authors_text: Yefei He,Luoming Zhang,Weijia Wu,Hong Zhou
title: Binarizing by Classification: Is soft function really necessary?
title_zh: 按分类二值化：软函数真的有必要吗？
comment: in IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (2023)
comments: in IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (2023)
abstract: Binary neural networks leverage $\mathrm{Sign}$ function to binarize weights and activations, which require gradient estimators to overcome its non-differentiability and will inevitably bring gradient errors during backpropagation. Although many hand-designed soft functions have been proposed as gradient estimators to better approximate gradients, their mechanism is not clear and there are still huge performance gaps between binary models and their full-precision counterparts. To address these issues and reduce gradient error, we propose to tackle network binarization as a binary classification problem and use a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) as the classifier in the forward pass and gradient estimator in the backward pass. Benefiting from the MLP's theoretical capability to fit any continuous function, it can be adaptively learned to binarize networks and backpropagate gradients without any prior knowledge of soft functions. From this perspective, we further empirically justify that even a simple linear function can outperform previous complex soft functions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method yields surprising performance both in image classification and human pose estimation tasks. Specifically, we achieve $65.7\%$ top-1 accuracy of ResNet-34 on ImageNet dataset, with an absolute improvement of $2.6\%$. Moreover, we take binarization as a lightweighting approach for pose estimation models and propose well-designed binary pose estimation networks SBPN and BHRNet. When evaluating on the challenging Microsoft COCO keypoint dataset, the proposed method enables binary networks to achieve a mAP of up to $60.6$ for the first time. Experiments conducted on real platforms demonstrate that BNN achieves a better balance between performance and computational complexity, especially when computational resources are extremely low.

Benefiting from the MLP's theoretical capability to fit any continuous function, it can be adaptively learned to binarize networks and backpropagate gradients without any prior knowledge of soft functions. From this perspective, we further empirically justify that even a simple linear function can outperform previous complex soft functions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method yields surprising performance both in image classification and human pose estimation tasks. Specifically, we achieve $65.7\%$ top-1 accuracy of ResNet-34 on ImageNet dataset, with an absolute improvement of $2.6\%$. Moreover, we take binarization as a lightweighting approach for pose estimation models and propose well-designed binary pose estimation networks SBPN and BHRNet. abstract_zh: 二元神经网络利用$\mathrm{Sign}$函数对权重和激活进行二值化，这需要梯度估计器克服其不可微性，并且在反向传播时不可避免地会带来梯度误差。尽管许多手工设计的软函数被提出作为梯度估计器以更好地逼近梯度，但它们的机制尚不清楚，并且二进制模型与其全精度模型之间仍然存在巨大的性能差距。为了解决这些问题并减少梯度误差，我们建议将网络二值化作为二元分类问题来解决，并使用多层感知器（MLP）作为前向传递中的分类器和后向传递中的梯度估计器。受益于 MLP 拟合任何连续函数的理论能力，它可以自适应地学习二值化网络和反向传播梯度，而无需任何软函数的先验知识。从这个角度来看，我们进一步凭经验证明，即使是简单的线性函数也可以优于以前的复杂软函数。大量的实验表明，所提出的方法在图像分类和人体姿势估计任务中都产生了令人惊讶的性能。具体来说，我们在 ImageNet 数据集上实现了 ResNet-34 的 $65.7\%$ top-1 准确率，绝对提高了 $2.6\%$。此外，我们将二值化作为姿态估计模型的轻量化方法，并提出了精心设计的二元姿态估计网络 SBPN 和 BHRNet。在评估具有挑战性的 Microsoft COCO 关键点数据集时，所提出的方法首次使二元网络能够实现高达 60.6 美元的 mAP。在真实平台上进行的实验表明，BNN 在性能和计算复杂度之间实现了更好的平衡，尤其是在计算资源极低的情况下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将网络二值化视为二分类问题，通过多层感知机（MLP）替代传统软函数进行梯度估计，以减少二值神经网络的梯度误差。
AI.motivation: 传统二值神经网络依赖软函数估计梯度，但其机制不明确且性能与全精度模型存在较大差距，需探索更有效的二值化方法。
AI.method: 将二值化作为分类问题，使用MLP在前向传播中进行二值化，在反向传播中作为梯度估计器，无需预设软函数即可自适应学习二值化过程。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，ResNet-34二值化模型达到65.7%的Top-1准确率（提升2.6%）；在COCO数据集上，二值化姿态估计网络首次达到60.6 mAP。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在极低计算资源下实现了性能与计算复杂度的良好平衡，证明了无需软函数的二值化方法的可行性与优越性。

authors_text: He Zhang,Bang Wu,Xingliang Yuan,Shirui Pan,Hanghang Tong,Jian Pei
title: Trustworthy Graph Neural Networks: Aspects, Methods and Trends
title_zh: 值得信赖的图神经网络：方面、方法和趋势
comment: 42 pages, 7 tables, 4 figures, double columns, accepted by Proceedings of the IEEE
comments: 42 pages, 7 tables, 4 figures, double columns, accepted by Proceedings of the IEEE
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have emerged as a series of competent graph learning methods for diverse real-world scenarios, ranging from daily applications like recommendation systems and question answering to cutting-edge technologies such as drug discovery in life sciences and n-body simulation in astrophysics. However, task performance is not the only requirement for GNNs. Performance-oriented GNNs have exhibited potential adverse effects like vulnerability to adversarial attacks, unexplainable discrimination against disadvantaged groups, or excessive resource consumption in edge computing environments. To avoid these unintentional harms, it is necessary to build competent GNNs characterised by trustworthiness. To this end, we propose a comprehensive roadmap to build trustworthy GNNs from the view of the various computing technologies involved. In this survey, we introduce basic concepts and comprehensively summarise existing efforts for trustworthy GNNs from six aspects, including robustness, explainability, privacy, fairness, accountability, and environmental well-being. Additionally, we highlight the intricate cross-aspect relations between the above six aspects of trustworthy GNNs. Finally, we present a thorough overview of trending directions for facilitating the research and industrialisation of trustworthy GNNs.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have emerged as a series of competent graph learning methods for diverse real-world scenarios, ranging from daily applications like recommendation systems and question answering to cutting-edge technologies such as drug discovery in life sciences and n-body simulation in astrophysics. However, task performance is not the only requirement for GNNs. Performance-oriented GNNs have exhibited potential adverse effects like vulnerability to adversarial attacks, unexplainable discrimination against disadvantaged groups, or excessive resource consumption in edge computing environments. To avoid these unintentional harms, it is necessary to build competent GNNs characterised by trustworthiness. To this end, we propose a comprehensive roadmap to build trustworthy GNNs from the view of the various computing technologies involved. In this survey, we introduce basic concepts and comprehensively summarise existing efforts for trustworthy GNNs from six aspects, including robustness, explainability, privacy, fairness, accountability, and environmental well-being. Additionally, we highlight the intricate cross-aspect relations between the above six aspects of trustworthy GNNs. Finally, we present a thorough overview of trending directions for facilitating the research and industrialisation of trustworthy GNNs.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络 (GNN) 已经成为一系列适用于各种现实场景的有效图学习方法，从推荐系统和问答等日常应用到生命科学中的药物发现和天体物理学中的 n 体模拟等尖端技术。然而，任务性能并不是 GNN 的唯一要求。以性能为导向的 GNN 表现出了潜在的不利影响，例如容易受到对抗性攻击、对弱势群体无法解释的歧视或边缘计算环境中的过度资源消耗。为了避免这些无意的伤害，有必要建立以可信为特征的强大的 GNN。为此，我们提出了一个全面的路线图，从涉及的各种计算技术的角度构建值得信赖的 GNN。在本次调查中，我们介绍了基本概念，并从鲁棒性、可解释性、隐私性、公平性、问责性和环境福祉六个方面全面总结了可信 GNN 的现有努力。此外，我们强调了可信 GNN 的上述六个方面之间复杂的跨方面关系。最后，我们全面概述了促进可信赖 GNN 的研究和产业化的趋势方向。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了可信图神经网络的六个关键方面、方法及未来趋势，旨在构建鲁棒、公平、隐私保护且环境友好的GNN模型。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN在性能优化的同时存在安全脆弱性、算法偏见、隐私泄露及资源消耗等问题，亟需系统性构建可信GNN框架以应对实际应用风险。
AI.method: 通过多维度交叉分析，系统梳理可信GNN在鲁棒性、可解释性、隐私保护、公平性、责任追溯及环境友好性六个核心维度的现有方法，揭示各维度间的耦合关系。
AI.result: 全面总结了可信GNN的六大核心方向研究进展，明确了各维度间的复杂关联，提出促进可信GNN研发与产业化的未来研究趋势。
AI.conclusion: 构建可信GNN需多维度技术协同，未来研究应注重跨维度优化与实际应用落地，推动GNN技术安全可控发展。

authors_text: Yang Liu,Xiaoqi Wang,Xi Wang,Zhen Wang,Jürgen Kurths
title: PrEF: Percolation-based Evolutionary Framework for the diffusion-source-localization problem in large networks
title_zh: PrEF：大型网络中扩散源定位问题的基于渗流的进化框架
abstract: We assume that the state of a number of nodes in a network could be investigated if necessary, and study what configuration of those nodes could facilitate a better solution for the diffusion-source-localization (DSL) problem. In particular, we formulate a candidate set which contains the diffusion source for sure, and propose the method, Percolation-based Evolutionary Framework (PrEF), to minimize such set. Hence one could further conduct more intensive investigation on only a few nodes to target the source. To achieve that, we first demonstrate that there are some similarities between the DSL problem and the network immunization problem. We find that the minimization of the candidate set is equivalent to the minimization of the order parameter if we view the observer set as the removal node set. Hence, PrEF is developed based on the network percolation and evolutionary algorithm. The effectiveness of the proposed method is validated on both model and empirical networks in regard to varied circumstances. Our results show that the developed approach could achieve a much smaller candidate set compared to the state of the art in almost all cases. Meanwhile, our approach is also more stable, i.e., it has similar performance irrespective of varied infection probabilities, diffusion models, and outbreak ranges. More importantly, our approach might provide a new framework to tackle the DSL problem in extreme large networks.
summary: We assume that the state of a number of nodes in a network could be investigated if necessary, and study what configuration of those nodes could facilitate a better solution for the diffusion-source-localization (DSL) problem. In particular, we formulate a candidate set which contains the diffusion source for sure, and propose the method, Percolation-based Evolutionary Framework (PrEF), to minimize such set. Hence one could further conduct more intensive investigation on only a few nodes to target the source. To achieve that, we first demonstrate that there are some similarities between the DSL problem and the network immunization problem. We find that the minimization of the candidate set is equivalent to the minimization of the order parameter if we view the observer set as the removal node set. Hence, PrEF is developed based on the network percolation and evolutionary algorithm. The effectiveness of the proposed method is validated on both model and empirical networks in regard to varied circumstances. Our results show that the developed approach could achieve a much smaller candidate set compared to the state of the art in almost all cases. Meanwhile, our approach is also more stable, i.e., it has similar performance irrespective of varied infection probabilities, diffusion models, and outbreak ranges. More importantly, our approach might provide a new framework to tackle the DSL problem in extreme large networks.
abstract_zh: 我们假设如有必要，可以调查网络中多个节点的状态，并研究这些节点的哪些配置可以促进更好地解决扩散源定位（DSL）问题。特别是，我们制定了一个肯定包含扩散源的候选集，并提出了基于渗滤的进化框架（PrEF）的方法来最小化该集。因此，我们可以进一步对少数几个节点进行更深入的调查，以锁定源头。为了实现这一点，我们首先证明 DSL 问题和网络免疫问题之间存在一些相似之处。我们发现，如果将观察者集视为移除节点集，则候选集的最小化相当于顺序参数的最小化。因此，PrEF是基于网络渗透和进化算法开发的。该方法的有效性在模型和经验网络上针对不同情况进行了验证。我们的结果表明，在几乎所有情况下，与现有技术相比，所开发的方法可以获得更小的候选集。同时，我们的方法也更加稳定，即，无论感染概率、扩散模型和爆发范围如何变化，它都具有相似的性能。更重要的是，我们的方法可能提供一个新的框架来解决超大型网络中的 DSL 问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于渗流理论的进化框架PrEF，用于在大规模网络中解决扩散源定位问题，通过最小化候选节点集以高效定位扩散源。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散源定位方法在大规模网络中效率低且稳定性差，需寻找更优的节点配置策略以缩小候选集并提高定位准确性。
AI.method: 将扩散源定位问题与网络免疫问题类比，基于渗流理论和进化算法设计PrEF框架，通过优化观测节点集最小化候选集规模。
AI.result: PrEF在多种模型网络和现实网络中均显著缩小候选集规模，且在不同感染概率、扩散模型和爆发范围下表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: PrEF为大规模网络的扩散源定位提供了新框架，兼具高效性与稳定性，可推广至其他复杂网络分析任务。

authors_text: Dening Lu,Qian Xie,Mingqiang Wei,Kyle Gao,Linlin Xu,Jonathan Li
title: Transformers in 3D Point Clouds: A Survey
title_zh: 3D 点云中的变形金刚：调查
comment: 20 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables
comments: 20 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables
abstract: Transformers have been at the heart of the Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Computer Vision (CV) revolutions. The significant success in NLP and CV inspired exploring the use of Transformers in point cloud processing. However, how do Transformers cope with the irregularity and unordered nature of point clouds? How suitable are Transformers for different 3D representations (e.g., point- or voxel-based)? How competent are Transformers for various 3D processing tasks? As of now, there is still no systematic survey of the research on these issues. For the first time, we provided a comprehensive overview of increasingly popular Transformers for 3D point cloud analysis. We start by introducing the theory of the Transformer architecture and reviewing its applications in 2D/3D fields. Then, we present three different taxonomies (i.e., implementation-, data representation-, and task-based), which can classify current Transformer-based methods from multiple perspectives. Furthermore, we present the results of an investigation of the variants and improvements of the self-attention mechanism in 3D. To demonstrate the superiority of Transformers in point cloud analysis, we present comprehensive comparisons of various Transformer-based methods for classification, segmentation, and object detection. Finally, we suggest three potential research directions, providing benefit references for the development of 3D Transformers.
summary: Transformers have been at the heart of the Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Computer Vision (CV) revolutions. The significant success in NLP and CV inspired exploring the use of Transformers in point cloud processing. However, how do Transformers cope with the irregularity and unordered nature of point clouds? How suitable are Transformers for different 3D representations (e.g., point- or voxel-based)? How competent are Transformers for various 3D processing tasks? As of now, there is still no systematic survey of the research on these issues. For the first time, we provided a comprehensive overview of increasingly popular Transformers for 3D point cloud analysis. We start by introducing the theory of the Transformer architecture and reviewing its applications in 2D/3D fields. Then, we present three different taxonomies (i.e., implementation-, data representation-, and task-based), which can classify current Transformer-based methods from multiple perspectives. Furthermore, we present the results of an investigation of the variants and improvements of the self-attention mechanism in 3D. To demonstrate the superiority of Transformers in point cloud analysis, we present comprehensive comparisons of various Transformer-based methods for classification, segmentation, and object detection. Finally, we suggest three potential research directions, providing benefit references for the development of 3D Transformers.
abstract_zh: Transformer 一直是自然语言处理 (NLP) 和计算机视觉 (CV) 革命的核心。 NLP 和 CV 领域的巨大成功激发了我们探索 Transformer 在点云处理中的使用。然而，Transformers 如何应对点云的不规则性和无序性呢？ Transformer 对于不同的 3D 表示（例如，基于点或体素）有多合适？ Transformer 执行各种 3D 处理任务的能力如何？截至目前，对于这些问题的研究还没有系统的综述。我们首次全面概述了日益流行的用于 3D 点云分析的 Transformer。我们首先介绍 Transformer 架构的理论并回顾其在 2D/3D 领域的应用。然后，我们提出了三种不同的分类法（即基于实现、数据表示和基于任务），它们可以从多个角度对当前基于 Transformer 的方法进行分类。此外，我们还展示了 3D 自注意力机制的变体和改进的研究结果。为了证明 Transformer 在点云分析方面的优越性，我们对各种基于 Transformer 的分类、分割和目标检测方法进行了全面比较。最后，我们提出了三个潜在的研究方向，为3D Transformers的发展提供有益参考。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了Transformer在3D点云分析中的应用，探讨其处理不规则性和无序性数据的能力，并分类比较了不同方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在NLP和CV领域取得成功，但其在3D点云处理中的适用性、数据表示方式及任务效果尚缺乏系统性总结。
AI.method: 通过介绍Transformer理论，构建三类分类体系（实现方式、数据表示、任务类型），分析自注意力机制改进，并对比多种方法在分类、分割等任务中的性能。
AI.result: 总结了当前Transformer在点云处理中的主要方法，揭示了不同变体的优劣，并提出了三个未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: Transformer在3D点云分析中展现潜力，但需进一步优化数据表示和计算效率，以推动其更广泛应用。

authors_text: Harideep Nair,Prabhu Vellaisamy,Santha Bhasuthkar,John Paul Shen
title: TNN7: A Custom Macro Suite for Implementing Highly Optimized Designs of Neuromorphic TNNs
title_zh: TNN7：用于实现高度优化的神经形态 TNN 设计的自定义宏套件
comment: To be published in ISVLSI 2022
comments: To be published in ISVLSI 2022
abstract: Temporal Neural Networks (TNNs), inspired from the mammalian neocortex, exhibit energy-efficient online sensory processing capabilities. Recent works have proposed a microarchitecture framework for implementing TNNs and demonstrated competitive performance on vision and time-series applications. Building on these previous works, this work proposes TNN7, a suite of nine highly optimized custom macros developed using a predictive 7nm Process Design Kit (PDK), to enhance the efficiency, modularity and flexibility of the TNN design framework. TNN prototypes for two applications are used for evaluation of TNN7. An unsupervised time-series clustering TNN delivering competitive performance can be implemented within 40 uW power and 0.05 mm^2 area, while a 4-layer TNN that achieves an MNIST error rate of 1% consumes only 18 mW and 24.63 mm^2. On average, the proposed macros reduce power, delay, area, and energy-delay product by 14%, 16%, 28%, and 45%, respectively. Furthermore, employing TNN7 significantly reduces the synthesis runtime of TNN designs (by more than 3x), allowing for highly-scaled TNN implementations to be realized.
summary: Temporal Neural Networks (TNNs), inspired from the mammalian neocortex, exhibit energy-efficient online sensory processing capabilities. Recent works have proposed a microarchitecture framework for implementing TNNs and demonstrated competitive performance on vision and time-series applications. Building on these previous works, this work proposes TNN7, a suite of nine highly optimized custom macros developed using a predictive 7nm Process Design Kit (PDK), to enhance the efficiency, modularity and flexibility of the TNN design framework. TNN prototypes for two applications are used for evaluation of TNN7. An unsupervised time-series clustering TNN delivering competitive performance can be implemented within 40 uW power and 0.05 mm^2 area, while a 4-layer TNN that achieves an MNIST error rate of 1% consumes only 18 mW and 24.63 mm^2. On average, the proposed macros reduce power, delay, area, and energy-delay product by 14%, 16%, 28%, and 45%, respectively. Furthermore, employing TNN7 significantly reduces the synthesis runtime of TNN designs (by more than 3x), allowing for highly-scaled TNN implementations to be realized.
abstract_zh: 受哺乳动物新皮质启发的时序神经网络 (TNN) 展现出高效节能的在线感觉处理能力。最近的工作提出了一种用于实现 TNN 的微架构框架，并展示了在视觉和时间序列应用上的竞争性能。在这些先前工作的基础上，这项工作提出了 TNN7，这是一套使用预测性 7nm 工艺设计套件 (PDK) 开发的九个高度优化的自定义宏，旨在提高 TNN 设计框架的效率、模块化性和灵活性。两个应用程序的 TNN 原型用于评估 TNN7。提供具有竞争力性能的无监督时间序列聚类 TNN 可以在 40 uW 功率和 0.05 mm^2 面积内实现，而实现 1% MNIST 错误率的 4 层 TNN 仅消耗 18 mW 和 24.63 mm^2。平均而言，所提出的宏将功率、延迟、面积和能量延迟乘积分别降低了 14%、16%、28% 和 45%。此外，采用 TNN7 显着减少了 TNN 设计的综合运行时间（减少了 3 倍以上），从而实现了大规模的 TNN 实现。

AI.motivation: 现有TNN微架构框架在能效、模块化和灵活性方面存在不足，需通过定制化设计进一步优化。
AI.method: 开发九个高度优化的定制宏模块，基于预测性7nm PDK实现，并在时序聚类和MNIST分类任务中验证性能。
AI.result: 平均降低功耗14%、延迟16%、面积28%、能量延迟积45%，并使综合运行时长缩短3倍以上。
AI.conclusion: TNN7显著提升TNN设计效率，为大规模神经形态计算提供可行方案。

authors_text: Stephen Whitelam,Viktor Selin,Ian Benlolo,Corneel Casert,Isaac Tamblyn
title: Training neural networks using Metropolis Monte Carlo and an adaptive variant
title_zh: 使用 Metropolis Monte Carlo 和自适应变体训练神经网络
abstract: We examine the zero-temperature Metropolis Monte Carlo algorithm as a tool for training a neural network by minimizing a loss function. We find that, as expected on theoretical grounds and shown empirically by other authors, Metropolis Monte Carlo can train a neural net with an accuracy comparable to that of gradient descent, if not necessarily as quickly. The Metropolis algorithm does not fail automatically when the number of parameters of a neural network is large. It can fail when a neural network's structure or neuron activations are strongly heterogenous, and we introduce an adaptive Monte Carlo algorithm, aMC, to overcome these limitations. The intrinsic stochasticity and numerical stability of the Monte Carlo method allow aMC to train deep neural networks and recurrent neural networks in which the gradient is too small or too large to allow training by gradient descent. Monte Carlo methods offer a complement to gradient-based methods for training neural networks, allowing access to a distinct set of network architectures and principles.
summary: We examine the zero-temperature Metropolis Monte Carlo algorithm as a tool for training a neural network by minimizing a loss function. We find that, as expected on theoretical grounds and shown empirically by other authors, Metropolis Monte Carlo can train a neural net with an accuracy comparable to that of gradient descent, if not necessarily as quickly. The Metropolis algorithm does not fail automatically when the number of parameters of a neural network is large. It can fail when a neural network's structure or neuron activations are strongly heterogenous, and we introduce an adaptive Monte Carlo algorithm, aMC, to overcome these limitations. The intrinsic stochasticity and numerical stability of the Monte Carlo method allow aMC to train deep neural networks and recurrent neural networks in which the gradient is too small or too large to allow training by gradient descent. Monte Carlo methods offer a complement to gradient-based methods for training neural networks, allowing access to a distinct set of network architectures and principles.
abstract_zh: 我们研究零温大都会蒙特卡罗算法作为通过最小化损失函数来训练神经网络的工具。我们发现，正如理论基础上的预期和其他作者的经验表明的那样，Metropolis Monte Carlo 可以以与梯度下降相当的精度训练神经网络，尽管不一定那么快。当神经网络的参数数量很大时，Metropolis 算法不会自动失败。当神经网络的结构或神经元激活具有很强的异质性时，它可能会失败，我们引入了自适应蒙特卡罗算法 aMC 来克服这些限制。蒙特卡罗方法的内在随机性和数值稳定性允许 aMC 训练深度神经网络和循环神经网络，其中梯度太小或太大而不允许通过梯度下降进行训练。蒙特卡罗方法为训练神经网络的基于梯度的方法提供了补充，允许访问一组不同的网络架构和原理。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用Metropolis蒙特卡洛算法及其自适应变体训练神经网络的方法，作为梯度下降的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 传统梯度下降方法在处理梯度消失/爆炸或异质网络结构时存在局限性，需探索新训练方法。
AI.method: 采用零温度Metropolis蒙特卡洛算法并提出自适应变体aMC，通过随机采样和参数调整优化神经网络。
AI.result: Metropolis方法可达到与梯度下降相当的准确率，aMC能有效训练梯度下降难以处理的深度/循环网络。
AI.conclusion: 蒙特卡洛方法为神经网络训练提供了梯度下降的补充方案，适用于更广泛的网络架构和训练场景。

authors_text: Li Yan,Pengcheng Wei,Hong Xie,Jicheng Dai,Hao Wu,Ming Huang
title: A New Outlier Removal Strategy Based on Reliability of Correspondence Graph for Fast Point Cloud Registration
title_zh: 一种基于对应图可靠性的快速点云配准异常值去除策略
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Registration is a basic yet crucial task in point cloud processing. In correspondence-based point cloud registration, matching correspondences by point feature techniques may lead to an extremely high outlier ratio. Current methods still suffer from low efficiency, accuracy, and recall rate. We use a simple and intuitive method to describe the 6-DOF (degree of freedom) curtailment process in point cloud registration and propose an outlier removal strategy based on the reliability of the correspondence graph. The method constructs the corresponding graph according to the given correspondences and designs the concept of the reliability degree of the graph node for optimal candidate selection and the reliability degree of the graph edge to obtain the global maximum consensus set. The presented method could achieve fast and accurate outliers removal along with gradual aligning parameters estimation. Extensive experiments on simulations and challenging real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed method can still perform effective point cloud registration even the correspondence outlier ratio is over 99%, and the efficiency is better than the state-of-the-art. Code is available at https://github.com/WPC-WHU/GROR.
summary: Registration is a basic yet crucial task in point cloud processing. In correspondence-based point cloud registration, matching correspondences by point feature techniques may lead to an extremely high outlier ratio. Current methods still suffer from low efficiency, accuracy, and recall rate. We use a simple and intuitive method to describe the 6-DOF (degree of freedom) curtailment process in point cloud registration and propose an outlier removal strategy based on the reliability of the correspondence graph. The method constructs the corresponding graph according to the given correspondences and designs the concept of the reliability degree of the graph node for optimal candidate selection and the reliability degree of the graph edge to obtain the global maximum consensus set. The presented method could achieve fast and accurate outliers removal along with gradual aligning parameters estimation. Extensive experiments on simulations and challenging real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed method can still perform effective point cloud registration even the correspondence outlier ratio is over 99%, and the efficiency is better than the state-of-the-art. Code is available at https://github.com/WPC-WHU/GROR.
abstract_zh: 配准是点云处理中的一项基本但关键的任务。在基于对应关系的点云配准中，通过点特征技术匹配对应关系可能会导致极高的异常值比率。目前的方法仍然存在效率、准确性和召回率较低的问题。我们使用一种简单直观的方法来描述点云配准中的6-DOF（自由度）缩减过程，并提出一种基于对应图可靠性的异常值去除策略。该方法根据给定的对应关系构造相应的图，并设计最优候选选择的图节点的可靠度和图边的可靠度的概念，以获得全局最大共识集。所提出的方法可以实现快速准确的异常值去除以及逐步对准参数估计。对模拟和具有挑战性的现实数据集的大量实验表明，即使对应异常值比率超过 99％，所提出的方法仍然可以执行有效的点云配准，并且效率优于最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/WPC-WHU/GROR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对应图可靠性度的新异常值去除策略，用于快速点云配准。
AI.motivation: 在基于对应关系的点云配准中，使用点特征技术匹配对应关系可能导致异常值比例极高，现有方法在效率、准确性和召回率方面仍存在不足。
AI.method: 该方法通过构建对应图并设计图节点和边的可靠性度，选择最优候选并获得全局最大共识集，实现快速而准确的异常值去除和渐进参数估计。
AI.result: 在仿真和具有挑战性的现实数据集上进行了大量实验，表明该方法即使在对应关系异常值比例超过99%的情况下，仍能有效进行点云配准，且效率优于最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在点云配准任务中表现出色，尤其在高异常值比例的情况下，具有更高的效率和准确性。

method: 该方法通过构建对应图并设计图节点和边的可靠性度，选择最优候选并获得全局最大共识集，实现快速而准确的异常值去除和渐进参数估计。
result: 在仿真和具有挑战性的现实数据集上进行了大量实验，表明该方法即使在对应关系异常值比例超过99%的情况下，仍能有效进行点云配准，且效率优于最先进的方法。
conclusion: 本文提出的方法在点云配准任务中表现出色，尤其在高异常值比例的情况下，具有更高的效率和准确性。
search_text: A New Outlier Removal Strategy Based on Reliability of Correspondence Graph for Fast Point Cloud Registration 一种基于对应图可靠性的快速点云配准异常值去除策略 Registration is a basic yet crucial task in point cloud processing. In correspondence-based point cloud registration, matching correspondences by point feature techniques may lead to an extremely high outlier ratio. Current methods still suffer from low efficiency, accuracy, and recall rate. We use a simple and intuitive method to describe the 6-DOF (degree of freedom) curtailment process in point cloud registration and propose an outlier removal strategy based on the reliability of the correspondence graph. The method constructs the corresponding graph according to the given correspondences and designs the concept of the reliability degree of the graph node for optimal candidate selection and the reliability degree of the graph edge to obtain the global maximum consensus set. The presented method could achieve fast and accurate outliers removal along with gradual aligning parameters estimation. Extensive experiments on simulations and challenging real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed method can still perform effective point cloud registration even the correspondence outlier ratio is over 99%, and the efficiency is better than the state-of-the-art. Code is available at https://github.com/WPC-WHU/GROR. 配准是点云处理中的一项基本但关键的任务。在基于对应关系的点云配准中，通过点特征技术匹配对应关系可能会导致极高的异常值比率。目前的方法仍然存在效率、准确性和召回率较低的问题。我们使用一种简单直观的方法来描述点云配准中的6-DOF（自由度）缩减过程，并提出一种基于对应图可靠性的异常值去除策略。该方法根据给定的对应关系构造相应的图，并设计最优候选选择的图节点的可靠度和图边的可靠度的概念，以获得全局最大共识集。所提出的方法可以实现快速准确的异常值去除以及逐步对准参数估计。对模拟和具有挑战性的现实数据集的大量实验表明，即使对应异常值比率超过 99％，所提出的方法仍然可以执行有效的点云配准，并且效率优于最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/WPC-WHU/GROR 获取。 本文提出了一种基于对应图可靠性度的新异常值去除策略，用于快速点云配准。 Li Yan,Pengcheng Wei,Hong Xie,Jicheng Dai,Hao Wu,Ming Huang cs.CV

authors_text: Guangsheng Shi,Ruifeng Li,Chao Ma
title: PillarNet: Real-Time and High-Performance Pillar-based 3D Object Detection
title_zh: PillarNet：基于 Pillar 的实时高性能 3D 对象检测
comment: ECCV 2022
comments: ECCV 2022
abstract: Real-time and high-performance 3D object detection is of critical importance for autonomous driving. Recent top-performing 3D object detectors mainly rely on point-based or 3D voxel-based convolutions, which are both computationally inefficient for onboard deployment. In contrast, pillar-based methods use solely 2D convolutions, which consume less computation resources, but they lag far behind their voxel-based counterparts in detection accuracy. In this paper, by examining the primary performance gap between pillar- and voxel-based detectors, we develop a real-time and high-performance pillar-based detector, dubbed PillarNet.The proposed PillarNet consists of a powerful encoder network for effective pillar feature learning, a neck network for spatial-semantic feature fusion and the commonly used detect head. Using only 2D convolutions, PillarNet is flexible to an optional pillar size and compatible with classical 2D CNN backbones, such as VGGNet and ResNet. Additionally, PillarNet benefits from our designed orientation-decoupled IoU regression loss along with the IoU-aware prediction branch. Extensive experimental results on the large-scale nuScenes Dataset and Waymo Open Dataset demonstrate that the proposed PillarNet performs well over state-of-the-art 3D detectors in terms of effectiveness and efficiency. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/agent-sgs/PillarNet}.
summary: Real-time and high-performance 3D object detection is of critical importance for autonomous driving. Recent top-performing 3D object detectors mainly rely on point-based or 3D voxel-based convolutions, which are both computationally inefficient for onboard deployment. In contrast, pillar-based methods use solely 2D convolutions, which consume less computation resources, but they lag far behind their voxel-based counterparts in detection accuracy. In this paper, by examining the primary performance gap between pillar- and voxel-based detectors, we develop a real-time and high-performance pillar-based detector, dubbed PillarNet.The proposed PillarNet consists of a powerful encoder network for effective pillar feature learning, a neck network for spatial-semantic feature fusion and the commonly used detect head. Using only 2D convolutions, PillarNet is flexible to an optional pillar size and compatible with classical 2D CNN backbones, such as VGGNet and ResNet. Additionally, PillarNet benefits from our designed orientation-decoupled IoU regression loss along with the IoU-aware prediction branch. Extensive experimental results on the large-scale nuScenes Dataset and Waymo Open Dataset demonstrate that the proposed PillarNet performs well over state-of-the-art 3D detectors in terms of effectiveness and efficiency. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/agent-sgs/PillarNet}.
abstract_zh: 实时、高性能的 3D 物体检测对于自动驾驶至关重要。最近性能最好的 3D 物体检测器主要依赖于基于点或基于 3D 体素的卷积，这对于机载部署而言计算效率较低。相比之下，基于柱的方法仅使用 2D 卷积，消耗的计算资源较少，但在检测精度方面远远落后于基于体素的方法。在本文中，通过检查基于柱子和基于体素的检测器之间的主要性能差距，我们开发了一种实时高性能的基于柱子的检测器，称为 PillarNet。所提出的 PillarNet 由用于有效柱子特征学习的强大编码器网络、用于空间语义特征融合的颈部网络和常用的检测头组成。 PillarNet 仅使用 2D 卷积，可灵活选择可选的支柱大小，并与经典 2D CNN 主干网（例如 VGGNet 和 ResNet）兼容。此外，PillarNet 受益于我们设计的方向解耦 IoU 回归损失以及 IoU 感知预测分支。在大规模 nuScenes 数据集和 Waymo 开放数据集上的大量实验结果表明，所提出的 PillarNet 在有效性和效率方面优于最先进的 3D 检测器。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/agent-sgs/PillarNet} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于柱体的实时高效3D目标检测方法PillarNet，旨在解决现有方法在计算效率与检测精度之间的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 现有基于点云或3D体素的检测方法计算效率低，而基于柱体的方法虽计算高效但精度不足，需在实时性与准确性之间找到平衡。
AI.method: 设计包含强大编码器网络（学习柱体特征）、颈部网络（融合空间语义特征）和检测头的PillarNet架构，结合方向解耦的IoU回归损失及感知分支，并兼容VGGNet/ResNet等经典2D CNN主干网络。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和Waymo Open Dataset上实验表明，PillarNet在保持实时性的同时，在检测效果和计算效率上优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: PillarNet通过优化柱体特征学习与损失函数设计，成功实现了高精度与低计算量的3D目标检测，为自动驾驶场景提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Navid Anjum Aadit,Andrea Grimaldi,Giovanni Finocchio,Kerem Y. Camsari
title: Physics-inspired Ising Computing with Ring Oscillator Activated p-bits
title_zh: 具有环形振荡器激活 p 位的物理启发伊辛计算
comment: To appear in the 22nd IEEE International Conference on Nanotechnology (IEEE-NANO 2022)
comments: To appear in the 22nd IEEE International Conference on Nanotechnology (IEEE-NANO 2022)
abstract: The nearing end of Moore's Law has been driving the development of domain-specific hardware tailored to solve a special set of problems. Along these lines, probabilistic computing with inherently stochastic building blocks (p-bits) have shown significant promise, particularly in the context of hard optimization and statistical sampling problems. p-bits have been proposed and demonstrated in different hardware substrates ranging from small-scale stochastic magnetic tunnel junctions (sMTJs) in asynchronous architectures to large-scale CMOS in synchronous architectures. Here, we design and implement a truly asynchronous and medium-scale p-computer (with $\approx$ 800 p-bits) that closely emulates the asynchronous dynamics of sMTJs in Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs). Using hard instances of the planted Ising glass problem on the Chimera lattice, we evaluate the performance of the asynchronous architecture against an ideal, synchronous design that performs parallelized (chromatic) exact Gibbs sampling. We find that despite the lack of any careful synchronization, the asynchronous design achieves parallelism with comparable algorithmic scaling in the ideal, carefully tuned and parallelized synchronous design. Our results highlight the promise of massively scaled p-computers with millions of free-running p-bits made out of nanoscale building blocks such as stochastic magnetic tunnel junctions.
summary: The nearing end of Moore's Law has been driving the development of domain-specific hardware tailored to solve a special set of problems. Along these lines, probabilistic computing with inherently stochastic building blocks (p-bits) have shown significant promise, particularly in the context of hard optimization and statistical sampling problems. p-bits have been proposed and demonstrated in different hardware substrates ranging from small-scale stochastic magnetic tunnel junctions (sMTJs) in asynchronous architectures to large-scale CMOS in synchronous architectures. Here, we design and implement a truly asynchronous and medium-scale p-computer (with $\approx$ 800 p-bits) that closely emulates the asynchronous dynamics of sMTJs in Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs). Using hard instances of the planted Ising glass problem on the Chimera lattice, we evaluate the performance of the asynchronous architecture against an ideal, synchronous design that performs parallelized (chromatic) exact Gibbs sampling. We find that despite the lack of any careful synchronization, the asynchronous design achieves parallelism with comparable algorithmic scaling in the ideal, carefully tuned and parallelized synchronous design. Our results highlight the promise of massively scaled p-computers with millions of free-running p-bits made out of nanoscale building blocks such as stochastic magnetic tunnel junctions.
abstract_zh: 摩尔定律的即将结束一直在推动特定领域硬件的发展，这些硬件是为解决一系列特殊问题而定制的。沿着这些思路，具有固有随机构建块（p 位）的概率计算已经显示出巨大的前景，特别是在硬优化和统计采样问题的背景下。 p位已在不同的硬件基板中被提出并得到演示，范围从异步架构中的小规模随机磁隧道结（sMTJ）到同步架构中的大规模CMOS。在这里，我们设计并实现了真正的异步中型 p 计算机（大约 800 p 位），它紧密模拟现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 中 sMTJ 的异步动态。使用 Chimera 晶格上种植伊辛玻璃问题的硬实例，我们根据执行并行（彩色）精确吉布斯采样的理想同步设计来评估异步架构的性能。我们发现，尽管缺乏任何仔细的同步，异步设计在理想的、仔细调整和并行化的同步设计中实现了具有可比算法缩放的并行性。我们的结果凸显了大规模 p 计算机的前景，该计算机具有数百万个自由运行的 p 位，由随机磁隧道结等纳米级构建块制成。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一个基于异步动态的中等规模p计算机，用于解决Ising玻璃优化问题，并评估其性能。
AI.motivation: 摩尔定律接近极限推动领域专用硬件发展，概率计算（p-bits）在优化问题中展现潜力，但需探索异步架构的可行性。
AI.method: 在FPGA中构建异步p计算机（约800 p-bits），模拟sMTJs的异步动态，并在Chimera晶格的Ising问题实例上与同步Gibbs采样对比。
AI.result: 异步设计在无同步机制下实现了与同步设计相当的算法扩展性，验证了其并行计算潜力。
AI.conclusion: 异步架构的大规模p计算机有望通过纳米级器件（如sMTJs）实现高效优化计算。

Using hard instances of the planted Ising glass problem on the Chimera lattice, we evaluate the performance of the asynchronous architecture against an ideal, synchronous design that performs parallelized (chromatic) exact Gibbs sampling. We find that despite the lack of any careful synchronization, the asynchronous design achieves parallelism with comparable algorithmic scaling in the ideal, carefully tuned and parallelized synchronous design. Our results highlight the promise of massively scaled p-computers with millions of free-running p-bits made out of nanoscale building blocks such as stochastic magnetic tunnel junctions. 摩尔定律的即将结束一直在推动特定领域硬件的发展，这些硬件是为解决一系列特殊问题而定制的。沿着这些思路，具有固有随机构建块（p 位）的概率计算已经显示出巨大的前景，特别是在硬优化和统计采样问题的背景下。 p位已在不同的硬件基板中被提出并得到演示，范围从异步架构中的小规模随机磁隧道结（sMTJ）到同步架构中的大规模CMOS。在这里，我们设计并实现了真正的异步中型 p 计算机（大约 800 p 位），它紧密模拟现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 中 sMTJ 的异步动态。使用 Chimera 晶格上种植伊辛玻璃问题的硬实例，我们根据执行并行（彩色）精确吉布斯采样的理想同步设计来评估异步架构的性能。我们发现，尽管缺乏任何仔细的同步，异步设计在理想的、仔细调整和并行化的同步设计中实现了具有可比算法缩放的并行性。我们的结果凸显了大规模 p 计算机的前景，该计算机具有数百万个自由运行的 p 位，由随机磁隧道结等纳米级构建块制成。 本文设计并实现了一个基于异步动态的中等规模p计算机，用于解决Ising玻璃优化问题，并评估其性能。 Navid Anjum Aadit,Andrea Grimaldi,Giovanni Finocchio,Kerem Y. Camsari cs.AR,cs.DC,cs.ET,cs.NE,physics.comp-ph

authors_text: Sean I. Young,Yaël Balbastre,Adrian V. Dalca,William M. Wells,Juan Eugenio Iglesias,Bruce Fischl
title: SuperWarp: Supervised Learning and Warping on U-Net for Invariant Subvoxel-Precise Registration
title_zh: SuperWarp：U-Net 上的监督学习和变形以实现不变子体素精确配准
abstract: In recent years, learning-based image registration methods have gradually moved away from direct supervision with target warps to instead use self-supervision, with excellent results in several registration benchmarks. These approaches utilize a loss function that penalizes the intensity differences between the fixed and moving images, along with a suitable regularizer on the deformation. In this paper, we argue that the relative failure of supervised registration approaches can in part be blamed on the use of regular U-Nets, which are jointly tasked with feature extraction, feature matching, and estimation of deformation. We introduce one simple but crucial modification to the U-Net that disentangles feature extraction and matching from deformation prediction, allowing the U-Net to warp the features, across levels, as the deformation field is evolved. With this modification, direct supervision using target warps begins to outperform self-supervision approaches that require segmentations, presenting new directions for registration when images do not have segmentations. We hope that our findings in this preliminary workshop paper will re-ignite research interest in supervised image registration techniques. Our code is publicly available from https://github.com/balbasty/superwarp.
summary: In recent years, learning-based image registration methods have gradually moved away from direct supervision with target warps to instead use self-supervision, with excellent results in several registration benchmarks. These approaches utilize a loss function that penalizes the intensity differences between the fixed and moving images, along with a suitable regularizer on the deformation. In this paper, we argue that the relative failure of supervised registration approaches can in part be blamed on the use of regular U-Nets, which are jointly tasked with feature extraction, feature matching, and estimation of deformation. We introduce one simple but crucial modification to the U-Net that disentangles feature extraction and matching from deformation prediction, allowing the U-Net to warp the features, across levels, as the deformation field is evolved. With this modification, direct supervision using target warps begins to outperform self-supervision approaches that require segmentations, presenting new directions for registration when images do not have segmentations. We hope that our findings in this preliminary workshop paper will re-ignite research interest in supervised image registration techniques. Our code is publicly available from https://github.com/balbasty/superwarp.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于学习的图像配准方法逐渐从使用目标扭曲的直接监督转而使用自监督，并在多个配准基准中取得了优异的结果。这些方法利用损失函数来惩罚固定图像和移动图像之间的强度差异，以及合适的变形正则化器。在本文中，我们认为监督配准方法的相对失败可以部分归咎于常规 U-Net 的使用，这些网络共同承担特征提取、特征匹配和变形估计的任务。我们对 U-Net 进行了一项简单但至关重要的修改，它将特征提取和匹配与变形预测分开，允许 U-Net 随着变形场的演化而跨级别扭曲特征。通过这种修改，使用目标扭曲的直接监督开始优于需要分割的自监督方法，为图像没有分割时的配准提供了新的方向。我们希望我们在这篇初步研讨会论文中的发现能够重新激发人们对监督图像配准技术的研究兴趣。我们的代码可从 https://github.com/balbasty/superwarp 公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的U-Net结构，通过监督学习和形变方法实现亚体素级精确的图像配准。
AI.motivation: 传统监督图像配准方法因U-Net同时处理特征提取与形变估计而效果不佳，需解耦这两个任务以提升性能。
AI.method: 修改U-Net结构，将特征提取与匹配解耦于形变预测，允许跨层级特征形变以适应演化中的形变场。
AI.result: 直接监督方法在无需分割信息的情况下优于自监督方法，为无分割图像配准提供新方向。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明监督学习在图像配准中的潜力，期望重新激发相关研究，代码已开源。

authors_text: Gagandeep Singh,Rakesh Nadig,Jisung Park,Rahul Bera,Nastaran Hajinazar,David Novo,Juan Gómez-Luna,Sander Stuijk,Henk Corporaal,Onur Mutlu
title: Sibyl: Adaptive and Extensible Data Placement in Hybrid Storage Systems Using Online Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: Sibyl：使用在线强化学习在混合存储系统中进行自适应和可扩展的数据放置
abstract: Hybrid storage systems (HSS) use multiple different storage devices to provide high and scalable storage capacity at high performance. Recent research proposes various techniques that aim to accurately identify performance-critical data to place it in a "best-fit" storage device. Unfortunately, most of these techniques are rigid, which (1) limits their adaptivity to perform well for a wide range of workloads and storage device configurations, and (2) makes it difficult for designers to extend these techniques to different storage system configurations (e.g., with a different number or different types of storage devices) than the configuration they are designed for. We introduce Sibyl, the first technique that uses reinforcement learning for data placement in hybrid storage systems. Sibyl observes different features of the running workload as well as the storage devices to make system-aware data placement decisions. For every decision it makes, Sibyl receives a reward from the system that it uses to evaluate the long-term performance impact of its decision and continuously optimizes its data placement policy online. We implement Sibyl on real systems with various HSS configurations. Our results show that Sibyl provides 21.6%/19.9% performance improvement in a performance-oriented/cost-oriented HSS configuration compared to the best previous data placement technique. Our evaluation using an HSS configuration with three different storage devices shows that Sibyl outperforms the state-of-the-art data placement policy by 23.9%-48.2%, while significantly reducing the system architect's burden in designing a data placement mechanism that can simultaneously incorporate three storage devices. We show that Sibyl achieves 80% of the performance of an oracle policy that has complete knowledge of future access patterns while incurring a very modest storage overhead of only 124.4 KiB.
summary: Hybrid storage systems (HSS) use multiple different storage devices to provide high and scalable storage capacity at high performance. Recent research proposes various techniques that aim to accurately identify performance-critical data to place it in a "best-fit" storage device. Unfortunately, most of these techniques are rigid, which (1) limits their adaptivity to perform well for a wide range of workloads and storage device configurations, and (2) makes it difficult for designers to extend these techniques to different storage system configurations (e.g., with a different number or different types of storage devices) than the configuration they are designed for. We introduce Sibyl, the first technique that uses reinforcement learning for data placement in hybrid storage systems. Sibyl observes different features of the running workload as well as the storage devices to make system-aware data placement decisions. For every decision it makes, Sibyl receives a reward from the system that it uses to evaluate the long-term performance impact of its decision and continuously optimizes its data placement policy online. We implement Sibyl on real systems with various HSS configurations. Our results show that Sibyl provides 21.6%/19.9% performance improvement in a performance-oriented/cost-oriented HSS configuration compared to the best previous data placement technique. Our evaluation using an HSS configuration with three different storage devices shows that Sibyl outperforms the state-of-the-art data placement policy by 23.9%-48.2%, while significantly reducing the system architect's burden in designing a data placement mechanism that can simultaneously incorporate three storage devices. We show that Sibyl achieves 80% of the performance of an oracle policy that has complete knowledge of future access patterns while incurring a very modest storage overhead of only 124.4 KiB.
abstract_zh: 混合存储系统 (HSS) 使用多个不同的存储设备以高性能提供高且可扩展的存储容量。最近的研究提出了各种技术，旨在准确识别性能关键数据，并将其放置在“最适合”的存储设备中。不幸的是，这些技术中的大多数都是僵化的，这（1）限制了它们在各种工作负载和存储设备配置中表现良好的适应性，并且（2）使设计人员很难将这些技术扩展到与它们设计的配置不同的存储系统配置（例如，具有不同数量或不同类型的存储设备）。我们介绍了 Sibyl，这是第一个使用强化学习在混合存储系统中进行数据放置的技术。 Sibyl 观察正在运行的工作负载以及存储设备的不同特征，以做出系统感知的数据放置决策。对于做出的每一个决定，Sibyl 都会从系统中获得奖励，该奖励用于评估其决策的长期性能影响，并不断在线优化其数据放置策略。我们在具有各种 HSS 配置的真实系统上实现了 Sibyl。我们的结果表明，与之前最好的数据放置技术相比，Sibyl 在面向性能/面向成本的 HSS 配置中提供了 21.6%/19.9% 的性能改进。我们使用具有三种不同存储设备的 HSS 配置进行的评估表明，Sibyl 的性能比最先进的数据放置策略高出 23.9%-48.2%，同时显着减轻了系统架构师设计可同时合并三个存储设备的数据放置机制的负担。我们表明，Sibyl 实现了预言机策略性能的 80%，该策略完全了解未来的访问模式，同时产生的存储开销非常小，仅为 124.4 KiB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sibyl，一种利用在线强化学习的自适应和可扩展数据放置技术，用于混合存储系统以提升性能和适应性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据放置技术在适应多变工作负载和存储配置方面存在局限性，且难以扩展到不同存储设备组合的场景。
AI.method: 通过在线强化学习动态观察工作负载特征及存储设备状态，根据系统反馈的奖励信号优化数据放置策略。
AI.result: 在性能导向和成本导向配置中分别提升21.6%/19.9%，三设备配置下优于现有方法23.9%-48.2%，存储开销仅124.4 KiB。
AI.conclusion: Sibyl验证了强化学习在混合存储系统中的有效性，显著降低系统设计复杂度，为未来研究提供新方向。

We show that Sibyl achieves 80% of the performance of an oracle policy that has complete knowledge of future access patterns while incurring a very modest storage overhead of only 124.4 KiB. 混合存储系统 (HSS) 使用多个不同的存储设备以高性能提供高且可扩展的存储容量。最近的研究提出了各种技术，旨在准确识别性能关键数据，并将其放置在“最适合”的存储设备中。不幸的是，这些技术中的大多数都是僵化的，这（1）限制了它们在各种工作负载和存储设备配置中表现良好的适应性，并且（2）使设计人员很难将这些技术扩展到与它们设计的配置不同的存储系统配置（例如，具有不同数量或不同类型的存储设备）。我们介绍了 Sibyl，这是第一个使用强化学习在混合存储系统中进行数据放置的技术。 Sibyl 观察正在运行的工作负载以及存储设备的不同特征，以做出系统感知的数据放置决策。对于做出的每一个决定，Sibyl 都会从系统中获得奖励，该奖励用于评估其决策的长期性能影响，并不断在线优化其数据放置策略。我们在具有各种 HSS 配置的真实系统上实现了 Sibyl。我们的结果表明，与之前最好的数据放置技术相比，Sibyl 在面向性能/面向成本的 HSS 配置中提供了 21.6%/19.9% 的性能改进。我们使用具有三种不同存储设备的 HSS 配置进行的评估表明，Sibyl 的性能比最先进的数据放置策略高出 23.9%-48.2%，同时显着减轻了系统架构师设计可同时合并三个存储设备的数据放置机制的负担。我们表明，Sibyl 实现了预言机策略性能的 80%，该策略完全了解未来的访问模式，同时产生的存储开销非常小，仅为 124.4 KiB。 本文提出Sibyl，一种利用在线强化学习的自适应和可扩展数据放置技术，用于混合存储系统以提升性能和适应性。 Gagandeep Singh,Rakesh Nadig,Jisung Park,Rahul Bera,Nastaran Hajinazar,David Novo,Juan Gómez-Luna,Sander Stuijk,Henk Corporaal,Onur Mutlu cs.AR,cs.AI,cs.DC,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhepei Wang,Cem Subakan,Xilin Jiang,Junkai Wu,Efthymios Tzinis,Mirco Ravanelli,Paris Smaragdis
title: Learning Representations for New Sound Classes With Continual Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 通过持续的自我监督学习来学习新声音类的表示
comment: Accepted to IEEE Signal Processing Letters
comments: Accepted to IEEE Signal Processing Letters
abstract: In this paper, we work on a sound recognition system that continually incorporates new sound classes. Our main goal is to develop a framework where the model can be updated without relying on labeled data. For this purpose, we propose adopting representation learning, where an encoder is trained using unlabeled data. This learning framework enables the study and implementation of a practically relevant use case where only a small amount of the labels is available in a continual learning context. We also make the empirical observation that a similarity-based representation learning method within this framework is robust to forgetting even if no explicit mechanism against forgetting is employed. We show that this approach obtains similar performance compared to several distillation-based continual learning methods when employed on self-supervised representation learning methods.
summary: In this paper, we work on a sound recognition system that continually incorporates new sound classes. Our main goal is to develop a framework where the model can be updated without relying on labeled data. For this purpose, we propose adopting representation learning, where an encoder is trained using unlabeled data. This learning framework enables the study and implementation of a practically relevant use case where only a small amount of the labels is available in a continual learning context. We also make the empirical observation that a similarity-based representation learning method within this framework is robust to forgetting even if no explicit mechanism against forgetting is employed. We show that this approach obtains similar performance compared to several distillation-based continual learning methods when employed on self-supervised representation learning methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们致力于开发一个不断融入新声音类别的声音识别系统。我们的主要目标是开发一个框架，可以在不依赖标记数据的情况下更新模型。为此，我们建议采用表示学习，其中使用未标记的数据来训练编码器。该学习框架能够研究和实现实际相关的用例，其中在持续学习环境中只有少量标签可用。我们还进行了实证观察，即使没有采用明确的遗忘机制，该框架内基于相似性的表示学习方法对于遗忘也具有鲁棒性。我们表明，当应用于自监督表示学习方法时，与几种基于蒸馏的持续学习方法相比，这种方法获得了相似的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种持续自监督学习框架，用于在无需标签数据的情况下不断学习新的声音类别。
AI.motivation: 现有声音识别系统在持续学习新类别时依赖大量标签数据，而实际场景中标签资源有限，需开发无需人工标注的高效学习方法。
AI.method: 采用自监督学习训练编码器，通过相似度-based表示学习方法，在持续学习过程中无需显式抗遗忘机制。
AI.result: 该方法在少量标签场景下表现与基于蒸馏的持续学习方法相当，且对遗忘具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 基于相似度的自监督表示学习能有效支持声音类别的持续学习，适用于实际中标签稀缺的场景。

authors_text: Ziyang Jiang,Tongshu Zheng,Yiling Liu,David Carlson
title: Incorporating Prior Knowledge into Neural Networks through an Implicit Composite Kernel
title_zh: 通过隐式复合内核将先验知识纳入神经网络
comment: 27 pages, 13 figures, 5 tables, 3 algorithms, published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)
comments: 27 pages, 13 figures, 5 tables, 3 algorithms, published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)
abstract: It is challenging to guide neural network (NN) learning with prior knowledge. In contrast, many known properties, such as spatial smoothness or seasonality, are straightforward to model by choosing an appropriate kernel in a Gaussian process (GP). Many deep learning applications could be enhanced by modeling such known properties. For example, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are frequently used in remote sensing, which is subject to strong seasonal effects. We propose to blend the strengths of deep learning and the clear modeling capabilities of GPs by using a composite kernel that combines a kernel implicitly defined by a neural network with a second kernel function chosen to model known properties (e.g., seasonality). We implement this idea by combining a deep network and an efficient mapping based on the Nystrom approximation, which we call Implicit Composite Kernel (ICK). We then adopt a sample-then-optimize approach to approximate the full GP posterior distribution. We demonstrate that ICK has superior performance and flexibility on both synthetic and real-world data sets. We believe that ICK framework can be used to include prior information into neural networks in many applications.
summary: It is challenging to guide neural network (NN) learning with prior knowledge. In contrast, many known properties, such as spatial smoothness or seasonality, are straightforward to model by choosing an appropriate kernel in a Gaussian process (GP). Many deep learning applications could be enhanced by modeling such known properties. For example, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are frequently used in remote sensing, which is subject to strong seasonal effects. We propose to blend the strengths of deep learning and the clear modeling capabilities of GPs by using a composite kernel that combines a kernel implicitly defined by a neural network with a second kernel function chosen to model known properties (e.g., seasonality). We implement this idea by combining a deep network and an efficient mapping based on the Nystrom approximation, which we call Implicit Composite Kernel (ICK). We then adopt a sample-then-optimize approach to approximate the full GP posterior distribution. We demonstrate that ICK has superior performance and flexibility on both synthetic and real-world data sets. We believe that ICK framework can be used to include prior information into neural networks in many applications.
abstract_zh: 利用先验知识指导神经网络（NN）学习具有挑战性。相比之下，许多已知属性（例如空间平滑度或季节性）可以通过在高斯过程 (GP) 中选择适当的核来直接建模。许多深度学习应用程序可以通过对此类已知属性进行建模来增强。例如，卷积神经网络（CNN）经常用于遥感，它受到强烈的季节性影响。我们建议通过使用复合内核来融合深度学习的优势和 GP 的清晰建模能力，该复合内核将神经网络隐式定义的内核与选择用于对已知属性（例如季节性）进行建模的第二个内核函数相结合。我们通过结合深度网络和基于 Nystrom 近似的高效映射（我们称之为隐式复合内核（ICK））来实现这一想法。然后，我们采用先采样再优化的方法来近似完整的 GP 后验分布。我们证明 ICK 在合成数据集和真实数据集上都具有卓越的性能和灵活性。我们相信 ICK 框架可用于在许多应用中将先验信息纳入神经网络中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过隐式复合核（ICK）将先验知识融入神经网络，结合深度学习与高斯过程的优势。
AI.motivation: 神经网络难以有效利用先验知识（如季节性），而高斯过程（GP）能直观建模此类属性，需融合两者优势提升深度学习性能。
AI.method: 设计复合核函数，将神经网络隐式定义的核与建模先验属性的核结合，采用Nystrom近似和样本后优化方法实现ICK框架。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上验证ICK具有优越性能和灵活性，成功捕捉季节性等先验特性。
AI.conclusion: ICK框架有效将先验信息整合至神经网络，为多领域应用提供新方法。

authors_text: Omobayode Fagbohungbe,Lijun Qian
title: Effect of Batch Normalization on Noise Resistant Property of Deep Learning Models
title_zh: 批量归一化对深度学习模型抗噪性能的影响
abstract: The fast execution speed and energy efficiency of analog hardware has made them a strong contender for deployment of deep learning model at the edge. However, there are concerns about the presence of analog noise which causes changes to the weight of the models, leading to performance degradation of deep learning model, despite their inherent noise resistant characteristics. The effect of the popular batch normalization layer on the noise resistant ability of deep learning model is investigated in this work. This systematic study has been carried out by first training different models with and without batch normalization layer on CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 dataset. The weights of the resulting models are then injected with analog noise and the performance of the models on the test dataset is obtained and compared. The results show that the presence of batch normalization layer negatively impacts noise resistant property of deep learning model and the impact grows with the increase of the number of batch normalization layers.
summary: The fast execution speed and energy efficiency of analog hardware has made them a strong contender for deployment of deep learning model at the edge. However, there are concerns about the presence of analog noise which causes changes to the weight of the models, leading to performance degradation of deep learning model, despite their inherent noise resistant characteristics. The effect of the popular batch normalization layer on the noise resistant ability of deep learning model is investigated in this work. This systematic study has been carried out by first training different models with and without batch normalization layer on CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 dataset. The weights of the resulting models are then injected with analog noise and the performance of the models on the test dataset is obtained and compared. The results show that the presence of batch normalization layer negatively impacts noise resistant property of deep learning model and the impact grows with the increase of the number of batch normalization layers.
abstract_zh: 模拟硬件的快速执行速度和能源效率使其成为边缘深度学习模型部署的有力竞争者。然而，人们担心模拟噪声的存在会导致模型权重的变化，从而导致深度学习模型的性能下降，尽管它们具有固有的抗噪声特性。这项工作研究了流行的批量归一化层对深度学习模型抗噪声能力的影响。这项系统研究是通过首先在 CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 数据集上训练带有和不带有批量归一化层的不同模型来进行的。然后将模拟噪声注入所得模型的权重，并获得并比较模型在测试数据集上的性能。结果表明，批量归一化层的存在会对深度学习模型的抗噪声性能产生负面影响，并且这种影响随着批量归一化层数量的增加而增大。

AI.tldr: 本文研究批量归一化层对深度学习模型噪声鲁棒性的影响，通过实验发现批量归一化会降低模型的抗噪声能力。
AI.motivation: 模拟硬件在边缘部署深度学习模型时存在噪声干扰问题，而批量归一化作为常用层其抗噪声特性未被充分研究。
AI.method: 在CIFAR10和CIFAR100数据集上训练含/不含批量归一化的模型，向模型权重注入模拟噪声后测试性能差异。
AI.result: 实验表明批量归一化层会显著降低模型抗噪声能力，且随着批量归一化层数增加负面影响加剧。
AI.conclusion: 批量归一化层可能削弱深度学习模型在噪声环境下的稳定性，需在部署时权衡其利弊。

search_text: Effect of Batch Normalization on Noise Resistant Property of Deep Learning Models 批量归一化对深度学习模型抗噪性能的影响 The fast execution speed and energy efficiency of analog hardware has made them a strong contender for deployment of deep learning model at the edge. However, there are concerns about the presence of analog noise which causes changes to the weight of the models, leading to performance degradation of deep learning model, despite their inherent noise resistant characteristics. The effect of the popular batch normalization layer on the noise resistant ability of deep learning model is investigated in this work. This systematic study has been carried out by first training different models with and without batch normalization layer on CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 dataset. The weights of the resulting models are then injected with analog noise and the performance of the models on the test dataset is obtained and compared. The results show that the presence of batch normalization layer negatively impacts noise resistant property of deep learning model and the impact grows with the increase of the number of batch normalization layers. 模拟硬件的快速执行速度和能源效率使其成为边缘深度学习模型部署的有力竞争者。然而，人们担心模拟噪声的存在会导致模型权重的变化，从而导致深度学习模型的性能下降，尽管它们具有固有的抗噪声特性。这项工作研究了流行的批量归一化层对深度学习模型抗噪声能力的影响。这项系统研究是通过首先在 CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 数据集上训练带有和不带有批量归一化层的不同模型来进行的。然后将模拟噪声注入所得模型的权重，并获得并比较模型在测试数据集上的性能。结果表明，批量归一化层的存在会对深度学习模型的抗噪声性能产生负面影响，并且这种影响随着批量归一化层数量的增加而增大。 本文研究批量归一化层对深度学习模型噪声鲁棒性的影响，通过实验发现批量归一化会降低模型的抗噪声能力。 Omobayode Fagbohungbe,Lijun Qian cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.AR

authors_text: The Anh Han
title: Understanding Emergent Behaviours in Multi-Agent Systems with Evolutionary Game Theory
title_zh: 用进化博弈论理解多智能体系统中的突发行为
abstract: The mechanisms of emergence and evolution of collective behaviours in dynamical Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) of multiple interacting agents, with diverse behavioral strategies in co-presence, have been undergoing mathematical study via Evolutionary Game Theory (EGT). Their systematic study also resorts to agent-based modelling and simulation (ABM) techniques, thus enabling the study of aforesaid mechanisms under a variety of conditions, parameters, and alternative virtual games. This paper summarises some main research directions and challenges tackled in our group, using methods from EGT and ABM. These range from the introduction of cognitive and emotional mechanisms into agents' implementation in an evolving MAS, to the cost-efficient interference for promoting prosocial behaviours in complex networks, to the regulation and governance of AI safety development ecology, and to the equilibrium analysis of random evolutionary multi-player games. This brief aims to sensitize the reader to EGT based issues, results and prospects, which are accruing in importance for the modeling of minds with machines and the engineering of prosocial behaviours in dynamical MAS, with impact on our understanding of the emergence and stability of collective behaviours. In all cases, important open problems in MAS research as viewed or prioritised by the group are described.
summary: The mechanisms of emergence and evolution of collective behaviours in dynamical Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) of multiple interacting agents, with diverse behavioral strategies in co-presence, have been undergoing mathematical study via Evolutionary Game Theory (EGT). Their systematic study also resorts to agent-based modelling and simulation (ABM) techniques, thus enabling the study of aforesaid mechanisms under a variety of conditions, parameters, and alternative virtual games. This paper summarises some main research directions and challenges tackled in our group, using methods from EGT and ABM. These range from the introduction of cognitive and emotional mechanisms into agents' implementation in an evolving MAS, to the cost-efficient interference for promoting prosocial behaviours in complex networks, to the regulation and governance of AI safety development ecology, and to the equilibrium analysis of random evolutionary multi-player games. This brief aims to sensitize the reader to EGT based issues, results and prospects, which are accruing in importance for the modeling of minds with machines and the engineering of prosocial behaviours in dynamical MAS, with impact on our understanding of the emergence and stability of collective behaviours. In all cases, important open problems in MAS research as viewed or prioritised by the group are described.
abstract_zh: 多个相互作用主体的动态多主体系统（MAS）中集体行为的出现和演化机制，以及共存的多种行为策略，一直在通过演化博弈论（EGT）进行数学研究。他们的系统研究还采用了基于代理的建模和仿真（ABM）技术，从而能够在各种条件、参数和替代虚拟游戏下研究上述机制。本文使用 EGT 和 ABM 的方法总结了我们小组的一些主要研究方向和解决的挑战。这些范围包括将认知和情感机制引入到不断发展的MAS中的代理实施中，到在复杂网络中促进亲社会行为的经济高效的干扰，到人工智能安全发展生态的监管和治理，以及随机进化多人博弈的均衡分析。本简介旨在让读者了解基于 EGT 的问题、结果和前景，这些问题、结果和前景对于用机器进行思维建模和动态 MAS 中亲社会行为的工程变得越来越重要，并影响我们对集体行为的出现和稳定性的理解。在所有情况下，都描述了小组认为或优先考虑的 MAS 研究中的重要开放问题。

AI.tldr: 本文总结了利用演化博弈论和基于代理的建模方法研究多智能体系统中集体行为涌现与演变机制的主要方向与挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着多智能体系统复杂性增加，理解集体行为的涌现机制及其稳定性对机器建模和工程化亲社会行为具有重要意义。
AI.method: 结合演化博弈论（EGT）与基于代理的建模与仿真（ABM）技术，研究多智能体系统的动态行为机制。
AI.result: 提出了包括认知情感机制引入、复杂网络中亲社会行为促进、AI安全生态调控及多玩家博弈均衡分析等研究方向，并指出现存关键问题。
AI.conclusion: 演化博弈论为理解多智能体系统中集体行为的涌现与稳定提供了重要工具，未来需进一步解决开放性问题以推动相关领域发展。

authors_text: Peikai Li,Ipek Ilayda Onur,Scott Dodelson,Shreyas Chaudhari
title: High-Resolution CMB Lensing Reconstruction with Deep Learning
title_zh: 利用深度学习进行高分辨率 CMB 透镜重建
comment: 11 pages, 9 figures
comments: 11 pages, 9 figures
abstract: Next-generation cosmic microwave background (CMB) surveys are expected to provide valuable information about the primordial universe by creating maps of the mass along the line of sight. Traditional tools for creating these lensing convergence maps include the quadratic estimator and the maximum likelihood based iterative estimator. Here, we apply a generative adversarial network (GAN) to reconstruct the lensing convergence field. We compare our results with a previous deep learning approach -- Residual-UNet -- and discuss the pros and cons of each. In the process, we use training sets generated by a variety of power spectra, rather than the one used in testing the methods.
summary: Next-generation cosmic microwave background (CMB) surveys are expected to provide valuable information about the primordial universe by creating maps of the mass along the line of sight. Traditional tools for creating these lensing convergence maps include the quadratic estimator and the maximum likelihood based iterative estimator. Here, we apply a generative adversarial network (GAN) to reconstruct the lensing convergence field. We compare our results with a previous deep learning approach -- Residual-UNet -- and discuss the pros and cons of each. In the process, we use training sets generated by a variety of power spectra, rather than the one used in testing the methods.
abstract_zh: 下一代宇宙微波背景（CMB）勘测预计将通过创建沿视线的质量图来提供有关原始宇宙的宝贵信息。用于创建这些透镜收敛图的传统工具包括二次估计器和基于最大似然的迭代估计器。在这里，我们应用生成对抗网络（GAN）来重建透镜收敛场。我们将我们的结果与之前的深度学习方法（Residual-UNet）进行比较，并讨论每种方法的优缺点。在此过程中，我们使用由各种功率谱生成的训练集，而不是测试方法时使用的训练集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用生成对抗网络（GAN）来重建宇宙微波背景（CMB）的透镜汇聚场，以提高高分辨率的CMB透镜重建效果。
AI.motivation: 下一代CMB观测将提供关于原始宇宙的重要信息，传统方法如二次估计器和最大似然迭代估计器在重建透镜汇聚场时存在局限性，因此需要更先进的方法。
AI.method: 本文采用生成对抗网络（GAN）来重建CMB透镜汇聚场，并与之前使用的Residual-UNet深度学习方法进行比较。
AI.result: 结果表明，使用GAN的方法在不同功率谱生成的训练集上表现良好，与Residual-UNet方法相比具有一定的优势。
AI.conclusion: GAN在CMB透镜重建任务中表现出良好的性能，为未来的高分辨率CMB数据分析提供了新的方法。

authors_text: Ramya Ramakrishnan,Hashan Buddhika Narangodage,Mauro Schilman,Kilian Q. Weinberger,Ryan McDonald
title: Long-term Control for Dialogue Generation: Methods and Evaluation
title_zh: 对话生成的长期控制：方法和评估
abstract: Current approaches for controlling dialogue response generation are primarily focused on high-level attributes like style, sentiment, or topic. In this work, we focus on constrained long-term dialogue generation, which involves more fine-grained control and requires a given set of control words to appear in generated responses. This setting requires a model to not only consider the generation of these control words in the immediate context, but also produce utterances that will encourage the generation of the words at some time in the (possibly distant) future. We define the problem of constrained long-term control for dialogue generation, identify gaps in current methods for evaluation, and propose new metrics that better measure long-term control. We also propose a retrieval-augmented method that improves performance of long-term controlled generation via logit modification techniques. We show through experiments on three task-oriented dialogue datasets that our metrics better assess dialogue control relative to current alternatives and that our method outperforms state-of-the-art constrained generation baselines.
summary: Current approaches for controlling dialogue response generation are primarily focused on high-level attributes like style, sentiment, or topic. In this work, we focus on constrained long-term dialogue generation, which involves more fine-grained control and requires a given set of control words to appear in generated responses. This setting requires a model to not only consider the generation of these control words in the immediate context, but also produce utterances that will encourage the generation of the words at some time in the (possibly distant) future. We define the problem of constrained long-term control for dialogue generation, identify gaps in current methods for evaluation, and propose new metrics that better measure long-term control. We also propose a retrieval-augmented method that improves performance of long-term controlled generation via logit modification techniques. We show through experiments on three task-oriented dialogue datasets that our metrics better assess dialogue control relative to current alternatives and that our method outperforms state-of-the-art constrained generation baselines.
abstract_zh: 当前控制对话响应生成的方法主要关注风格、情绪或主题等高级属性。在这项工作中，我们专注于受约束的长期对话生成，这涉及更细粒度的控制，并且需要一组给定的控制词出现在生成的响应中。这种设置要求模型不仅要考虑在当前上下文中生成这些控制词，还要生成鼓励在未来某个时间（可能是遥远的）生成这些词的话语。我们定义了对话生成的受限长期控制问题，确定了当前评估方法的差距，并提出了更好地衡量长期控制的新指标。我们还提出了一种检索增强方法，通过 logit 修改技术提高长期受控生成的性能。我们通过对三个面向任务的对话数据集的实验表明，我们的指标相对于当前的替代方案更好地评估了对话控制，并且我们的方法优于最先进的约束生成基线。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究对话生成中的长期控制问题，要求生成的回复中包含特定控制词，并在未来对话中持续体现。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多关注风格、情感等高层属性，难以实现细粒度的长期控制，且缺乏有效评估指标。
AI.method: 提出新的评估指标和检索增强方法，结合logit修改技术优化长期控制生成。
AI.result: 实验表明新指标更准确评估控制效果，方法在三个任务数据集上优于现有模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文解决了长期对话控制的挑战，通过新指标和方法提升了生成效果和评估准确性。

authors_text: Ghalib Ahmed Tahir,Chu Kiong Loo
title: Novel Multicolumn Kernel Extreme Learning Machine for Food Detection via Optimal Features from CNN
title_zh: 通过 CNN 的最佳特征进行食品检测的新型多列内核极限学习机
abstract: Automatic food detection is an emerging topic of interest due to its wide array of applications ranging from detecting food images on social media platforms to filtering non-food photos from the users in dietary assessment apps. Recently, during the COVID-19 pandemic, it has facilitated enforcing an eating ban by automatically detecting eating activities from cameras in public places. Therefore, to tackle the challenge of recognizing food images with high accuracy, we proposed the idea of a hybrid framework for extracting and selecting optimal features from an efficient neural network. There on, a nonlinear classifier is employed to discriminate between linearly inseparable feature vectors with great precision. In line with this idea, our method extracts features from MobileNetV3, selects an optimal subset of attributes by using Shapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) values, and exploits kernel extreme learning machine (KELM) due to its nonlinear decision boundary and good generalization ability. However, KELM suffers from the 'curse of dimensionality problem' for large datasets due to the complex computation of kernel matrix with large numbers of hidden nodes. We solved this problem by proposing a novel multicolumn kernel extreme learning machine (MCKELM) which exploited the k-d tree algorithm to divide data into N subsets and trains separate KELM on each subset of data. Then, the method incorporates KELM classifiers into parallel structures and selects the top k nearest subsets during testing by using the k-d tree search for classifying input instead of the whole network. For evaluating a proposed framework large food/non-food dataset is prepared using nine publically available datasets. Experimental results showed the superiority of our method on an integrated set of measures while solving the problem of 'curse of dimensionality in KELM for large datasets.
summary: Automatic food detection is an emerging topic of interest due to its wide array of applications ranging from detecting food images on social media platforms to filtering non-food photos from the users in dietary assessment apps. Recently, during the COVID-19 pandemic, it has facilitated enforcing an eating ban by automatically detecting eating activities from cameras in public places. Therefore, to tackle the challenge of recognizing food images with high accuracy, we proposed the idea of a hybrid framework for extracting and selecting optimal features from an efficient neural network. There on, a nonlinear classifier is employed to discriminate between linearly inseparable feature vectors with great precision. In line with this idea, our method extracts features from MobileNetV3, selects an optimal subset of attributes by using Shapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) values, and exploits kernel extreme learning machine (KELM) due to its nonlinear decision boundary and good generalization ability. However, KELM suffers from the 'curse of dimensionality problem' for large datasets due to the complex computation of kernel matrix with large numbers of hidden nodes. We solved this problem by proposing a novel multicolumn kernel extreme learning machine (MCKELM) which exploited the k-d tree algorithm to divide data into N subsets and trains separate KELM on each subset of data. Then, the method incorporates KELM classifiers into parallel structures and selects the top k nearest subsets during testing by using the k-d tree search for classifying input instead of the whole network. For evaluating a proposed framework large food/non-food dataset is prepared using nine publically available datasets. Experimental results showed the superiority of our method on an integrated set of measures while solving the problem of 'curse of dimensionality in KELM for large datasets.
abstract_zh: 自动食物检测是一个新兴的令人感兴趣的话题，因为它具有广泛的应用范围，从检测社交媒体平台上的食物图像到过滤饮食评估应用程序中用户的非食物照片。最近，在 COVID-19 大流行期间，它通过公共场所摄像头自动检测饮食活动，促进了饮食禁令的执行。因此，为了解决高精度识别食物图像的挑战，我们提出了一种混合框架的想法，用于从高效的神经网络中提取和选择最佳特征。随后，采用非线性分类器来高精度地区分线性不可分的特征向量。根据这个想法，我们的方法从 MobileNetV3 中提取特征，使用 Shapley 加法解释（SHAP）值选择最佳属性子集，并利用内核极限学习机（KELM）的非线性决策边界和良好的泛化能力。然而，由于具有大量隐藏节点的核矩阵的复杂计算，KELM 在大型数据集上遇到了“维数灾难”问题。我们通过提出一种新颖的多列核极限学习机（MCKELM）来解决这个问题，它利用 k-d 树算法将数据划分为 N 个子集，并在每个数据子集上训练单独的 KELM。然后，该方法将 KELM 分类器合并到并行结构中，并在测试过程中通过使用 k-d 树搜索而不是整个网络来对输入进行分类，选择前 k 个最近的子集。为了评估拟议的框架，使用九个公开可用的数据集准备了大型食品/非食品数据集。实验结果表明，我们的方法在解决大型数据集的 KELM 中的“维数灾难”问题时，在一组集成的度量上具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多列核极限学习机（MCKELM）的食品检测方法，通过从CNN中提取最优特征并解决KELM的维度灾难问题。
AI.motivation: 食品检测在社交媒体分析和饮食评估应用中需求迫切，但现有方法在高精度识别和处理大规模数据时面临挑战，尤其需要解决KELM的维度灾难问题。
AI.method: 结合MobileNetV3提取特征，利用SHAP值选择关键属性，设计多列KELM框架通过k-d树算法分割数据集并行训练，测试时采用k近邻子集分类。
AI.result: 在整合九个公开数据集的实验中，该方法在准确率和处理大规模数据效率上均优于传统方法，有效缓解了维度灾难问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出的MCKELM框架通过并行化和特征优化显著提升了食品检测的精度与可扩展性，为实际应用提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Thomas Spooner,Rui Silva,Joshua Lockhart,Jason Long,Vacslav Glukhov
title: Reductive MDPs: A Perspective Beyond Temporal Horizons
title_zh: 还原性 MDP：超越时间视野的视角
comment: 15 pages, 10 figures, 1 algorithm
comments: 15 pages, 10 figures, 1 algorithm
abstract: Solving general Markov decision processes (MDPs) is a computationally hard problem. Solving finite-horizon MDPs, on the other hand, is highly tractable with well known polynomial-time algorithms. What drives this extreme disparity, and do problems exist that lie between these diametrically opposed complexities? In this paper we identify and analyse a sub-class of stochastic shortest path problems (SSPs) for general state-action spaces whose dynamics satisfy a particular drift condition. This construction generalises the traditional, temporal notion of a horizon via decreasing reachability: a property called reductivity. It is shown that optimal policies can be recovered in polynomial-time for reductive SSPs -- via an extension of backwards induction -- with an efficient analogue in reductive MDPs. The practical considerations of the proposed approach are discussed, and numerical verification provided on a canonical optimal liquidation problem.
summary: Solving general Markov decision processes (MDPs) is a computationally hard problem. Solving finite-horizon MDPs, on the other hand, is highly tractable with well known polynomial-time algorithms. What drives this extreme disparity, and do problems exist that lie between these diametrically opposed complexities? In this paper we identify and analyse a sub-class of stochastic shortest path problems (SSPs) for general state-action spaces whose dynamics satisfy a particular drift condition. This construction generalises the traditional, temporal notion of a horizon via decreasing reachability: a property called reductivity. It is shown that optimal policies can be recovered in polynomial-time for reductive SSPs -- via an extension of backwards induction -- with an efficient analogue in reductive MDPs. The practical considerations of the proposed approach are discussed, and numerical verification provided on a canonical optimal liquidation problem.
abstract_zh: 解决一般马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）是一个计算难题。另一方面，使用众所周知的多项式时间算法来求解有限范围 MDP 是非常容易处理的。是什么造成了这种极端的差异？这些截然相反的复杂性之间是否存在问题？在本文中，我们识别并分析了一般状态动作空间的随机最短路径问题（SSP）的子类，其动力学满足特定的漂移条件。这种构造通过递减可达性概括了地平线的传统时间概念：一种称为还原性的属性。结果表明，通过向后归纳法的扩展，还原性 SSP 的最优策略可以在多项式时间内恢复，并与还原性 MDP 中的有效类似。讨论了所提出方法的实际考虑因素，并对典型的最优清算问题进行了数值验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的马尔可夫决策过程子类（reductive MDPs），通过引入可减性属性和漂移条件，在多项式时间内求解最优策略。
AI.motivation: 传统MDPs计算复杂度高，而有限地平线MDPs可高效求解，但两者之间的复杂度差异未被充分研究，需探索中间复杂度问题。
AI.method: 通过构建满足特定漂移条件的随机最短路径问题（SSPs），定义可减性属性，并扩展逆向归纳法以求解reductive MDPs。
AI.result: 证明reductive SSPs的最优策略可在多项式时间内求得，数值实验验证了该方法在经典最优清算问题中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: reductive MDPs为解决传统MDPs与有限地平线MDPs之间的复杂度问题提供了新视角，具有实际应用潜力。

search_text: Reductive MDPs: A Perspective Beyond Temporal Horizons 还原性 MDP：超越时间视野的视角 Solving general Markov decision processes (MDPs) is a computationally hard problem. Solving finite-horizon MDPs, on the other hand, is highly tractable with well known polynomial-time algorithms. What drives this extreme disparity, and do problems exist that lie between these diametrically opposed complexities? In this paper we identify and analyse a sub-class of stochastic shortest path problems (SSPs) for general state-action spaces whose dynamics satisfy a particular drift condition. This construction generalises the traditional, temporal notion of a horizon via decreasing reachability: a property called reductivity. It is shown that optimal policies can be recovered in polynomial-time for reductive SSPs -- via an extension of backwards induction -- with an efficient analogue in reductive MDPs. The practical considerations of the proposed approach are discussed, and numerical verification provided on a canonical optimal liquidation problem. 解决一般马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）是一个计算难题。另一方面，使用众所周知的多项式时间算法来求解有限范围 MDP 是非常容易处理的。是什么造成了这种极端的差异？这些截然相反的复杂性之间是否存在问题？在本文中，我们识别并分析了一般状态动作空间的随机最短路径问题（SSP）的子类，其动力学满足特定的漂移条件。这种构造通过递减可达性概括了地平线的传统时间概念：一种称为还原性的属性。结果表明，通过向后归纳法的扩展，还原性 SSP 的最优策略可以在多项式时间内恢复，并与还原性 MDP 中的有效类似。讨论了所提出方法的实际考虑因素，并对典型的最优清算问题进行了数值验证。 本文提出了一种新的马尔可夫决策过程子类（reductive MDPs），通过引入可减性属性和漂移条件，在多项式时间内求解最优策略。 Thomas Spooner,Rui Silva,Joshua Lockhart,Jason Long,Vacslav Glukhov cs.AI,cs.CC,cs.LG,math.PR,stat.ML

authors_text: Mahroo Bahreinian,Roberto Tron
title: Output-Feedback Path Planning with Robustness to State-Dependent Errors
title_zh: 对状态相关误差具有鲁棒性的输出反馈路径规划
comment: This work has been submitted to the CDC conference 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.04416
comments: This work has been submitted to the CDC conference 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.04416
abstract: We consider the problem of sample-based feedback motion planning from measurements affected by systematic errors. Our previous work presented output feedback controllers that use measurements from landmarks in the environment to navigate through a cell-decomposable environment using duality, Control Lyapunov and Barrier Functions (CLF, CBF), and Linear Programming. In this paper, we build on this previous work with a novel strategy that allows the use of measurements affected by systematic errors in perceived depth (similarly to what might be generated by vision-based sensors), as opposed to accurate displacement measurements. As a result, our new method has the advantage of providing more robust performance (with quantitative guarantees) when inaccurate sensors are used. We test the proposed algorithm in the simulation to evaluate the performance limits of our approach predicted by our theoretical derivations.
summary: We consider the problem of sample-based feedback motion planning from measurements affected by systematic errors. Our previous work presented output feedback controllers that use measurements from landmarks in the environment to navigate through a cell-decomposable environment using duality, Control Lyapunov and Barrier Functions (CLF, CBF), and Linear Programming. In this paper, we build on this previous work with a novel strategy that allows the use of measurements affected by systematic errors in perceived depth (similarly to what might be generated by vision-based sensors), as opposed to accurate displacement measurements. As a result, our new method has the advantage of providing more robust performance (with quantitative guarantees) when inaccurate sensors are used. We test the proposed algorithm in the simulation to evaluate the performance limits of our approach predicted by our theoretical derivations.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑受系统误差影响的测量的基于样本的反馈运动规划问题。我们之前的工作提出了输出反馈控制器，该控制器使用环境中地标的测量结果，利用对偶性、控制李雅普诺夫和势垒函数（CLF、CBF）以及线性规划在细胞可分解环境中导航。在本文中，我们在之前的工作基础上采用了一种新颖的策略，该策略允许使用受感知深度系统误差影响的测量（类似于基于视觉的传感器可能生成的结果），而不是精确的位移测量。因此，我们的新方法具有在使用不准确的传感器时提供更稳健的性能（具有定量保证）的优点。我们在模拟中测试所提出的算法，以评估我们的理论推导所预测的方法的性能限制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的输出反馈路径规划方法，能够处理受系统误差影响的测量数据，提升在传感器不准确情况下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖精确的位移测量，但实际传感器（如视觉传感器）常存在深度感知误差，导致导航性能下降，需改进鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于先前的控制李雅普诺夫函数（CLF）、控制屏障函数（CBF）和线性规划方法，改进算法以处理系统误差影响的深度测量数据。
AI.result: 通过仿真验证了算法在理论预测范围内的性能极限，证明了方法在存在系统误差时的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 新方法在传感器不准确场景下能提供具有定量保证的鲁棒路径规划性能，适用于实际视觉传感器等误差敏感场景。

authors_text: How Khang Lim,Avishkar Mahajan,Martin Strecker,Meng Weng Wong
title: Automating Defeasible Reasoning in Law
title_zh: 法律中可废止推理的自动化
abstract: The paper studies defeasible reasoning in rule-based systems, in particular about legal norms and contracts. We identify rule modifiers that specify how rules interact and how they can be overridden. We then define rule transformations that eliminate these modifiers, leading in the end to a translation of rules to formulas. For reasoning with and about rules, we contrast two approaches, one in a classical logic with SMT solvers as proof engines, one in a non-monotonic logic with Answer Set Programming solvers.
summary: The paper studies defeasible reasoning in rule-based systems, in particular about legal norms and contracts. We identify rule modifiers that specify how rules interact and how they can be overridden. We then define rule transformations that eliminate these modifiers, leading in the end to a translation of rules to formulas. For reasoning with and about rules, we contrast two approaches, one in a classical logic with SMT solvers as proof engines, one in a non-monotonic logic with Answer Set Programming solvers.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了基于规则的系统中的可废止推理，特别是有关法律规范和合同的推理。我们确定规则修饰符，指定规则如何交互以及如何覆盖它们。然后，我们定义消除这些修饰符的规则转换，最终将规则转换为公式。对于使用规则进行推理和关于规则的推理，我们对比了两种方法，一种是使用 SMT 求解器作为证明引擎的经典逻辑，另一种是使用答案集编程求解器的非单调逻辑。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在法律规范和合同中实现可废止推理的自动化，通过规则转换和两种逻辑方法对比实现规则推理。
AI.motivation: 法律规则存在冲突和例外情况，传统方法难以处理动态规则交互，需自动化工具支持复杂法律推理。
AI.method: 识别规则修饰符并定义转换规则消除修饰符，对比经典逻辑（SMT求解器）与非单调逻辑（答案集编程）两种推理方法。
AI.result: 成功将规则转化为逻辑公式，两种方法分别适用于不同场景，为法律推理提供自动化解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 两种逻辑方法各有优势，可废止推理框架有效支持法律规则的动态分析与冲突解决。
