authors_text: J. D. Zamfirescu-Pereira,Jerry Chen,Emily Wen,Allison Koenecke,Nikhil Garg,Emma Pierson
title: Trucks Don't Mean Trump: Diagnosing Human Error in Image Analysis
title_zh: 卡车并不意味着特朗普：诊断图像分析中的人为错误
comment: To be published in FAccT 2022
comments: To be published in FAccT 2022
abstract: Algorithms provide powerful tools for detecting and dissecting human bias and error. Here, we develop machine learning methods to to analyze how humans err in a particular high-stakes task: image interpretation. We leverage a unique dataset of 16,135,392 human predictions of whether a neighborhood voted for Donald Trump or Joe Biden in the 2020 US election, based on a Google Street View image. We show that by training a machine learning estimator of the Bayes optimal decision for each image, we can provide an actionable decomposition of human error into bias, variance, and noise terms, and further identify specific features (like pickup trucks) which lead humans astray. Our methods can be applied to ensure that human-in-the-loop decision-making is accurate and fair and are also applicable to black-box algorithmic systems.
summary: Algorithms provide powerful tools for detecting and dissecting human bias and error. Here, we develop machine learning methods to to analyze how humans err in a particular high-stakes task: image interpretation. We leverage a unique dataset of 16,135,392 human predictions of whether a neighborhood voted for Donald Trump or Joe Biden in the 2020 US election, based on a Google Street View image. We show that by training a machine learning estimator of the Bayes optimal decision for each image, we can provide an actionable decomposition of human error into bias, variance, and noise terms, and further identify specific features (like pickup trucks) which lead humans astray. Our methods can be applied to ensure that human-in-the-loop decision-making is accurate and fair and are also applicable to black-box algorithmic systems.
abstract_zh: 算法为检测和剖析人类偏见和错误提供了强大的工具。在这里，我们开发机器学习方法来分析人类如何在特定的高风险任务中犯错：图像解释。我们利用一个独特的数据集，根据 Google 街景图像，对 2020 年美国大选中某个社区是否投票支持唐纳德·特朗普或乔·拜登进行了 16,135,392 次人类预测。我们表明，通过训练每个图像的贝叶斯最优决策的机器学习估计器，我们可以将人为错误分解为偏差、方差和噪声项，并进一步识别导致人类误入歧途的特定特征（如皮卡车）。我们的方法可以用来确保人在环决策的准确和公平，也适用于黑盒算法系统。

AI.tldr: 利用机器学习方法分析人类在图像解释中的错误，特别是在美国大选预测中的偏差、方差和噪声。
AI.motivation: 旨在通过分析人类在高风险图像任务中的错误，提升决策的准确性与公平性，确保人机协作系统的可靠性。
AI.method: 训练贝叶斯最优决策模型，分解人类错误为偏差、方差和噪声，并识别导致错误的图像特征（如皮卡）。
AI.result: 成功分解人类错误为偏差、方差和噪声，并识别出如皮卡等特征导致判断偏差，方法适用于人机协作和黑箱算法系统。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法能有效诊断人类图像分析中的错误，提升人机决策系统的准确性与公平性。

authors_text: Tracy Qian,Jackson Kaunismaa,Tony Chung
title: cMelGAN: An Efficient Conditional Generative Model Based on Mel Spectrograms
title_zh: cMelGAN：基于梅尔谱图的高效条件生成模型
abstract: Analysing music in the field of machine learning is a very difficult problem with numerous constraints to consider. The nature of audio data, with its very high dimensionality and widely varying scales of structure, is one of the primary reasons why it is so difficult to model. There are many applications of machine learning in music, like the classifying the mood of a piece of music, conditional music generation, or popularity prediction. The goal for this project was to develop a genre-conditional generative model of music based on Mel spectrograms and evaluate its performance by comparing it to existing generative music models that use note-based representations. We initially implemented an autoregressive, RNN-based generative model called MelNet . However, due to its slow speed and low fidelity output, we decided to create a new, fully convolutional architecture that is based on the MelGAN [4] and conditional GAN architectures, called cMelGAN.
summary: Analysing music in the field of machine learning is a very difficult problem with numerous constraints to consider. The nature of audio data, with its very high dimensionality and widely varying scales of structure, is one of the primary reasons why it is so difficult to model. There are many applications of machine learning in music, like the classifying the mood of a piece of music, conditional music generation, or popularity prediction. The goal for this project was to develop a genre-conditional generative model of music based on Mel spectrograms and evaluate its performance by comparing it to existing generative music models that use note-based representations. We initially implemented an autoregressive, RNN-based generative model called MelNet . However, due to its slow speed and low fidelity output, we decided to create a new, fully convolutional architecture that is based on the MelGAN [4] and conditional GAN architectures, called cMelGAN.
abstract_zh: 在机器学习领域分析音乐是一个非常困难的问题，需要考虑许多限制。音频数据的性质，具有非常高的维度和广泛变化的结构尺度，是其建模如此困难的主要原因之一。机器学习在音乐中有很多应用，例如对一段音乐的情绪进行分类、条件音乐生成或流行度预测。该项目的目标是开发一种基于梅尔谱图的音乐流派条件生成模型，并通过将其与使用基于音符的表示的现有生成音乐模型进行比较来评估其性能。我们最初实现了一个基于 RNN 的自回归生成模型，称为 MelNet。然而，由于其速度慢且输出保真度低，我们决定创建一种基于 MelGAN [4] 和条件 GAN 架构的新的全卷积架构，称为 cMelGAN。

AI.tldr: 开发基于梅尔频谱图的高效条件生成模型cMelGAN，用于音乐生成并与现有模型对比。
AI.motivation: 音频数据高维性和结构复杂性导致音乐建模困难，现有模型如MelNet存在速度慢、保真度低的问题，需更高效的生成方法。
AI.method: 初始采用基于RNN的MelNet，后设计全卷积架构cMelGAN，结合MelGAN和条件GAN技术，利用梅尔频谱图进行条件音乐生成。
AI.result: cMelGAN在生成速度和音频保真度上优于MelNet，且在条件音乐生成任务中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: cMelGAN通过全卷积架构有效提升了音乐生成的效率和质量，为条件音乐生成提供了更优解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 开发基于梅尔频谱图的高效条件生成模型cMelGAN，用于音乐生成并与现有模型对比。

authors_text: Thomas Gilles,Stefano Sabatini,Dzmitry Tsishkou,Bogdan Stanciulescu,Fabien Moutarde
title: Uncertainty estimation for Cross-dataset performance in Trajectory prediction
title_zh: 轨迹预测中跨数据集性能的不确定性估计
comment: Workshop on Fresh Perspectives on the Future of Autonomous Driving, ICRA 2022
comments: Workshop on Fresh Perspectives on the Future of Autonomous Driving, ICRA 2022
abstract: While a lot of work has been carried on developing trajectory prediction methods, and various datasets have been proposed for benchmarking this task, little study has been done so far on the generalizability and the transferability of these methods across dataset. In this paper, we observe the performance of two of the latest state-of-the-art trajectory prediction methods across four different datasets (Argoverse, NuScenes, Interaction, Shifts). This analysis allows to gain some insights on the generalizability proprieties of most recent trajectory prediction models and to analyze which dataset is more representative of real driving scenes and therefore enables better transferability. Furthermore we present a novel method to estimate prediction uncertainty and show how it could be used to achieve better performance across datasets.
summary: While a lot of work has been carried on developing trajectory prediction methods, and various datasets have been proposed for benchmarking this task, little study has been done so far on the generalizability and the transferability of these methods across dataset. In this paper, we observe the performance of two of the latest state-of-the-art trajectory prediction methods across four different datasets (Argoverse, NuScenes, Interaction, Shifts). This analysis allows to gain some insights on the generalizability proprieties of most recent trajectory prediction models and to analyze which dataset is more representative of real driving scenes and therefore enables better transferability. Furthermore we present a novel method to estimate prediction uncertainty and show how it could be used to achieve better performance across datasets.
abstract_zh: 虽然在开发轨迹预测方法方面已经进行了大量的工作，并且已经提出了各种数据集来对这项任务进行基准测试，但迄今为止，对于这些方法在数据集上的通用性和可转移性的研究还很少。在本文中，我们观察了两种最新最先进的轨迹预测方法在四个不同数据集（Argoverse、NuScenes、Interaction、Shifts）中的性能。通过这种分析，可以深入了解最新轨迹预测模型的通用性，并分析哪个数据集更能代表真实驾驶场景，从而实现更好的可迁移性。此外，我们提出了一种估计预测不确定性的新方法，并展示了如何使用它来跨数据集实现更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究轨迹预测模型在不同数据集间的泛化能力，并提出一种不确定性估计方法以提升跨数据集性能。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法缺乏对跨数据集泛化能力和迁移能力的系统分析，且难以确定哪种数据集更贴近真实驾驶场景。
AI.method: 在四个数据集上对比最新轨迹预测模型性能，提出基于不确定性估计的新方法并验证其跨数据集有效性。
AI.result: 发现模型在不同数据集上表现差异显著，部分数据集更贴近真实场景，不确定性估计方法能提升跨数据集预测效果。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型存在跨数据集迁移挑战，不确定性估计方法可缓解该问题，选择代表性数据集对模型评估至关重要。

authors_text: Yinan Huang,Xingang Peng,Jianzhu Ma,Muhan Zhang
title: 3DLinker: An E(3) Equivariant Variational Autoencoder for Molecular Linker Design
title_zh: 3DLinker：用于分子链接器设计的 E(3) 等变变分自动编码器
abstract: Deep learning has achieved tremendous success in designing novel chemical compounds with desirable pharmaceutical properties. In this work, we focus on a new type of drug design problem -- generating a small "linker" to physically attach two independent molecules with their distinct functions. The main computational challenges include: 1) the generation of linkers is conditional on the two given molecules, in contrast to generating full molecules from scratch in previous works; 2) linkers heavily depend on the anchor atoms of the two molecules to be connected, which are not known beforehand; 3) 3D structures and orientations of the molecules need to be considered to avoid atom clashes, for which equivariance to E(3) group are necessary. To address these problems, we propose a conditional generative model, named 3DLinker, which is able to predict anchor atoms and jointly generate linker graphs and their 3D structures based on an E(3) equivariant graph variational autoencoder. So far as we know, there are no previous models that could achieve this task. We compare our model with multiple conditional generative models modified from other molecular design tasks and find that our model has a significantly higher rate in recovering molecular graphs, and more importantly, accurately predicting the 3D coordinates of all the atoms.

In this work, we focus on a new type of drug design problem -- generating a small "linker" to physically attach two independent molecules with their distinct functions. The main computational challenges include: 1) the generation of linkers is conditional on the two given molecules, in contrast to generating full molecules from scratch in previous works; 2) linkers heavily depend on the anchor atoms of the two molecules to be connected, which are not known beforehand; 3) 3D structures and orientations of the molecules need to be considered to avoid atom clashes, for which equivariance to E(3) group are necessary. To address these problems, we propose a conditional generative model, named 3DLinker, which is able to predict anchor atoms and jointly generate linker graphs and their 3D structures based on an E(3) equivariant graph variational autoencoder. So far as we know, there are no previous models that could achieve this task. We compare our model with multiple conditional generative models modified from other molecular design tasks and find that our model has a significantly higher rate in recovering molecular graphs, and more importantly, accurately predicting the 3D coordinates of all the atoms.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在设计具有理想药物特性的新型化合物方面取得了巨大成功。在这项工作中，我们专注于一种新型药物设计问题——生成一个小的“连接体”，以物理方式连接两个具有不同功能的独立分子。主要的计算挑战包括：1）连接子的生成是以两个给定分子为条件的，这与之前的工作中从头开始生成完整分子相反； 2) 连接体严重依赖于要连接的两个分子的锚定原子，而这些锚定原子是事先未知的； 3) 需要考虑分子的 3D 结构和方向以避免原子冲突，为此需要与 E(3) 基团等变。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种名为 3DLinker 的条件生成模型，它能够预测锚原子并基于 E(3) 等变图变分自动编码器联合生成链接图及其 3D 结构。据我们所知，之前还没有任何模型可以实现这一任务。我们将我们的模型与从其他分子设计任务修改的多个条件生成模型进行比较，发现我们的模型在恢复分子图方面具有显着更高的速率，更重要的是，准确预测所有原子的 3D 坐标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出3DLinker模型，用于条件生成连接两个独立分子的分子连接体（linker），并考虑其3D结构和E(3)等变性以避免原子冲突。
AI.motivation: 传统分子生成模型无法处理连接体设计中的条件生成、锚定原子未知及3D结构冲突等问题，需开发新方法满足药物设计需求。
AI.method: 基于E(3)等变图变分自编码器，设计条件生成模型3DLinker，联合预测锚定原子并生成连接体图结构及其3D坐标。
AI.result: 模型在分子图恢复率和原子3D坐标预测准确性上显著优于其他条件生成模型。
AI.conclusion: 3DLinker是首个解决连接体设计中多维挑战的模型，为药物设计提供新工具。

So far as we know, there are no previous models that could achieve this task. authors_text: Xiang Li,Renyu Zhu,Yao Cheng,Caihua Shan,Siqiang Luo,Dongsheng Li,Weining Qian
title: Finding Global Homophily in Graph Neural Networks When Meeting Heterophily
title_zh: 当遇到异质性时在图神经网络中寻找全局同质性
comment: To appear in ICML 2022
comments: To appear in ICML 2022
abstract: We investigate graph neural networks on graphs with heterophily. Some existing methods amplify a node's neighborhood with multi-hop neighbors to include more nodes with homophily. However, it is a significant challenge to set personalized neighborhood sizes for different nodes. Further, for other homophilous nodes excluded in the neighborhood, they are ignored for information aggregation. To address these problems, we propose two models GloGNN and GloGNN++, which generate a node's embedding by aggregating information from global nodes in the graph. In each layer, both models learn a coefficient matrix to capture the correlations between nodes, based on which neighborhood aggregation is performed. The coefficient matrix allows signed values and is derived from an optimization problem that has a closed-form solution. We further accelerate neighborhood aggregation and derive a linear time complexity. We theoretically explain the models' effectiveness by proving that both the coefficient matrix and the generated node embedding matrix have the desired grouping effect. We conduct extensive experiments to compare our models against 11 other competitors on 15 benchmark datasets in a wide range of domains, scales and graph heterophilies. Experimental results show that our methods achieve superior performance and are also very efficient.
summary: We investigate graph neural networks on graphs with heterophily. Some existing methods amplify a node's neighborhood with multi-hop neighbors to include more nodes with homophily. However, it is a significant challenge to set personalized neighborhood sizes for different nodes. Further, for other homophilous nodes excluded in the neighborhood, they are ignored for information aggregation. To address these problems, we propose two models GloGNN and GloGNN++, which generate a node's embedding by aggregating information from global nodes in the graph. In each layer, both models learn a coefficient matrix to capture the correlations between nodes, based on which neighborhood aggregation is performed. The coefficient matrix allows signed values and is derived from an optimization problem that has a closed-form solution. We further accelerate neighborhood aggregation and derive a linear time complexity. We theoretically explain the models' effectiveness by proving that both the coefficient matrix and the generated node embedding matrix have the desired grouping effect. We conduct extensive experiments to compare our models against 11 other competitors on 15 benchmark datasets in a wide range of domains, scales and graph heterophilies. Experimental results show that our methods achieve superior performance and are also very efficient.
abstract_zh: 我们研究具有异质性的图上的图神经网络。一些现有方法利用多跳邻居放大节点的邻居以包含更多具有同质性的节点。然而，为不同节点设置个性化的邻域大小是一个重大挑战。此外，对于邻域中排除的其他同源节点，在信息聚合时将忽略它们。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了两个模型 GloGNN 和 GloGNN++，它们通过聚合图中全局节点的信息来生成节点的嵌入。在每一层中，两个模型都会学习一个系数矩阵来捕获节点之间的相关性，并基于该系数矩阵执行邻域聚合。系数矩阵允许有符号值，并且源自具有封闭式解的优化问题。我们进一步加速邻域聚合并推导出线性时间复杂度。我们通过证明系数矩阵和生成的节点嵌入矩阵都具有期望的分组效果，从理论上解释了模型的有效性。我们进行了广泛的实验，在广泛的领域、尺度和图异质性的 15 个基准数据集上将我们的模型与其他 11 个竞争对手进行比较。实验结果表明我们的方法取得了优异的性能并且非常高效。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了图神经网络在处理异质性图时的同质性问题，提出GloGNN和GloGNN++模型通过全局节点信息聚合解决现有方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过多跳邻居增强同质性但难以个性化设置邻域大小，且忽略部分同质节点导致信息聚合不全面。
AI.method: 提出GloGNN和GloGNN++模型，通过学习全局节点间的系数矩阵进行信息聚合，利用闭式解优化并加速至线性时间复杂度。
AI.result: 在15个基准数据集上实验表明，所提方法优于11种对比模型，且具有高效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文理论证明了模型的有效性，通过全局信息聚合解决了异质图中同质性问题，实验验证了方法的优越性。

authors_text: Yuan Sun,Sisi Liu,Junjie Deng,Xiaobing Zhao
title: TiBERT: Tibetan Pre-trained Language Model
title_zh: TiBERT：藏语预训练语言模型
abstract: The pre-trained language model is trained on large-scale unlabeled text and can achieve state-of-the-art results in many different downstream tasks. However, the current pre-trained language model is mainly concentrated in the Chinese and English fields. For low resource language such as Tibetan, there is lack of a monolingual pre-trained model. To promote the development of Tibetan natural language processing tasks, this paper collects the large-scale training data from Tibetan websites and constructs a vocabulary that can cover 99.95$\%$ of the words in the corpus by using Sentencepiece. Then, we train the Tibetan monolingual pre-trained language model named TiBERT on the data and vocabulary. Finally, we apply TiBERT to the downstream tasks of text classification and question generation, and compare it with classic models and multilingual pre-trained models, the experimental results show that TiBERT can achieve the best performance. Our model is published in http://tibert.cmli-nlp.com/
summary: The pre-trained language model is trained on large-scale unlabeled text and can achieve state-of-the-art results in many different downstream tasks. However, the current pre-trained language model is mainly concentrated in the Chinese and English fields. For low resource language such as Tibetan, there is lack of a monolingual pre-trained model. To promote the development of Tibetan natural language processing tasks, this paper collects the large-scale training data from Tibetan websites and constructs a vocabulary that can cover 99.95$\%$ of the words in the corpus by using Sentencepiece. Then, we train the Tibetan monolingual pre-trained language model named TiBERT on the data and vocabulary. Finally, we apply TiBERT to the downstream tasks of text classification and question generation, and compare it with classic models and multilingual pre-trained models, the experimental results show that TiBERT can achieve the best performance. Our model is published in http://tibert.cmli-nlp.com/
abstract_zh: 预训练的语言模型在大规模未标记文本上进行训练，可以在许多不同的下游任务中取得最先进的结果。然而，目前预训练的语言模型主要集中在中文和英文领域。对于藏语等低资源语言，缺乏单语预训练模型。为了促进藏文自然语言处理任务的发展，本文收集了藏文网站的大规模训练数据，并利用Sentencepiece构建了可以覆盖语料库中99.95$\%$单词的词汇表。然后，我们在数据和词汇上训练藏语单语预训练语言模型 TiBERT。最后，我们将TiBERT应用到文本分类和问题生成的下游任务中，并与经典模型和多语言预训练模型进行比较，实验结果表明TiBERT可以达到最佳性能。我们的模型发布在http://tibert.cmli-nlp.com/

AI.tldr: 本文提出TiBERT，一个针对藏语的预训练语言模型，以解决低资源语言缺乏有效预训练模型的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练语言模型主要集中在中文和英文，而藏语等低资源语言缺乏高质量的单语预训练模型，限制了相关自然语言处理任务的发展。
AI.method: 通过爬取藏语网站构建大规模语料库，使用Sentencepiece构建覆盖99.95%词汇的词表，并基于此训练藏语预训练模型TiBERT。
AI.result: 在文本分类和问题生成任务中，TiBERT的表现优于经典模型和多语言预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: TiBERT为藏语自然语言处理任务提供了有效工具，推动了低资源语言的模型研究与应用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出TiBERT，一个针对藏语的预训练语言模型，以解决低资源语言缺乏有效预训练模型的问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有预训练语言模型主要集中在中文和英文，而藏语等低资源语言缺乏高质量的单语预训练模型，限制了相关自然语言处理任务的发展。

ai_content.result: 在文本分类和问题生成任务中，TiBERT的表现优于经典模型和多语言预训练模型。

search_text: TiBERT: Tibetan Pre-trained Language Model TiBERT：藏语预训练语言模型 The pre-trained language model is trained on large-scale unlabeled text and can achieve state-of-the-art results in many different downstream tasks. However, the current pre-trained language model is mainly concentrated in the Chinese and English fields. For low resource language such as Tibetan, there is lack of a monolingual pre-trained model. To promote the development of Tibetan natural language processing tasks, this paper collects the large-scale training data from Tibetan websites and constructs a vocabulary that can cover 99.95$\%$ of the words in the corpus by using Sentencepiece. Then, we train the Tibetan monolingual pre-trained language model named TiBERT on the data and vocabulary. Finally, we apply TiBERT to the downstream tasks of text classification and question generation, and compare it with classic models and multilingual pre-trained models, the experimental results show that TiBERT can achieve the best performance. Our model is published in http://tibert.cmli-nlp.com/ 预训练的语言模型在大规模未标记文本上进行训练，可以在许多不同的下游任务中取得最先进的结果。然而，目前预训练的语言模型主要集中在中文和英文领域。对于藏语等低资源语言，缺乏单语预训练模型。为了促进藏文自然语言处理任务的发展，本文收集了藏文网站的大规模训练数据，并利用Sentencepiece构建了可以覆盖语料库中99.95$\%$单词的词汇表。然后，我们在数据和词汇上训练藏语单语预训练语言模型 TiBERT。最后，我们将TiBERT应用到文本分类和问题生成的下游任务中，并与经典模型和多语言预训练模型进行比较，实验结果表明TiBERT可以达到最佳性能。我们的模型发布在http://tibert.cmli-nlp.com/ 本文提出TiBERT，一个针对藏语的预训练语言模型，以解决低资源语言缺乏有效预训练模型的问题。 Yuan Sun,Sisi Liu,Junjie Deng,Xiaobing Zhao cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Valeria Efimova,Ivan Jarsky,Ilya Bizyaev,Andrey Filchenkov
title: Conditional Vector Graphics Generation for Music Cover Images
title_zh: 音乐封面图像的条件矢量图形生成
abstract: Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN) have motivated a rapid growth of the domain of computer image synthesis. As almost all the existing image synthesis algorithms consider an image as a pixel matrix, the high-resolution image synthesis is complicated.A good alternative can be vector images. However, they belong to the highly sophisticated parametric space, which is a restriction for solving the task of synthesizing vector graphics by GANs. In this paper, we consider a specific application domain that softens this restriction dramatically allowing the usage of vector image synthesis. Music cover images should meet the requirements of Internet streaming services and printing standards, which imply high resolution of graphic materials without any additional requirements on the content of such images. Existing music cover image generation services do not analyze tracks themselves; however, some services mostly consider only genre tags. To generate music covers as vector images that reflect the music and consist of simple geometric objects, we suggest a GAN-based algorithm called CoverGAN. The assessment of resulting images is based on their correspondence to the music compared with AttnGAN and DALL-E text-to-image generation according to title or lyrics. Moreover, the significance of the patterns found by CoverGAN has been evaluated in terms of the correspondence of the generated cover images to the musical tracks. Listeners evaluate the music covers generated by the proposed algorithm as quite satisfactory and corresponding to the tracks. Music cover images generation code and demo are available at https://github.com/IzhanVarsky/CoverGAN.
summary: Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN) have motivated a rapid growth of the domain of computer image synthesis. As almost all the existing image synthesis algorithms consider an image as a pixel matrix, the high-resolution image synthesis is complicated.A good alternative can be vector images. However, they belong to the highly sophisticated parametric space, which is a restriction for solving the task of synthesizing vector graphics by GANs. In this paper, we consider a specific application domain that softens this restriction dramatically allowing the usage of vector image synthesis. Music cover images should meet the requirements of Internet streaming services and printing standards, which imply high resolution of graphic materials without any additional requirements on the content of such images. Existing music cover image generation services do not analyze tracks themselves; however, some services mostly consider only genre tags. To generate music covers as vector images that reflect the music and consist of simple geometric objects, we suggest a GAN-based algorithm called CoverGAN. The assessment of resulting images is based on their correspondence to the music compared with AttnGAN and DALL-E text-to-image generation according to title or lyrics. Moreover, the significance of the patterns found by CoverGAN has been evaluated in terms of the correspondence of the generated cover images to the musical tracks. Listeners evaluate the music covers generated by the proposed algorithm as quite satisfactory and corresponding to the tracks. Music cover images generation code and demo are available at https://github.com/IzhanVarsky/CoverGAN.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）推动了计算机图像合成领域的快速发展。由于几乎所有现有的图像合成算法都将图像视为像素矩阵，因此高分辨率图像合成很复杂。矢量图像是一个很好的替代方案。然而，它们属于高度复杂的参数空间，这限制了 GAN 解决合成矢量图形的任务。在本文中，我们考虑了一个特定的应用领域，它极大地缓解了这种限制，允许使用矢量图像合成。音乐封面图像应满足互联网流媒体服务和印刷标准的要求，这意味着图文材料的高分辨率，而对此类图像的内容没有任何额外要求。现有的音乐封面图像生成服务本身并不分析曲目；然而，一些服务大多只考虑流派标签。为了将音乐封面生成为反映音乐并由简单几何对象组成的矢量图像，我们建议使用一种基于 GAN 的算法，称为 CoverGAN。对结果图像的评估是基于它们与音乐的对应关系，与根据标题或歌词的 AttnGAN 和 DALL-E 文本到图像生成进行比较。此外，CoverGAN 发现的模式的重要性已根据生成的封面图像与音乐曲目的对应关系进行了评估。听众评价所提出的算法生成的音乐封面非常令人满意并且与曲目相对应。音乐封面图像生成代码和演示可在 https://github.com/IzhanVarsky/CoverGAN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的算法CoverGAN，用于根据音乐生成符合流媒体和印刷标准的矢量图形音乐封面。
AI.motivation: 传统图像合成算法依赖像素矩阵导致高分辨率生成复杂，而矢量图像虽更高效但参数空间复杂。音乐封面需满足高分辨率要求且内容无额外限制，现有服务仅依赖流派标签生成效果有限。
AI.method: 设计CoverGAN模型，通过分析音乐元数据（如流派标签）和歌词标题，生成由简单几何图形组成的矢量封面，并与AttnGAN和DALL-E进行对比评估。
AI.result: 生成的矢量封面被听众评价为与音乐内容匹配度高，且满足印刷分辨率要求，代码和演示已开源。
AI.conclusion: CoverGAN有效解决了矢量图形音乐封面生成问题，证明了基于GAN的参数化矢量合成在特定应用场景中的可行性。

authors_text: Rui-Jie Yew,Alice Xiang
title: Regulating Facial Processing Technologies: Tensions Between Legal and Technical Considerations in the Application of Illinois BIPA
title_zh: 监管面部处理技术：伊利诺伊州 BIPA 应用中法律和技术考虑之间的紧张关系
comment: Forthcoming at FAccT 2022
comments: Forthcoming at FAccT 2022
abstract: Harms resulting from the development and deployment of facial processing technologies (FPT) have been met with increasing controversy. Several states and cities in the U.S. have banned the use of facial recognition by law enforcement and governments, but FPT are still being developed and used in a wide variety of contexts where they primarily are regulated by state biometric information privacy laws. Among these laws, the 2008 Illinois Biometric Information Privacy Act (BIPA) has generated a significant amount of litigation. Yet, with most BIPA lawsuits reaching settlements before there have been meaningful clarifications of relevant technical intricacies and legal definitions, there remains a great degree of uncertainty as to how exactly this law applies to FPT. What we have found through applications of BIPA in FPT litigation so far, however, points to potential disconnects between technical and legal communities. This paper analyzes what we know based on BIPA court proceedings and highlights these points of tension: areas where the technical operationalization of BIPA may create unintended and undesirable incentives for FPT development, as well as areas where BIPA litigation can bring to light the limitations of solely technical methods in achieving legal privacy values. These factors are relevant for (i) reasoning about biometric information privacy laws as a governing mechanism for FPT, (ii) assessing the potential harms of FPT, and (iii) providing incentives for the mitigation of these harms. By illuminating these considerations, we hope to empower courts and lawmakers to take a more nuanced approach to regulating FPT and developers to better understand privacy values in the current U.S. legal landscape.

Several states and cities in the U.S. have banned the use of facial recognition by law enforcement and governments, but FPT are still being developed and used in a wide variety of contexts where they primarily are regulated by state biometric information privacy laws. Among these laws, the 2008 Illinois Biometric Information Privacy Act (BIPA) has generated a significant amount of litigation. Yet, with most BIPA lawsuits reaching settlements before there have been meaningful clarifications of relevant technical intricacies and legal definitions, there remains a great degree of uncertainty as to how exactly this law applies to FPT. What we have found through applications of BIPA in FPT litigation so far, however, points to potential disconnects between technical and legal communities. This paper analyzes what we know based on BIPA court proceedings and highlights these points of tension: areas where the technical operationalization of BIPA may create unintended and undesirable incentives for FPT development, as well as areas where BIPA litigation can bring to light the limitations of solely technical methods in achieving legal privacy values. These factors are relevant for (i) reasoning about biometric information privacy laws as a governing mechanism for FPT, (ii) assessing the potential harms of FPT, and (iii) providing incentives for the mitigation of these harms. By illuminating these considerations, we hope to empower courts and lawmakers to take a more nuanced approach to regulating FPT and developers to better understand privacy values in the current U.S. legal landscape.
abstract_zh: 面部处理技术（FPT）的开发和部署所带来的危害引起了越来越多的争议。美国的几个州和城市已禁止执法部门和政府使用面部识别，但 FPT 仍在各种环境中开发和使用，这些环境主要受各州生物识别信息隐私法的监管。在这些法律中，2008 年伊利诺伊州生物识别信息隐私法案 (BIPA) 引发了大量诉讼。然而，由于大多数 BIPA 诉讼在相关技术复杂性和法律定义得到有意义的澄清之前就达成和解，因此该法律究竟如何适用于 FPT 仍然存在很大程度的不确定性。然而，迄今为止，我们通过 BIPA 在 FPT 诉讼中的应用发现，技术社区和法律社区之间存在潜在的脱节。本文分析了我们基于 BIPA 法院诉讼程序所了解的情况，并强调了这些紧张点：BIPA 的技术运作可能会对 FPT 的发展产生意想不到的和不良的激励，以及 BIPA 诉讼可以揭示单纯技术方法在实现合法隐私价值方面的局限性。这些因素与 (i) 将生物特征信息隐私法作为 FPT 治理机制进行推理，(ii) 评估 FPT 的潜在危害，以及 (iii) 为减轻这些危害提供激励措施。通过阐明这些考虑因素，我们希望使法院和立法者能够采取更细致的方法来监管 FPT 和开发者，以更好地理解当前美国法律环境中的隐私价值。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了伊利诺伊州BIPA法律在面部处理技术（FPT）诉讼中的适用性，揭示法律与技术之间的矛盾。
AI.motivation: BIPA诉讼中缺乏对技术细节的明确澄清，导致法律适用的不确定性，需探讨法律与技术间的脱节问题。
AI.method: 通过分析BIPA相关诉讼案例及法律条文，对比技术实现与法律定义的差异。
AI.result: 发现BIPA的技术实施可能引发不良激励，且诉讼凸显纯技术手段在隐私保护中的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 需推动法院与立法者采取更细致的监管策略，并帮助开发者理解当前法律环境中的隐私价值。

tldr: 本文分析了伊利诺伊州BIPA法律在面部处理技术（FPT）诉讼中的适用性，揭示法律与技术之间的矛盾。
motivation: BIPA诉讼中缺乏对技术细节的明确澄清，导致法律适用的不确定性，需探讨法律与技术间的脱节问题。
method: 通过分析BIPA相关诉讼案例及法律条文，对比技术实现与法律定义的差异。
result: 发现BIPA的技术实施可能引发不良激励，且诉讼凸显纯技术手段在隐私保护中的局限性。

search_text: Regulating Facial Processing Technologies: Tensions Between Legal and Technical Considerations in the Application of Illinois BIPA 监管面部处理技术：伊利诺伊州 BIPA 应用中法律和技术考虑之间的紧张关系 Harms resulting from the development and deployment of facial processing technologies (FPT) have been met with increasing controversy. Several states and cities in the U.S. have banned the use of facial recognition by law enforcement and governments, but FPT are still being developed and used in a wide variety of contexts where they primarily are regulated by state biometric information privacy laws. Among these laws, the 2008 Illinois Biometric Information Privacy Act (BIPA) has generated a significant amount of litigation. Yet, with most BIPA lawsuits reaching settlements before there have been meaningful clarifications of relevant technical intricacies and legal definitions, there remains a great degree of uncertainty as to how exactly this law applies to FPT. What we have found through applications of BIPA in FPT litigation so far, however, points to potential disconnects between technical and legal communities. This paper analyzes what we know based on BIPA court proceedings and highlights these points of tension: areas where the technical operationalization of BIPA may create unintended and undesirable incentives for FPT development, as well as areas where BIPA litigation can bring to light the limitations of solely technical methods in achieving legal privacy values. These factors are relevant for (i) reasoning about biometric information privacy laws as a governing mechanism for FPT, (ii) assessing the potential harms of FPT, and (iii) providing incentives for the mitigation of these harms. By illuminating these considerations, we hope to empower courts and lawmakers to take a more nuanced approach to regulating FPT and developers to better understand privacy values in the current U.S. legal landscape. 面部处理技术（FPT）的开发和部署所带来的危害引起了越来越多的争议。美国的几个州和城市已禁止执法部门和政府使用面部识别，但 FPT 仍在各种环境中开发和使用，这些环境主要受各州生物识别信息隐私法的监管。在这些法律中，2008 年伊利诺伊州生物识别信息隐私法案 (BIPA) 引发了大量诉讼。然而，由于大多数 BIPA 诉讼在相关技术复杂性和法律定义得到有意义的澄清之前就达成和解，因此该法律究竟如何适用于 FPT 仍然存在很大程度的不确定性。然而，迄今为止，我们通过 BIPA 在 FPT 诉讼中的应用发现，技术社区和法律社区之间存在潜在的脱节。本文分析了我们基于 BIPA 法院诉讼程序所了解的情况，并强调了这些紧张点：BIPA 的技术运作可能会对 FPT 的发展产生意想不到的和不良的激励，以及 BIPA 诉讼可以揭示单纯技术方法在实现合法隐私价值方面的局限性。这些因素与 (i) 将生物特征信息隐私法作为 FPT 治理机制进行推理，(ii) 评估 FPT 的潜在危害，以及 (iii) 为减轻这些危害提供激励措施。通过阐明这些考虑因素，我们希望使法院和立法者能够采取更细致的方法来监管 FPT 和开发者，以更好地理解当前美国法律环境中的隐私价值。 本文分析了伊利诺伊州BIPA法律在面部处理技术（FPT）诉讼中的适用性，揭示法律与技术之间的矛盾。 Rui-Jie Yew,Alice Xiang cs.CY,cs.CV

authors_text: Yukun Yang,Peng Li
title: A Computational Framework of Cortical Microcircuits Approximates Sign-concordant Random Backpropagation
title_zh: 皮质微电路的计算框架近似符号一致随机反向传播
abstract: Several recent studies attempt to address the biological implausibility of the well-known backpropagation (BP) method. While promising methods such as feedback alignment, direct feedback alignment, and their variants like sign-concordant feedback alignment tackle BP's weight transport problem, their validity remains controversial owing to a set of other unsolved issues. In this work, we answer the question of whether it is possible to realize random backpropagation solely based on mechanisms observed in neuroscience. We propose a hypothetical framework consisting of a new microcircuit architecture and its supporting Hebbian learning rules. Comprising three types of cells and two types of synaptic connectivity, the proposed microcircuit architecture computes and propagates error signals through local feedback connections and supports the training of multi-layered spiking neural networks with a globally defined spiking error function. We employ the Hebbian rule operating in local compartments to update synaptic weights and achieve supervised learning in a biologically plausible manner. Finally, we interpret the proposed framework from an optimization point of view and show its equivalence to sign-concordant feedback alignment. The proposed framework is benchmarked on several datasets including MNIST and CIFAR10, demonstrating promising BP-comparable accuracy.
summary: Several recent studies attempt to address the biological implausibility of the well-known backpropagation (BP) method. While promising methods such as feedback alignment, direct feedback alignment, and their variants like sign-concordant feedback alignment tackle BP's weight transport problem, their validity remains controversial owing to a set of other unsolved issues. In this work, we answer the question of whether it is possible to realize random backpropagation solely based on mechanisms observed in neuroscience. We propose a hypothetical framework consisting of a new microcircuit architecture and its supporting Hebbian learning rules. Comprising three types of cells and two types of synaptic connectivity, the proposed microcircuit architecture computes and propagates error signals through local feedback connections and supports the training of multi-layered spiking neural networks with a globally defined spiking error function. We employ the Hebbian rule operating in local compartments to update synaptic weights and achieve supervised learning in a biologically plausible manner. Finally, we interpret the proposed framework from an optimization point of view and show its equivalence to sign-concordant feedback alignment. The proposed framework is benchmarked on several datasets including MNIST and CIFAR10, demonstrating promising BP-comparable accuracy.
abstract_zh: 最近的几项研究试图解决众所周知的反向传播（BP）方法在生物学上的不合理性。虽然反馈对齐、直接反馈对齐等有前途的方法及其变体（如符号一致反馈对齐）可以解决 BP 的重量传输问题，但由于一系列其他未解决的问题，它们的有效性仍然存在争议。在这项工作中，我们回答了是否有可能仅基于神经科学中观察到的机制来实现随机反向传播的问题。我们提出了一个假设框架，由新的微电路架构及其支持的赫布学习规则组成。所提出的微电路架构由三种类型的细胞和两种类型的突触连接组成，通过局部反馈连接计算和传播误差信号，并支持具有全局定义的尖峰误差函数的多层尖峰神经网络的训练。我们采用在局部区室中运行的赫布规则来更新突触权重并以生物学上合理的方式实现监督学习。最后，我们从优化的角度解释了所提出的框架，并展示了其与符号一致反馈对齐的等价性。所提出的框架在包括 MNIST 和 CIFAR10 在内的多个数据集上进行了基准测试，证明了与 BP 相当的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于皮层微回路的计算框架，用于实现符合生物学规律的随机反向传播算法。
AI.motivation: 传统反向传播算法存在生物合理性问题，现有替代方法如反馈对齐等仍存在争议，需探索更符合神经科学机制的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含三种神经元和两种突触连接的微回路架构，结合局部反馈连接与赫布学习规则，实现多层脉冲神经网络的监督学习。
AI.result: 在MNIST和CIFAR10等数据集上验证了该框架的性能，准确率与传统反向传播算法相当。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架从优化角度等价于符号一致反馈对齐，为生物可解释的深度学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Fan Wang,Adams Wai-Kin Kong
title: Exploiting the Relationship Between Kendall's Rank Correlation and Cosine Similarity for Attribution Protection
title_zh: 利用肯德尔排名相关性和余弦相似度之间的关系进行归因保护
abstract: Model attributions are important in deep neural networks as they aid practitioners in understanding the models, but recent studies reveal that attributions can be easily perturbed by adding imperceptible noise to the input. The non-differentiable Kendall's rank correlation is a key performance index for attribution protection. In this paper, we first show that the expected Kendall's rank correlation is positively correlated to cosine similarity and then indicate that the direction of attribution is the key to attribution robustness. Based on these findings, we explore the vector space of attribution to explain the shortcomings of attribution defense methods using $\ell_p$ norm and propose integrated gradient regularizer (IGR), which maximizes the cosine similarity between natural and perturbed attributions. Our analysis further exposes that IGR encourages neurons with the same activation states for natural samples and the corresponding perturbed samples, which is shown to induce robustness to gradient-based attribution methods. Our experiments on different models and datasets confirm our analysis on attribution protection and demonstrate a decent improvement in adversarial robustness.
summary: Model attributions are important in deep neural networks as they aid practitioners in understanding the models, but recent studies reveal that attributions can be easily perturbed by adding imperceptible noise to the input. The non-differentiable Kendall's rank correlation is a key performance index for attribution protection. In this paper, we first show that the expected Kendall's rank correlation is positively correlated to cosine similarity and then indicate that the direction of attribution is the key to attribution robustness. Based on these findings, we explore the vector space of attribution to explain the shortcomings of attribution defense methods using $\ell_p$ norm and propose integrated gradient regularizer (IGR), which maximizes the cosine similarity between natural and perturbed attributions. Our analysis further exposes that IGR encourages neurons with the same activation states for natural samples and the corresponding perturbed samples, which is shown to induce robustness to gradient-based attribution methods. Our experiments on different models and datasets confirm our analysis on attribution protection and demonstrate a decent improvement in adversarial robustness.
abstract_zh: 模型归因在深度神经网络中很重要，因为它们可以帮助从业者理解模型，但最近的研究表明，通过在输入中添加难以察觉的噪声很容易扰乱归因。不可微的肯德尔等级相关性是归因保护的关键性能指标。在本文中，我们首先证明预期的肯德尔等级相关性与余弦相似度正相关，然后表明归因方向是归因稳健性的关键。基于这些发现，我们探索了归因向量空间，以解释使用 $\ell_p$ 范数的归因防御方法的缺点，并提出了集成梯度正则化器（IGR），它最大化了自然归因和扰动归因之间的余弦相似性。我们的分析进一步表明，IGR 鼓励神经元对自然样本和相应的扰动样本具有相同的激活状态，这被证明可以增强基于梯度的归因方法的鲁棒性。我们对不同模型和数据集的实验证实了我们对归因保护的分析，并证明对抗鲁棒性有了相当大的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文通过研究Kendall等级相关系数与余弦相似度的关系，提出了一种新的归因保护方法以增强深度神经网络对抗扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 模型归因对理解深度学习模型至关重要，但现有研究显示归因结果容易受到输入微小扰动的影响，而基于ℓ_p范数的防御方法存在不足。
AI.method: 建立Kendall相关系数与余弦相似度的正相关性，提出集成梯度正则化器（IGR）以最大化自然样本与扰动样本归因间的余弦相似度，并通过激活状态对齐提升梯度归因方法的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个模型和数据集上有效提升了对抗鲁棒性，验证了归因保护分析的正确性。
AI.conclusion: IGR通过强制神经元在自然样本与扰动样本间保持一致的激活状态，显著增强了梯度归因方法的鲁棒性，为归因保护提供了新思路。

Based on these findings, we explore the vector space of attribution to explain the shortcomings of attribution defense methods using $\ell_p$ norm and propose integrated gradient regularizer (IGR), which maximizes the cosine similarity between natural and perturbed attributions. Our analysis further exposes that IGR encourages neurons with the same activation states for natural samples and the corresponding perturbed samples, which is shown to induce robustness to gradient-based attribution methods. Our experiments on different models and datasets confirm our analysis on attribution protection and demonstrate a decent improvement in adversarial robustness. 模型归因在深度神经网络中很重要，因为它们可以帮助从业者理解模型，但最近的研究表明，通过在输入中添加难以察觉的噪声很容易扰乱归因。不可微的肯德尔等级相关性是归因保护的关键性能指标。在本文中，我们首先证明预期的肯德尔等级相关性与余弦相似度正相关，然后表明归因方向是归因稳健性的关键。基于这些发现，我们探索了归因向量空间，以解释使用 $\ell_p$ 范数的归因防御方法的缺点，并提出了集成梯度正则化器（IGR），它最大化了自然归因和扰动归因之间的余弦相似性。我们的分析进一步表明，IGR 鼓励神经元对自然样本和相应的扰动样本具有相同的激活状态，这被证明可以增强基于梯度的归因方法的鲁棒性。我们对不同模型和数据集的实验证实了我们对归因保护的分析，并证明对抗鲁棒性有了相当大的改进。 本文通过研究Kendall等级相关系数与余弦相似度的关系，提出了一种新的归因保护方法以增强深度神经网络对抗扰动的鲁棒性。 Fan Wang,Adams Wai-Kin Kong cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Amir H Gandomi,Kalyanmoy Deb,Ronald C Averill,Shahryar Rahnamayan,Mohammad Nabi Omidvar
title: Variable Functioning and Its Application to Large Scale Steel Frame Design Optimization
title_zh: 变函数及其在大型钢框架设计优化中的应用
abstract: To solve complex real-world problems, heuristics and concept-based approaches can be used in order to incorporate information into the problem. In this study, a concept-based approach called variable functioning Fx is introduced to reduce the optimization variables and narrow down the search space. In this method, the relationships among one or more subset of variables are defined with functions using information prior to optimization; thus, instead of modifying the variables in the search process, the function variables are optimized. By using problem structure analysis technique and engineering expert knowledge, the $Fx$ method is used to enhance the steel frame design optimization process as a complex real-world problem. The proposed approach is coupled with particle swarm optimization and differential evolution algorithms and used for three case studies. The algorithms are applied to optimize the case studies by considering the relationships among column cross-section areas. The results show that $Fx$ can significantly improve both the convergence rate and the final design of a frame structure, even if it is only used for seeding.
summary: To solve complex real-world problems, heuristics and concept-based approaches can be used in order to incorporate information into the problem. In this study, a concept-based approach called variable functioning Fx is introduced to reduce the optimization variables and narrow down the search space. In this method, the relationships among one or more subset of variables are defined with functions using information prior to optimization; thus, instead of modifying the variables in the search process, the function variables are optimized. By using problem structure analysis technique and engineering expert knowledge, the $Fx$ method is used to enhance the steel frame design optimization process as a complex real-world problem. The proposed approach is coupled with particle swarm optimization and differential evolution algorithms and used for three case studies. The algorithms are applied to optimize the case studies by considering the relationships among column cross-section areas. The results show that $Fx$ can significantly improve both the convergence rate and the final design of a frame structure, even if it is only used for seeding.
abstract_zh: 为了解决复杂的现实问题，可以使用启发式和基于概念的方法将信息纳入问题中。在本研究中，引入了一种称为变量函数 Fx 的基于概念的方法，以减少优化变量并缩小搜索空间。在此方法中，一个或多个变量子集之间的关系是通过使用优化之前的信息的函数来定义的；因此，不是在搜索过程中修改变量，而是对函数变量进行优化。通过使用问题结构分析技术和工程专家知识，$Fx$ 方法用于增强钢框架设计优化过程作为一个复杂的现实问题。所提出的方法与粒子群优化和差分进化算法相结合，并用于三个案例研究。该算法通过考虑柱横截面积之间的关系来优化案例研究。结果表明，$Fx$ 可以显着提高收敛速度和框架结构的最终设计，即使它仅用于播种。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变量功能（Fx）的方法，用于减少优化变量并提升大规模钢框架设计优化效率。
AI.motivation: 现实工程问题中变量关系复杂且搜索空间庞大，传统优化方法效率低下，需结合先验知识简化问题。
AI.method: 通过定义变量间函数关系构建Fx方法，结合粒子群优化和差分进化算法，利用结构分析与工程专家知识优化钢框架设计。
AI.result: Fx方法显著提升收敛速度与最终设计质量，即使仅用于初始化也能有效优化框架结构。
AI.conclusion: Fx方法通过变量功能建模有效降低复杂度，为大规模工程优化提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Fang Wu,Siyuan Li,Stan Z. Li
title: Discovering the Representation Bottleneck of Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 发现图神经网络的表示瓶颈
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering ( Volume: 36, Issue: 12, December 2024)
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering ( Volume: 36, Issue: 12, December 2024)
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) rely mainly on the message-passing paradigm to propagate node features and build interactions, and different graph learning problems require different ranges of node interactions. In this work, we explore the capacity of GNNs to capture node interactions under contexts of different complexities. We discover that GNNs usually fail to capture the most informative kinds of interaction styles for diverse graph learning tasks, and thus name this phenomenon GNNs' representation bottleneck. As a response, we demonstrate that the inductive bias introduced by existing graph construction mechanisms can result in this representation bottleneck, \emph{i.e.}, preventing GNNs from learning interactions of the most appropriate complexity. To address that limitation, we propose a novel graph rewiring approach based on interaction patterns learned by GNNs to dynamically adjust each node's receptive fields. Extensive experiments on both real-world and synthetic datasets prove the effectiveness of our algorithm in alleviating the representation bottleneck and its superiority in enhancing the performance of GNNs over state-of-the-art graph rewiring baselines.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) rely mainly on the message-passing paradigm to propagate node features and build interactions, and different graph learning problems require different ranges of node interactions. In this work, we explore the capacity of GNNs to capture node interactions under contexts of different complexities. We discover that GNNs usually fail to capture the most informative kinds of interaction styles for diverse graph learning tasks, and thus name this phenomenon GNNs' representation bottleneck. As a response, we demonstrate that the inductive bias introduced by existing graph construction mechanisms can result in this representation bottleneck, \emph{i.e.}, preventing GNNs from learning interactions of the most appropriate complexity. To address that limitation, we propose a novel graph rewiring approach based on interaction patterns learned by GNNs to dynamically adjust each node's receptive fields. Extensive experiments on both real-world and synthetic datasets prove the effectiveness of our algorithm in alleviating the representation bottleneck and its superiority in enhancing the performance of GNNs over state-of-the-art graph rewiring baselines.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）主要依靠消息传递范式来传播节点特征并建立交互，不同的图学习问题需要不同范围的节点交互。在这项工作中，我们探索了 GNN 在不同复杂性的背景下捕获节点交互的能力。我们发现 GNN 通常无法捕获各种图学习任务中信息最丰富的交互方式，因此将这种现象称为 GNN 的表示瓶颈。作为回应，我们证明现有图构建机制引入的归纳偏差可能会导致这种表示瓶颈，\emph{i.e.}，阻止 GNN 学习最合适复杂度的交互。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种基于 GNN 学习的交互模式的新颖的图重新布线方法，以动态调整每个节点的感受野。对现实世界和合成数据集的大量实验证明了我们的算法在缓解表示瓶颈方面的有效性，以及在增强 GNN 性能方面优于最先进的图重新布线基线的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文研究图神经网络（GNN）在不同复杂度任务中捕捉节点交互能力的限制，提出动态调整图结构的方法以缓解表示瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN因图构建机制的归纳偏置，难以学习最合适的交互复杂度，导致在多样化的图学习任务中表现受限。
AI.method: 基于GNN学习的交互模式，提出动态调整节点感受野的图重 wiring 方法，优化图结构以增强表示能力。
AI.result: 在真实和合成数据集上的实验表明，该方法有效缓解了表示瓶颈，优于现有图重 wiring 基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态图调整，本文方法成功突破GNN的表示瓶颈，提升了其在复杂任务中的性能。

authors_text: Bum Jun Kim,Hyeyeon Choi,Hyeonah Jang,Dong Gu Lee,Wonseok Jeong,Sang Woo Kim
title: Guidelines for the Regularization of Gammas in Batch Normalization for Deep Residual Networks
title_zh: 深度残差网络批量归一化中 Gamma 正则化指南
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures
comments: 12 pages, 6 figures
abstract: L2 regularization for weights in neural networks is widely used as a standard training trick. However, L2 regularization for gamma, a trainable parameter of batch normalization, remains an undiscussed mystery and is applied in different ways depending on the library and practitioner. In this paper, we study whether L2 regularization for gamma is valid. To explore this issue, we consider two approaches: 1) variance control to make the residual network behave like identity mapping and 2) stable optimization through the improvement of effective learning rate. Through two analyses, we specify the desirable and undesirable gamma to apply L2 regularization and propose four guidelines for managing them. In several experiments, we observed the increase and decrease in performance caused by applying L2 regularization to gamma of four categories, which is consistent with our four guidelines. Our proposed guidelines were validated through various tasks and architectures, including variants of residual networks and transformers.
summary: L2 regularization for weights in neural networks is widely used as a standard training trick. However, L2 regularization for gamma, a trainable parameter of batch normalization, remains an undiscussed mystery and is applied in different ways depending on the library and practitioner. In this paper, we study whether L2 regularization for gamma is valid. To explore this issue, we consider two approaches: 1) variance control to make the residual network behave like identity mapping and 2) stable optimization through the improvement of effective learning rate. Through two analyses, we specify the desirable and undesirable gamma to apply L2 regularization and propose four guidelines for managing them. In several experiments, we observed the increase and decrease in performance caused by applying L2 regularization to gamma of four categories, which is consistent with our four guidelines. Our proposed guidelines were validated through various tasks and architectures, including variants of residual networks and transformers.
abstract_zh: 神经网络中权重的 L2 正则化被广泛用作标准训练技巧。然而，gamma 的 L2 正则化（批标准化的可训练参数）仍然是一个未讨论的谜团，并且根据库和实践者以不同的方式应用。在本文中，我们研究了 gamma 的 L2 正则化是否有效。为了探讨这个问题，我们考虑两种方法：1）方差控制，使残差网络表现得像恒等映射；2）通过提高有效学习率进行稳定优化。通过两次分析，我们指定了应用 L2 正则化所需的和不需要的 gamma，并提出了管理它们的四个准则。在几个实验中，我们观察到将 L2 正则化应用于四个类别的 gamma 所导致的性能增加和下降，这与我们的四个准则一致。我们提出的指南通过各种任务和架构进行了验证，包括残差网络和变压器的变体。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在深度残差网络中对批量归一化参数gamma应用L2正则化的有效性，并提出四条管理指南。
AI.motivation: 现有对批量归一化中gamma参数的正则化方法缺乏统一标准，不同框架和实践者存在差异，需明确其有效性及适用场景。
AI.method: 通过方差控制（使残差网络近似恒等映射）和优化稳定性（改进有效学习率）两方面分析，确定适用L2正则化的gamma特征，并提出四条管理指南。
AI.result: 实验验证了四类gamma应用L2正则化后的性能变化与指南一致，指南在残差网络及Transformer等多架构任务中有效。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的gamma正则化指南为深度网络训练提供了实践依据，明确了正则化适用条件及优化方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了在深度残差网络中对批量归一化参数gamma应用L2正则化的有效性，并提出四条管理指南。

ai_content.method: 通过方差控制（使残差网络近似恒等映射）和优化稳定性（改进有效学习率）两方面分析，确定适用L2正则化的gamma特征，并提出四条管理指南。

ai_content.conclusion: 本文提出的gamma正则化指南为深度网络训练提供了实践依据，明确了正则化适用条件及优化方向。

search_text: Guidelines for the Regularization of Gammas in Batch Normalization for Deep Residual Networks 深度残差网络批量归一化中 Gamma 正则化指南 L2 regularization for weights in neural networks is widely used as a standard training trick. However, L2 regularization for gamma, a trainable parameter of batch normalization, remains an undiscussed mystery and is applied in different ways depending on the library and practitioner. In this paper, we study whether L2 regularization for gamma is valid. To explore this issue, we consider two approaches: 1) variance control to make the residual network behave like identity mapping and 2) stable optimization through the improvement of effective learning rate. Through two analyses, we specify the desirable and undesirable gamma to apply L2 regularization and propose four guidelines for managing them. In several experiments, we observed the increase and decrease in performance caused by applying L2 regularization to gamma of four categories, which is consistent with our four guidelines. Our proposed guidelines were validated through various tasks and architectures, including variants of residual networks and transformers. 神经网络中权重的 L2 正则化被广泛用作标准训练技巧。然而，gamma 的 L2 正则化（批标准化的可训练参数）仍然是一个未讨论的谜团，并且根据库和实践者以不同的方式应用。在本文中，我们研究了 gamma 的 L2 正则化是否有效。为了探讨这个问题，我们考虑两种方法：1）方差控制，使残差网络表现得像恒等映射；2）通过提高有效学习率进行稳定优化。通过两次分析，我们指定了应用 L2 正则化所需的和不需要的 gamma，并提出了管理它们的四个准则。在几个实验中，我们观察到将 L2 正则化应用于四个类别的 gamma 所导致的性能增加和下降，这与我们的四个准则一致。我们提出的指南通过各种任务和架构进行了验证，包括残差网络和变压器的变体。 本文研究了在深度残差网络中对批量归一化参数gamma应用L2正则化的有效性，并提出四条管理指南。 Bum Jun Kim,Hyeyeon Choi,Hyeonah Jang,Dong Gu Lee,Wonseok Jeong,Sang Woo Kim cs.CV

authors_text: Vasudeva Raju Sangaraju,Bharath Kumar Bolla,Deepak Kumar Nayak,Jyothsna Kh
title: Topic Modelling on Consumer Financial Protection Bureau Data: An Approach Using BERT Based Embeddings
title_zh: 消费者金融保护局数据的主题建模：一种使用基于 BERT 的嵌入的方法
comment: Accepted at International Conference for Convergence in Technology, 2022
comments: Accepted at International Conference for Convergence in Technology, 2022
abstract: Customers' reviews and comments are important for businesses to understand users' sentiment about the products and services. However, this data needs to be analyzed to assess the sentiment associated with topics/aspects to provide efficient customer assistance. LDA and LSA fail to capture the semantic relationship and are not specific to any domain. In this study, we evaluate BERTopic, a novel method that generates topics using sentence embeddings on Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) data. Our work shows that BERTopic is flexible and yet provides meaningful and diverse topics compared to LDA and LSA. Furthermore, domain-specific pre-trained embeddings (FinBERT) yield even better topics. We evaluated the topics on coherence score (c_v) and UMass.
summary: Customers' reviews and comments are important for businesses to understand users' sentiment about the products and services. However, this data needs to be analyzed to assess the sentiment associated with topics/aspects to provide efficient customer assistance. LDA and LSA fail to capture the semantic relationship and are not specific to any domain. In this study, we evaluate BERTopic, a novel method that generates topics using sentence embeddings on Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) data. Our work shows that BERTopic is flexible and yet provides meaningful and diverse topics compared to LDA and LSA. Furthermore, domain-specific pre-trained embeddings (FinBERT) yield even better topics. We evaluated the topics on coherence score (c_v) and UMass.
abstract_zh: 客户的评论和评论对于企业了解用户对产品和服务的看法非常重要。然而，需要分析这些数据以评估与主题/方面相关的情绪，从而提供有效的客户帮助。 LDA和LSA无法捕获语义关系，并且不特定于任何领域。在本研究中，我们评估了 BERTopic，这是一种使用消费者金融保护局 (CFPB) 数据上的句子嵌入来生成主题的新颖方法。我们的工作表明，与 LDA 和 LSA 相比，BERTopic 非常灵活，并且提供了有意义且多样化的主题。此外，特定领域的预训练嵌入（FinBERT）会产生更好的主题。我们评估了一致性分数 (c_v) 和麻省大学的主题。

AI.tldr: 本文利用BERTopic方法对消费者金融保护局（CFPB）数据进行主题建模，比较其与LDA和LSA的效果，并评估领域特定FinBERT嵌入的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法如LDA和LSA无法有效捕捉语义关系且缺乏领域特定性，需探索更有效的主题建模方法以提升客户情感分析的准确性。
AI.method: 采用BERTopic方法生成主题，结合FinBERT预训练嵌入，并通过c_v一致性得分和UMass指标评估主题质量。
AI.result: BERTopic相比LDA和LSA生成更灵活、有意义且多样的主题，而FinBERT嵌入在主题评估指标上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: BERTopic在主题建模中优于传统方法，领域特定嵌入（如FinBERT）能进一步提升效果，未来可探索更多优化方向。

authors_text: Cheng Feng
title: A cGAN Ensemble-based Uncertainty-aware Surrogate Model for Offline Model-based Optimization in Industrial Control Problems
title_zh: 基于 cGAN 集成的不确定性感知代理模型，用于工业控制问题中基于离线模型的优化
comment: Accepted in IJCNN 2024
comments: Accepted in IJCNN 2024
abstract: This study focuses on two important problems related to applying offline model-based optimization to real-world industrial control problems. The first problem is how to create a reliable probabilistic model that accurately captures the dynamics present in noisy industrial data. The second problem is how to reliably optimize control parameters without actively collecting feedback from industrial systems. Specifically, we introduce a novel cGAN ensemble-based uncertainty-aware surrogate model for reliable offline model-based optimization in industrial control problems. The effectiveness of the proposed method is demonstrated through extensive experiments conducted on two representative cases, namely a discrete control case and a continuous control case. The results of these experiments show that our method outperforms several competitive baselines in the field of offline model-based optimization for industrial control.
summary: This study focuses on two important problems related to applying offline model-based optimization to real-world industrial control problems. The first problem is how to create a reliable probabilistic model that accurately captures the dynamics present in noisy industrial data. The second problem is how to reliably optimize control parameters without actively collecting feedback from industrial systems. Specifically, we introduce a novel cGAN ensemble-based uncertainty-aware surrogate model for reliable offline model-based optimization in industrial control problems. The effectiveness of the proposed method is demonstrated through extensive experiments conducted on two representative cases, namely a discrete control case and a continuous control case. The results of these experiments show that our method outperforms several competitive baselines in the field of offline model-based optimization for industrial control.
abstract_zh: 本研究重点关注与将基于离线模型的优化应用于现实工业控制问题相关的两个重要问题。第一个问题是如何创建可靠的概率模型，以准确捕获嘈杂的工业数据中存在的动态。第二个问题是如何在不主动收集工业系统反馈的情况下可靠地优化控制参数。具体来说，我们引入了一种新颖的基于 cGAN 集成的不确定性感知代理模型，用于工业控制问题中可靠的基于离线模型的优化。通过对两个代表性案例（即离散控制案例和连续控制案例）进行的大量实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。这些实验的结果表明，我们的方法优于基于离线模型的工业控制优化领域的几个竞争基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于cGAN集成的不确定性感知替代模型，用于解决工业控制中离线模型优化的可靠性问题。
AI.motivation: 工业控制场景中存在数据噪声大且无法实时反馈的问题，传统方法难以构建可靠模型并实现有效优化。
AI.method: 设计cGAN集成框架结合不确定性感知机制，通过离线数据学习系统动态并生成控制参数优化方案。
AI.result: 在离散控制和连续控制案例中，该方法均优于现有基准算法，验证了模型的有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的不确定性感知替代模型为工业控制离线优化提供了新思路，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yidong Wang,Hao Chen,Qiang Heng,Wenxin Hou,Yue Fan,Zhen Wu,Jindong Wang,Marios Savvides,Takahiro Shinozaki,Bhiksha Raj,Bernt Schiele,Xing Xie
title: FreeMatch: Self-adaptive Thresholding for Semi-supervised Learning
title_zh: FreeMatch：半监督学习的自适应阈值
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2023. Code: https://github.com/microsoft/Semi-supervised-learning
comments: Accepted by ICLR 2023. Code: https://github.com/microsoft/Semi-supervised-learning
abstract: Semi-supervised Learning (SSL) has witnessed great success owing to the impressive performances brought by various methods based on pseudo labeling and consistency regularization. However, we argue that existing methods might fail to utilize the unlabeled data more effectively since they either use a pre-defined / fixed threshold or an ad-hoc threshold adjusting scheme, resulting in inferior performance and slow convergence. We first analyze a motivating example to obtain intuitions on the relationship between the desirable threshold and model's learning status. Based on the analysis, we hence propose FreeMatch to adjust the confidence threshold in a self-adaptive manner according to the model's learning status. We further introduce a self-adaptive class fairness regularization penalty to encourage the model for diverse predictions during the early training stage. Extensive experiments indicate the superiority of FreeMatch especially when the labeled data are extremely rare. FreeMatch achieves 5.78%, 13.59%, and 1.28% error rate reduction over the latest state-of-the-art method FlexMatch on CIFAR-10 with 1 label per class, STL-10 with 4 labels per class, and ImageNet with 100 labels per class, respectively. Moreover, FreeMatch can also boost the performance of imbalanced SSL. The codes can be found at https://github.com/microsoft/Semi-supervised-learning.
summary: Semi-supervised Learning (SSL) has witnessed great success owing to the impressive performances brought by various methods based on pseudo labeling and consistency regularization. However, we argue that existing methods might fail to utilize the unlabeled data more effectively since they either use a pre-defined / fixed threshold or an ad-hoc threshold adjusting scheme, resulting in inferior performance and slow convergence. We first analyze a motivating example to obtain intuitions on the relationship between the desirable threshold and model's learning status. Based on the analysis, we hence propose FreeMatch to adjust the confidence threshold in a self-adaptive manner according to the model's learning status. We further introduce a self-adaptive class fairness regularization penalty to encourage the model for diverse predictions during the early training stage. Extensive experiments indicate the superiority of FreeMatch especially when the labeled data are extremely rare. FreeMatch achieves 5.78%, 13.59%, and 1.28% error rate reduction over the latest state-of-the-art method FlexMatch on CIFAR-10 with 1 label per class, STL-10 with 4 labels per class, and ImageNet with 100 labels per class, respectively. Moreover, FreeMatch can also boost the performance of imbalanced SSL. The codes can be found at https://github.com/microsoft/Semi-supervised-learning.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习（SSL）由于基于伪标签和一致性正则化的各种方法带来的令人印象深刻的性能而取得了巨大的成功。然而，我们认为现有方法可能无法更有效地利用未标记的数据，因为它们要么使用预定义/固定阈值，要么使用临时阈值调整方案，导致性能较差且收敛缓慢。我们首先分析一个激励示例，以直观地了解所需阈值与模型学习状态之间的关系。基于分析，我们提出FreeMatch根据模型的学习状态自适应地调整置信度阈值。我们进一步引入了自适应类别公平正则化惩罚，以鼓励模型在早期训练阶段进行多样化的预测。大量的实验表明了 FreeMatch 的优越性，尤其是当标记数据极其罕见时。与最新最先进的方法 FlexMatch 相比，FreeMatch 在每类 1 个标签的 CIFAR-10、每类 4 个标签的 STL-10 和每类 100 个标签的 ImageNet 上分别实现了 5.78%、13.59% 和 1.28% 的错误率降低。此外，FreeMatch 还可以提高不平衡 SSL 的性能。这些代码可以在 https://github.com/microsoft/Semi-supervised-learning 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FreeMatch方法，通过自适应阈值调整和类公平性正则化提升半监督学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督学习方法因使用预定义或启发式阈值，导致未标记数据利用效率低、收敛速度慢且性能不足。
AI.method: 基于模型学习状态动态调整置信度阈值，并引入自适应类公平性正则化以促进早期训练阶段的多样化预测。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/STL-10/ImageNet数据集上分别减少5.78%/13.59%/1.28%误差率，显著优于FlexMatch等最新方法，并提升不平衡SSL性能。
AI.conclusion: FreeMatch通过自适应阈值机制和正则化策略，在标记数据稀缺场景下实现了半监督学习的性能突破。

search_text: FreeMatch: Self-adaptive Thresholding for Semi-supervised Learning FreeMatch：半监督学习的自适应阈值 Semi-supervised Learning (SSL) has witnessed great success owing to the impressive performances brought by various methods based on pseudo labeling and consistency regularization. However, we argue that existing methods might fail to utilize the unlabeled data more effectively since they either use a pre-defined / fixed threshold or an ad-hoc threshold adjusting scheme, resulting in inferior performance and slow convergence. We first analyze a motivating example to obtain intuitions on the relationship between the desirable threshold and model's learning status. Based on the analysis, we hence propose FreeMatch to adjust the confidence threshold in a self-adaptive manner according to the model's learning status. We further introduce a self-adaptive class fairness regularization penalty to encourage the model for diverse predictions during the early training stage. Extensive experiments indicate the superiority of FreeMatch especially when the labeled data are extremely rare. FreeMatch achieves 5.78%, 13.59%, and 1.28% error rate reduction over the latest state-of-the-art method FlexMatch on CIFAR-10 with 1 label per class, STL-10 with 4 labels per class, and ImageNet with 100 labels per class, respectively. Moreover, FreeMatch can also boost the performance of imbalanced SSL. The codes can be found at https://github.com/microsoft/Semi-supervised-learning. 半监督学习（SSL）由于基于伪标签和一致性正则化的各种方法带来的令人印象深刻的性能而取得了巨大的成功。然而，我们认为现有方法可能无法更有效地利用未标记的数据，因为它们要么使用预定义/固定阈值，要么使用临时阈值调整方案，导致性能较差且收敛缓慢。我们首先分析一个激励示例，以直观地了解所需阈值与模型学习状态之间的关系。基于分析，我们提出FreeMatch根据模型的学习状态自适应地调整置信度阈值。我们进一步引入了自适应类别公平正则化惩罚，以鼓励模型在早期训练阶段进行多样化的预测。大量的实验表明了 FreeMatch 的优越性，尤其是当标记数据极其罕见时。与最新最先进的方法 FlexMatch 相比，FreeMatch 在每类 1 个标签的 CIFAR-10、每类 4 个标签的 STL-10 和每类 100 个标签的 ImageNet 上分别实现了 5.78%、13.59% 和 1.28% 的错误率降低。此外，FreeMatch 还可以提高不平衡 SSL 的性能。这些代码可以在 https://github.com/microsoft/Semi-supervised-learning 找到。 本文提出FreeMatch方法，通过自适应阈值调整和类公平性正则化提升半监督学习效果。 Yidong Wang,Hao Chen,Qiang Heng,Wenxin Hou,Yue Fan,Zhen Wu,Jindong Wang,Marios Savvides,Takahiro Shinozaki,Bhiksha Raj,Bernt Schiele,Xing Xie cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Hazrat Ali,Zubair Shah
title: Combating COVID-19 using Generative Adversarial Networks and Artificial Intelligence for Medical Images: A Scoping Review
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络和医学图像人工智能来对抗 COVID-19：范围界定审查
comment: ef:JMIR Medical Informatics, 2022
comments: ef:JMIR Medical Informatics, 2022
abstract: This review presents a comprehensive study on the role of GANs in addressing the challenges related to COVID-19 data scarcity and diagnosis. It is the first review that summarizes the different GANs methods and the lungs images datasets for COVID-19. It attempts to answer the questions related to applications of GANs, popular GAN architectures, frequently used image modalities, and the availability of source code. This review included 57 full-text studies that reported the use of GANs for different applications in COVID-19 lungs images data. Most of the studies (n=42) used GANs for data augmentation to enhance the performance of AI techniques for COVID-19 diagnosis. Other popular applications of GANs were segmentation of lungs and super-resolution of the lungs images. The cycleGAN and the conditional GAN were the most commonly used architectures used in nine studies each. 29 studies used chest X-Ray images while 21 studies used CT images for the training of GANs. For majority of the studies (n=47), the experiments were done and results were reported using publicly available data. A secondary evaluation of the results by radiologists/clinicians was reported by only two studies. Conclusion: Studies have shown that GANs have great potential to address the data scarcity challenge for lungs images of COVID-19. Data synthesized with GANs have been helpful to improve the training of the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models trained for the diagnosis of COVID-19. Besides, GANs have also contributed to enhancing the CNNs performance through the super-resolution of the images and segmentation. This review also identified key limitations of the potential transformation of GANs based methods in clinical applications.

abstract_zh: 这篇综述对 GAN 在解决与 COVID-19 数据稀缺和诊断相关的挑战方面的作用进行了全面的研究。这是第一篇总结不同 GAN 方法和 COVID-19 肺部图像数据集的综述。它试图回答与 GAN 应用、流行的 GAN 架构、常用图像模式以及源代码的可用性相关的问题。该综述包括 57 项全文研究，报告了 GAN 在 COVID-19 肺部图像数据中的不同应用。大多数研究 (n=42) 使用 GAN 进行数据增强，以增强 AI 技术在 COVID-19 诊断中的性能。 GAN 的其他流行应用是肺部分割和肺部图像的超分辨率。 CycleGAN 和条件 GAN 是九项研究中最常用的架构。 29 项研究使用胸部 X 射线图像，21 项研究使用 CT 图像来训练 GAN。大多数研究 (n=47) 均使用公开数据进行实验并报告结果。仅两项研究报告了放射科医生/临床医生对结果的二次评估。结论：研究表明，GAN 在解决 COVID-19 肺部图像数据稀缺挑战方面具有巨大潜力。使用 GAN 合成的数据有助于改进用于诊断 COVID-19 的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 模型的训练。此外，GAN 还通过图像的超分辨率和分割来增强 CNN 的性能。该综述还确定了基于 GAN 的方法在临床应用中潜在转变的关键局限性。

AI.tldr: 本论文综述了生成对抗网络（GANs）在应对COVID-19肺部影像数据稀缺和诊断挑战中的应用。
AI.motivation: COVID-19疫情期间肺部影像数据不足，影响AI诊断模型训练，需探索GANs等技术解决数据稀缺问题。
AI.method: 通过纳入57项研究的系统综述，总结GANs方法、肺部影像数据集及应用情况，分析架构、模态和代码可用性。
AI.result: 42项研究使用GANs进行数据增强，9项采用cycleGAN和条件GAN，29项用X光片21项用CT影像，多数基于公开数据且仅2项有临床专家复核。
AI.conclusion: GANs能有效缓解数据稀缺问题，提升CNN诊断性能，但临床转化仍存在局限性。

authors_text: Yikuan Li,Mohammad Mamouei,Shishir Rao,Abdelaali Hassaine,Dexter Canoy,Thomas Lukasiewicz,Kazem Rahimi,Gholamreza Salimi-Khorshidi
title: Clinical outcome prediction under hypothetical interventions -- a representation learning framework for counterfactual reasoning
title_zh: 假设干预下的临床结果预测——反事实推理的表征学习框架
abstract: Most machine learning (ML) models are developed for prediction only; offering no option for causal interpretation of their predictions or parameters/properties. This can hamper the health systems' ability to employ ML models in clinical decision-making processes, where the need and desire for predicting outcomes under hypothetical investigations (i.e., counterfactual reasoning/explanation) is high. In this research, we introduce a new representation learning framework (i.e., partial concept bottleneck), which considers the provision of counterfactual explanations as an embedded property of the risk model. Despite architectural changes necessary for jointly optimising for prediction accuracy and counterfactual reasoning, the accuracy of our approach is comparable to prediction-only models. Our results suggest that our proposed framework has the potential to help researchers and clinicians improve personalised care (e.g., by investigating the hypothetical differential effects of interventions)
summary: Most machine learning (ML) models are developed for prediction only; offering no option for causal interpretation of their predictions or parameters/properties. This can hamper the health systems' ability to employ ML models in clinical decision-making processes, where the need and desire for predicting outcomes under hypothetical investigations (i.e., counterfactual reasoning/explanation) is high. In this research, we introduce a new representation learning framework (i.e., partial concept bottleneck), which considers the provision of counterfactual explanations as an embedded property of the risk model. Despite architectural changes necessary for jointly optimising for prediction accuracy and counterfactual reasoning, the accuracy of our approach is comparable to prediction-only models. Our results suggest that our proposed framework has the potential to help researchers and clinicians improve personalised care (e.g., by investigating the hypothetical differential effects of interventions)
abstract_zh: 大多数机器学习 (ML) 模型仅用于预测；不提供对其预测或参数/属性进行因果解释的选项。这可能会妨碍卫生系统在临床决策过程中使用机器学习模型的能力，因为在临床决策过程中预测假设调查（即反事实推理/解释）结果的需求和愿望很高。在这项研究中，我们引入了一种新的表示学习框架（即部分概念瓶颈），该框架将提供反事实解释视为风险模型的嵌入属性。尽管联合优化预测准确性和反事实推理需要进行架构更改，但我们方法的准确性与仅预测模型相当。我们的结果表明，我们提出的框架有可能帮助研究人员和临床医生改善个性化护理（例如，通过调查干预措施的假设差异效应）

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合预测与反事实推理的表示学习框架，用于临床结果预测及干预效果分析。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习模型缺乏因果解释能力，难以满足临床决策中对假设干预效果预测的需求。
AI.method: 设计部分概念瓶颈框架，将反事实解释作为模型嵌入属性，联合优化预测精度与因果推理能力。
AI.result: 方法在保持预测准确性的同时，可生成有效反事实解释，辅助个性化医疗方案制定。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为临床研究提供了分析干预效果的新工具，有助于提升个性化医疗水平。

search_text: Clinical outcome prediction under hypothetical interventions -- a representation learning framework for counterfactual reasoning 假设干预下的临床结果预测——反事实推理的表征学习框架 Most machine learning (ML) models are developed for prediction only; offering no option for causal interpretation of their predictions or parameters/properties. This can hamper the health systems' ability to employ ML models in clinical decision-making processes, where the need and desire for predicting outcomes under hypothetical investigations (i.e., counterfactual reasoning/explanation) is high. In this research, we introduce a new representation learning framework (i.e., partial concept bottleneck), which considers the provision of counterfactual explanations as an embedded property of the risk model. Despite architectural changes necessary for jointly optimising for prediction accuracy and counterfactual reasoning, the accuracy of our approach is comparable to prediction-only models. Our results suggest that our proposed framework has the potential to help researchers and clinicians improve personalised care (e.g., by investigating the hypothetical differential effects of interventions) 大多数机器学习 (ML) 模型仅用于预测；不提供对其预测或参数/属性进行因果解释的选项。这可能会妨碍卫生系统在临床决策过程中使用机器学习模型的能力，因为在临床决策过程中预测假设调查（即反事实推理/解释）结果的需求和愿望很高。在这项研究中，我们引入了一种新的表示学习框架（即部分概念瓶颈），该框架将提供反事实解释视为风险模型的嵌入属性。尽管联合优化预测准确性和反事实推理需要进行架构更改，但我们方法的准确性与仅预测模型相当。我们的结果表明，我们提出的框架有可能帮助研究人员和临床医生改善个性化护理（例如，通过调查干预措施的假设差异效应） 本文提出一种结合预测与反事实推理的表示学习框架，用于临床结果预测及干预效果分析。 Yikuan Li,Mohammad Mamouei,Shishir Rao,Abdelaali Hassaine,Dexter Canoy,Thomas Lukasiewicz,Kazem Rahimi,Gholamreza Salimi-Khorshidi cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Allison Lahnala,Charles Welch,Béla Neuendorf,Lucie Flek
title: Mitigating Toxic Degeneration with Empathetic Data: Exploring the Relationship Between Toxicity and Empathy
title_zh: 用同理心数据减轻毒性退化：探索毒性和同理心之间的关系
comment: Accepted to NAACL 2022
comments: Accepted to NAACL 2022
abstract: Large pre-trained neural language models have supported the effectiveness of many NLP tasks, yet are still prone to generating toxic language hindering the safety of their use. Using empathetic data, we improve over recent work on controllable text generation that aims to reduce the toxicity of generated text. We find we are able to dramatically reduce the size of fine-tuning data to 7.5-30k samples while at the same time making significant improvements over state-of-the-art toxicity mitigation of up to 3.4% absolute reduction (26% relative) from the original work on 2.3m samples, by strategically sampling data based on empathy scores. We observe that the degree of improvement is subject to specific communication components of empathy. In particular, the cognitive components of empathy significantly beat the original dataset in almost all experiments, while emotional empathy was tied to less improvement and even underperforming random samples of the original data. This is a particularly implicative insight for NLP work concerning empathy as until recently the research and resources built for it have exclusively considered empathy as an emotional concept.
summary: Large pre-trained neural language models have supported the effectiveness of many NLP tasks, yet are still prone to generating toxic language hindering the safety of their use. Using empathetic data, we improve over recent work on controllable text generation that aims to reduce the toxicity of generated text. We find we are able to dramatically reduce the size of fine-tuning data to 7.5-30k samples while at the same time making significant improvements over state-of-the-art toxicity mitigation of up to 3.4% absolute reduction (26% relative) from the original work on 2.3m samples, by strategically sampling data based on empathy scores. We observe that the degree of improvement is subject to specific communication components of empathy. In particular, the cognitive components of empathy significantly beat the original dataset in almost all experiments, while emotional empathy was tied to less improvement and even underperforming random samples of the original data. This is a particularly implicative insight for NLP work concerning empathy as until recently the research and resources built for it have exclusively considered empathy as an emotional concept.
abstract_zh: 大型预训练神经语言模型已经支持了许多 NLP 任务的有效性，但仍然容易产生有毒语言，阻碍其使用的安全性。使用同理心数据，我们改进了最近的可控文本生成工作，旨在减少生成文本的毒性。我们发现，通过根据同理心分数对数据进行策略性采样，我们能够将微调数据的大小大幅减少到 7.5-30k 个样本，同时与最先进的毒性缓解相比，在 230 万个样本的原始工作中绝对减少了 3.4%（相对减少 26%）。我们观察到，改善的程度取决于同理心的特定沟通成分。特别是，在几乎所有实验中，同理心的认知成分都显着击败了原始数据集，而情感同理心则与原始数据的随机样本的改进较少甚至表现不佳有关。对于涉及同理心的 NLP 工作来说，这是一个特别有意义的见解，因为直到最近，为其建立的研究和资源都专门将同理心视为一种情感概念。

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入共情数据，探索减少生成文本毒性与共情之间的关系，提出基于共情分数的策略性抽样方法以提升去毒性效果。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型易生成有毒内容，现有去毒性方法依赖大量数据且效果有限，需寻找更高效的数据利用方式并重新审视共情的定义与作用。
AI.method: 基于共情分数对数据进行策略性抽样，将微调数据量缩减至7.5-30k样本，对比认知共情与情感共情在毒性降低中的表现差异。
AI.result: 在2.3m样本基准上实现3.4%绝对毒性降低（26%相对提升），认知共情成分显著优于原始数据，情感共情效果接近或劣于随机抽样。
AI.conclusion: 认知共情是降低生成毒性更有效的因素，提示NLP领域需突破传统将共情仅视为情感概念的局限性，重新定义共情维度。

authors_text: Liying Lu,Ruizheng Wu,Huaijia Lin,Jiangbo Lu,Jiaya Jia
title: Video Frame Interpolation with Transformer
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 进行视频帧插值
comment: CVPR2022
comments: CVPR2022
abstract: Video frame interpolation (VFI), which aims to synthesize intermediate frames of a video, has made remarkable progress with development of deep convolutional networks over past years. Existing methods built upon convolutional networks generally face challenges of handling large motion due to the locality of convolution operations. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a novel framework, which takes advantage of Transformer to model long-range pixel correlation among video frames. Further, our network is equipped with a novel cross-scale window-based attention mechanism, where cross-scale windows interact with each other. This design effectively enlarges the receptive field and aggregates multi-scale information. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate that our method achieves new state-of-the-art results on various benchmarks.
summary: Video frame interpolation (VFI), which aims to synthesize intermediate frames of a video, has made remarkable progress with development of deep convolutional networks over past years. Existing methods built upon convolutional networks generally face challenges of handling large motion due to the locality of convolution operations. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a novel framework, which takes advantage of Transformer to model long-range pixel correlation among video frames. Further, our network is equipped with a novel cross-scale window-based attention mechanism, where cross-scale windows interact with each other. This design effectively enlarges the receptive field and aggregates multi-scale information. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate that our method achieves new state-of-the-art results on various benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 视频帧插值（VFI）旨在合成视频的中间帧，在过去几年中随着深度卷积网络的发展取得了显着的进展。由于卷积运算的局部性，基于卷积网络构建的现有方法通常面临着处理大运动的挑战。为了克服这个限制，我们引入了一种新颖的框架，它利用 Transformer 来模拟视频帧之间的远程像素相关性。此外，我们的网络配备了一种新颖的基于跨尺度窗口的注意力机制，其中跨尺度窗口相互交互。这种设计有效地扩大了感受野并聚合了多尺度信息。广泛的定量和定性实验表明，我们的方法在各种基准上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的视频帧插值方法，通过建模视频帧间的长距离像素关联来解决大运动场景下的插值难题。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积网络因局部感受野限制，难以有效处理视频中的大范围运动，导致插值效果受限。
AI.method: 设计融合Transformer架构的新型框架，引入跨尺度窗口注意力机制，通过多尺度窗口交互扩大感受野并聚合多尺度信息。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到新的最先进水平，定量与定性实验均验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构有效克服了卷积网络的局限性，证明了其在视频帧插值任务中的优越性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的视频帧插值方法，通过建模视频帧间的长距离像素关联来解决大运动场景下的插值难题。

authors_text: Ziyuan Zhou,Guanjun Liu
title: RoMFAC: A robust mean-field actor-critic reinforcement learning against adversarial perturbations on states
title_zh: RoMFAC：针对状态对抗性扰动的强大平均场行动者批评家强化学习
abstract: Multi-agent deep reinforcement learning makes optimal decisions dependent on system states observed by agents, but any uncertainty on the observations may mislead agents to take wrong actions. The Mean-Field Actor-Critic reinforcement learning (MFAC) is well-known in the multi-agent field since it can effectively handle a scalability problem. However, it is sensitive to state perturbations that can significantly degrade the team rewards. This work proposes a Robust Mean-field Actor-Critic reinforcement learning (RoMFAC) that has two innovations: 1) a new objective function of training actors, composed of a \emph{policy gradient function} that is related to the expected cumulative discount reward on sampled clean states and an \emph{action loss function} that represents the difference between actions taken on clean and adversarial states; and 2) a repetitive regularization of the action loss, ensuring the trained actors to obtain excellent performance. Furthermore, this work proposes a game model named a State-Adversarial Stochastic Game (SASG). Despite the Nash equilibrium of SASG may not exist, adversarial perturbations to states in the RoMFAC are proven to be defensible based on SASG. Experimental results show that RoMFAC is robust against adversarial perturbations while maintaining its competitive performance in environments without perturbations.
summary: Multi-agent deep reinforcement learning makes optimal decisions dependent on system states observed by agents, but any uncertainty on the observations may mislead agents to take wrong actions. The Mean-Field Actor-Critic reinforcement learning (MFAC) is well-known in the multi-agent field since it can effectively handle a scalability problem. However, it is sensitive to state perturbations that can significantly degrade the team rewards. This work proposes a Robust Mean-field Actor-Critic reinforcement learning (RoMFAC) that has two innovations: 1) a new objective function of training actors, composed of a \emph{policy gradient function} that is related to the expected cumulative discount reward on sampled clean states and an \emph{action loss function} that represents the difference between actions taken on clean and adversarial states; and 2) a repetitive regularization of the action loss, ensuring the trained actors to obtain excellent performance. Furthermore, this work proposes a game model named a State-Adversarial Stochastic Game (SASG). Despite the Nash equilibrium of SASG may not exist, adversarial perturbations to states in the RoMFAC are proven to be defensible based on SASG. Experimental results show that RoMFAC is robust against adversarial perturbations while maintaining its competitive performance in environments without perturbations.
abstract_zh: 多智能体深度强化学习根据智能体观察到的系统状态做出最佳决策，但观察结果的任何不确定性都可能会误导智能体采取错误的行动。平均场 Actor-Critic 强化学习（MFAC）在多智能体领域众所周知，因为它可以有效地处理可扩展性问题。然而，它对状态扰动很敏感，这会显着降低团队奖励。这项工作提出了一种鲁棒平均场行动者批评家强化学习（RoMFAC），它有两个创新：1）训练行动者的新目标函数，由与采样干净状态的预期累积折扣奖励相关的\emph{策略梯度函数}和表示在干净状态和对抗状态上采取的行动之间的差异的\emph{动作损失函数}组成； 2）对动作损失进行重复正则化，确保训练后的演员获得优异的表现。此外，这项工作提出了一种名为状态对抗随机博弈（SASG）的博弈模型。尽管 SASG 的纳什均衡可能不存在，但基于 SASG，对 RoMFAC 中各州的对抗性扰动被证明是可以防御的。实验结果表明，RoMFAC 对于对抗性扰动具有鲁棒性，同时在没有扰动的环境中保持其竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RoMFAC的鲁棒均场演员-评论家强化学习方法，旨在应对多智能体环境中状态对抗扰动带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统的均场演员-评论家（MFAC）算法在处理多智能体扩展性问题时表现良好，但对状态扰动高度敏感，可能导致团队奖励显著下降，需提升其鲁棒性。
AI.method: RoMFAC通过两个创新点改进算法：1）设计新的演员训练目标函数，结合清洁状态的策略梯度和对抗状态的动作损失；2）引入动作损失的重复正则化。同时提出状态对抗随机博弈（SASG）模型，证明对抗扰动的防御性。
AI.result: 实验表明，RoMFAC在存在对抗扰动的环境中表现鲁棒，且在无扰动环境下仍保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: RoMFAC通过SASG模型和改进的目标函数有效防御状态扰动，在保证性能的同时提升了算法鲁棒性。
