authors_text: Pengfei Zhang,Tingting Chai,Yongdong Xu
title: Adaptive Prompt Learning-based Few-Shot Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: 基于自适应提示学习的小样本情感分析
abstract: In the field of natural language processing, sentiment analysis via deep learning has a excellent performance by using large labeled datasets. Meanwhile, labeled data are insufficient in many sentiment analysis, and obtaining these data is time-consuming and laborious. Prompt learning devotes to resolving the data deficiency by reformulating downstream tasks with the help of prompt. In this way, the appropriate prompt is very important for the performance of the model. This paper proposes an adaptive prompting(AP) construction strategy using seq2seq-attention structure to acquire the semantic information of the input sequence. Then dynamically construct adaptive prompt which can not only improve the quality of the prompt, but also can effectively generalize to other fields by pre-trained prompt which is constructed by existing public labeled data. The experimental results on FewCLUE datasets demonstrate that the proposed method AP can effectively construct appropriate adaptive prompt regardless of the quality of hand-crafted prompt and outperform the state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: In the field of natural language processing, sentiment analysis via deep learning has a excellent performance by using large labeled datasets. Meanwhile, labeled data are insufficient in many sentiment analysis, and obtaining these data is time-consuming and laborious. Prompt learning devotes to resolving the data deficiency by reformulating downstream tasks with the help of prompt. In this way, the appropriate prompt is very important for the performance of the model. This paper proposes an adaptive prompting(AP) construction strategy using seq2seq-attention structure to acquire the semantic information of the input sequence. Then dynamically construct adaptive prompt which can not only improve the quality of the prompt, but also can effectively generalize to other fields by pre-trained prompt which is constructed by existing public labeled data. The experimental results on FewCLUE datasets demonstrate that the proposed method AP can effectively construct appropriate adaptive prompt regardless of the quality of hand-crafted prompt and outperform the state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 在自然语言处理领域，通过深度学习进行情感分析，通过使用大型标记数据集，具有出色的性能。同时，很多情感分析中标记数据的不足，获取这些数据费时费力。即时学习致力于通过在提示的帮助下重新制定下游任务来解决数据不足的问题。这样看来，合适的提示对于模型的表现来说是非常重要的。本文提出一种利用seq2seq-attention结构来获取输入序列的语义信息的自适应提示（AP）构建策略。然后动态构造自适应提示，不仅可以提高提示的质量，而且可以通过现有公共标记数据构建的预训练提示有效推广到其他领域。 FewCLUE 数据集上的实验结果表明，无论手工制作的提示的质量如何，所提出的方法 AP 都可以有效地构建适当的自适应提示，并且优于最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自适应提示学习的小样本情感分析方法，通过动态构建高质量提示解决标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习情感分析依赖大量标注数据，但实际场景中数据获取困难且成本高昂，而现有提示学习方法对人工提示质量敏感。
AI.method: 设计seq2seq-attention结构提取输入语义，动态生成自适应提示，并利用预训练提示实现跨领域泛化。
AI.result: 在FewCLUE数据集实验中，AP方法在不同质量人工提示下均优于现有最先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 自适应提示学习有效提升了小样本情感分析性能，证明了动态提示构建与预训练泛化的有效性。

authors_text: Jianfeng Lin,Ruikang Xiao,Zhao Guo
title: Design and Stiffness Analysis of a Bio-inspired Soft Actuator with Bi-direction Tunable Stiffness Property
title_zh: 具有双向刚度可调特性的仿生软执行器的设计与刚度分析
comment: Accepted by IROS 2023
comments: Accepted by IROS 2023
abstract: Modulating the stiffness of soft actuators is crucial for improving the efficiency of interaction with the environment. However, current stiffness modulation mechanisms are hard to achieve high lateral stiffness and a wide range of bending stiffness simultaneously. Here, we draw inspiration from the anatomical structure of the finger and propose a bi-directional tunable stiffness actuator (BTSA). BTSA is a soft-rigid hybrid structure that combines air-tendon hybrid actuation (ATA) and bone-like structures (BLS). We develop a corresponding fabrication method and a stiffness analysis model to support the design of BLS. The results show that the influence of the BLS on bending deformation is negligible, with a distal point distance error of less than 1.5 mm. Moreover, the bi-directional tunable stiffness is proved to be functional. The bending stiffness can be tuned by ATA from 0.23 N/mm to 0.70 N/mm, with a magnification of 3 times. The addition of BLS improves lateral stiffness up to 4.2 times compared with the one without BLS, and the lateral stiffness can be tuned decoupling within 1.2 to 2.1 times (e.g. from 0.35 N/mm to 0.46 N/mm when the bending angle is 45 deg). Finally, a four-BTSA gripper is developed to conduct horizontal lifting and grasping tasks to demonstrate the advantages of BTSA.
summary: Modulating the stiffness of soft actuators is crucial for improving the efficiency of interaction with the environment. However, current stiffness modulation mechanisms are hard to achieve high lateral stiffness and a wide range of bending stiffness simultaneously. Here, we draw inspiration from the anatomical structure of the finger and propose a bi-directional tunable stiffness actuator (BTSA). BTSA is a soft-rigid hybrid structure that combines air-tendon hybrid actuation (ATA) and bone-like structures (BLS). We develop a corresponding fabrication method and a stiffness analysis model to support the design of BLS. The results show that the influence of the BLS on bending deformation is negligible, with a distal point distance error of less than 1.5 mm. Moreover, the bi-directional tunable stiffness is proved to be functional. The bending stiffness can be tuned by ATA from 0.23 N/mm to 0.70 N/mm, with a magnification of 3 times. The addition of BLS improves lateral stiffness up to 4.2 times compared with the one without BLS, and the lateral stiffness can be tuned decoupling within 1.2 to 2.1 times (e.g. from 0.35 N/mm to 0.46 N/mm when the bending angle is 45 deg). Finally, a four-BTSA gripper is developed to conduct horizontal lifting and grasping tasks to demonstrate the advantages of BTSA.
abstract_zh: 调节软执行器的刚度对于提高与环境交互的效率至关重要。然而，当前的刚度调制机制很难同时实现高横向刚度和大范围的弯曲刚度。在这里，我们从手指的解剖结构中汲取灵感，提出了一种双向可调刚度执行器（BTSA）。 BTSA 是一种软硬混合结构，结合了空气腱混合驱动 (ATA) 和类骨结构 (BLS)。我们开发了相应的制造方法和刚度分析模型来支持 BLS 的设计。结果表明，BLS对弯曲变形的影响可以忽略不计，远点距离误差小于1.5 mm。此外，双向可调刚度被证明是有效的。抗弯刚度可通过 ATA 在 0.23 N/mm 至 0.70 N/mm 之间调节，放大倍数为 3 倍。与未添加BLS的情况相比，添加BLS可将侧向刚度提高达4.2倍，并且侧向刚度可在1.2至2.1倍范围内解耦调整（例如，当弯曲角度为45度时，从0.35 N/mm到0.46 N/mm）。最后，开发了四BTSA夹具来执行水平提升和抓取任务，以展示BTSA的优势。

AI.tldr: 设计并分析一种具有双向可调刚度特性的仿生软体执行器，结合气-肌腱混合驱动与类骨结构，解决现有软执行器刚度调节不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有软执行器难以同时实现高侧向刚度和宽范围弯曲刚度，限制了其与环境交互的效率与适应性。
AI.method: 基于手指解剖结构设计软-刚混合结构，融合气-肌腱混合驱动（ATA）与类骨结构（BLS），开发制造工艺及刚度分析模型，并通过实验验证性能。
AI.result: 弯曲刚度调节范围达3倍（0.23-0.70 N/mm），侧向刚度提升4.2倍且可解耦调节（1.2-2.1倍），误差小于1.5 mm；四指夹持器成功完成抓取任务。
AI.conclusion: BTSA通过ATA与BLS协同设计，实现了双向刚度独立调节，显著提升软执行器的多功能性与环境适应性。

ai_content.tldr: 设计并分析一种具有双向可调刚度特性的仿生软体执行器，结合气-肌腱混合驱动与类骨结构，解决现有软执行器刚度调节不足的问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有软执行器难以同时实现高侧向刚度和宽范围弯曲刚度，限制了其与环境交互的效率与适应性。
ai_content.method: 基于手指解剖结构设计软-刚混合结构，融合气-肌腱混合驱动（ATA）与类骨结构（BLS），开发制造工艺及刚度分析模型，并通过实验验证性能。
ai_content.result: 弯曲刚度调节范围达3倍（0.23-0.70 N/mm），侧向刚度提升4.2倍且可解耦调节（1.2-2.1倍），误差小于1.5 mm；四指夹持器成功完成抓取任务。
ai_content.conclusion: BTSA通过ATA与BLS协同设计，实现了双向刚度独立调节，显著提升软执行器的多功能性与环境适应性。

search_text: Design and Stiffness Analysis of a Bio-inspired Soft Actuator with Bi-direction Tunable Stiffness Property 具有双向刚度可调特性的仿生软执行器的设计与刚度分析 Modulating the stiffness of soft actuators is crucial for improving the efficiency of interaction with the environment. However, current stiffness modulation mechanisms are hard to achieve high lateral stiffness and a wide range of bending stiffness simultaneously. Here, we draw inspiration from the anatomical structure of the finger and propose a bi-directional tunable stiffness actuator (BTSA). BTSA is a soft-rigid hybrid structure that combines air-tendon hybrid actuation (ATA) and bone-like structures (BLS). We develop a corresponding fabrication method and a stiffness analysis model to support the design of BLS. The results show that the influence of the BLS on bending deformation is negligible, with a distal point distance error of less than 1.5 mm. Moreover, the bi-directional tunable stiffness is proved to be functional. The bending stiffness can be tuned by ATA from 0.23 N/mm to 0.70 N/mm, with a magnification of 3 times. The addition of BLS improves lateral stiffness up to 4.2 times compared with the one without BLS, and the lateral stiffness can be tuned decoupling within 1.2 to 2.1 times (e.g. from 0.35 N/mm to 0.46 N/mm when the bending angle is 45 deg). Finally, a four-BTSA gripper is developed to conduct horizontal lifting and grasping tasks to demonstrate the advantages of BTSA. 调节软执行器的刚度对于提高与环境交互的效率至关重要。然而，当前的刚度调制机制很难同时实现高横向刚度和大范围的弯曲刚度。在这里，我们从手指的解剖结构中汲取灵感，提出了一种双向可调刚度执行器（BTSA）。 BTSA 是一种软硬混合结构，结合了空气腱混合驱动 (ATA) 和类骨结构 (BLS)。我们开发了相应的制造方法和刚度分析模型来支持 BLS 的设计。结果表明，BLS对弯曲变形的影响可以忽略不计，远点距离误差小于1.5 mm。此外，双向可调刚度被证明是有效的。抗弯刚度可通过 ATA 在 0.23 N/mm 至 0.70 N/mm 之间调节，放大倍数为 3 倍。与未添加BLS的情况相比，添加BLS可将侧向刚度提高达4.2倍，并且侧向刚度可在1.2至2.1倍范围内解耦调整（例如，当弯曲角度为45度时，从0.35 N/mm到0.46 N/mm）。最后，开发了四BTSA夹具来执行水平提升和抓取任务，以展示BTSA的优势。 设计并分析一种具有双向可调刚度特性的仿生软体执行器，结合气-肌腱混合驱动与类骨结构，解决现有软执行器刚度调节不足的问题。 Jianfeng Lin,Ruikang Xiao,Zhao Guo cs.RO

authors_text: Rongjie Huang,Yi Ren,Jinglin Liu,Chenye Cui,Zhou Zhao
title: GenerSpeech: Towards Style Transfer for Generalizable Out-Of-Domain Text-to-Speech
title_zh: GenerSpeech：走向可推广的域外文本到语音的风格迁移
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Style transfer for out-of-domain (OOD) speech synthesis aims to generate speech samples with unseen style (e.g., speaker identity, emotion, and prosody) derived from an acoustic reference, while facing the following challenges: 1) The highly dynamic style features in expressive voice are difficult to model and transfer; and 2) the TTS models should be robust enough to handle diverse OOD conditions that differ from the source data. This paper proposes GenerSpeech, a text-to-speech model towards high-fidelity zero-shot style transfer of OOD custom voice. GenerSpeech decomposes the speech variation into the style-agnostic and style-specific parts by introducing two components: 1) a multi-level style adaptor to efficiently model a large range of style conditions, including global speaker and emotion characteristics, and the local (utterance, phoneme, and word-level) fine-grained prosodic representations; and 2) a generalizable content adaptor with Mix-Style Layer Normalization to eliminate style information in the linguistic content representation and thus improve model generalization. Our evaluations on zero-shot style transfer demonstrate that GenerSpeech surpasses the state-of-the-art models in terms of audio quality and style similarity. The extension studies to adaptive style transfer further show that GenerSpeech performs robustly in the few-shot data setting. Audio samples are available at https://GenerSpeech.github.io/
summary: Style transfer for out-of-domain (OOD) speech synthesis aims to generate speech samples with unseen style (e.g., speaker identity, emotion, and prosody) derived from an acoustic reference, while facing the following challenges: 1) The highly dynamic style features in expressive voice are difficult to model and transfer; and 2) the TTS models should be robust enough to handle diverse OOD conditions that differ from the source data. This paper proposes GenerSpeech, a text-to-speech model towards high-fidelity zero-shot style transfer of OOD custom voice. GenerSpeech decomposes the speech variation into the style-agnostic and style-specific parts by introducing two components: 1) a multi-level style adaptor to efficiently model a large range of style conditions, including global speaker and emotion characteristics, and the local (utterance, phoneme, and word-level) fine-grained prosodic representations; and 2) a generalizable content adaptor with Mix-Style Layer Normalization to eliminate style information in the linguistic content representation and thus improve model generalization. Our evaluations on zero-shot style transfer demonstrate that GenerSpeech surpasses the state-of-the-art models in terms of audio quality and style similarity. The extension studies to adaptive style transfer further show that GenerSpeech performs robustly in the few-shot data setting. Audio samples are available at https://GenerSpeech.github.io/
abstract_zh: 域外（OOD）语音合成的风格迁移旨在生成从声学参考中导出的具有未见风格（例如，说话者身份、情感和韵律）的语音样本，但面临以下挑战：1）表达性语音中高度动态的风格特征难以建模和迁移； 2) TTS 模型应该足够强大，能够处理与源数据不同的各种 OOD 条件。本文提出了 GenerSpeech，一种文本到语音模型，旨在实现 OOD 自定义语音的高保真零样本风格传输。 GenerSpeech 通过引入两个组件将语音变化分解为与风格无关和特定于风格的部分：1）多级风格适配器，可有效地建模大范围的风格条件，包括全局说话者和情感特征，以及本地（话语、音素和单词级）细粒度韵律表示； 2）具有混合风格层归一化的可泛化内容适配器，用于消除语言内容表示中的风格信息，从而提高模型泛化能力。我们对零样本风格迁移的评估表明，GenerSpeech 在音频质量和风格相似性方面超越了最先进的模型。自适应风格迁移的扩展研究进一步表明 GenerSpeech 在少样本数据设置中表现强劲。音频样本可在 https://GenerSpeech.github.io/ 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出GenerSpeech模型，旨在实现高保真度的零样本风格迁移，解决文本到语音合成中面对未见过的风格（如说话人身份、情感、韵律）时的泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到语音（TTS）模型在处理未见过的风格（如新说话人、情感或韵律）时面临两大挑战：动态风格特征难以建模，以及模型对多样化域外条件的鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: GenerSpeech通过两个核心组件分解语音变化：1）多级风格适配器，建模全局（说话人/情感）和局部（音节/词级）细粒度韵律特征；2）结合Mix-Style Layer Normalization的通用内容适配器，消除语言内容中的风格信息以提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在零样本风格迁移任务中，GenerSpeech在音频质量和风格相似度上优于现有最先进模型；扩展实验表明其在少量样本设置下仍具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: GenerSpeech通过解耦风格与内容表示，有效解决了域外文本到语音的高保真风格迁移问题，为通用化语音合成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Liuyue Jiang,Nguyen Khoi Tran,M. Ali Babar
title: Mod2Dash: A Framework for Model-Driven Dashboards Generation
title_zh: Mod2Dash：模型驱动的仪表板生成框架
abstract: The construction of an interactive dashboard involves deciding on what information to present and how to display it and implementing those design decisions to create an operational dashboard. Traditionally, a dashboard's design is implied in the deployed dashboard rather than captured explicitly as a digital artifact, preventing it from being backed up, version-controlled, and shared. Moreover, practitioners have to implement this implicit design manually by coding or configuring it on a dashboard platform. This paper proposes Mod2Dash, a software framework that enables practitioners to capture their dashboard designs as models and generate operational dashboards automatically from these models. The framework also provides a GUI-driven customization approach for practitioners to fine-tune the auto-generated dashboards and update their models. With these abilities, Mod2Dash enables practitioners to rapidly prototype and deploy dashboards for both operational and research purposes. We evaluated the framework's effectiveness in a case study on cyber security visualization for decision support. A proof-of-concept of Mod2Dash was employed to model and reconstruct 31 diverse real-world cyber security dashboards. A human-assisted comparison between the Mod2Dash-generated dashboards and the baseline dashboards shows a close matching, indicating the framework's effectiveness for real-world scenarios.
summary: The construction of an interactive dashboard involves deciding on what information to present and how to display it and implementing those design decisions to create an operational dashboard. Traditionally, a dashboard's design is implied in the deployed dashboard rather than captured explicitly as a digital artifact, preventing it from being backed up, version-controlled, and shared. Moreover, practitioners have to implement this implicit design manually by coding or configuring it on a dashboard platform. This paper proposes Mod2Dash, a software framework that enables practitioners to capture their dashboard designs as models and generate operational dashboards automatically from these models. The framework also provides a GUI-driven customization approach for practitioners to fine-tune the auto-generated dashboards and update their models. With these abilities, Mod2Dash enables practitioners to rapidly prototype and deploy dashboards for both operational and research purposes. We evaluated the framework's effectiveness in a case study on cyber security visualization for decision support. A proof-of-concept of Mod2Dash was employed to model and reconstruct 31 diverse real-world cyber security dashboards. A human-assisted comparison between the Mod2Dash-generated dashboards and the baseline dashboards shows a close matching, indicating the framework's effectiveness for real-world scenarios.
abstract_zh: 交互式仪表板的构建涉及决定要呈现哪些信息以及如何显示信息，并实施这些设计决策以创建可操作的仪表板。传统上，仪表板的设计隐含在已部署的仪表板中，而不是明确捕获为数字工件，从而阻止其备份、版本控制和共享。此外，从业者必须通过在仪表板平台上编码或配置来手动实现这种隐式设计。本文提出了 Mod2Dash，这是一个软件框架，使从业者能够将其仪表板设计捕获为模型，并从这些模型自动生成操作仪表板。该框架还为从业者提供了 GUI 驱动的定制方法，以微调自动生成的仪表板并更新其模型。凭借这些功能，Mod2Dash 使从业者能够快速原型化并部署用于运营和研究目的的仪表板。我们在用于决策支持的网络安全可视化案例研究中评估了该框架的有效性。采用 Mod2Dash 的概念验证来建模和重建 31 个不同的现实世界网络安全仪表板。 Mod2Dash 生成的仪表板和基准仪表板之间的人工辅助比较显示出紧密的匹配，表明该框架对于现实场景的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Mod2Dash的软件框架，用于从模型自动生成交互式仪表板，并支持GUI驱动的自定义。
AI.motivation: 传统的仪表板设计隐含在部署的仪表板中，无法进行备份、版本控制和共享，且需要手动实现设计，效率低下。
AI.method: Mod2Dash框架允许用户将仪表板设计作为模型进行捕捉，并自动从这些模型生成操作仪表板。同时，框架提供GUI驱动的定制方法，以微调自动生成的仪表板并更新模型。
AI.result: 在网络安全可视化的案例研究中，Mod2Dash被用于建模和重建31个现实世界的网络安全仪表板，与基准仪表板的人工辅助比较显示匹配度较高，表明框架在实际场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Mod2Dash框架有效支持了仪表板的快速原型设计和部署，适用于操作和研究目的，并通过案例研究验证了其在实际场景中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Mod2Dash的软件框架，用于从模型自动生成交互式仪表板，并支持GUI驱动的自定义。

search_text: Mod2Dash: A Framework for Model-Driven Dashboards Generation Mod2Dash：模型驱动的仪表板生成框架 The construction of an interactive dashboard involves deciding on what information to present and how to display it and implementing those design decisions to create an operational dashboard. Traditionally, a dashboard's design is implied in the deployed dashboard rather than captured explicitly as a digital artifact, preventing it from being backed up, version-controlled, and shared. Moreover, practitioners have to implement this implicit design manually by coding or configuring it on a dashboard platform. This paper proposes Mod2Dash, a software framework that enables practitioners to capture their dashboard designs as models and generate operational dashboards automatically from these models. The framework also provides a GUI-driven customization approach for practitioners to fine-tune the auto-generated dashboards and update their models. With these abilities, Mod2Dash enables practitioners to rapidly prototype and deploy dashboards for both operational and research purposes. We evaluated the framework's effectiveness in a case study on cyber security visualization for decision support. A proof-of-concept of Mod2Dash was employed to model and reconstruct 31 diverse real-world cyber security dashboards. A human-assisted comparison between the Mod2Dash-generated dashboards and the baseline dashboards shows a close matching, indicating the framework's effectiveness for real-world scenarios. 交互式仪表板的构建涉及决定要呈现哪些信息以及如何显示信息，并实施这些设计决策以创建可操作的仪表板。传统上，仪表板的设计隐含在已部署的仪表板中，而不是明确捕获为数字工件，从而阻止其备份、版本控制和共享。此外，从业者必须通过在仪表板平台上编码或配置来手动实现这种隐式设计。本文提出了 Mod2Dash，这是一个软件框架，使从业者能够将其仪表板设计捕获为模型，并从这些模型自动生成操作仪表板。该框架还为从业者提供了 GUI 驱动的定制方法，以微调自动生成的仪表板并更新其模型。凭借这些功能，Mod2Dash 使从业者能够快速原型化并部署用于运营和研究目的的仪表板。我们在用于决策支持的网络安全可视化案例研究中评估了该框架的有效性。采用 Mod2Dash 的概念验证来建模和重建 31 个不同的现实世界网络安全仪表板。 Mod2Dash 生成的仪表板和基准仪表板之间的人工辅助比较显示出紧密的匹配，表明该框架对于现实场景的有效性。 本文提出了一种名为Mod2Dash的软件框架，用于从模型自动生成交互式仪表板，并支持GUI驱动的自定义。 Liuyue Jiang,Nguyen Khoi Tran,M. Ali Babar cs.HC

authors_text: Mohamed Mohana,Prasanalakshmi B,Salem Alelyani,Mohammed Saleh Alsaqer
title: Fused Deep Neural Network based Transfer Learning in Occluded Face Classification and Person re-Identification
title_zh: 基于融合深度神经网络的遮挡人脸分类和人员重新识别中的迁移学习
comment: 15 pages, 9 figures
comments: 15 pages, 9 figures
abstract: Recent period of pandemic has brought person identification even with occluded face image a great importance with increased number of mask usage. This paper aims to recognize the occlusion of one of four types in face images. Various transfer learning methods were tested, and the results show that MobileNet V2 with Gated Recurrent Unit(GRU) performs better than any other Transfer Learning methods, with a perfect accuracy of 99% in classification of images as with or without occlusion and if with occlusion, then the type of occlusion. In parallel, identifying the Region of interest from the device captured image is done. This extracted Region of interest is utilised in face identification. Such a face identification process is done using the ResNet model with its Caffe implementation. To reduce the execution time, after the face occlusion type was recognized the person was searched to confirm their face image in the registered database. The face label of the person obtained from both simultaneous processes was verified for their matching score. If the matching score was above 90, the recognized label of the person was logged into a file with their name, type of mask, date, and time of recognition. MobileNetV2 is a lightweight framework which can also be used in embedded or IoT devices to perform real time detection and identification in suspicious areas of investigations using CCTV footages. When MobileNetV2 was combined with GRU, a reliable accuracy was obtained. The data provided in the paper belong to two categories, being either collected from Google Images for occlusion classification, face recognition, and facial landmarks, or collected in fieldwork. The motive behind this research is to identify and log person details which could serve surveillance activities in society-based e-governance.

This paper aims to recognize the occlusion of one of four types in face images. Various transfer learning methods were tested, and the results show that MobileNet V2 with Gated Recurrent Unit(GRU) performs better than any other Transfer Learning methods, with a perfect accuracy of 99% in classification of images as with or without occlusion and if with occlusion, then the type of occlusion. In parallel, identifying the Region of interest from the device captured image is done. This extracted Region of interest is utilised in face identification. Such a face identification process is done using the ResNet model with its Caffe implementation. To reduce the execution time, after the face occlusion type was recognized the person was searched to confirm their face image in the registered database. The face label of the person obtained from both simultaneous processes was verified for their matching score. If the matching score was above 90, the recognized label of the person was logged into a file with their name, type of mask, date, and time of recognition. MobileNetV2 is a lightweight framework which can also be used in embedded or IoT devices to perform real time detection and identification in suspicious areas of investigations using CCTV footages. When MobileNetV2 was combined with GRU, a reliable accuracy was obtained. The data provided in the paper belong to two categories, being either collected from Google Images for occlusion classification, face recognition, and facial landmarks, or collected in fieldwork. The motive behind this research is to identify and log person details which could serve surveillance activities in society-based e-governance.
abstract_zh: 最近一段时间的大流行使得随着口罩使用数量的增加，即使在人脸图像被遮挡的情况下进行人员识别也变得非常重要。本文旨在识别人脸图像中四种类型之一的遮挡。测试了各种迁移学习方法，结果表明，采用门控循环单元 (GRU) 的 MobileNet V2 比任何其他迁移学习方法表现更好，在图像有无遮挡以及遮挡类型的分类方面具有 99% 的完美准确率。同时，从设备捕获的图像中识别感兴趣区域。该提取的感兴趣区域用于人脸识别。这样的人脸识别过程是使用 ResNet 模型及其 Caffe 实现来完成的。为了减少执行时间，在识别人脸遮挡类型后，在注册数据库中搜索人员以确认其人脸图像。验证从两个同时处理过程中获得的人的面部标签的匹配分数。如果匹配分数高于 90，则该人的识别标签将被记录到一个文件中，其中包含该人的姓名、面具类型、识别日期和时间。 MobileNetV2 是一个轻量级框架，也可用于嵌入式或物联网设备，使用闭路电视录像对可疑调查区域进行实时检测和识别。当 MobileNetV2 与 GRU 结合时，获得了可靠的精度。论文中提供的数据分为两类，要么是从谷歌图像中收集的用于遮挡分类、人脸识别和面部标志的数据，要么是在实地工作中收集的。这项研究背后的动机是识别和记录人员详细信息，这些详细信息可以为基于社会的电子政务中的监视活动服务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合深度神经网络的迁移学习方法，用于遮挡人脸分类与人员重识别，结合MobileNetV2与GRU实现高精度遮挡检测，并利用ResNet进行人脸识别。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情导致口罩普及，传统人脸识别人脸识别技术面临挑战，需开发可靠方法应对遮挡场景下的人员识别需求，以支持社会治理与安防应用。
AI.method: 采用MobileNetV2-GRU模型进行遮挡类型分类，通过ResNet模型提取人脸特征并结合数据库比对验证身份，利用轻量化框架实现实时检测。
AI.result: 在遮挡分类任务中达到99%准确率，人脸识别匹配得分超过90%时可记录人员信息，MobileNetV2适用于嵌入式设备实现实时处理。
AI.conclusion: 融合迁移学习的深度网络有效解决遮挡场景识别难题，为疫情时代安防系统提供技术支撑，具有社会管理与物联网应用价值。

authors_text: Ruiqi Zha,Zhichao Lian,Qianmu Li,Siqi Gu
title: Real-centric Consistency Learning for Deepfake Detection
title_zh: 用于 Deepfake 检测的以真实为中心的一致性学习
abstract: Most of previous deepfake detection researches bent their efforts to describe and discriminate artifacts in human perceptible ways, which leave a bias in the learned networks of ignoring some critical invariance features intra-class and underperforming the robustness of internet interference. Essentially, the target of deepfake detection problem is to represent natural faces and fake faces at the representation space discriminatively, and it reminds us whether we could optimize the feature extraction procedure at the representation space through constraining intra-class consistence and inter-class inconsistence to bring the intra-class representations close and push the inter-class representations apart? Therefore, inspired by contrastive representation learning, we tackle the deepfake detection problem through learning the invariant representations of both classes and propose a novel real-centric consistency learning method. We constraint the representation from both the sample level and the feature level. At the sample level, we take the procedure of deepfake synthesis into consideration and propose a novel forgery semantical-based pairing strategy to mine latent generation-related features. At the feature level, based on the centers of natural faces at the representation space, we design a hard positive mining and synthesizing method to simulate the potential marginal features. Besides, a hard negative fusion method is designed to improve the discrimination of negative marginal features with the help of supervised contrastive margin loss we developed. The effectiveness and robustness of the proposed method has been demonstrated through extensive experiments.
summary: Most of previous deepfake detection researches bent their efforts to describe and discriminate artifacts in human perceptible ways, which leave a bias in the learned networks of ignoring some critical invariance features intra-class and underperforming the robustness of internet interference. Essentially, the target of deepfake detection problem is to represent natural faces and fake faces at the representation space discriminatively, and it reminds us whether we could optimize the feature extraction procedure at the representation space through constraining intra-class consistence and inter-class inconsistence to bring the intra-class representations close and push the inter-class representations apart? Therefore, inspired by contrastive representation learning, we tackle the deepfake detection problem through learning the invariant representations of both classes and propose a novel real-centric consistency learning method. We constraint the representation from both the sample level and the feature level. At the sample level, we take the procedure of deepfake synthesis into consideration and propose a novel forgery semantical-based pairing strategy to mine latent generation-related features. At the feature level, based on the centers of natural faces at the representation space, we design a hard positive mining and synthesizing method to simulate the potential marginal features. Besides, a hard negative fusion method is designed to improve the discrimination of negative marginal features with the help of supervised contrastive margin loss we developed. The effectiveness and robustness of the proposed method has been demonstrated through extensive experiments.
abstract_zh: 之前的大多数深度伪造检测研究都致力于以人类可感知的方式描述和区分伪影，这在学习网络中留下了偏见，忽略了一些关键的类内不变性特征，并且在互联网干扰的鲁棒性方面表现不佳。本质上，深度换脸检测问题的目标是在表示空间上有区别地表示自然人脸和假人脸，这提醒我们是否可以通过约束类内一致性和类间不一致性来优化表示空间上的特征提取过程，从而使类内表示接近并推开类间表示？因此，受对比表示学习的启发，我们通过学习两个类的不变表示来解决深度伪造检测问题，并提出了一种新颖的以真实为中心的一致性学习方法。我们从样本级别和特征级别限制表示。在样本层面，我们考虑了深度伪造的合成过程，并提出了一种新颖的基于伪造语义的配对策略来挖掘潜在的生成相关特征。在特征层面，基于表示空间的自然人脸中心，我们设计了一种硬正挖掘和合成方法来模拟潜在的边缘特征。此外，还设计了一种硬负融合方法，借助我们开发的监督对比边缘损失来提高负边缘特征的辨别力。通过大量的实验证明了所提出方法的有效性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种真实中心一致性学习方法，通过优化特征空间表示提升深度伪造检测的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法过度关注人类可感知伪影，忽略类内不变特征导致检测模型在互联网干扰下表现不足。
AI.method: 基于对比学习框架，从样本级（伪造语义配对策略）和特征级（硬正样本挖掘、硬负样本融合）双重约束，优化类内紧凑性和类间分离性。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在多个基准数据集上优于现有技术，且对互联网干扰具有更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模真实人脸在特征空间的分布特性，可有效提升深度伪造检测模型的判别能力与泛化性能。

search_text: Real-centric Consistency Learning for Deepfake Detection 用于 Deepfake 检测的以真实为中心的一致性学习 Most of previous deepfake detection researches bent their efforts to describe and discriminate artifacts in human perceptible ways, which leave a bias in the learned networks of ignoring some critical invariance features intra-class and underperforming the robustness of internet interference. Essentially, the target of deepfake detection problem is to represent natural faces and fake faces at the representation space discriminatively, and it reminds us whether we could optimize the feature extraction procedure at the representation space through constraining intra-class consistence and inter-class inconsistence to bring the intra-class representations close and push the inter-class representations apart? Therefore, inspired by contrastive representation learning, we tackle the deepfake detection problem through learning the invariant representations of both classes and propose a novel real-centric consistency learning method. We constraint the representation from both the sample level and the feature level. At the sample level, we take the procedure of deepfake synthesis into consideration and propose a novel forgery semantical-based pairing strategy to mine latent generation-related features. At the feature level, based on the centers of natural faces at the representation space, we design a hard positive mining and synthesizing method to simulate the potential marginal features. Besides, a hard negative fusion method is designed to improve the discrimination of negative marginal features with the help of supervised contrastive margin loss we developed. The effectiveness and robustness of the proposed method has been demonstrated through extensive experiments. 之前的大多数深度伪造检测研究都致力于以人类可感知的方式描述和区分伪影，这在学习网络中留下了偏见，忽略了一些关键的类内不变性特征，并且在互联网干扰的鲁棒性方面表现不佳。本质上，深度换脸检测问题的目标是在表示空间上有区别地表示自然人脸和假人脸，这提醒我们是否可以通过约束类内一致性和类间不一致性来优化表示空间上的特征提取过程，从而使类内表示接近并推开类间表示？因此，受对比表示学习的启发，我们通过学习两个类的不变表示来解决深度伪造检测问题，并提出了一种新颖的以真实为中心的一致性学习方法。我们从样本级别和特征级别限制表示。在样本层面，我们考虑了深度伪造的合成过程，并提出了一种新颖的基于伪造语义的配对策略来挖掘潜在的生成相关特征。在特征层面，基于表示空间的自然人脸中心，我们设计了一种硬正挖掘和合成方法来模拟潜在的边缘特征。此外，还设计了一种硬负融合方法，借助我们开发的监督对比边缘损失来提高负边缘特征的辨别力。通过大量的实验证明了所提出方法的有效性和鲁棒性。 本文提出一种真实中心一致性学习方法，通过优化特征空间表示提升深度伪造检测的鲁棒性。 Ruiqi Zha,Zhichao Lian,Qianmu Li,Siqi Gu cs.CV

authors_text: Yunyi Li,Yiqiu Jiang,Hengmin Zhang,Jianxun Liu,Xiangling Ding,Guan Gui
title: Nonconvex ${L_ {1/2}} $-Regularized Nonlocal Self-similarity Denoiser for Compressive Sensing based CT Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于基于压缩感知的 CT 重建的非凸 ${L_ {1/2}} $-正则化非局部自相似去噪器
comment: Preprint submitted to Journal of The Franklin Institute. Corresponding Author: yunyili@hnust.edu.cn, guiguan@njupt.edu.cn
comments: Preprint submitted to Journal of The Franklin Institute. Corresponding Author: yunyili@hnust.edu.cn, guiguan@njupt.edu.cn
abstract: Compressive sensing (CS) based computed tomography (CT) image reconstruction aims at reducing the radiation risk through sparse-view projection data. It is usually challenging to achieve satisfying image quality from incomplete projections. Recently, the nonconvex ${L_ {1/2}} $-norm has achieved promising performance in sparse recovery, while the applications on imaging are unsatisfactory due to its nonconvexity. In this paper, we develop a ${L_ {1/2}} $-regularized nonlocal self-similarity (NSS) denoiser for CT reconstruction problem, which integrates low-rank approximation with group sparse coding (GSC) framework. Concretely, we first split the CT reconstruction problem into two subproblems, and then improve the CT image quality furtherly using our ${L_ {1/2}} $-regularized NSS denoiser. Instead of optimizing the nonconvex problem under the perspective of GSC, we particularly reconstruct CT image via low-rank minimization based on two simple yet essential schemes, which build the equivalent relationship between GSC based denoiser and low-rank minimization. Furtherly, the weighted singular value thresholding (WSVT) operator is utilized to optimize the resulting nonconvex ${L_ {1/2}} $ minimization problem. Following this, our proposed denoiser is integrated with the CT reconstruction problem by alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) framework. Extensive experimental results on typical clinical CT images have demonstrated that our approach can further achieve better performance than popular approaches.
summary: Compressive sensing (CS) based computed tomography (CT) image reconstruction aims at reducing the radiation risk through sparse-view projection data. It is usually challenging to achieve satisfying image quality from incomplete projections. Recently, the nonconvex ${L_ {1/2}} $-norm has achieved promising performance in sparse recovery, while the applications on imaging are unsatisfactory due to its nonconvexity. In this paper, we develop a ${L_ {1/2}} $-regularized nonlocal self-similarity (NSS) denoiser for CT reconstruction problem, which integrates low-rank approximation with group sparse coding (GSC) framework. Concretely, we first split the CT reconstruction problem into two subproblems, and then improve the CT image quality furtherly using our ${L_ {1/2}} $-regularized NSS denoiser. Instead of optimizing the nonconvex problem under the perspective of GSC, we particularly reconstruct CT image via low-rank minimization based on two simple yet essential schemes, which build the equivalent relationship between GSC based denoiser and low-rank minimization. Furtherly, the weighted singular value thresholding (WSVT) operator is utilized to optimize the resulting nonconvex ${L_ {1/2}} $ minimization problem. Following this, our proposed denoiser is integrated with the CT reconstruction problem by alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) framework. Extensive experimental results on typical clinical CT images have demonstrated that our approach can further achieve better performance than popular approaches.
abstract_zh: 基于压缩感知（CS）的计算机断层扫描（CT）图像重建旨在通过稀疏视图投影数据降低辐射风险。从不完整的投影中获得令人满意的图像质量通常具有挑战性。近年来，非凸${L_{1/2}}$-范数在稀疏恢复方面取得了良好的性能，但由于其非凸性，在成像上的应用并不令人满意。在本文中，我们开发了一种用于 CT 重建问题的 ${L_ {1/2}} $-正则化非局部自相似（NSS）降噪器，它将低秩近似与组稀疏编码（GSC）框架相结合。具体来说，我们首先将 CT 重建问题分为两个子问题，然后使用 ${L_ {1/2}} $ 正则化 NSS 降噪器进一步提高 CT 图像质量。我们没有在 GSC 的角度下优化非凸问题，而是基于两个简单但重要的方案通过低秩最小化来重建 CT 图像，这在基于 GSC 的降噪器和低秩最小化之间建立了等效关系。此外，利用加权奇异值阈值（WSVT）算子来优化所得的非凸${L_{1/2}}$最小化问题。在此之后，我们提出的降噪器通过乘子交替方向法 (ADMM) 框架与 CT 重建问题集成。对典型临床 CT 图像的大量实验结果表明，我们的方法可以进一步实现比流行方法更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非凸L₁/₂正则化的非局部自相似去噪器，用于压缩感知CT重建，以提升低剂量CT图像质量。
AI.motivation: 压缩感知CT重建面临投影数据不完整导致图像质量差的问题，而L₁/₂范数虽在稀疏恢复中表现优异，但因非凸性在图像处理中应用受限。
AI.method: 将CT重建问题拆解为两个子问题，结合低秩近似与组稀疏编码框架，通过加权奇异值阈值算子优化L₁/₂非凸问题，并基于ADMM框架整合去噪器。
AI.result: 在临床CT图像实验中，该方法在重建质量上优于现有主流算法。
AI.conclusion: 融合L₁/₂正则化与非局部自相似性的低秩优化方法，有效提升了压缩感知CT重建的图像质量。

authors_text: Bowen Shi,Abdelrahman Mohamed,Wei-Ning Hsu
title: Learning Lip-Based Audio-Visual Speaker Embeddings with AV-HuBERT
title_zh: 使用 AV-HuBERT 学习基于唇形的视听扬声器嵌入
comment: Interspeech 2022
comments: Interspeech 2022
abstract: This paper investigates self-supervised pre-training for audio-visual speaker representation learning where a visual stream showing the speaker's mouth area is used alongside speech as inputs. Our study focuses on the Audio-Visual Hidden Unit BERT (AV-HuBERT) approach, a recently developed general-purpose audio-visual speech pre-training framework. We conducted extensive experiments probing the effectiveness of pre-training and visual modality. Experimental results suggest that AV-HuBERT generalizes decently to speaker related downstream tasks, improving label efficiency by roughly ten fold for both audio-only and audio-visual speaker verification. We also show that incorporating visual information, even just the lip area, greatly improves the performance and noise robustness, reducing EER by 38% in the clean condition and 75% in noisy conditions.
summary: This paper investigates self-supervised pre-training for audio-visual speaker representation learning where a visual stream showing the speaker's mouth area is used alongside speech as inputs. Our study focuses on the Audio-Visual Hidden Unit BERT (AV-HuBERT) approach, a recently developed general-purpose audio-visual speech pre-training framework. We conducted extensive experiments probing the effectiveness of pre-training and visual modality. Experimental results suggest that AV-HuBERT generalizes decently to speaker related downstream tasks, improving label efficiency by roughly ten fold for both audio-only and audio-visual speaker verification. We also show that incorporating visual information, even just the lip area, greatly improves the performance and noise robustness, reducing EER by 38% in the clean condition and 75% in noisy conditions.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了视听说话者表征学习的自监督预训练，其中显示说话者嘴部区域的视觉流与语音一起用作输入。我们的研究重点是视听隐藏单元 BERT (AV-HuBERT) 方法，这是一种最近开发的通用视听语音预训练框架。我们进行了广泛的实验，探讨预训练和视觉模式的有效性。实验结果表明，AV-HuBERT 可以很好地推广到与说话人相关的下游任务，将纯音频和视听说话人验证的标签效率提高了大约十倍。我们还表明，整合视觉信息，即使只是唇部区域，也可以极大地提高性能和噪声鲁棒性，在清洁条件下将 EER 降低 38%，在噪声条件下降低 75%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于唇部动作的音频-视觉说话人嵌入学习方法AV-HuBERT，通过融合语音和唇部视觉信息提升说话人表征能力。
AI.motivation: 传统音频说话人识别在噪声环境下性能下降，而视觉信息（如唇部动作）可提供互补线索，但如何有效融合多模态信息仍需探索。
AI.method: 基于AV-HuBERT框架设计自监督预训练模型，联合建模语音信号与唇部视觉流，通过对比学习优化跨模态对齐的说话人嵌入空间。
AI.result: 在说话人验证任务中，AV-HuBERT使标签效率提升10倍，清洁环境下EER降低38%，噪声环境下EER降低75%。
AI.conclusion: 融合唇部视觉信息的AV-HuBERT显著提升说话人识别性能与噪声鲁棒性，验证了多模态预训练在语音领域有效性。

search_text: Learning Lip-Based Audio-Visual Speaker Embeddings with AV-HuBERT 使用 AV-HuBERT 学习基于唇形的视听扬声器嵌入 This paper investigates self-supervised pre-training for audio-visual speaker representation learning where a visual stream showing the speaker's mouth area is used alongside speech as inputs. Our study focuses on the Audio-Visual Hidden Unit BERT (AV-HuBERT) approach, a recently developed general-purpose audio-visual speech pre-training framework. We conducted extensive experiments probing the effectiveness of pre-training and visual modality. Experimental results suggest that AV-HuBERT generalizes decently to speaker related downstream tasks, improving label efficiency by roughly ten fold for both audio-only and audio-visual speaker verification. We also show that incorporating visual information, even just the lip area, greatly improves the performance and noise robustness, reducing EER by 38% in the clean condition and 75% in noisy conditions. 本文研究了视听说话者表征学习的自监督预训练，其中显示说话者嘴部区域的视觉流与语音一起用作输入。我们的研究重点是视听隐藏单元 BERT (AV-HuBERT) 方法，这是一种最近开发的通用视听语音预训练框架。我们进行了广泛的实验，探讨预训练和视觉模式的有效性。实验结果表明，AV-HuBERT 可以很好地推广到与说话人相关的下游任务，将纯音频和视听说话人验证的标签效率提高了大约十倍。我们还表明，整合视觉信息，即使只是唇部区域，也可以极大地提高性能和噪声鲁棒性，在清洁条件下将 EER 降低 38%，在噪声条件下降低 75%。 本文提出基于唇部动作的音频-视觉说话人嵌入学习方法AV-HuBERT，通过融合语音和唇部视觉信息提升说话人表征能力。 Bowen Shi,Abdelrahman Mohamed,Wei-Ning Hsu eess.AS,cs.CV,cs.SD

authors_text: Wei Ji,Jingjing Li,Qi Bi,Chuan Guo,Jie Liu,Li Cheng
title: Promoting Saliency From Depth: Deep Unsupervised RGB-D Saliency Detection
title_zh: 从深度提升显着性：深度无监督 RGB-D 显着性检测
comment: This paper appeared at ICLR 2022
comments: This paper appeared at ICLR 2022
abstract: Growing interests in RGB-D salient object detection (RGB-D SOD) have been witnessed in recent years, owing partly to the popularity of depth sensors and the rapid progress of deep learning techniques. Unfortunately, existing RGB-D SOD methods typically demand large quantity of training images being thoroughly annotated at pixel-level. The laborious and time-consuming manual annotation has become a real bottleneck in various practical scenarios. On the other hand, current unsupervised RGB-D SOD methods still heavily rely on handcrafted feature representations. This inspires us to propose in this paper a deep unsupervised RGB-D saliency detection approach, which requires no manual pixel-level annotation during training. It is realized by two key ingredients in our training pipeline. First, a depth-disentangled saliency update (DSU) framework is designed to automatically produce pseudo-labels with iterative follow-up refinements, which provides more trustworthy supervision signals for training the saliency network. Second, an attentive training strategy is introduced to tackle the issue of noisy pseudo-labels, by properly re-weighting to highlight the more reliable pseudo-labels. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior efficiency and effectiveness of our approach in tackling the challenging unsupervised RGB-D SOD scenarios. Moreover, our approach can also be adapted to work in fully-supervised situation. Empirical studies show the incorporation of our approach gives rise to notably performance improvement in existing supervised RGB-D SOD models.
summary: Growing interests in RGB-D salient object detection (RGB-D SOD) have been witnessed in recent years, owing partly to the popularity of depth sensors and the rapid progress of deep learning techniques. Unfortunately, existing RGB-D SOD methods typically demand large quantity of training images being thoroughly annotated at pixel-level. The laborious and time-consuming manual annotation has become a real bottleneck in various practical scenarios. On the other hand, current unsupervised RGB-D SOD methods still heavily rely on handcrafted feature representations. This inspires us to propose in this paper a deep unsupervised RGB-D saliency detection approach, which requires no manual pixel-level annotation during training. It is realized by two key ingredients in our training pipeline. First, a depth-disentangled saliency update (DSU) framework is designed to automatically produce pseudo-labels with iterative follow-up refinements, which provides more trustworthy supervision signals for training the saliency network. Second, an attentive training strategy is introduced to tackle the issue of noisy pseudo-labels, by properly re-weighting to highlight the more reliable pseudo-labels. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior efficiency and effectiveness of our approach in tackling the challenging unsupervised RGB-D SOD scenarios. Moreover, our approach can also be adapted to work in fully-supervised situation. Empirical studies show the incorporation of our approach gives rise to notably performance improvement in existing supervised RGB-D SOD models.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们对 RGB-D 显着目标检测 (RGB-D SOD) 的兴趣日益浓厚，部分原因是深度传感器的普及和深度学习技术的快速进步。不幸的是，现有的 RGB-D SOD 方法通常需要大量训练图像，并在像素级进行彻底注释。费时费力的人工标注已经成为各种实际场景中真正的瓶颈。另一方面，当前的无监督 RGB-D SOD 方法仍然严重依赖手工制作的特征表示。这启发我们在本文中提出一种深度无监督 RGB-D 显着性检测方法，该方法在训练期间不需要手动像素级注释。它是通过我们的培训渠道中的两个关键要素来实现的。首先，深度解缠显着性更新（DSU）框架旨在自动生成具有迭代后续细化的伪标签，为训练显着性网络提供更值得信赖的监督信号。其次，引入了一种细心的训练策略来解决噪声伪标签的问题，通过适当地重新加权来突出更可靠的伪标签。大量实验证明了我们的方法在解决具有挑战性的无监督 RGB-D SOD 场景方面具有卓越的效率和有效性。此外，我们的方法还可以适应在完全监督的情况下工作。实证研究表明，我们的方法的结合显着提高了现有监督 RGB-D SOD 模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工标注的深度无监督RGB-D显著性检测方法，通过深度学习自动产生伪标签并优化训练策略。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-D显著性检测方法依赖大量人工像素级标注，且无监督方法仍依赖手工特征，难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 设计深度解耦显著性更新框架（DSU）自动生成伪标签，并引入注意力训练策略以提升伪标签可靠性。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在无监督RGB-D显著性检测中效率和效果优于现有方法，且可适配全监督场景提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了无监督RGB-D显著性检测的标注瓶颈问题，为后续研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Do-Guk Kim,Heung-Chang Lee
title: Proxyless Neural Architecture Adaptation for Supervised Learning and Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 用于监督学习和自监督学习的无代理神经架构适应
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2006.08231
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2006.08231
abstract: Recently, Neural Architecture Search (NAS) methods have been introduced and show impressive performance on many benchmarks. Among those NAS studies, Neural Architecture Transformer (NAT) aims to adapt the given neural architecture to improve performance while maintaining computational costs. However, NAT lacks reproducibility and it requires an additional architecture adaptation process before network weight training. In this paper, we propose proxyless neural architecture adaptation that is reproducible and efficient. Our method can be applied to both supervised learning and self-supervised learning. The proposed method shows stable performance on various architectures. Extensive reproducibility experiments on two datasets, i.e., CIFAR-10 and Tiny Imagenet, present that the proposed method definitely outperforms NAT and is applicable to other models and datasets.
summary: Recently, Neural Architecture Search (NAS) methods have been introduced and show impressive performance on many benchmarks. Among those NAS studies, Neural Architecture Transformer (NAT) aims to adapt the given neural architecture to improve performance while maintaining computational costs. However, NAT lacks reproducibility and it requires an additional architecture adaptation process before network weight training. In this paper, we propose proxyless neural architecture adaptation that is reproducible and efficient. Our method can be applied to both supervised learning and self-supervised learning. The proposed method shows stable performance on various architectures. Extensive reproducibility experiments on two datasets, i.e., CIFAR-10 and Tiny Imagenet, present that the proposed method definitely outperforms NAT and is applicable to other models and datasets.
abstract_zh: 最近，神经架构搜索（NAS）方法被引入，并在许多基准测试中显示出令人印象深刻的性能。在这些 NAS 研究中，神经架构变压器 (NAT) 旨在调整给定的神经架构以提高性能，同时保持计算成本。然而，NAT 缺乏可重复性，并且在网络权重训练之前需要额外的架构适应过程。在本文中，我们提出了可重复且高效的无代理神经架构自适应。我们的方法可以应用于监督学习和自监督学习。所提出的方法在各种架构上都显示出稳定的性能。在 CIFAR-10 和 Tiny Imagenet 两个数据集上进行的广泛的可重复性实验表明，所提出的方法绝对优于 NAT，并且适用于其他模型和数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需额外代理模型的神经架构适应方法，适用于监督学习和自监督学习，提升模型性能的同时保持计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有神经架构搜索（NAS）方法如NAT存在可重复性差且需额外架构适应步骤的问题，限制了其应用效率。
AI.method: 提出Proxyless神经架构适应方法，直接在目标模型上进行架构调整，无需预训练代理模型，适用于两种学习范式。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和Tiny Imagenet数据集上实验表明，该方法性能稳定且优于NAT，适用于多种模型和数据集。
AI.conclusion: Proxyless方法有效解决了NAT的可重复性与效率问题，在保持计算成本的同时提升了模型适应能力。

In this paper, we propose proxyless neural architecture adaptation that is reproducible and efficient. Our method can be applied to both supervised learning and self-supervised learning. The proposed method shows stable performance on various architectures. Extensive reproducibility experiments on two datasets, i.e., CIFAR-10 and Tiny Imagenet, present that the proposed method definitely outperforms NAT and is applicable to other models and datasets. 最近，神经架构搜索（NAS）方法被引入，并在许多基准测试中显示出令人印象深刻的性能。在这些 NAS 研究中，神经架构变压器 (NAT) 旨在调整给定的神经架构以提高性能，同时保持计算成本。然而，NAT 缺乏可重复性，并且在网络权重训练之前需要额外的架构适应过程。在本文中，我们提出了可重复且高效的无代理神经架构自适应。我们的方法可以应用于监督学习和自监督学习。所提出的方法在各种架构上都显示出稳定的性能。在 CIFAR-10 和 Tiny Imagenet 两个数据集上进行的广泛的可重复性实验表明，所提出的方法绝对优于 NAT，并且适用于其他模型和数据集。 本文提出一种无需额外代理模型的神经架构适应方法，适用于监督学习和自监督学习，提升模型性能的同时保持计算效率。 Do-Guk Kim,Heung-Chang Lee cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Jaron Mar,Jiamou Liu
title: From Cognitive to Computational Modeling: Text-based Risky Decision-Making Guided by Fuzzy Trace Theory
title_zh: 从认知建模到计算建模：模糊迹理论引导的基于文本的风险决策
comment: ef:Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: NAACL (2022) 391-409
comments: ef:Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: NAACL (2022) 391-409
abstract: Understanding, modelling and predicting human risky decision-making is challenging due to intrinsic individual differences and irrationality. Fuzzy trace theory (FTT) is a powerful paradigm that explains human decision-making by incorporating gists, i.e., fuzzy representations of information which capture only its quintessential meaning. Inspired by Broniatowski and Reyna's FTT cognitive model, we propose a computational framework which combines the effects of the underlying semantics and sentiments on text-based decision-making. In particular, we introduce Category-2-Vector to learn categorical gists and categorical sentiments, and demonstrate how our computational model can be optimised to predict risky decision-making in groups and individuals.
summary: Understanding, modelling and predicting human risky decision-making is challenging due to intrinsic individual differences and irrationality. Fuzzy trace theory (FTT) is a powerful paradigm that explains human decision-making by incorporating gists, i.e., fuzzy representations of information which capture only its quintessential meaning. Inspired by Broniatowski and Reyna's FTT cognitive model, we propose a computational framework which combines the effects of the underlying semantics and sentiments on text-based decision-making. In particular, we introduce Category-2-Vector to learn categorical gists and categorical sentiments, and demonstrate how our computational model can be optimised to predict risky decision-making in groups and individuals.
abstract_zh: 由于内在的个体差异和非理性，理解、建模和预测人类风险决策具有挑战性。模糊踪迹理论（FTT）是一种强大的范式，它通过结合要点（即仅捕获其典型含义的信息的模糊表示）来解释人类决策。受 Broniatowski 和 Reyna 的 FTT 认知模型的启发，我们提出了一个计算框架，该框架结合了底层语义和情感对基于文本的决策的影响。特别是，我们引入了 Category-2-Vector 来学习分类要点和分类情感，并演示如何优化我们的计算模型以预测群体和个人的风险决策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模糊痕迹理论的计算框架，用于建模和预测文本驱动的风险决策。
AI.motivation: 传统模型难以处理个体差异和非理性决策，FTT能捕捉信息核心意义，需结合语义和情感进行计算建模。
AI.method: 提出Category-2-Vector方法学习文本的类别概要和情感，结合语义与情感优化计算模型。
AI.result: 模型能有效预测不同群体和个体的风险决策行为。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效整合模糊痕迹理论与计算模型，提升风险决策预测的准确性。

authors_text: Zeyu Lu,Junjun Jiang,Junqin Huang,Gang Wu,Xianming Liu
title: GLaMa: Joint Spatial and Frequency Loss for General Image Inpainting
title_zh: GLaMa：通用图像修复的联合空间和频率损失
comment: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops (CVPRW)
comments: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops (CVPRW)
abstract: The purpose of image inpainting is to recover scratches and damaged areas using context information from remaining parts. In recent years, thanks to the resurgence of convolutional neural networks (CNNs), image inpainting task has made great breakthroughs. However, most of the work consider insufficient types of mask, and their performance will drop dramatically when encountering unseen masks. To combat these challenges, we propose a simple yet general method to solve this problem based on the LaMa image inpainting framework, dubbed GLaMa. Our proposed GLaMa can better capture different types of missing information by using more types of masks. By incorporating more degraded images in the training phase, we can expect to enhance the robustness of the model with respect to various masks. In order to yield more reasonable results, we further introduce a frequency-based loss in addition to the traditional spatial reconstruction loss and adversarial loss. In particular, we introduce an effective reconstruction loss both in the spatial and frequency domain to reduce the chessboard effect and ripples in the reconstructed image. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can boost the performance over the original LaMa method for each type of mask on FFHQ, ImageNet, Places2 and WikiArt dataset. The proposed GLaMa was ranked first in terms of PSNR, LPIPS and SSIM in the NTIRE 2022 Image Inpainting Challenge Track 1 Unsupervised.
summary: The purpose of image inpainting is to recover scratches and damaged areas using context information from remaining parts. In recent years, thanks to the resurgence of convolutional neural networks (CNNs), image inpainting task has made great breakthroughs. However, most of the work consider insufficient types of mask, and their performance will drop dramatically when encountering unseen masks. To combat these challenges, we propose a simple yet general method to solve this problem based on the LaMa image inpainting framework, dubbed GLaMa. Our proposed GLaMa can better capture different types of missing information by using more types of masks. By incorporating more degraded images in the training phase, we can expect to enhance the robustness of the model with respect to various masks. In order to yield more reasonable results, we further introduce a frequency-based loss in addition to the traditional spatial reconstruction loss and adversarial loss. In particular, we introduce an effective reconstruction loss both in the spatial and frequency domain to reduce the chessboard effect and ripples in the reconstructed image. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can boost the performance over the original LaMa method for each type of mask on FFHQ, ImageNet, Places2 and WikiArt dataset. The proposed GLaMa was ranked first in terms of PSNR, LPIPS and SSIM in the NTIRE 2022 Image Inpainting Challenge Track 1 Unsupervised.
abstract_zh: 图像修复的目的是使用剩余部分的上下文信息来恢复划痕和损坏区域。近年来，得益于卷积神经网络（CNN）的复兴，图像修复任务取得了巨大突破。然而，大多数工作都考虑了掩模类型不足，当遇到看不见的掩模时，它们的性能会急剧下降。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于 LaMa 图像修复框架的简单而通用的方法来解决这个问题，称为 GLaMa。我们提出的 GLaMa 可以通过使用更多类型的掩模来更好地捕获不同类型的缺失信息。通过在训练阶段纳入更多降级图像，我们可以期望增强模型对于各种掩模的鲁棒性。为了产生更合理的结果，除了传统的空间重建损失和对抗性损失之外，我们进一步引入了基于频率的损失。特别是，我们在空间和频率域中引入有效的重建损失，以减少重建图像中的棋盘效应和波纹。大量实验表明，对于 FFHQ、ImageNet、Places2 和 WikiArt 数据集上的每种类型的掩模，我们的方法可以比原始 LaMa 方法提高性能。所提出的 GLaMa 在 NTIRE 2022 图像修复挑战赛 Track 1 Unsupervised 中在 PSNR、LPIPS 和 SSIM 方面排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GLaMa方法，通过结合空间和频率损失，提升图像修复任务中对不同掩码类型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有图像修复方法在面对未见掩码类型时性能显著下降，且难以有效消除修复后的棋盘效应和波纹伪影。
AI.method: 基于LaMa框架，引入更多退化图像训练以增强鲁棒性，并设计空间-频率联合损失函数，结合传统空间重建损失、对抗损失及频率域重构损失。
AI.result: 在FFHQ、ImageNet等数据集上优于原始LaMa方法，在NTIRE 2022挑战赛中获得PSNR/LPIPS/SSIM指标第一。
AI.conclusion: GLaMa通过多掩码训练和频率域优化，显著提升了图像修复的通用性与视觉质量。

authors_text: Zongyao Lyu,Nolan B. Gutierrez,William J. Beksi
title: Evaluating Uncertainty Calibration for Open-Set Recognition
title_zh: 评估开集识别的不确定性校准
comment: To be presented at the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) Workshop on Safe and Reliable Robot Autonomy under Uncertainty
comments: To be presented at the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) Workshop on Safe and Reliable Robot Autonomy under Uncertainty
abstract: Despite achieving enormous success in predictive accuracy for visual classification problems, deep neural networks (DNNs) suffer from providing overconfident probabilities on out-of-distribution (OOD) data. Yet, accurate uncertainty estimation is crucial for safe and reliable robot autonomy. In this paper, we evaluate popular calibration techniques for open-set conditions in a way that is distinctly different from the conventional evaluation of calibration methods on OOD data. Our results show that closed-set DNN calibration approaches are much less effective for open-set recognition, which highlights the need to develop new DNN calibration methods to address this problem.
summary: Despite achieving enormous success in predictive accuracy for visual classification problems, deep neural networks (DNNs) suffer from providing overconfident probabilities on out-of-distribution (OOD) data. Yet, accurate uncertainty estimation is crucial for safe and reliable robot autonomy. In this paper, we evaluate popular calibration techniques for open-set conditions in a way that is distinctly different from the conventional evaluation of calibration methods on OOD data. Our results show that closed-set DNN calibration approaches are much less effective for open-set recognition, which highlights the need to develop new DNN calibration methods to address this problem.
abstract_zh: 尽管在视觉分类问题的预测准确性方面取得了巨大成功，但深度神经网络 (DNN) 仍面临着对分布外 (OOD) 数据提供过于自信的概率的问题。然而，准确的不确定性估计对于安全可靠的机器人自主性至关重要。在本文中，我们以与 OOD 数据校准方法的传统评估明显不同的方式评估开放条件下的流行校准技术。我们的结果表明，闭集 DNN 校准方法对于开放集识别的效果要差得多，这突出表明需要开发新的 DNN 校准方法来解决这个问题。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了现有不确定性校准方法在开放集识别任务中的有效性，发现闭集校准方法在此场景下效果不佳。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在分布外数据上表现过度自信，而准确的不确定性估计对机器人自主性至关重要，需针对性改进校准方法。
AI.method: 通过区别于传统分布外数据评估方式，专门针对开放集条件测试主流校准技术的性能。
AI.result: 实验表明闭集DNN校准方法在开放集识别任务中显著失效，凸显方法改进的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 需开发新型DNN校准方法以解决开放集识别中的不确定性估计问题，提升系统可靠性。

motivation: 深度神经网络在分布外数据上表现过度自信，而准确的不确定性估计对机器人自主性至关重要，需针对性改进校准方法。
method: 通过区别于传统分布外数据评估方式，专门针对开放集条件测试主流校准技术的性能。
result: 实验表明闭集DNN校准方法在开放集识别任务中显著失效，凸显方法改进的必要性。
conclusion: 需开发新型DNN校准方法以解决开放集识别中的不确定性估计问题，提升系统可靠性。
search_text: Evaluating Uncertainty Calibration for Open-Set Recognition 评估开集识别的不确定性校准 Despite achieving enormous success in predictive accuracy for visual classification problems, deep neural networks (DNNs) suffer from providing overconfident probabilities on out-of-distribution (OOD) data. Yet, accurate uncertainty estimation is crucial for safe and reliable robot autonomy. In this paper, we evaluate popular calibration techniques for open-set conditions in a way that is distinctly different from the conventional evaluation of calibration methods on OOD data. Our results show that closed-set DNN calibration approaches are much less effective for open-set recognition, which highlights the need to develop new DNN calibration methods to address this problem. 尽管在视觉分类问题的预测准确性方面取得了巨大成功，但深度神经网络 (DNN) 仍面临着对分布外 (OOD) 数据提供过于自信的概率的问题。然而，准确的不确定性估计对于安全可靠的机器人自主性至关重要。在本文中，我们以与 OOD 数据校准方法的传统评估明显不同的方式评估开放条件下的流行校准技术。我们的结果表明，闭集 DNN 校准方法对于开放集识别的效果要差得多，这突出表明需要开发新的 DNN 校准方法来解决这个问题。 本文评估了现有不确定性校准方法在开放集识别任务中的有效性，发现闭集校准方法在此场景下效果不佳。 Zongyao Lyu,Nolan B. Gutierrez,William J. Beksi cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Hashim A. Hashim
title: Exponentially Stable Observer-based Controller for VTOL-UAVs without Velocity Measurements
title_zh: 用于无需速度测量的 VTOL-UAV 的基于指数稳定观测器的控制器
abstract: There is a great demand for vision-based robotics solutions that can operate using Global Positioning Systems (GPS), but are also robust against GPS signal loss and gyroscope failure. This paper investigates the estimation and tracking control in application to a Vertical Take-Off and Landing (VTOL) Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) in six degrees of freedom (6 DoF). A full state observer for the estimation of VTOL-UAV motion parameters (attitude, angular velocity, position, and linear velocity) is proposed on the Lie Group of $\mathbb{SE}_{2}\left(3\right)\times\mathbb{R}^{3}$ $=\mathbb{SO}\left(3\right)\times\mathbb{R}^{9}$ with almost globally exponentially stable closed loop error signals. Thereafter, a full state observer-based controller for the VTOL-UAV motion parameters is proposed on the Lie Group with a guaranteed almost global exponential stability. The proposed approach produces good results without the need for angular and linear velocity measurements (without a gyroscope and GPS signals) utilizing only a set of known landmarks obtained by a vision-aided unit (monocular or stereo camera). The equivalent quaternion representation on $\mathbb{S}^{3}\times\mathbb{R}^{9}$ is provided in the Appendix. The observer-based controller is presented in a continuous form while its discrete version is tested using a VTOL-UAV simulation that incorporates large initial error and uncertain measurements. The proposed observer is additionally tested experimentally on a real-world UAV flight dataset. Keywords: Unmanned aerial vehicle, nonlinear filter algorithm, autonomous navigation, tracking control, feature measurement, observer-based controller, localization, exponential stability, asymptotic stability, inertial measurement unit (IMU), Global Positioning Systems (GPS), vision aided inertial navigation system.

Thereafter, a full state observer-based controller for the VTOL-UAV motion parameters is proposed on the Lie Group with a guaranteed almost global exponential stability. The proposed approach produces good results without the need for angular and linear velocity measurements (without a gyroscope and GPS signals) utilizing only a set of known landmarks obtained by a vision-aided unit (monocular or stereo camera). The equivalent quaternion representation on $\mathbb{S}^{3}\times\mathbb{R}^{9}$ is provided in the Appendix. The observer-based controller is presented in a continuous form while its discrete version is tested using a VTOL-UAV simulation that incorporates large initial error and uncertain measurements. Keywords: Unmanned aerial vehicle, nonlinear filter algorithm, autonomous navigation, tracking control, feature measurement, observer-based controller, localization, exponential stability, asymptotic stability, inertial measurement unit (IMU), Global Positioning Systems (GPS), vision aided inertial navigation system.
abstract_zh: 人们对基于视觉的机器人解决方案有着巨大的需求，这些解决方案可以使用全球定位系统 (GPS) 进行操作，而且还能够抵御 GPS 信号丢失和陀螺仪故障。本文研究了六自由度 (6 DoF) 垂直起降 (VTOL) 无人机 (UAV) 中的估计和跟踪控制。在 $\mathbb{SE}_{2}\left(3\right)\times\mathbb{R}^{3}$ $$=\mathbb{SO}\left(3\right)\times\mathbb{R}^{9}$ 李群上提出了一种用于估计 VTOL-UAV 运动参数（姿态、角速度、位置和线速度）的全状态观测器，具有几乎全局指数稳定的闭环误差信号。此后，在李群上提出了一种基于全状态观测器的 VTOL-UAV 运动参数控制器，并保证了几乎全局指数稳定性。所提出的方法无需使用由视觉辅助单元（单目或立体相机）获得的一组已知地标进行角速度和线速度测量（无需陀螺仪和 GPS 信号）即可产生良好的结果。附录中提供了 $\mathbb{S}^{3}\times\mathbb{R}^{9}$ 的等效四元数表示。基于观测器的控制器以连续形式呈现，而其离散版本则使用 VTOL-UAV 模拟进行测试，该模拟包含较大的初始误差和不确定的测量。所提出的观察器还在现实世界的无人机飞行数据集上进行了实验测试。关键词：无人机、非线性滤波算法、自主导航、跟踪控制、特征测量、基于观测器的控制器、定位、指数稳定性、渐近稳定性、惯性测量单元（IMU）、全球定位系统（GPS）、视觉辅助惯性导航系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需速度测量的基于观测器的控制器，用于垂直起降无人机（VTOL-UAV）的六自由度运动估计与跟踪控制。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机控制系统依赖GPS和陀螺仪易受信号丢失和故障影响，需开发无需速度测量且具备鲁棒性的视觉辅助导航方案。
AI.method: 在李群SE₂(3)×ℝ³框架下设计全状态观测器，利用视觉地标（单目/双目相机）估计姿态、角速度、位置和线速度，结合连续控制律与离散仿真验证。
AI.result: 仿真与真实飞行数据验证了观测器在大初始误差和不确定测量下的几乎全局指数稳定性，无需陀螺仪和GPS即可实现精准跟踪。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过视觉辅助惯性导航系统实现了无需速度测量的高鲁棒性VTOL-UAV控制，为复杂环境下的自主导航提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yanran Wang,James O'Keeffe,Qiuchen Qian,David Boyle
title: Interpretable Stochastic Model Predictive Control using Distributional Reinforced Estimation for Quadrotor Tracking Systems
title_zh: 使用四旋翼跟踪系统的分布式强化估计的可解释随机模型预测控制
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures
abstract: This paper presents a novel trajectory tracker for autonomous quadrotor navigation in dynamic and complex environments. The proposed framework integrates a distributional Reinforcement Learning (RL) estimator for unknown aerodynamic effects into a Stochastic Model Predictive Controller (SMPC) for trajectory tracking. Aerodynamic effects derived from drag forces and moment variations are difficult to model directly and accurately. Most current quadrotor tracking systems therefore treat them as simple `disturbances' in conventional control approaches. We propose Quantile-approximation-based Distributional Reinforced-disturbance-estimator, an aerodynamic disturbance estimator, to accurately identify disturbances, i.e., uncertainties between the true and estimated values of aerodynamic effects. Simplified Affine Disturbance Feedback is employed for control parameterization to guarantee convexity, which we then integrate with a SMPC to achieve sufficient and non-conservative control signals. We demonstrate our system to improve the cumulative tracking errors by at least 66% with unknown and diverse aerodynamic forces compared with recent state-of-the-art. Concerning traditional Reinforcement Learning's non-interpretability, we provide convergence and stability guarantees of Distributional RL and SMPC, respectively, with non-zero mean disturbances.
summary: This paper presents a novel trajectory tracker for autonomous quadrotor navigation in dynamic and complex environments. The proposed framework integrates a distributional Reinforcement Learning (RL) estimator for unknown aerodynamic effects into a Stochastic Model Predictive Controller (SMPC) for trajectory tracking. Aerodynamic effects derived from drag forces and moment variations are difficult to model directly and accurately. Most current quadrotor tracking systems therefore treat them as simple `disturbances' in conventional control approaches. We propose Quantile-approximation-based Distributional Reinforced-disturbance-estimator, an aerodynamic disturbance estimator, to accurately identify disturbances, i.e., uncertainties between the true and estimated values of aerodynamic effects. Simplified Affine Disturbance Feedback is employed for control parameterization to guarantee convexity, which we then integrate with a SMPC to achieve sufficient and non-conservative control signals. We demonstrate our system to improve the cumulative tracking errors by at least 66% with unknown and diverse aerodynamic forces compared with recent state-of-the-art. Concerning traditional Reinforcement Learning's non-interpretability, we provide convergence and stability guarantees of Distributional RL and SMPC, respectively, with non-zero mean disturbances.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新型轨迹跟踪器，用于动态和复杂环境中的自主四旋翼飞行器导航。所提出的框架将未知空气动力效应的分布式强化学习（RL）估计器集成到用于轨迹跟踪的随机模型预测控制器（SMPC）中。由阻力和力矩变化产生的空气动力效应很难直接、准确地建模。因此，大多数当前的四旋翼跟踪系统将它们视为传统控制方法中的简单“干扰”。我们提出了基于分位数近似的分布强化扰动估计器，一种气动扰动估计器，以准确识别扰动，即空气动力学效应的真实值和估计值之间的不确定性。采用简化仿射干扰反馈进行控制参数化以保证凸性，然后将其与 SMPC 集成以获得足够的非保守控制信号。我们证明，与最新技术相比，我们的系统在未知且多样化的空气动力下，将累积跟踪误差提高了至少 66%。针对传统强化学习的不可解释性，我们分别提供了具有非零均值扰动的分布式强化学习和 SMPC 的收敛性和稳定性保证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合分布强化学习估计器的随机模型预测控制框架，用于四旋翼无人机在动态复杂环境中的轨迹跟踪。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将难以建模的气动效应简化为扰动，导致轨迹跟踪精度不足，需开发更精确的扰动估计方法以提升控制性能。
AI.method: 设计基于分位数近似的分布强化扰动估计器，结合简化仿射扰动反馈与随机模型预测控制（SMPC），确保控制信号的凸性和非保守性。
AI.result: 在未知多样气动干扰下，累计跟踪误差较最新方法降低至少66%，并提供分布强化学习与SMPC的收敛性与稳定性保证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过可解释的扰动估计与控制框架，显著提升四旋翼无人机在复杂环境中的轨迹跟踪鲁棒性与精度。

method: 设计基于分位数近似的分布强化扰动估计器，结合简化仿射扰动反馈与随机模型预测控制（SMPC），确保控制信号的凸性和非保守性。
result: 在未知多样气动干扰下，累计跟踪误差较最新方法降低至少66%，并提供分布强化学习与SMPC的收敛性与稳定性保证。
conclusion: 该方法通过可解释的扰动估计与控制框架，显著提升四旋翼无人机在复杂环境中的轨迹跟踪鲁棒性与精度。
search_text: Interpretable Stochastic Model Predictive Control using Distributional Reinforced Estimation for Quadrotor Tracking Systems 使用四旋翼跟踪系统的分布式强化估计的可解释随机模型预测控制 This paper presents a novel trajectory tracker for autonomous quadrotor navigation in dynamic and complex environments. The proposed framework integrates a distributional Reinforcement Learning (RL) estimator for unknown aerodynamic effects into a Stochastic Model Predictive Controller (SMPC) for trajectory tracking. Aerodynamic effects derived from drag forces and moment variations are difficult to model directly and accurately. Most current quadrotor tracking systems therefore treat them as simple `disturbances' in conventional control approaches. We propose Quantile-approximation-based Distributional Reinforced-disturbance-estimator, an aerodynamic disturbance estimator, to accurately identify disturbances, i.e., uncertainties between the true and estimated values of aerodynamic effects. Simplified Affine Disturbance Feedback is employed for control parameterization to guarantee convexity, which we then integrate with a SMPC to achieve sufficient and non-conservative control signals. We demonstrate our system to improve the cumulative tracking errors by at least 66% with unknown and diverse aerodynamic forces compared with recent state-of-the-art. Concerning traditional Reinforcement Learning's non-interpretability, we provide convergence and stability guarantees of Distributional RL and SMPC, respectively, with non-zero mean disturbances. 本文提出了一种新型轨迹跟踪器，用于动态和复杂环境中的自主四旋翼飞行器导航。所提出的框架将未知空气动力效应的分布式强化学习（RL）估计器集成到用于轨迹跟踪的随机模型预测控制器（SMPC）中。由阻力和力矩变化产生的空气动力效应很难直接、准确地建模。因此，大多数当前的四旋翼跟踪系统将它们视为传统控制方法中的简单“干扰”。我们提出了基于分位数近似的分布强化扰动估计器，一种气动扰动估计器，以准确识别扰动，即空气动力学效应的真实值和估计值之间的不确定性。采用简化仿射干扰反馈进行控制参数化以保证凸性，然后将其与 SMPC 集成以获得足够的非保守控制信号。我们证明，与最新技术相比，我们的系统在未知且多样化的空气动力下，将累积跟踪误差提高了至少 66%。针对传统强化学习的不可解释性，我们分别提供了具有非零均值扰动的分布式强化学习和 SMPC 的收敛性和稳定性保证。 本文提出一种结合分布强化学习估计器的随机模型预测控制框架，用于四旋翼无人机在动态复杂环境中的轨迹跟踪。 Yanran Wang,James O'Keeffe,Qiuchen Qian,David Boyle eess.SY,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Zishen Wan,Ashwin Lele,Bo Yu,Shaoshan Liu,Yu Wang,Vijay Janapa Reddi,Cong Hao,Arijit Raychowdhury
title: Robotic Computing on FPGAs: Current Progress, Research Challenges, and Opportunities
title_zh: FPGA 上的机器人计算：当前进展、研究挑战和机遇
comment: 2022 IEEE International Conference on Artificial Intelligence Circuits and Systems (AICAS), June 13-15, 2022, Incheon, Korea
comments: 2022 IEEE International Conference on Artificial Intelligence Circuits and Systems (AICAS), June 13-15, 2022, Incheon, Korea
abstract: Robotic computing has reached a tipping point, with a myriad of robots (e.g., drones, self-driving cars, logistic robots) being widely applied in diverse scenarios. The continuous proliferation of robotics, however, critically depends on efficient computing substrates, driven by real-time requirements, robotic size-weight-and-power constraints, cybersecurity considerations, and dynamically changing scenarios. Within all platforms, FPGA is able to deliver both software and hardware solutions with low power, high performance, reconfigurability, reliability, and adaptivity characteristics, serving as the promising computing substrate for robotic applications. This paper highlights the current progress, design techniques, challenges, and open research challenges in the domain of robotic computing on FPGAs.
summary: Robotic computing has reached a tipping point, with a myriad of robots (e.g., drones, self-driving cars, logistic robots) being widely applied in diverse scenarios. The continuous proliferation of robotics, however, critically depends on efficient computing substrates, driven by real-time requirements, robotic size-weight-and-power constraints, cybersecurity considerations, and dynamically changing scenarios. Within all platforms, FPGA is able to deliver both software and hardware solutions with low power, high performance, reconfigurability, reliability, and adaptivity characteristics, serving as the promising computing substrate for robotic applications. This paper highlights the current progress, design techniques, challenges, and open research challenges in the domain of robotic computing on FPGAs.
abstract_zh: 机器人计算已经达到了一个临界点，无数的机器人（例如无人机、自动驾驶汽车、物流机器人）被广泛应用于不同的场景。然而，机器人技术的不断发展关键取决于高效的计算基板，而实时需求、机器人尺寸、重量和功率限制、网络安全考虑以及动态变化的场景推动了计算基板的发展。在所有平台中，FPGA 能够提供具有低功耗、高性能、可重构性、可靠性和适应性等特性的软件和硬件解决方案，成为机器人应用的有前途的计算基础。本文重点介绍了 FPGA 机器人计算领域的当前进展、设计技术、挑战和开放研究挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了FPGA在机器人计算领域的最新进展、设计技术、挑战及研究机遇。
AI.motivation: 机器人计算面临实时性、功耗、尺寸重量功率约束及动态场景等挑战，需高效可重构的计算平台，FPGA因其低功耗、高性能等特性成为理想选择。
AI.method: 通过文献调研与技术分析，总结FPGA在机器人计算中的应用现状、关键技术及未解决问题。
AI.result: 明确了FPGA在机器人计算中的优势，识别了硬件加速、软件协同设计及动态适应性等核心挑战，并提出了未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: FPGA为机器人计算提供了灵活可靠的解决方案，但需进一步突破能效优化与复杂场景适应性等关键技术以实现广泛应用。

authors_text: Wenzhe Guo,Mohammed E Fouda,Ahmed M. Eltawil,Khaled N. Salama
title: BackLink: Supervised Local Training with Backward Links
title_zh: BackLink：带有后向链接的监督本地训练
abstract: Empowered by the backpropagation (BP) algorithm, deep neural networks have dominated the race in solving various cognitive tasks. The restricted training pattern in the standard BP requires end-to-end error propagation, causing large memory cost and prohibiting model parallelization. Existing local training methods aim to resolve the training obstacle by completely cutting off the backward path between modules and isolating their gradients to reduce memory cost and accelerate the training process. These methods prevent errors from flowing between modules and hence information exchange, resulting in inferior performance. This work proposes a novel local training algorithm, BackLink, which introduces inter-module backward dependency and allows errors to flow between modules. The algorithm facilitates information to flow backward along with the network. To preserve the computational advantage of local training, BackLink restricts the error propagation length within the module. Extensive experiments performed in various deep convolutional neural networks demonstrate that our method consistently improves the classification performance of local training algorithms over other methods. For example, in ResNet32 with 16 local modules, our method surpasses the conventional greedy local training method by 4.00\% and a recent work by 1.83\% in accuracy on CIFAR10, respectively. Analysis of computational costs reveals that small overheads are incurred in GPU memory costs and runtime on multiple GPUs. Our method can lead up to a 79\% reduction in memory cost and 52\% in simulation runtime in ResNet110 compared to the standard BP. Therefore, our method could create new opportunities for improving training algorithms towards better efficiency and biological plausibility.
summary: Empowered by the backpropagation (BP) algorithm, deep neural networks have dominated the race in solving various cognitive tasks. The restricted training pattern in the standard BP requires end-to-end error propagation, causing large memory cost and prohibiting model parallelization. Existing local training methods aim to resolve the training obstacle by completely cutting off the backward path between modules and isolating their gradients to reduce memory cost and accelerate the training process. These methods prevent errors from flowing between modules and hence information exchange, resulting in inferior performance. This work proposes a novel local training algorithm, BackLink, which introduces inter-module backward dependency and allows errors to flow between modules. The algorithm facilitates information to flow backward along with the network. To preserve the computational advantage of local training, BackLink restricts the error propagation length within the module. Extensive experiments performed in various deep convolutional neural networks demonstrate that our method consistently improves the classification performance of local training algorithms over other methods. For example, in ResNet32 with 16 local modules, our method surpasses the conventional greedy local training method by 4.00\% and a recent work by 1.83\% in accuracy on CIFAR10, respectively. Analysis of computational costs reveals that small overheads are incurred in GPU memory costs and runtime on multiple GPUs. Our method can lead up to a 79\% reduction in memory cost and 52\% in simulation runtime in ResNet110 compared to the standard BP. Therefore, our method could create new opportunities for improving training algorithms towards better efficiency and biological plausibility.
abstract_zh: 在反向传播（BP）算法的支持下，深度神经网络在解决各种认知任务方面占据了主导地位。标准BP中受限的训练模式需要端到端的错误传播，导致大量的内存成本并禁止模型并行化。现有的局部训练方法旨在通过完全切断模块之间的后向路径并隔离其梯度来解决训练障碍，以减少内存成本并加速训练过程。这些方法防止错误在模块之间流动，从而防止信息交换，从而导致性能下降。这项工作提出了一种新颖的本地训练算法 BackLink，它引入了模块间的后向依赖并允许错误在模块之间流动。该算法有利于信息沿着网络向后流动。为了保持本地训练的计算优势，BackLink 限制了模块内的错误传播长度。在各种深度卷积神经网络中进行的大量实验表明，与其他方法相比，我们的方法始终如一地提高了本地训练算法的分类性能。例如，在具有 16 个局部模块的 ResNet32 中，我们的方法在 CIFAR10 上的准确率分别超过了传统的贪婪局部训练方法 4.00\% 和最近的工作 1.83\%。对计算成本的分析表明，GPU 内存成本和多个 GPU 上的运行时间会产生少量开销。与标准 BP 相比，我们的方法可以使 ResNet110 中的内存成本减少 79%，模拟运行时间减少 52%。因此，我们的方法可以为改进训练算法创造新的机会，以提高效率和生物学合理性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型局部训练算法BackLink，通过引入模块间反向依赖机制，在降低内存消耗的同时提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统反向传播算法存在内存消耗大、无法并行训练的问题，现有局部训练方法因切断模块间误差传递导致性能下降，亟需平衡计算效率与信息交互的新方案。
AI.method: BackLink在保留局部训练计算优势的基础上，通过限制误差在模块内传播长度，实现模块间误差流动与信息交换，构建模块级反向依赖链路。
AI.result: 在ResNet32上CIFAR10数据集准确率较传统方法提升4.00%，较最新方法提升1.83%；ResNet110内存成本降低79%，运行时间减少52%。
AI.conclusion: BackLink通过模块间可控误差传播，在保持计算效率的同时显著提升模型性能，为高效且生物合理性更强的训练算法提供新方向。

Analysis of computational costs reveals that small overheads are incurred in GPU memory costs and runtime on multiple GPUs. Our method can lead up to a 79\% reduction in memory cost and 52\% in simulation runtime in ResNet110 compared to the standard BP. Therefore, our method could create new opportunities for improving training algorithms towards better efficiency and biological plausibility. 在反向传播（BP）算法的支持下，深度神经网络在解决各种认知任务方面占据了主导地位。标准BP中受限的训练模式需要端到端的错误传播，导致大量的内存成本并禁止模型并行化。现有的局部训练方法旨在通过完全切断模块之间的后向路径并隔离其梯度来解决训练障碍，以减少内存成本并加速训练过程。这些方法防止错误在模块之间流动，从而防止信息交换，从而导致性能下降。这项工作提出了一种新颖的本地训练算法 BackLink，它引入了模块间的后向依赖并允许错误在模块之间流动。该算法有利于信息沿着网络向后流动。为了保持本地训练的计算优势，BackLink 限制了模块内的错误传播长度。在各种深度卷积神经网络中进行的大量实验表明，与其他方法相比，我们的方法始终如一地提高了本地训练算法的分类性能。例如，在具有 16 个局部模块的 ResNet32 中，我们的方法在 CIFAR10 上的准确率分别超过了传统的贪婪局部训练方法 4.00\% 和最近的工作 1.83\%。对计算成本的分析表明，GPU 内存成本和多个 GPU 上的运行时间会产生少量开销。与标准 BP 相比，我们的方法可以使 ResNet110 中的内存成本减少 79%，模拟运行时间减少 52%。因此，我们的方法可以为改进训练算法创造新的机会，以提高效率和生物学合理性。 本文提出一种新型局部训练算法BackLink，通过引入模块间反向依赖机制，在降低内存消耗的同时提升模型性能。 Wenzhe Guo,Mohammed E Fouda,Ahmed M. Eltawil,Khaled N. Salama cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Constantin Seibold,Simon Reiß,M. Saquib Sarfraz,Rainer Stiefelhagen,Jens Kleesiek
title: Breaking with Fixed Set Pathology Recognition through Report-Guided Contrastive Training
title_zh: 通过报告引导的对比训练打破固定病理学识别
comment: Provisionally Accepted at MICCAI2022
comments: Provisionally Accepted at MICCAI2022
abstract: When reading images, radiologists generate text reports describing the findings therein. Current state-of-the-art computer-aided diagnosis tools utilize a fixed set of predefined categories automatically extracted from these medical reports for training. This form of supervision limits the potential usage of models as they are unable to pick up on anomalies outside of their predefined set, thus, making it a necessity to retrain the classifier with additional data when faced with novel classes. In contrast, we investigate direct text supervision to break away from this closed set assumption. By doing so, we avoid noisy label extraction via text classifiers and incorporate more contextual information. We employ a contrastive global-local dual-encoder architecture to learn concepts directly from unstructured medical reports while maintaining its ability to perform free form classification. We investigate relevant properties of open set recognition for radiological data and propose a method to employ currently weakly annotated data into training. We evaluate our approach on the large-scale chest X-Ray datasets MIMIC-CXR, CheXpert, and ChestX-Ray14 for disease classification. We show that despite using unstructured medical report supervision, we perform on par with direct label supervision through a sophisticated inference setting.
summary: When reading images, radiologists generate text reports describing the findings therein. Current state-of-the-art computer-aided diagnosis tools utilize a fixed set of predefined categories automatically extracted from these medical reports for training. This form of supervision limits the potential usage of models as they are unable to pick up on anomalies outside of their predefined set, thus, making it a necessity to retrain the classifier with additional data when faced with novel classes. In contrast, we investigate direct text supervision to break away from this closed set assumption. By doing so, we avoid noisy label extraction via text classifiers and incorporate more contextual information. We employ a contrastive global-local dual-encoder architecture to learn concepts directly from unstructured medical reports while maintaining its ability to perform free form classification. We investigate relevant properties of open set recognition for radiological data and propose a method to employ currently weakly annotated data into training. We evaluate our approach on the large-scale chest X-Ray datasets MIMIC-CXR, CheXpert, and ChestX-Ray14 for disease classification. We show that despite using unstructured medical report supervision, we perform on par with direct label supervision through a sophisticated inference setting.
abstract_zh: 在读取图像时，放射科医生会生成文本报告来描述其中的发现。当前最先进的计算机辅助诊断工具利用从这些医疗报告中自动提取的一组固定的预定义类别进行培训。这种形式的监督限制了模型的潜在用途，因为它们无法识别预定义集合之外的异常，因此，在面对新类时，有必要使用附加数据重新训练分类器。相反，我们研究直接文本监督以摆脱这种封闭集假设。通过这样做，我们可以避免通过文本分类器提取嘈杂的标签，并融入更多的上下文信息。我们采用对比的全局-局部双编码器架构来直接从非结构化医疗报告中学习概念，同时保持其执行自由形式分类的能力。我们研究了放射数据的开放集识别的相关属性，并提出了一种将当前弱注释数据用于训练的方法。我们在大规模胸部 X 射线数据集 MIMIC-CXR、CheXpert 和 ChestX-Ray14 上评估了我们用于疾病分类的方法。我们表明，尽管使用非结构化医疗报告监督，但我们通过复杂的推理设置，表现与直接标签监督相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于报告引导的对比训练方法，用于突破固定病理分类集的限制，实现更灵活的医学影像病理识别。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖预定义的固定病理分类集，难以检测新类别且标签提取存在噪声，需重新训练模型。
AI.method: 采用对比全局-局部双编码器架构，直接利用非结构化医学报告进行概念学习，并引入弱标注数据增强训练。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-CXR等大规模胸片数据集上，该方法在无结构化报告监督下表现与直接标签监督相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过直接利用医学报告文本信息，模型可突破封闭集假设，提升开放集病理识别能力。
