authors_text: Shuming Liu,Mengmeng Xu,Chen Zhao,Xu Zhao,Bernard Ghanem
title: ETAD: Training Action Detection End to End on a Laptop
title_zh: ETAD：在笔记本电脑上端到端训练动作检测
abstract: Temporal action detection (TAD) with end-to-end training often suffers from the pain of huge demand for computing resources due to long video duration. In this work, we propose an efficient temporal action detector (ETAD) that can train directly from video frames with extremely low GPU memory consumption. Our main idea is to minimize and balance the heavy computation among features and gradients in each training iteration. We propose to sequentially forward the snippet frame through the video encoder, and backward only a small necessary portion of gradients to update the encoder. To further alleviate the computational redundancy in training, we propose to dynamically sample only a small subset of proposals during training. Moreover, various sampling strategies and ratios are studied for both the encoder and detector. ETAD achieves state-of-the-art performance on TAD benchmarks with remarkable efficiency. On ActivityNet-1.3, training ETAD in 18 hours can reach 38.25% average mAP with only 1.3 GB memory consumption per video under end-to-end training. Our code will be publicly released.
summary: Temporal action detection (TAD) with end-to-end training often suffers from the pain of huge demand for computing resources due to long video duration. In this work, we propose an efficient temporal action detector (ETAD) that can train directly from video frames with extremely low GPU memory consumption. Our main idea is to minimize and balance the heavy computation among features and gradients in each training iteration. We propose to sequentially forward the snippet frame through the video encoder, and backward only a small necessary portion of gradients to update the encoder. To further alleviate the computational redundancy in training, we propose to dynamically sample only a small subset of proposals during training. Moreover, various sampling strategies and ratios are studied for both the encoder and detector. ETAD achieves state-of-the-art performance on TAD benchmarks with remarkable efficiency. On ActivityNet-1.3, training ETAD in 18 hours can reach 38.25% average mAP with only 1.3 GB memory consumption per video under end-to-end training. Our code will be publicly released.
abstract_zh: 具有端到端训练的时间动作检测（TAD）往往会因视频时长过长而遭受计算资源巨大需求的痛苦。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种高效的时间动作检测器（ETAD），它可以直接从视频帧进行训练，GPU 内存消耗极低。我们的主要思想是最小化和平衡每次训练迭代中特征和梯度之间的繁重计算。我们建议通过视频编码器顺序转发片段帧，并仅向后转发一小部分必要的梯度来更新编码器。为了进一步减轻训练中的计算冗余，我们建议在训练期间仅动态采样提案的一小部分。此外，还研究了编码器和检测器的各种采样策略和比率。 ETAD 在 TAD 基准上以卓越的效率实现了最先进的性能。在 ActivityNet-1.3 上，在端到端训练下，18 小时内训练 ETAD 可以达到 38.25% 的平均 mAP，每个视频仅消耗 1.3 GB 内存。我们的代码将公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ETAD的高效时序动作检测器，能够在端到端训练中显著降低GPU内存消耗，从而在普通笔记本电脑上实现长时间视频的动作检测训练。
AI.motivation: 现有的端到端时序动作检测（TAD）方法因处理长视频需大量计算资源，导致训练时GPU内存需求过高，难以在普通设备上运行。
AI.method: 通过分片前向传播视频帧并仅反向传播必要梯度来减少计算冗余，同时动态采样少量候选框进行训练，并研究编码器与检测器的多样化采样策略。
AI.result: 在ActivityNet-1.3数据集上，ETAD在端到端训练下以每视频仅1.3GB内存消耗、18小时训练时间达到38.25%的平均mAP，性能达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: ETAD通过优化计算流程与采样策略，在保持检测精度的同时大幅降低资源需求，使端到端TAD训练可在普通硬件上高效实现。

authors_text: Alice Tarzariol,Martin Gebser,Mark Law,Konstantin Schekotihin
title: Efficient lifting of symmetry breaking constraints for complex combinatorial problems
title_zh: 有效解除复杂组合问题的对称性破缺约束
comment: Paper presented at the 38th International Conference on Logic Programming (ICLP 2022), 16 pages
comments: Paper presented at the 38th International Conference on Logic Programming (ICLP 2022), 16 pages
abstract: Many industrial applications require finding solutions to challenging combinatorial problems. Efficient elimination of symmetric solution candidates is one of the key enablers for high-performance solving. However, existing model-based approaches for symmetry breaking are limited to problems for which a set of representative and easily-solvable instances is available, which is often not the case in practical applications. This work extends the learning framework and implementation of a model-based approach for Answer Set Programming to overcome these limitations and address challenging problems, such as the Partner Units Problem. In particular, we incorporate a new conflict analysis algorithm in the Inductive Logic Programming system ILASP, redefine the learning task, and suggest a new example generation method to scale up the approach. The experiments conducted for different kinds of Partner Units Problem instances demonstrate the applicability of our approach and the computational benefits due to the first-order constraints learned.
summary: Many industrial applications require finding solutions to challenging combinatorial problems. Efficient elimination of symmetric solution candidates is one of the key enablers for high-performance solving. However, existing model-based approaches for symmetry breaking are limited to problems for which a set of representative and easily-solvable instances is available, which is often not the case in practical applications. This work extends the learning framework and implementation of a model-based approach for Answer Set Programming to overcome these limitations and address challenging problems, such as the Partner Units Problem. In particular, we incorporate a new conflict analysis algorithm in the Inductive Logic Programming system ILASP, redefine the learning task, and suggest a new example generation method to scale up the approach. The experiments conducted for different kinds of Partner Units Problem instances demonstrate the applicability of our approach and the computational benefits due to the first-order constraints learned.
abstract_zh: 许多工业应用需要找到具有挑战性的组合问题的解决方案。有效消除对称解候选是高性能求解的关键推动因素之一。然而，现有的基于模型的对称性破缺方法仅限于解决可用一组代表性且易于解决的实例的问题，而在实际应用中通常并非如此。这项工作扩展了答案集编程的学习框架和基于模型的方法的实施，以克服这些限制并解决具有挑战性的问题，例如合作伙伴单元问题。特别是，我们在归纳逻辑编程系统 ILASP 中结合了一种新的冲突分析算法，重新定义了学习任务，并提出了一种新的示例生成方法来扩展该方法。针对不同类型的合作伙伴单元问题实例进行的实验证明了我们的方法的适用性以及由于学习的一阶约束而带来的计算优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种扩展模型方法，通过学习一阶约束提升复杂组合问题中对称性破除的效率，解决实际应用中缺乏代表性实例的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有基于模型的对称性破除方法依赖代表性实例集，但实际工业问题中此类实例常不可用，限制了方法的适用性。
AI.method: 在ILASP系统中引入新型冲突分析算法，重新定义学习任务，并设计新的示例生成方法，扩展答案集编程框架以处理复杂问题。
AI.result: 实验验证方法在多种合作伙伴单位问题实例上有效，通过学习到的约束显著提升了计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统模型依赖实例集的限制，在复杂组合问题求解中展现出实际应用价值。

authors_text: Sabeesh Ethiraj,Bharath Kumar Bolla
title: Classification of Astronomical Bodies by Efficient Layer Fine-Tuning of Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 通过深度神经网络的高效层微调对天体进行分类
comment: Accepted at 5th Conference on Information and Communication Technology (CICT), 2021
comments: Accepted at 5th Conference on Information and Communication Technology (CICT), 2021
abstract: The SDSS-IV dataset contains information about various astronomical bodies such as Galaxies, Stars, and Quasars captured by observatories. Inspired by our work on deep multimodal learning, which utilized transfer learning to classify the SDSS-IV dataset, we further extended our research in the fine tuning of these architectures to study the effect in the classification scenario. Architectures such as Resnet-50, DenseNet-121 VGG-16, Xception, EfficientNetB2, MobileNetV2 and NasnetMobile have been built using layer wise fine tuning at different levels. Our findings suggest that freezing all layers with Imagenet weights and adding a final trainable layer may not be the optimal solution. Further, baseline models and models that have higher number of trainable layers performed similarly in certain architectures. Model need to be fine tuned at different levels and a specific training ratio is required for a model to be termed ideal. Different architectures had different responses to the change in the number of trainable layers w.r.t accuracies. While models such as DenseNet-121, Xception, EfficientNetB2 achieved peak accuracies that were relatively consistent with near perfect training curves, models such as Resnet-50,VGG-16, MobileNetV2 and NasnetMobile had lower, delayed peak accuracies with poorly fitting training curves. It was also found that though mobile neural networks have lesser parameters and model size, they may not always be ideal for deployment on a low computational device as they had consistently lower validation accuracies. Customized evaluation metrics such as Tuning Parameter Ratio and Tuning Layer Ratio are used for model evaluation.
summary: The SDSS-IV dataset contains information about various astronomical bodies such as Galaxies, Stars, and Quasars captured by observatories. Inspired by our work on deep multimodal learning, which utilized transfer learning to classify the SDSS-IV dataset, we further extended our research in the fine tuning of these architectures to study the effect in the classification scenario. Architectures such as Resnet-50, DenseNet-121 VGG-16, Xception, EfficientNetB2, MobileNetV2 and NasnetMobile have been built using layer wise fine tuning at different levels. Our findings suggest that freezing all layers with Imagenet weights and adding a final trainable layer may not be the optimal solution. Further, baseline models and models that have higher number of trainable layers performed similarly in certain architectures. Model need to be fine tuned at different levels and a specific training ratio is required for a model to be termed ideal. Different architectures had different responses to the change in the number of trainable layers w.r.t accuracies. While models such as DenseNet-121, Xception, EfficientNetB2 achieved peak accuracies that were relatively consistent with near perfect training curves, models such as Resnet-50,VGG-16, MobileNetV2 and NasnetMobile had lower, delayed peak accuracies with poorly fitting training curves. It was also found that though mobile neural networks have lesser parameters and model size, they may not always be ideal for deployment on a low computational device as they had consistently lower validation accuracies. Customized evaluation metrics such as Tuning Parameter Ratio and Tuning Layer Ratio are used for model evaluation.
abstract_zh: SDSS-IV 数据集包含天文台捕获的各种天体的信息，例如星系、恒星和类星体。受到我们在深度多模态学习方面的工作（利用迁移学习对 SDSS-IV 数据集进行分类）的启发，我们进一步扩展了对这些架构的微调的研究，以研究分类场景中的效果。 Resnet-50、DenseNet-121 VGG-16、Xception、EfficientNetB2、MobileNetV2 和 NasnetMobile 等架构是使用不同级别的逐层微调构建的。我们的研究结果表明，用 Imagenet 权重冻结所有层并添加最终可训练层可能不是最佳解决方案。此外，基线模型和具有更多可训练层数的模型在某些架构中表现相似。模型需要在不同级别进行微调，并且需要特定的训练比例才能使模型称为理想模型。不同的架构对可训练层数与精度的变化有不同的响应。虽然 DenseNet-121、Xception、EfficientNetB2 等模型实现了与近乎完美的训练曲线相对一致的峰值精度，但 Resnet-50、VGG-16、MobileNetV2 和 NasnetMobile 等模型的峰值精度较低、延迟，且训练曲线拟合不佳。研究还发现，尽管移动神经网络的参数和模型大小较小，但它们可能并不总是适合部署在低计算设备上，因为它们的验证精度始终较低。模型评估采用定制参数比、调优层比等评估指标。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究通过深度神经网络的逐层微调方法对天体进行分类，基于SDSS-IV数据集评估不同架构的微调效果。
AI.motivation: 在先前利用迁移学习对SDSS-IV数据集分类的研究基础上，进一步探索微调策略对分类性能的影响，以优化模型效果。
AI.method: 采用ResNet-50、DenseNet-121等架构，通过逐层微调不同层级的参数，并引入调参比例和调层比例等定制化评估指标进行模型评价。
AI.result: DenseNet-121、Xception等模型在微调后达到较高且稳定的准确率，而ResNet-50、VGG-16等模型表现较差；轻量级网络虽参数少但验证准确率较低，表明模型需针对性微调。
AI.conclusion: 不同架构对微调策略的响应差异显著，需根据具体模型设计训练比例和微调层级，轻量级网络未必适合低算力设备部署。

authors_text: Natalia Tomashenko,Brij Mohan Lal Srivastava,Xin Wang,Emmanuel Vincent,Andreas Nautsch,Junichi Yamagishi,Nicholas Evans,Jose Patino,Jean-François Bonastre,Paul-Gauthier Noé,Massimiliano Todisco
title: The VoicePrivacy 2020 Challenge Evaluation Plan
title_zh: VoicePrivacy 2020 挑战评估计划
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.12468
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.12468
abstract: The VoicePrivacy Challenge aims to promote the development of privacy preservation tools for speech technology by gathering a new community to define the tasks of interest and the evaluation methodology, and benchmarking solutions through a series of challenges. In this document, we formulate the voice anonymization task selected for the VoicePrivacy 2020 Challenge and describe the datasets used for system development and evaluation. We also present the attack models and the associated objective and subjective evaluation metrics. We introduce two anonymization baselines and report objective evaluation results.
summary: The VoicePrivacy Challenge aims to promote the development of privacy preservation tools for speech technology by gathering a new community to define the tasks of interest and the evaluation methodology, and benchmarking solutions through a series of challenges. In this document, we formulate the voice anonymization task selected for the VoicePrivacy 2020 Challenge and describe the datasets used for system development and evaluation. We also present the attack models and the associated objective and subjective evaluation metrics. We introduce two anonymization baselines and report objective evaluation results.
abstract_zh: VoicePrivacy Challenge旨在通过聚集一个新的社区来定义感兴趣的任务和评估方法，并通过一系列挑战对解决方案进行基准测试，从而促进语音技术隐私保护工具的发展。在本文档中，我们制定了为 VoicePrivacy 2020 挑战赛选择的语音匿名化任务，并描述了用于系统开发和评估的数据集。我们还介绍了攻击模型以及相关的客观和主观评估指标。我们引入两个匿名化基线并报告客观评估结果。

AI.tldr: 本文制定了VoicePrivacy 2020挑战赛的语音匿名化任务，描述了数据集、攻击模型及评估指标，并引入两个匿名化基线方法。
AI.motivation: 推动语音技术隐私保护工具的发展，通过标准化评估框架促进社区协作与技术基准测试。
AI.method: 采用语音匿名化任务，使用特定数据集进行系统开发，设计攻击模型并结合客观与主观评估指标，引入两个基线方法进行对比。
AI.result: 报告了两个匿名化基线的客观评估结果，验证了评估框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过挑战赛形式确立了语音隐私保护的评估标准，为后续研究提供了基准与方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文制定了VoicePrivacy 2020挑战赛的语音匿名化任务，描述了数据集、攻击模型及评估指标，并引入两个匿名化基线方法。

search_text: The VoicePrivacy 2020 Challenge Evaluation Plan VoicePrivacy 2020 挑战评估计划 The VoicePrivacy Challenge aims to promote the development of privacy preservation tools for speech technology by gathering a new community to define the tasks of interest and the evaluation methodology, and benchmarking solutions through a series of challenges. In this document, we formulate the voice anonymization task selected for the VoicePrivacy 2020 Challenge and describe the datasets used for system development and evaluation. We also present the attack models and the associated objective and subjective evaluation metrics. We introduce two anonymization baselines and report objective evaluation results. VoicePrivacy Challenge旨在通过聚集一个新的社区来定义感兴趣的任务和评估方法，并通过一系列挑战对解决方案进行基准测试，从而促进语音技术隐私保护工具的发展。在本文档中，我们制定了为 VoicePrivacy 2020 挑战赛选择的语音匿名化任务，并描述了用于系统开发和评估的数据集。我们还介绍了攻击模型以及相关的客观和主观评估指标。我们引入两个匿名化基线并报告客观评估结果。 本文制定了VoicePrivacy 2020挑战赛的语音匿名化任务，描述了数据集、攻击模型及评估指标，并引入两个匿名化基线方法。 Natalia Tomashenko,Brij Mohan Lal Srivastava,Xin Wang,Emmanuel Vincent,Andreas Nautsch,Junichi Yamagishi,Nicholas Evans,Jose Patino,Jean-François Bonastre,Paul-Gauthier Noé,Massimiliano Todisco cs.CL,cs.CR,eess.AS

authors_text: Prathima Dileep,Bharath Kumar Bolla,Sabeesh Ethiraj
title: Revisiting Facial Key Point Detection: An Efficient Approach Using Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 重新审视面部关键点检测：一种使用深度神经网络的有效方法
comment: Accepted at international Conference On Big Data, Machine Learning and Applications (BigDML 2021)
comments: Accepted at international Conference On Big Data, Machine Learning and Applications (BigDML 2021)
abstract: Facial landmark detection is a widely researched field of deep learning as this has a wide range of applications in many fields. These key points are distinguishing characteristic points on the face, such as the eyes center, the eye's inner and outer corners, the mouth center, and the nose tip from which human emotions and intent can be explained. The focus of our work has been evaluating transfer learning models such as MobileNetV2 and NasNetMobile, including custom CNN architectures. The objective of the research has been to develop efficient deep learning models in terms of model size, parameters, and inference time and to study the effect of augmentation imputation and fine-tuning on these models. It was found that while augmentation techniques produced lower RMSE scores than imputation techniques, they did not affect the inference time. MobileNetV2 architecture produced the lowest RMSE and inference time. Moreover, our results indicate that manually optimized CNN architectures performed similarly to Auto Keras tuned architecture. However, manually optimized architectures yielded better inference time and training curves.
summary: Facial landmark detection is a widely researched field of deep learning as this has a wide range of applications in many fields. These key points are distinguishing characteristic points on the face, such as the eyes center, the eye's inner and outer corners, the mouth center, and the nose tip from which human emotions and intent can be explained. The focus of our work has been evaluating transfer learning models such as MobileNetV2 and NasNetMobile, including custom CNN architectures. The objective of the research has been to develop efficient deep learning models in terms of model size, parameters, and inference time and to study the effect of augmentation imputation and fine-tuning on these models. It was found that while augmentation techniques produced lower RMSE scores than imputation techniques, they did not affect the inference time. MobileNetV2 architecture produced the lowest RMSE and inference time. Moreover, our results indicate that manually optimized CNN architectures performed similarly to Auto Keras tuned architecture. However, manually optimized architectures yielded better inference time and training curves.
abstract_zh: 面部标志检测是深度学习的一个广泛研究的领域，因为它在许多领域都有广泛的应用。这些关键点是面部的特征点，如眼睛中心、眼睛的内外角、嘴中心、鼻尖等，可以解释人的情绪和意图。我们工作的重点是评估 MobileNetV2 和 NasNetMobile 等迁移学习模型，包括自定义 CNN 架构。该研究的目的是在模型大小、参数和推理时间方面开发高效的深度学习模型，并研究增强插补和微调对这些模型的影响。研究发现，虽然增强技术产生的 RMSE 分数低于插补技术，但它们并不影响推理时间。 MobileNetV2 架构产生最低的 RMSE 和推理时间。此外，我们的结果表明，手动优化的 CNN 架构的性能与 Auto Keras 调整的架构类似。然而，手动优化的架构产生了更好的推理时间和训练曲线。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在研究高效的面部关键点检测方法，通过比较不同深度学习模型和数据增强技术的效果，以优化模型效率和检测精度。
AI.motivation: 面部关键点检测在多个领域有广泛应用，但现有模型在效率和精度上仍有改进空间，需探索更高效的模型架构和训练策略。
AI.method: 评估迁移学习模型（如MobileNetV2、NasNetMobile）和自定义CNN架构，对比数据增强与插补技术，并分析微调对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 数据增强技术降低RMSE但不增加推理时间，MobileNetV2在RMSE和推理时间上表现最优，手动优化CNN在推理效率和训练稳定性上优于Auto Keras架构。
AI.conclusion: MobileNetV2是面部关键点检测的高效模型选择，手动优化CNN在特定指标上优于自动调参方法，数据增强有效且不影响推理速度。

authors_text: Bharath Kumar Bolla,Mohan Kingam,Sabeesh Ethiraj
title: Efficient Deep Learning Methods for Identification of Defective Casting Products
title_zh: 用于识别缺陷铸造产品的高效深度学习方法
comment: Accepted at ICCR 2021: International Conference on Cognition and Recognition 2021
comments: Accepted at ICCR 2021: International Conference on Cognition and Recognition 2021
abstract: Quality inspection has become crucial in any large-scale manufacturing industry recently. In order to reduce human error, it has become imperative to use efficient and low computational AI algorithms to identify such defective products. In this paper, we have compared and contrasted various pre-trained and custom-built architectures using model size, performance and CPU latency in the detection of defective casting products. Our results show that custom architectures are efficient than pre-trained mobile architectures. Moreover, custom models perform 6 to 9 times faster than lightweight models such as MobileNetV2 and NasNet. The number of training parameters and the model size of the custom architectures is significantly lower (~386 times & ~119 times respectively) than the best performing models such as MobileNetV2 and NasNet. Augmentation experimentations have also been carried out on the custom architectures to make the models more robust and generalizable. Our work sheds light on the efficiency of these custom-built architectures for deployment on Edge and IoT devices and that transfer learning models may not always be ideal. Instead, they should be specific to the kind of dataset and the classification problem at hand.
summary: Quality inspection has become crucial in any large-scale manufacturing industry recently. In order to reduce human error, it has become imperative to use efficient and low computational AI algorithms to identify such defective products. In this paper, we have compared and contrasted various pre-trained and custom-built architectures using model size, performance and CPU latency in the detection of defective casting products. Our results show that custom architectures are efficient than pre-trained mobile architectures. Moreover, custom models perform 6 to 9 times faster than lightweight models such as MobileNetV2 and NasNet. The number of training parameters and the model size of the custom architectures is significantly lower (~386 times & ~119 times respectively) than the best performing models such as MobileNetV2 and NasNet. Augmentation experimentations have also been carried out on the custom architectures to make the models more robust and generalizable. Our work sheds light on the efficiency of these custom-built architectures for deployment on Edge and IoT devices and that transfer learning models may not always be ideal. Instead, they should be specific to the kind of dataset and the classification problem at hand.
abstract_zh: 近年来，质量检验在任何大型制造业中都变得至关重要。为了减少人为错误，使用高效且低计算量的人工智能算法来识别此类缺陷产品已势在必行。在本文中，我们使用模型大小、性能和 CPU 延迟来检测有缺陷的铸造产品，对各种预训练和定制的架构进行了比较和对比。我们的结果表明，定制架构比预先训练的移动架构更高效。此外，定制模型的执行速度比 MobileNetV2 和 NasNet 等轻量级模型快 6 到 9 倍。定制架构的训练参数数量和模型大小明显低于 MobileNetV2 和 NasNet 等性能最佳模型（分别约为 386 倍和约 119 倍）。还在定制架构上进行了增强实验，以使模型更加稳健和通用。我们的工作揭示了这些定制架构在边缘和物联网设备上部署的效率，并且迁移学习模型可能并不总是理想的。相反，它们应该特定于数据集的类型和手头的分类问题。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发高效的深度学习方法以识别铸造缺陷产品。
AI.motivation: 为减少人工检测错误，制造业亟需计算效率高且低资源消耗的AI算法进行缺陷识别。
AI.method: 比较预训练模型与自定义架构在模型规模、性能及CPU延迟的表现，并通过数据增强提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 自定义模型较MobileNetV2等轻量模型快6-9倍，参数量少386倍，模型尺寸小119倍。
AI.conclusion: 自定义架构更适合边缘设备部署，迁移学习模型未必优于针对性设计的专用模型。

authors_text: Frank Sicong Chen,Amith K. Belman,Vir V. Phoha
title: Formalizing PQRST Complex in Accelerometer-based Gait Cycle for Authentication
title_zh: 在基于加速度计的步态周期中形式化 PQRST 复合体以进行身份​​验证
abstract: Accelerometer signals generated through gait present a new frontier of human interface with mobile devices. Gait cycle detection based on these signals has applications in various areas, including authentication, health monitoring, and activity detection. Template-based studies focus on how the entire gait cycle represents walking patterns, but these are compute-intensive. Aggregate feature-based studies extract features in the time domain and frequency domain from the entire gait cycle to reduce the number of features. However, these methods may miss critical structural information needed to appropriately represent the intricacies of walking patterns. To the best of our knowledge, no study has formally proposed a structure to capture variations within gait cycles or phases from accelerometer readings. We propose a new structure named the PQRST Complex, which corresponds to the swing phase in a gait cycle and matches the foot movements during this phase, thus capturing the changes in foot position. In our experiments, based on the nine features derived from this structure, the accelerometer-based gait authentication system outperforms many state-of-the-art gait cycle-based authentication systems. Our work opens up a new paradigm of capturing the structure of gait and opens multiple areas of research and practice using gait analogous to the "QRS complex" structure of ECG signals related to the heart.
summary: Accelerometer signals generated through gait present a new frontier of human interface with mobile devices. Gait cycle detection based on these signals has applications in various areas, including authentication, health monitoring, and activity detection. Template-based studies focus on how the entire gait cycle represents walking patterns, but these are compute-intensive. Aggregate feature-based studies extract features in the time domain and frequency domain from the entire gait cycle to reduce the number of features. However, these methods may miss critical structural information needed to appropriately represent the intricacies of walking patterns. To the best of our knowledge, no study has formally proposed a structure to capture variations within gait cycles or phases from accelerometer readings. We propose a new structure named the PQRST Complex, which corresponds to the swing phase in a gait cycle and matches the foot movements during this phase, thus capturing the changes in foot position. In our experiments, based on the nine features derived from this structure, the accelerometer-based gait authentication system outperforms many state-of-the-art gait cycle-based authentication systems. Our work opens up a new paradigm of capturing the structure of gait and opens multiple areas of research and practice using gait analogous to the "QRS complex" structure of ECG signals related to the heart.
abstract_zh: 通过步态生成的加速度计信号代表了移动设备人机界面的新领域。基于这些信号的步态周期检测在各个领域都有应用，包括身份验证、健康监测和活动检测。基于模板的研究重点关注整个步态周期如何表示步行模式，但这些都是计算密集型的。基于聚合特征的研究从整个步态周期中提取时域和频域特征，以减少特征数量。然而，这些方法可能会错过适当表示复杂的行走模式所需的关键结构信息。据我们所知，还没有研究正式提出一种结构来从加速度计读数中捕获步态周期或阶段内的变化。我们提出了一种名为 PQRST Complex 的新结构，它对应于步态周期中的摆动阶段，并匹配该阶段的足部运动，从而捕获足部位置的变化。在我们的实验中，基于从该结构衍生的九个特征，基于加速度计的步态认证系统优于许多最先进的基于步态周期的认证系统。我们的工作开辟了捕获步态结构的新范式，并使用类似于与心脏相关的心电图信号的“QRS 复合体”结构的步态开辟了多个研究和实践领域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于加速度计的步态周期认证方法，通过引入PQRST复杂结构来捕捉步态周期中摆动阶段的足部运动变化。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于步态周期的认证方法计算量大，或无法捕捉步态模式的关键结构信息，缺乏一种结构来捕捉步态周期或阶段的变化。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的结构——PQRST复杂，对应步态周期中的摆动阶段，通过提取该结构的九个特征进行步态认证。
AI.result: 基于PQRST复杂结构的加速度计步态认证系统在实验中优于许多最先进的步态周期认证系统。
AI.conclusion: 本文的工作为捕捉步态结构提供了新范式，类似于心电图中的QRS复杂结构，开启了步态相关研究和应用的新领域。

authors_text: Edwin Bedolla,Luis Carlos Padierna,Ramón Castañeda-Priego
title: Evolutionary optimization of the Verlet closure relation for the hard-sphere and square-well fluids
title_zh: 硬球和方井流体 Verlet 闭合关系的演化优化
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures
comments: 12 pages, 6 figures
abstract: The Ornstein-Zernike equation is solved for the hard-sphere and square-well fluids using a diverse selection of closure relations; the attraction range of the square-well is chosen to be $λ=1.5.$ In particular, for both fluids we mainly focus on the solution based on a three-parameter version of the Verlet closure relation [Mol. Phys. 42, 1291-1302 (1981)]. To find the free parameters of the latter, an unconstrained optimization problem is defined as a condition of thermodynamic consistency based on the compressibility and solved using Evolutionary Algorithms. For the hard-sphere fluid, the results show good agreement when compared with mean-field equations of state and accurate computer simulation results; at high densities, i.e., close to the freezing transition, expected (small) deviations are seen. In the case of the square-well fluid, a good agreement is observed at low and high densities when compared with event-driven molecular dynamics computer simulations. For intermediate densities, the explored closure relations vary in terms of accuracy. Our findings suggest that a modification of the optimization problem to include, for example, additional thermodynamic consistency criteria could improve the results for the type of fluids here explored.
summary: The Ornstein-Zernike equation is solved for the hard-sphere and square-well fluids using a diverse selection of closure relations; the attraction range of the square-well is chosen to be $λ=1.5.$ In particular, for both fluids we mainly focus on the solution based on a three-parameter version of the Verlet closure relation [Mol. Phys. 42, 1291-1302 (1981)]. To find the free parameters of the latter, an unconstrained optimization problem is defined as a condition of thermodynamic consistency based on the compressibility and solved using Evolutionary Algorithms. For the hard-sphere fluid, the results show good agreement when compared with mean-field equations of state and accurate computer simulation results; at high densities, i.e., close to the freezing transition, expected (small) deviations are seen. In the case of the square-well fluid, a good agreement is observed at low and high densities when compared with event-driven molecular dynamics computer simulations. For intermediate densities, the explored closure relations vary in terms of accuracy. Our findings suggest that a modification of the optimization problem to include, for example, additional thermodynamic consistency criteria could improve the results for the type of fluids here explored.
abstract_zh: 使用多种闭合关系选择来求解硬球和方井流体的 Ornstein-Zernike 方程；方井的吸引范围选择为 $λ=1.5。$ 特别是，对于这两种流体，我们主要关注基于 Verlet 闭合关系的三参数版本的解决方案 [Mol.物理。 42, 1291-1302 (1981)]。为了找到后者的自由参数，无约束优化问题被定义为基于可压缩性的热力学一致性条件，并使用进化算法求解。对于硬球流体，与平均场状态方程和精确的计算机模拟结果相比，结果表现出良好的一致性；在高密度下，即接近冻结转变，可以看到预期的（小）偏差。在方井流体的情况下，与事件驱动的分子动力学计算机模拟相比，在低密度和高密度下观察到良好的一致性。对于中间密度，所探索的闭合关系在准确性方面有所不同。我们的研究结果表明，对优化问题进行修改，包括附加的热力学一致性标准，可以改善此处探索的流体类型的结果。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过进化算法优化Verlet闭合关系参数，以提高硬球和方阱流体的理论预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有闭合关系在特定密度下存在偏差，需优化参数以提升理论模型与模拟结果的一致性。
AI.method: 基于Ornstein-Zernike方程和三参数Verlet闭合关系，结合进化算法进行无约束优化，利用压缩性等热力学条件确定参数。
AI.result: 硬球流体在高温下与模拟结果吻合，但接近冻结时有偏差；方阱流体在高低密度表现良好，中间密度存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 需扩展优化问题的热力学一致性条件，以进一步提升模型对两类流体的预测精度。

authors_text: Gerard Sant,Gerard I. Gállego,Belen Alastruey,Marta R. Costa-Jussà
title: Multiformer: A Head-Configurable Transformer-Based Model for Direct Speech Translation
title_zh: Multiformer：基于头部可配置变压器的直接语音翻译模型
comment: NAACL-SRW 2022
comments: NAACL-SRW 2022
abstract: Transformer-based models have been achieving state-of-the-art results in several fields of Natural Language Processing. However, its direct application to speech tasks is not trivial. The nature of this sequences carries problems such as long sequence lengths and redundancy between adjacent tokens. Therefore, we believe that regular self-attention mechanism might not be well suited for it. Different approaches have been proposed to overcome these problems, such as the use of efficient attention mechanisms. However, the use of these methods usually comes with a cost, which is a performance reduction caused by information loss. In this study, we present the Multiformer, a Transformer-based model which allows the use of different attention mechanisms on each head. By doing this, the model is able to bias the self-attention towards the extraction of more diverse token interactions, and the information loss is reduced. Finally, we perform an analysis of the head contributions, and we observe that those architectures where all heads relevance is uniformly distributed obtain better results. Our results show that mixing attention patterns along the different heads and layers outperforms our baseline by up to 0.7 BLEU.
summary: Transformer-based models have been achieving state-of-the-art results in several fields of Natural Language Processing. However, its direct application to speech tasks is not trivial. The nature of this sequences carries problems such as long sequence lengths and redundancy between adjacent tokens. Therefore, we believe that regular self-attention mechanism might not be well suited for it. Different approaches have been proposed to overcome these problems, such as the use of efficient attention mechanisms. However, the use of these methods usually comes with a cost, which is a performance reduction caused by information loss. In this study, we present the Multiformer, a Transformer-based model which allows the use of different attention mechanisms on each head. By doing this, the model is able to bias the self-attention towards the extraction of more diverse token interactions, and the information loss is reduced. Finally, we perform an analysis of the head contributions, and we observe that those architectures where all heads relevance is uniformly distributed obtain better results. Our results show that mixing attention patterns along the different heads and layers outperforms our baseline by up to 0.7 BLEU.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的模型已经在自然语言处理的多个领域取得了最先进的成果。然而，它在语音任务中的直接应用并不是微不足道的。该序列的性质带来了诸如序列长度长和相邻标记之间的冗余等问题。因此，我们认为常规的自注意力机制可能不太适合它。人们提出了不同的方法来克服这些问题，例如使用有效的注意力机制。然而，使用这些方法通常会带来成本，即由于信息丢失而导致性能下降。在这项研究中，我们提出了 Multiformer，这是一种基于 Transformer 的模型，允许在每个头上使用不同的注意力机制。通过这样做，模型能够将自注意力偏向于提取更多样化的令牌交互，并减少信息损失。最后，我们对头部贡献进行分析，我们观察到所有头部相关性均匀分布的架构获得了更好的结果。我们的结果表明，沿着不同头部和层的混合注意力模式比我们的基线高出高达 0.7 BLEU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可配置注意力机制的Transformer模型Multiformer，用于直接语音翻译任务。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer在语音任务中面临序列冗余和长序列处理难题，现有高效注意力机制常伴随信息损失，需探索更优解决方案。
AI.method: 设计允许不同注意力机制并行运作的多头架构，通过混合不同注意力模式降低信息损失，优化多头相关性分布。
AI.result: 实验显示混合注意力模式的模型较基线提升0.7 BLEU，均匀分布的多头相关性架构表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: Multiformer通过灵活配置注意力机制有效缓解语音序列处理难题，在直接语音翻译任务中取得性能突破。

search_text: Multiformer: A Head-Configurable Transformer-Based Model for Direct Speech Translation Multiformer：基于头部可配置变压器的直接语音翻译模型 Transformer-based models have been achieving state-of-the-art results in several fields of Natural Language Processing. However, its direct application to speech tasks is not trivial. The nature of this sequences carries problems such as long sequence lengths and redundancy between adjacent tokens. Therefore, we believe that regular self-attention mechanism might not be well suited for it. Different approaches have been proposed to overcome these problems, such as the use of efficient attention mechanisms. However, the use of these methods usually comes with a cost, which is a performance reduction caused by information loss. In this study, we present the Multiformer, a Transformer-based model which allows the use of different attention mechanisms on each head. By doing this, the model is able to bias the self-attention towards the extraction of more diverse token interactions, and the information loss is reduced. Finally, we perform an analysis of the head contributions, and we observe that those architectures where all heads relevance is uniformly distributed obtain better results. Our results show that mixing attention patterns along the different heads and layers outperforms our baseline by up to 0.7 BLEU. 基于 Transformer 的模型已经在自然语言处理的多个领域取得了最先进的成果。然而，它在语音任务中的直接应用并不是微不足道的。该序列的性质带来了诸如序列长度长和相邻标记之间的冗余等问题。因此，我们认为常规的自注意力机制可能不太适合它。人们提出了不同的方法来克服这些问题，例如使用有效的注意力机制。然而，使用这些方法通常会带来成本，即由于信息丢失而导致性能下降。在这项研究中，我们提出了 Multiformer，这是一种基于 Transformer 的模型，允许在每个头上使用不同的注意力机制。通过这样做，模型能够将自注意力偏向于提取更多样化的令牌交互，并减少信息损失。最后，我们对头部贡献进行分析，我们观察到所有头部相关性均匀分布的架构获得了更好的结果。我们的结果表明，沿着不同头部和层的混合注意力模式比我们的基线高出高达 0.7 BLEU。 本文提出一种可配置注意力机制的Transformer模型Multiformer，用于直接语音翻译任务。 Gerard Sant,Gerard I. Gállego,Belen Alastruey,Marta R. Costa-Jussà cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.MM,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Shilei Fu,Feng Xu
title: Differentiable SAR Renderer and SAR Target Reconstruction
title_zh: 可微分 SAR 渲染器和 SAR 目标重建
abstract: Forward modeling of wave scattering and radar imaging mechanisms is the key to information extraction from synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images. Like inverse graphics in optical domain, an inherently-integrated forward-inverse approach would be promising for SAR advanced information retrieval and target reconstruction. This paper presents such an attempt to the inverse graphics for SAR imagery. A differentiable SAR renderer (DSR) is developed which reformulates the mapping and projection algorithm of SAR imaging mechanism in the differentiable form of probability maps. First-order gradients of the proposed DSR are then analytically derived which can be back-propagated from rendered image/silhouette to the target geometry and scattering attributes. A 3D inverse target reconstruction algorithm from SAR images is devised. Several simulation and reconstruction experiments are conducted, including targets with and without background, using both synthesized data or real measured inverse SAR (ISAR) data by ground radar. Results demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed DSR and its inverse approach.
summary: Forward modeling of wave scattering and radar imaging mechanisms is the key to information extraction from synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images. Like inverse graphics in optical domain, an inherently-integrated forward-inverse approach would be promising for SAR advanced information retrieval and target reconstruction. This paper presents such an attempt to the inverse graphics for SAR imagery. A differentiable SAR renderer (DSR) is developed which reformulates the mapping and projection algorithm of SAR imaging mechanism in the differentiable form of probability maps. First-order gradients of the proposed DSR are then analytically derived which can be back-propagated from rendered image/silhouette to the target geometry and scattering attributes. A 3D inverse target reconstruction algorithm from SAR images is devised. Several simulation and reconstruction experiments are conducted, including targets with and without background, using both synthesized data or real measured inverse SAR (ISAR) data by ground radar. Results demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed DSR and its inverse approach.
abstract_zh: 波散射和雷达成像机制的正演建模是从合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像中提取信息的关键。与光域中的逆向图形一样，固有集成的正向逆向方法将有望用于 SAR 高级信息检索和目标重建。本文对SAR图像的反演图进行了这样的尝试。开发了一种可微分SAR渲染器（DSR），它以概率图的可微形式重新表述了SAR成像机制的映射和投影算法。然后通过分析导出所提出的 DSR 的一阶梯度，该梯度可以从渲染图像/轮廓反向传播到目标几何形状和散射属性。设计了一种SAR图像的3D逆向目标重建算法。使用合成数据或地面雷达实测逆合成孔径雷达 (ISAR) 数据进行了多项模拟和重建实验，包括有背景和无背景的目标。结果证明了所提出的 DSR 及其逆方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可微SAR渲染器（DSR）及逆向目标重建方法，通过概率图的微分形式实现SAR图像的正向建模与逆向重建。
AI.motivation: 传统SAR图像信息提取与目标重建方法存在效率与精度不足，需借鉴光学领域逆图形学思想，开发集成正向-反向的统一框架。
AI.method: 构建基于概率图的可微SAR渲染器，推导一阶梯度实现图像到目标几何与散射特性的反向传播，并设计3D逆向重建算法，结合合成与实测ISAR数据验证。
AI.result: 实验表明DSR在有无背景场景下均能有效重建目标几何结构，验证了方法在SAR图像逆问题求解中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: DSR方法为SAR先进信息提取与目标重建提供了新范式，其可微特性为后续优化与应用拓展奠定基础。

authors_text: Sandipan Das,Navid Mahabadi,Addi Djikic,Cesar Nassir,Saikat Chatterjee,Maurice Fallon
title: Extrinsic Calibration and Verification of Multiple Non-overlapping Field of View Lidar Sensors
title_zh: 多个非重叠视场激光雷达传感器的外在校准和验证
comment: ef:ICRA, Philadelphia, PA, USA, 2022, pp. 919-925
comments: ef:ICRA, Philadelphia, PA, USA, 2022, pp. 919-925
abstract: We demonstrate a multi-lidar calibration framework for large mobile platforms that jointly calibrate the extrinsic parameters of non-overlapping Field-of-View (FoV) lidar sensors, without the need for any external calibration aid. The method starts by estimating the pose of each lidar in its corresponding sensor frame in between subsequent timestamps. Since the pose estimates from the lidars are not necessarily synchronous, we first align the poses using a Dual Quaternion (DQ) based Screw Linear Interpolation. Afterward, a Hand-Eye based calibration problem is solved using the DQ-based formulation to recover the extrinsics. Furthermore, we verify the extrinsics by matching chosen lidar semantic features, obtained by projecting the lidar data into the camera perspective after time alignment using vehicle kinematics. Experimental results on the data collected from a Scania vehicle [$\sim$ 1 Km sequence] demonstrate the ability of our approach to obtain better calibration parameters than the provided vehicle CAD model calibration parameters. This setup can also be scaled to any combination of multiple lidars.
summary: We demonstrate a multi-lidar calibration framework for large mobile platforms that jointly calibrate the extrinsic parameters of non-overlapping Field-of-View (FoV) lidar sensors, without the need for any external calibration aid. The method starts by estimating the pose of each lidar in its corresponding sensor frame in between subsequent timestamps. Since the pose estimates from the lidars are not necessarily synchronous, we first align the poses using a Dual Quaternion (DQ) based Screw Linear Interpolation. Afterward, a Hand-Eye based calibration problem is solved using the DQ-based formulation to recover the extrinsics. Furthermore, we verify the extrinsics by matching chosen lidar semantic features, obtained by projecting the lidar data into the camera perspective after time alignment using vehicle kinematics. Experimental results on the data collected from a Scania vehicle [$\sim$ 1 Km sequence] demonstrate the ability of our approach to obtain better calibration parameters than the provided vehicle CAD model calibration parameters. This setup can also be scaled to any combination of multiple lidars.
abstract_zh: 我们演示了一种适用于大型移动平台的多激光雷达校准框架，该框架可以联合校准非重叠视场（FoV）激光雷达传感器的外部参数，而无需任何外部校准辅助。该方法首先估计每个激光雷达在后续时间戳之间的相应传感器帧中的位姿。由于激光雷达的姿态估计不一定是同步的，因此我们首先使用基于双四元数 (DQ) 的螺旋线性插值来对齐姿态。随后，使用基于 DQ 的公式来解决基于手眼的校准问题，以恢复外在因素。此外，我们通过匹配选定的激光雷达语义特征来验证外在因素，这些语义特征是通过使用车辆运动学进行时间对准后将激光雷达数据投影到相机视角中获得的。从 Scania 车辆 [$\sim$ 1 Km 序列] 收集的数据的实验结果表明，我们的方法能够获得比提供的车辆 CAD 模型校准参数更好的校准参数。该设置还可以扩展到多个激光雷达的任意组合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需外部校准工具即可对多个非重叠视场激光雷达传感器进行外参校准和验证的框架。
AI.motivation: 在大型移动平台上使用多个非重叠视场的激光雷达传感器时，传统校准方法依赖外部工具，难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 该方法首先估计每个激光雷达在对应传感器坐标系中的姿态，使用双四元数（DQ）基螺旋线性插值对齐不同时间戳的姿态，然后通过基于DQ的公式解决手眼校准问题以恢复外参，并通过匹配激光雷达语义特征进行验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在Scania车辆采集的数据上获得的校准参数优于车辆CAD模型提供的参数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够扩展到任意多个激光雷达的组合，具有良好的实用性和可扩展性。

search_text: Extrinsic Calibration and Verification of Multiple Non-overlapping Field of View Lidar Sensors 多个非重叠视场激光雷达传感器的外在校准和验证 We demonstrate a multi-lidar calibration framework for large mobile platforms that jointly calibrate the extrinsic parameters of non-overlapping Field-of-View (FoV) lidar sensors, without the need for any external calibration aid. The method starts by estimating the pose of each lidar in its corresponding sensor frame in between subsequent timestamps. Since the pose estimates from the lidars are not necessarily synchronous, we first align the poses using a Dual Quaternion (DQ) based Screw Linear Interpolation. Afterward, a Hand-Eye based calibration problem is solved using the DQ-based formulation to recover the extrinsics. Furthermore, we verify the extrinsics by matching chosen lidar semantic features, obtained by projecting the lidar data into the camera perspective after time alignment using vehicle kinematics. Experimental results on the data collected from a Scania vehicle [$\sim$ 1 Km sequence] demonstrate the ability of our approach to obtain better calibration parameters than the provided vehicle CAD model calibration parameters. This setup can also be scaled to any combination of multiple lidars. 我们演示了一种适用于大型移动平台的多激光雷达校准框架，该框架可以联合校准非重叠视场（FoV）激光雷达传感器的外部参数，而无需任何外部校准辅助。该方法首先估计每个激光雷达在后续时间戳之间的相应传感器帧中的位姿。由于激光雷达的姿态估计不一定是同步的，因此我们首先使用基于双四元数 (DQ) 的螺旋线性插值来对齐姿态。随后，使用基于 DQ 的公式来解决基于手眼的校准问题，以恢复外在因素。此外，我们通过匹配选定的激光雷达语义特征来验证外在因素，这些语义特征是通过使用车辆运动学进行时间对准后将激光雷达数据投影到相机视角中获得的。从 Scania 车辆 [$\sim$ 1 Km 序列] 收集的数据的实验结果表明，我们的方法能够获得比提供的车辆 CAD 模型校准参数更好的校准参数。该设置还可以扩展到多个激光雷达的任意组合。 本文提出了一种无需外部校准工具即可对多个非重叠视场激光雷达传感器进行外参校准和验证的框架。 Sandipan Das,Navid Mahabadi,Addi Djikic,Cesar Nassir,Saikat Chatterjee,Maurice Fallon cs.RO

authors_text: Sandipan Das,Navid Mahabadi,Saikat Chatterjee,Maurice Fallon
title: Multi-modal curb detection and filtering
title_zh: 多模式路缘检测和过滤
abstract: Reliable knowledge of road boundaries is critical for autonomous vehicle navigation. We propose a robust curb detection and filtering technique based on the fusion of camera semantics and dense lidar point clouds. The lidar point clouds are collected by fusing multiple lidars for robust feature detection. The camera semantics are based on a modified EfficientNet architecture which is trained with labeled data collected from onboard fisheye cameras. The point clouds are associated with the closest curb segment with $L_2$-norm analysis after projecting into the image space with the fisheye model projection. Next, the selected points are clustered using unsupervised density-based spatial clustering to detect different curb regions. As new curb points are detected in consecutive frames they are associated with the existing curb clusters using temporal reachability constraints. If no reachability constraints are found a new curb cluster is formed from these new points. This ensures we can detect multiple curbs present in road segments consisting of multiple lanes if they are in the sensors' field of view. Finally, Delaunay filtering is applied for outlier removal and its performance is compared to traditional RANSAC-based filtering. An objective evaluation of the proposed solution is done using a high-definition map containing ground truth curb points obtained from a commercial map supplier. The proposed system has proven capable of detecting curbs of any orientation in complex urban road scenarios comprising straight roads, curved roads, and intersections with traffic isles.
summary: Reliable knowledge of road boundaries is critical for autonomous vehicle navigation. We propose a robust curb detection and filtering technique based on the fusion of camera semantics and dense lidar point clouds. The lidar point clouds are collected by fusing multiple lidars for robust feature detection. The camera semantics are based on a modified EfficientNet architecture which is trained with labeled data collected from onboard fisheye cameras. The point clouds are associated with the closest curb segment with $L_2$-norm analysis after projecting into the image space with the fisheye model projection. Next, the selected points are clustered using unsupervised density-based spatial clustering to detect different curb regions. As new curb points are detected in consecutive frames they are associated with the existing curb clusters using temporal reachability constraints. If no reachability constraints are found a new curb cluster is formed from these new points. This ensures we can detect multiple curbs present in road segments consisting of multiple lanes if they are in the sensors' field of view. Finally, Delaunay filtering is applied for outlier removal and its performance is compared to traditional RANSAC-based filtering. An objective evaluation of the proposed solution is done using a high-definition map containing ground truth curb points obtained from a commercial map supplier. The proposed system has proven capable of detecting curbs of any orientation in complex urban road scenarios comprising straight roads, curved roads, and intersections with traffic isles.
abstract_zh: 可靠的道路边界知识对于自动驾驶车辆导航至关重要。我们提出了一种基于相机语义和密集激光雷达点云融合的鲁棒路缘检测和过滤技术。通过融合多个激光雷达来收集激光雷达点云，以进行稳健的特征检测。相机语义基于改进的 EfficientNet 架构，该架构使用从机载鱼眼相机收集的标记数据进行训练。使用鱼眼模型投影投影到图像空间后，点云通过 $L_2$-范数分析与最近的路缘段相关联。接下来，使用无监督的基于密度的空间聚类对选定的点进行聚类，以检测不同的路缘区域。当在连续帧中检测到新的路缘点时，它们使用时间可达性约束与现有的路缘簇相关联。如果没有发现可达性约束，则由这些新点形成新的路缘簇。这确保了我们可以检测到由多个车道组成的路段中存在的多个路缘石（如果它们位于传感器的视野内）。最后，应用 Delaunay 过滤来去除异常值，并将其性能与传统的基于 RANSAC 的过滤进行比较。使用包含从商业地图供应商获得的地面实况路缘点的高清地图对所提出的解决方案进行客观评估。事实证明，所提出的系统能够检测复杂城市道路场景中任何方向的路缘石，包括直道、弯道和交通岛交叉口。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合摄像头语义与激光雷达点云的多模态路缘检测与过滤方法，用于自动驾驶中的道路边界识别。
AI.motivation: 道路边界信息对自动驾驶导航至关重要，但复杂城市环境中多车道、曲线路段及交通岛等场景对传统单模态检测方法提出挑战。
AI.method: 通过多激光雷达融合获取点云数据，结合改进EfficientNet的摄像头语义分割；利用L2范数将点云投影至图像空间关联路缘段，采用无监督密度聚类检测区域，并通过时间可达性约束关联连续帧数据，最后用Delaunay过滤替代RANSAC进行去噪。
AI.result: 在包含真实路缘点的高精度地图上验证，系统可准确检测任意方向的路缘，适用于直行、曲行道路及交叉口等复杂场景。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合方法有效提升了路缘检测鲁棒性，Delaunay过滤较传统RANSAC具有更优的去噪性能，可支持多车道复杂道路场景的实时检测。

authors_text: Joonas Kalda,Tanel Alumäe
title: Collar-aware Training for Streaming Speaker Change Detection in Broadcast Speech
title_zh: 用于广播语音中流式讲话者变化检测的项圈感知训练
comment: Accepted to Speaker Odyssey 2022
comments: Accepted to Speaker Odyssey 2022
abstract: In this paper, we present a novel training method for speaker change detection models. Speaker change detection is often viewed as a binary sequence labelling problem. The main challenges with this approach are the vagueness of annotated change points caused by the silences between speaker turns and imbalanced data due to the majority of frames not including a speaker change. Conventional training methods tackle these by artificially increasing the proportion of positive labels in the training data. Instead, the proposed method uses an objective function which encourages the model to predict a single positive label within a specified collar. This is done by marginalizing over all possible subsequences that have exactly one positive label within the collar. Experiments on English and Estonian datasets show large improvements over the conventional training method. Additionally, the model outputs have peaks concentrated to a single frame, removing the need for post-processing to find the exact predicted change point which is particularly useful for streaming applications.
summary: In this paper, we present a novel training method for speaker change detection models. Speaker change detection is often viewed as a binary sequence labelling problem. The main challenges with this approach are the vagueness of annotated change points caused by the silences between speaker turns and imbalanced data due to the majority of frames not including a speaker change. Conventional training methods tackle these by artificially increasing the proportion of positive labels in the training data. Instead, the proposed method uses an objective function which encourages the model to predict a single positive label within a specified collar. This is done by marginalizing over all possible subsequences that have exactly one positive label within the collar. Experiments on English and Estonian datasets show large improvements over the conventional training method. Additionally, the model outputs have peaks concentrated to a single frame, removing the need for post-processing to find the exact predicted change point which is particularly useful for streaming applications.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的说话人变化检测模型训练方法。说话人变化检测通常被视为二进制序列标记问题。这种方法的主要挑战是由于说话者轮流之间的沉默而引起的注释变化点的模糊性以及由于大多数帧不包括说话者变化而导致的不平衡数据。传统的训练方法通过人为地增加训练数据中正标签的比例来解决这些问题。相反，所提出的方法使用目标函数来鼓励模型预测指定项圈内的单个正标签。这是通过边缘化所有可能的子序列来完成的，这些子序列在项圈内只有一个正标签。在英语和爱沙尼亚语数据集上的实验表明，相对于传统的训练方法有很大的改进。此外，模型输出的峰值集中在单个帧，无需进行后处理即可找到准确的预测变化点，这对于流应用程序特别有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于广播语音流式说话人变化检测的新型训练方法，通过优化目标函数解决标注模糊和数据不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过人工增加正样本比例处理数据不平衡问题，但无法有效解决因静音导致的标注模糊性及流式应用中后处理需求。
AI.method: 设计基于'领口'(collar)约束的目标函数，通过子序列边际化确保每个领口内仅预测一个正标签，替代传统数据增强策略。
AI.result: 在英语和爱沙尼亚语数据集上显著优于传统方法，模型输出峰值集中于单帧，无需后处理即可直接用于流式应用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过聚焦领口区域优化预测分布，在提升检测精度的同时满足流式处理需求，为说话人变化检测提供新思路。

Experiments on English and Estonian datasets show large improvements over the conventional training method. Additionally, the model outputs have peaks concentrated to a single frame, removing the need for post-processing to find the exact predicted change point which is particularly useful for streaming applications. 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的说话人变化检测模型训练方法。说话人变化检测通常被视为二进制序列标记问题。这种方法的主要挑战是由于说话者轮流之间的沉默而引起的注释变化点的模糊性以及由于大多数帧不包括说话者变化而导致的不平衡数据。传统的训练方法通过人为地增加训练数据中正标签的比例来解决这些问题。相反，所提出的方法使用目标函数来鼓励模型预测指定项圈内的单个正标签。这是通过边缘化所有可能的子序列来完成的，这些子序列在项圈内只有一个正标签。在英语和爱沙尼亚语数据集上的实验表明，相对于传统的训练方法有很大的改进。此外，模型输出的峰值集中在单个帧，无需进行后处理即可找到准确的预测变化点，这对于流应用程序特别有用。 本文提出一种用于广播语音流式说话人变化检测的新型训练方法，通过优化目标函数解决标注模糊和数据不平衡问题。 Joonas Kalda,Tanel Alumäe eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.SD

authors_text: David Ahmedt-Aristizabal,Chuong Nguyen,Lachlan Tychsen-Smith,Ashley Stacey,Shenghong Li,Joseph Pathikulangara,Lars Petersson,Dadong Wang
title: Monitoring of Pigmented Skin Lesions Using 3D Whole Body Imaging
title_zh: 使用 3D 全身成像监测色素皮肤病变
comment: In Computer Methods and Programs in Biomedicine
comments: In Computer Methods and Programs in Biomedicine
abstract: Advanced artificial intelligence and machine learning have great potential to redefine how skin lesions are detected, mapped, tracked and documented. Here, We propose a 3D whole-body imaging system known as 3DSkin-mapper to enable automated detection, evaluation and mapping of skin lesions. A modular camera rig arranged in a cylindrical configuration was designed to automatically capture images of the entire skin surface of a subject synchronously from multiple angles. Based on the images, we developed algorithms for 3D model reconstruction, data processing and skin lesion detection and tracking based on deep convolutional neural networks. We also introduced a customised, user-friendly, and adaptable interface that enables individuals to interactively visualise, manipulate, and annotate the images. The proposed system is developed for skin lesion screening, the focus of this paper is to introduce the system instead of clinical study. Using synthetic and real images we demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed system by providing multiple views of a target skin lesion, enabling further 3D geometry analysis and longitudinal tracking. It takes only a few seconds to capture the entire skin surface, and about half an hour to process and analyse the images. Our experiments show that the proposed system allow fast and easy whole body 3D imaging. It can be used by dermatological clinics to conduct skin screening, detect and track skin lesions over time, identify suspicious lesions, and document pigmented lesions. The system can potentially save clinicians time and effort significantly. The 3D imaging and analysis has the potential to change the paradigm of whole body photography with many applications in skin diseases, including inflammatory and pigmentary disorders.

The proposed system is developed for skin lesion screening, the focus of this paper is to introduce the system instead of clinical study. abstract_zh: 先进的人工智能和机器学习具有重新定义皮肤病变检测、绘图、跟踪和记录方式的巨大潜力。在这里，我们提出了一种称为 3DSkin-mapper 的 3D 全身成像系统，可以自动检测、评估和绘制皮肤病变图。以圆柱形配置排列的模块化相机装置被设计为从多个角度同步自动捕获对象的整个皮肤表面的图像。基于这些图像，我们开发了基于深度卷积神经网络的 3D 模型重建、数据处理以及皮肤病变检测和跟踪的算法。我们还引入了一个定制的、用户友好的、适应性强的界面，使个人能够交互式地可视化、操作和注释图像。该系统是为皮肤病变筛查而开发的，本文的重点是介绍该系统而不是临床研究。使用合成图像和真实图像，我们通过提供目标皮肤病变的多个视图来证明所提出系统的有效性，从而实现进一步的 3D 几何分析和纵向跟踪。只需几秒钟即可捕获整个皮肤表面，处理和分析图像大约需要半小时。我们的实验表明，所提出的系统可以快速、轻松地进行全身 3D 成像。皮肤科诊所可以使用它来进行皮肤筛查、检测和跟踪一段时间内的皮肤病变、识别可疑病变并记录色素病变。该系统可以显着节省临床医生的时间和精力。 3D 成像和分析有可能改变全身摄影的范式，在皮肤疾病（包括炎症和色素性疾病）方面有许多应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于3D全身成像的系统3DSkin-mapper，用于自动化检测、评估和跟踪皮肤病变。
AI.motivation: 利用人工智能和机器学习技术提升皮肤病变检测效率，通过3D成像实现全身皮肤的快速筛查与长期追踪。
AI.method: 设计圆柱形多角度相机阵列同步采集全身皮肤图像，结合深度卷积神经网络进行3D重建、数据处理及病变检测，并开发交互式可视化界面。
AI.result: 系统可在数秒内完成全身成像及半小时内处理分析，实验表明其能有效提供多视角病变视图，支持3D几何分析与长期追踪。
AI.conclusion: 该系统有望显著提升皮肤科临床筛查效率，为色素性病变等皮肤疾病提供革新性解决方案。

authors_text: Tanel Alumäe,Kunnar Kukk
title: Pretraining Approaches for Spoken Language Recognition: TalTech Submission to the OLR 2021 Challenge
title_zh: 口语识别的预训练方法：TalTech 提交的 OLR 2021 挑战赛
comment: Accepted to Speaker Odyssey 2022
comments: Accepted to Speaker Odyssey 2022
abstract: This paper investigates different pretraining approaches to spoken language identification. The paper is based on our submission to the Oriental Language Recognition 2021 Challenge. We participated in two tracks of the challenge: constrained and unconstrained language recognition. For the constrained track, we first trained a Conformer-based encoder-decoder model for multilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR), using the provided training data that had transcripts available. The shared encoder of the multilingual ASR model was then finetuned for the language identification task. For the unconstrained task, we relied on both externally available pretrained models as well as external data: the multilingual XLSR-53 wav2vec2.0 model was finetuned on the VoxLingua107 corpus for the language recognition task, and finally finetuned on the provided target language training data, augmented with CommonVoice data. Our primary metric $C_{\rm avg}$ values on the Test set are 0.0079 for the constrained task and 0.0119 for the unconstrained task which resulted in the second place in both rankings. In post-evaluation experiments, we study the amount of target language data needed for training an accurate backend model, the importance of multilingual pretraining data, and compare different models as finetuning starting points.
summary: This paper investigates different pretraining approaches to spoken language identification. The paper is based on our submission to the Oriental Language Recognition 2021 Challenge. We participated in two tracks of the challenge: constrained and unconstrained language recognition. For the constrained track, we first trained a Conformer-based encoder-decoder model for multilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR), using the provided training data that had transcripts available. The shared encoder of the multilingual ASR model was then finetuned for the language identification task. For the unconstrained task, we relied on both externally available pretrained models as well as external data: the multilingual XLSR-53 wav2vec2.0 model was finetuned on the VoxLingua107 corpus for the language recognition task, and finally finetuned on the provided target language training data, augmented with CommonVoice data. Our primary metric $C_{\rm avg}$ values on the Test set are 0.0079 for the constrained task and 0.0119 for the unconstrained task which resulted in the second place in both rankings. In post-evaluation experiments, we study the amount of target language data needed for training an accurate backend model, the importance of multilingual pretraining data, and compare different models as finetuning starting points.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了口语识别的不同预训练方法。该论文基于我们向 2021 年东方语言识别挑战赛提交的论文。我们参加了挑战赛的两个赛道：受约束和无约束语言识别。对于受限轨道，我们首先使用提供的具有可用转录本的训练数据，训练用于多语言自动语音识别 (ASR) 的基于 Conformer 的编码器-解码器模型。然后针对语言识别任务对多语言 ASR 模型的共享编码器进行微调。对于无约束任务，我们依赖外部可用的预训练模型和外部数据：多语言 XLSR-53 wav2vec2.0 模型在 VoxLingua107 语料库上针对语言识别任务进行微调，最后在提供的目标语言训练数据上进行微调，并使用 CommonVoice 数据进行增强。我们在测试集上的主要指标 $C_{\rm avg}$ 值对于受约束任务是 0.0079，对于无​​约束任务是 0.0119，这在两个排名中都获得了第二名。在后评估实验中，我们研究了训练准确的后端模型所需的目标语言数据量、多语言预训练数据的重要性，并比较不同的模型作为微调的起点。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了用于口语语言识别的预训练方法，并基于TalTech在OLR 2021挑战赛中的提交方案进行了分析。
AI.motivation: 通过探索不同的预训练策略，提升在受限和非受限场景下的口语语言识别性能，以应对实际应用中数据和资源的限制。
AI.method: 在受限任务中，基于Conformer模型进行多语言ASR预训练并微调编码器；在非受限任务中，使用XLSR-53模型结合VoxLingua107和CommonVoice数据进行多阶段微调。
AI.result: 在测试集上取得C_avg值分别为0.0079（受限任务）和0.0119（非受限任务），均位列第二名。
AI.conclusion: 多语言预训练与外部数据结合能显著提升性能，且微调起点模型的选择及目标语言数据量对后端模型效果影响显著。

ai_content.result: 在测试集上取得C_avg值分别为0.0079（受限任务）和0.0119（非受限任务），均位列第二名。

In post-evaluation experiments, we study the amount of target language data needed for training an accurate backend model, the importance of multilingual pretraining data, and compare different models as finetuning starting points. 本文研究了口语识别的不同预训练方法。该论文基于我们向 2021 年东方语言识别挑战赛提交的论文。我们参加了挑战赛的两个赛道：受约束和无约束语言识别。对于受限轨道，我们首先使用提供的具有可用转录本的训练数据，训练用于多语言自动语音识别 (ASR) 的基于 Conformer 的编码器-解码器模型。然后针对语言识别任务对多语言 ASR 模型的共享编码器进行微调。对于无约束任务，我们依赖外部可用的预训练模型和外部数据：多语言 XLSR-53 wav2vec2.0 模型在 VoxLingua107 语料库上针对语言识别任务进行微调，最后在提供的目标语言训练数据上进行微调，并使用 CommonVoice 数据进行增强。我们在测试集上的主要指标 $C_{\rm avg}$ 值对于受约束任务是 0.0079，对于无​​约束任务是 0.0119，这在两个排名中都获得了第二名。在后评估实验中，我们研究了训练准确的后端模型所需的目标语言数据量、多语言预训练数据的重要性，并比较不同的模型作为微调的起点。 本文研究了用于口语语言识别的预训练方法，并基于TalTech在OLR 2021挑战赛中的提交方案进行了分析。 Tanel Alumäe,Kunnar Kukk eess.AS,cs.CL

authors_text: Shreya Sharma,Jigyasa Gupta,Shreshth Tuli,Rohan Paul,Mausam
title: GoalNet: Inferring Conjunctive Goal Predicates from Human Plan Demonstrations for Robot Instruction Following
title_zh: GoalNet：从机器人指令跟随的人类计划演示中推断联合目标谓词
comment: Accepted at Planning and Reinforcement Learning workshop in ICAPS 2022
comments: Accepted at Planning and Reinforcement Learning workshop in ICAPS 2022
abstract: Our goal is to enable a robot to learn how to sequence its actions to perform tasks specified as natural language instructions, given successful demonstrations from a human partner. The ability to plan high-level tasks can be factored as (i) inferring specific goal predicates that characterize the task implied by a language instruction for a given world state and (ii) synthesizing a feasible goal-reaching action-sequence with such predicates. For the former, we leverage a neural network prediction model, while utilizing a symbolic planner for the latter. We introduce a novel neuro-symbolic model, GoalNet, for contextual and task dependent inference of goal predicates from human demonstrations and linguistic task descriptions. GoalNet combines (i) learning, where dense representations are acquired for language instruction and the world state that enables generalization to novel settings and (ii) planning, where the cause-effect modeling by the symbolic planner eschews irrelevant predicates facilitating multi-stage decision making in large domains. GoalNet demonstrates a significant improvement (51%) in the task completion rate in comparison to a state-of-the-art rule-based approach on a benchmark data set displaying linguistic variations, particularly for multi-stage instructions.
summary: Our goal is to enable a robot to learn how to sequence its actions to perform tasks specified as natural language instructions, given successful demonstrations from a human partner. The ability to plan high-level tasks can be factored as (i) inferring specific goal predicates that characterize the task implied by a language instruction for a given world state and (ii) synthesizing a feasible goal-reaching action-sequence with such predicates. For the former, we leverage a neural network prediction model, while utilizing a symbolic planner for the latter. We introduce a novel neuro-symbolic model, GoalNet, for contextual and task dependent inference of goal predicates from human demonstrations and linguistic task descriptions. GoalNet combines (i) learning, where dense representations are acquired for language instruction and the world state that enables generalization to novel settings and (ii) planning, where the cause-effect modeling by the symbolic planner eschews irrelevant predicates facilitating multi-stage decision making in large domains. GoalNet demonstrates a significant improvement (51%) in the task completion rate in comparison to a state-of-the-art rule-based approach on a benchmark data set displaying linguistic variations, particularly for multi-stage instructions.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是，在人类伙伴的成功演示下，使机器人能够学习如何排序其动作以执行自然语言指令指定的任务。规划高级任务的能力可以分解为（i）推断特定的目标谓词，这些目标谓词表征给定世界状态的语言指令所隐含的任务，以及（ii）用这些谓词合成可行的达到目标的动作序列。对于前者，我们利用神经网络预测模型，而对于后者则利用符号规划器。我们引入了一种新颖的神经符号模型 GoalNet，用于根据人类演示和语言任务描述对目标谓词进行上下文和任务相关的推断。 GoalNet 结合了（i）学习，其中获取语言指令和世界状态的密集表示，从而能够泛化到新颖的设置；以及（ii）规划，其中符号规划器的因果建模避开不相关的谓词，促进大领域中的多阶段决策。在显示语言变化的基准数据集上，GoalNet 与最先进的基于规则的方法相比，任务完成率显着提高 (51%)，特别是对于多阶段指令。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GoalNet模型，通过人类演示推断任务目标谓词，使机器人能更好执行自然语言指令。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多阶段指令和复杂任务时表现不足，需提升机器人对语言指令的理解与规划能力。
AI.method: 结合神经网络与符号规划器，利用神经网络学习语言和状态表示，通过符号规划器进行因果建模与动作序列生成。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上任务完成率较先进规则方法提升51%，尤其在多阶段指令中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: GoalNet通过神经符号方法有效提升机器人复杂任务处理能力，验证了该框架在指令跟随任务中的优势。

authors_text: Ramashish Gaurav,Bryan Tripp,Apurva Narayan
title: Spiking Approximations of the MaxPooling Operation in Deep SNNs
title_zh: 深度 SNN 中 MaxPooling 操作的尖峰近似
comment: Accepted in IJCNN-2022
comments: Accepted in IJCNN-2022
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are an emerging domain of biologically inspired neural networks that have shown promise for low-power AI. A number of methods exist for building deep SNNs, with Artificial Neural Network (ANN)-to-SNN conversion being highly successful. MaxPooling layers in Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are an integral component to downsample the intermediate feature maps and introduce translational invariance, but the absence of their hardware-friendly spiking equivalents limits such CNNs' conversion to deep SNNs. In this paper, we present two hardware-friendly methods to implement Max-Pooling in deep SNNs, thus facilitating easy conversion of CNNs with MaxPooling layers to SNNs. In a first, we also execute SNNs with spiking-MaxPooling layers on Intel's Loihi neuromorphic hardware (with MNIST, FMNIST, & CIFAR10 dataset); thus, showing the feasibility of our approach.
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are an emerging domain of biologically inspired neural networks that have shown promise for low-power AI. A number of methods exist for building deep SNNs, with Artificial Neural Network (ANN)-to-SNN conversion being highly successful. MaxPooling layers in Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are an integral component to downsample the intermediate feature maps and introduce translational invariance, but the absence of their hardware-friendly spiking equivalents limits such CNNs' conversion to deep SNNs. In this paper, we present two hardware-friendly methods to implement Max-Pooling in deep SNNs, thus facilitating easy conversion of CNNs with MaxPooling layers to SNNs. In a first, we also execute SNNs with spiking-MaxPooling layers on Intel's Loihi neuromorphic hardware (with MNIST, FMNIST, & CIFAR10 dataset); thus, showing the feasibility of our approach.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 是受生物学启发的神经网络的一个新兴领域，它在低功耗人工智能方面展现出了前景。构建深度 SNN 的方法有很多种，其中人工神经网络 (ANN) 到 SNN 的转换非常成功。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 中的 MaxPooling 层是对中间特征图进行下采样并引入平移不变性的不可或缺的组件，但缺乏硬件友好的尖峰等效项限制了此类 CNN 向深度 SNN 的转换。在本文中，我们提出了两种硬件友好的方法来在深度 SNN 中实现 Max-Pooling，从而方便将具有 MaxPooling 层的 CNN 轻松转换为 SNN。首先，我们还在 Intel 的 Loihi 神经拟态硬件（使用 MNIST、FMNIST 和 CIFAR10 数据集）上执行具有尖峰 MaxPooling 层的 SNN；因此，表明我们的方法的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种硬件友好的方法，在深度脉冲神经网络（SNN）中实现MaxPooling操作，促进包含MaxPooling层的卷积神经网络（CNN）向SNN的转换。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN中的MaxPooling层缺乏硬件友好的脉冲神经网络（SNN）实现方式，限制了CNN向SNN的转换，亟需开发高效近似方法以推动SNN应用。
AI.method: 提出两种基于脉冲的MaxPooling近似方法，设计适用于神经形态硬件（如Intel Loihi）的实现方案，并通过实验验证其可行性。
AI.result: 在Intel Loihi芯片上成功运行包含脉冲MaxPooling层的SNN，验证了方法在多个数据集（MNIST、FMNIST、CIFAR10）上的有效性与硬件兼容性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究解决了SNN中MaxPooling操作的硬件实现难题，为CNN向SNN的转换提供了可行方案，推动了低功耗神经网络的发展。

authors_text: Dennis Haitz,Boris Jutzi,Patrick Huebner,Markus Ulrich
title: Corrosion Detection for Industrial Objects: From Multi-Sensor System to 5D Feature Space
title_zh: 工业物体腐蚀检测：从多传感器系统到 5D 特征空间
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures
abstract: Corrosion is a form of damage that often appears on the surface of metal-made objects used in industrial applications. Those damages can be critical depending on the purpose of the used object. Optical-based testing systems provide a form of non-contact data acquisition, where the acquired data can then be used to analyse the surface of an object. In the field of industrial image processing, this is called surface inspection. We provide a testing setup consisting of a rotary table which rotates the object by 360 degrees, as well as industrial RGB cameras and laser triangulation sensors for the acquisition of 2D and 3D data as our multi-sensor system. These sensors acquire data while the object to be tested takes a full rotation. Further on, data augmentation is applied to prepare new data or enhance already acquired data. In order to evaluate the impact of a laser triangulation sensor for corrosion detection, one challenge is to at first fuse the data of both domains. After the data fusion process, 5 different channels can be utilized to create a 5D feature space. Besides the red, green and blue channels of the image (1-3), additional range data from the laser triangulation sensor is incorporated (4). As a fifth channel, said sensor provides additional intensity data (5). With a multi-channel image classification, a 5D feature space will lead to slightly superior results opposed to a 3D feature space, composed of only the RGB channels of the image.
summary: Corrosion is a form of damage that often appears on the surface of metal-made objects used in industrial applications. Those damages can be critical depending on the purpose of the used object. Optical-based testing systems provide a form of non-contact data acquisition, where the acquired data can then be used to analyse the surface of an object. In the field of industrial image processing, this is called surface inspection. We provide a testing setup consisting of a rotary table which rotates the object by 360 degrees, as well as industrial RGB cameras and laser triangulation sensors for the acquisition of 2D and 3D data as our multi-sensor system. These sensors acquire data while the object to be tested takes a full rotation. Further on, data augmentation is applied to prepare new data or enhance already acquired data. In order to evaluate the impact of a laser triangulation sensor for corrosion detection, one challenge is to at first fuse the data of both domains. After the data fusion process, 5 different channels can be utilized to create a 5D feature space. Besides the red, green and blue channels of the image (1-3), additional range data from the laser triangulation sensor is incorporated (4). As a fifth channel, said sensor provides additional intensity data (5). With a multi-channel image classification, a 5D feature space will lead to slightly superior results opposed to a 3D feature space, composed of only the RGB channels of the image.
abstract_zh: 腐蚀是一种经常出现在工业应用中使用的金属制成的物体表面的损坏形式。根据所用物体的用途，这些损坏可能会很严重。基于光学的测试系统提供了一种非接触式数据采集方式，所采集的数据可用于分析物体的表面。在工业图像处理领域，这称为表面检查。我们提供的测试装置包括可将物体旋转 360 度的转台、工业 RGB 相机和激光三角测量传感器，用于采集 2D 和 3D 数据作为我们的多传感器系统。这些传感器在待测试物体旋转一整圈时采集数据。此外，数据增强用于准备新数据或增强已获取的数据。为了评估激光三角测量传感器对腐蚀检测的影响，一个挑战是首先融合两个域的数据。数据融合过程之后，可以利用 5 个不同的通道来创建 5D 特征空间。除了图像的红色、绿色和蓝色通道 (1-3) 之外，还包含来自激光三角测量传感器的附加距离数据 (4)。作为第五通道，所述传感器提供额外的强度数据(5)。对于多通道图像分类，与仅由图像的 RGB 通道组成的 3D 特征空间相比，5D 特征空间将产生稍微优越的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多传感器系统的工业对象腐蚀检测方法，通过融合RGB图像与激光三角传感器的范围和强度数据，构建5D特征空间以提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 工业金属物体表面腐蚀可能引发严重安全隐患，传统检测方法存在精度不足问题，需结合多源数据提升检测可靠性。
AI.method: 搭建包含旋转台、RGB相机和激光传感器的多传感器系统，采集2D/3D数据并进行数据增强；融合RGB三通道、激光范围数据及强度数据构建5D特征空间，采用多通道图像分类方法进行腐蚀检测。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于5D特征空间的分类方法较仅使用RGB的3D特征空间在检测精度上略有提升。
AI.conclusion: 多传感器数据融合与5D特征空间构建能有效提升工业腐蚀检测性能，为复杂工业场景下的表面缺陷检测提供新思路。

search_text: Corrosion Detection for Industrial Objects: From Multi-Sensor System to 5D Feature Space 工业物体腐蚀检测：从多传感器系统到 5D 特征空间 Corrosion is a form of damage that often appears on the surface of metal-made objects used in industrial applications. Those damages can be critical depending on the purpose of the used object. Optical-based testing systems provide a form of non-contact data acquisition, where the acquired data can then be used to analyse the surface of an object. In the field of industrial image processing, this is called surface inspection. We provide a testing setup consisting of a rotary table which rotates the object by 360 degrees, as well as industrial RGB cameras and laser triangulation sensors for the acquisition of 2D and 3D data as our multi-sensor system. These sensors acquire data while the object to be tested takes a full rotation. Further on, data augmentation is applied to prepare new data or enhance already acquired data. In order to evaluate the impact of a laser triangulation sensor for corrosion detection, one challenge is to at first fuse the data of both domains. After the data fusion process, 5 different channels can be utilized to create a 5D feature space. Besides the red, green and blue channels of the image (1-3), additional range data from the laser triangulation sensor is incorporated (4). As a fifth channel, said sensor provides additional intensity data (5). With a multi-channel image classification, a 5D feature space will lead to slightly superior results opposed to a 3D feature space, composed of only the RGB channels of the image. 腐蚀是一种经常出现在工业应用中使用的金属制成的物体表面的损坏形式。根据所用物体的用途，这些损坏可能会很严重。基于光学的测试系统提供了一种非接触式数据采集方式，所采集的数据可用于分析物体的表面。在工业图像处理领域，这称为表面检查。我们提供的测试装置包括可将物体旋转 360 度的转台、工业 RGB 相机和激光三角测量传感器，用于采集 2D 和 3D 数据作为我们的多传感器系统。这些传感器在待测试物体旋转一整圈时采集数据。此外，数据增强用于准备新数据或增强已获取的数据。为了评估激光三角测量传感器对腐蚀检测的影响，一个挑战是首先融合两个域的数据。数据融合过程之后，可以利用 5 个不同的通道来创建 5D 特征空间。除了图像的红色、绿色和蓝色通道 (1-3) 之外，还包含来自激光三角测量传感器的附加距离数据 (4)。作为第五通道，所述传感器提供额外的强度数据(5)。对于多通道图像分类，与仅由图像的 RGB 通道组成的 3D 特征空间相比，5D 特征空间将产生稍微优越的结果。 本文提出一种基于多传感器系统的工业对象腐蚀检测方法，通过融合RGB图像与激光三角传感器的范围和强度数据，构建5D特征空间以提升检测效果。 Dennis Haitz,Boris Jutzi,Patrick Huebner,Markus Ulrich cs.CV

authors_text: Jun Wang,Omran Alamayreh,Benedetta Tondi,Mauro Barni
title: An Architecture for the detection of GAN-generated Flood Images with Localization Capabilities
title_zh: 具有定位功能的 GAN 生成洪水图像检测架构
abstract: In this paper, we address a new image forensics task, namely the detection of fake flood images generated by ClimateGAN architecture. We do so by proposing a hybrid deep learning architecture including both a detection and a localization branch, the latter being devoted to the identification of the image regions manipulated by ClimateGAN. Even if our goal is the detection of fake flood images, in fact, we found that adding a localization branch helps the network to focus on the most relevant image regions with significant improvements in terms of generalization capabilities and robustness against image processing operations. The good performance of the proposed architecture is validated on two datasets of pristine flood images downloaded from the internet and three datasets of fake flood images generated by ClimateGAN starting from a large set of diverse street images.
summary: In this paper, we address a new image forensics task, namely the detection of fake flood images generated by ClimateGAN architecture. We do so by proposing a hybrid deep learning architecture including both a detection and a localization branch, the latter being devoted to the identification of the image regions manipulated by ClimateGAN. Even if our goal is the detection of fake flood images, in fact, we found that adding a localization branch helps the network to focus on the most relevant image regions with significant improvements in terms of generalization capabilities and robustness against image processing operations. The good performance of the proposed architecture is validated on two datasets of pristine flood images downloaded from the internet and three datasets of fake flood images generated by ClimateGAN starting from a large set of diverse street images.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了一项新的图像取证任务，即检测由 ClimateGAN 架构生成的假洪水图像。为此，我们提出了一种混合深度学习架构，其中包括检测和定位分支，后者致力于识别 ClimateGAN 操纵的图像区域。即使我们的目标是检测假洪水图像，事实上，我们发现添加本地化分支有助于网络专注于最相关的图像区域，并在泛化能力和针对图像处理操作的鲁棒性方面显着提高。该架构的良好性能在从互联网下载的两个原始洪水图像数据集和由 ClimateGAN 从大量不同街道图像生成的三个假洪水图像数据集上得到了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合深度学习架构，用于检测由ClimateGAN生成的假洪水图像，并具备定位篡改区域的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在检测GAN生成图像时缺乏定位能力，导致泛化能力不足且对图像处理操作鲁棒性较差。
AI.method: 设计包含检测分支和定位分支的双分支网络，定位分支专门识别ClimateGAN篡改的图像区域，通过多任务学习提升整体性能。
AI.result: 在2个真实洪水图像数据集和3个ClimateGAN生成数据集上验证，模型在检测准确率和定位精度上均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 定位分支有效增强模型对关键区域的关注度，显著提升检测鲁棒性，未来可扩展至其他类型生成图像的检测任务。

authors_text: Guilherme Maeda,Naoki Fukaya,Shin-ichi Maeda
title: F1 Hand: A Versatile Fixed-Finger Gripper for Delicate Teleoperation and Autonomous Grasping
title_zh: F1 Hand：多功能固定手指抓手，用于精细遥控操作和自主抓取
comment: Accepted for publication at the IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
comments: Accepted for publication at the IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
abstract: Teleoperation is often limited by the ability of an operator to react and predict the behavior of the robot as it interacts with the environment. For example, to grasp small objects on a table, the teleoperator needs to predict the position of the fingertips before the fingers are closed to avoid them hitting the table. For that reason, we developed the F1 hand, a single-motor gripper that facilitates teleoperation with the use of a fixed finger. The hand is capable of grasping objects as thin as a paper clip, and as heavy and large as a cordless drill. The applicability of the hand can be expanded by replacing the fixed finger with different shapes. This flexibility makes the hand highly versatile while being easy and cheap to develop. However, due to the atypical asymmetric structure and actuation of the hand usual grasping strategies no longer apply. Thus, we propose a controller that approximates actuation symmetry by using the motion of the whole arm. The F1 hand and its controller are compared side-by-side with the original Toyota Human Support Robot (HSR) gripper in teleoperation using 22 objects from the YCB dataset in addition to small objects. The grasping time and peak contact forces could be decreased by 20% and 70%, respectively while increasing success rates by 5%. Using an off-the-shelf grasp pose estimator for autonomous grasping, the system achieved similar success rates to the original HSR gripper, at the order of 80%.
summary: Teleoperation is often limited by the ability of an operator to react and predict the behavior of the robot as it interacts with the environment. For example, to grasp small objects on a table, the teleoperator needs to predict the position of the fingertips before the fingers are closed to avoid them hitting the table. For that reason, we developed the F1 hand, a single-motor gripper that facilitates teleoperation with the use of a fixed finger. The hand is capable of grasping objects as thin as a paper clip, and as heavy and large as a cordless drill. The applicability of the hand can be expanded by replacing the fixed finger with different shapes. This flexibility makes the hand highly versatile while being easy and cheap to develop. However, due to the atypical asymmetric structure and actuation of the hand usual grasping strategies no longer apply. Thus, we propose a controller that approximates actuation symmetry by using the motion of the whole arm. The F1 hand and its controller are compared side-by-side with the original Toyota Human Support Robot (HSR) gripper in teleoperation using 22 objects from the YCB dataset in addition to small objects. The grasping time and peak contact forces could be decreased by 20% and 70%, respectively while increasing success rates by 5%. Using an off-the-shelf grasp pose estimator for autonomous grasping, the system achieved similar success rates to the original HSR gripper, at the order of 80%.
abstract_zh: 远程操作通常受到操作员在机器人与环境交互时做出反应和预测机器人行为的能力的限制。例如，为了抓取桌子上的小物体，远程操作者需要在手指闭合之前预测指尖的位置，以避免手指撞到桌子。因此，我们开发了 F1 手，这是一种单电机夹具，可以使用固定手指进行远程操作。手能够抓住像回形针一样薄的物体，以及像无绳钻一样重和大的物体。通过更换不同形状的固定手指，可以扩展手的适用性。这种灵活性使得该手具有高度的通用性，同时开发起来既简单又便宜。然而，由于非典型的不对称结构和手的驱动，通常的抓取策略不再适用。因此，我们提出了一种通过使用整个手臂的运动来近似驱动对称性的控制器。除了小物体外，还使用 ​​YCB 数据集中的 22 个物体进行远程操作，将 F1 手及其控制器与原始丰田人类支持机器人 (HSR) 抓手进行并排比较。抓取时间和峰值接触力可分别减少 20% 和 70%，同时成功率提高 5%。使用现成的抓取姿态估计器进行自主抓取，该系统实现了与原始 HSR 抓取器类似的成功率，约为 80%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为F1 Hand的单电机固定指夹爪，用于精细远程操作和自主抓取，并设计了适配其非对称结构的控制器。
AI.motivation: 传统远程操作受限于操作者对机器人行为的预测能力，而现有夹爪难以兼顾轻小物体抓取与大物件操作，且结构复杂成本高。
AI.method: 开发具有可替换固定指的F1 Hand夹爪，通过全臂运动模拟对称性控制策略，并与丰田HSR夹爪进行抓取性能对比实验。
AI.result: 抓取时间减少20%、峰值接触力降低70%、成功率提升5%，自主抓取成功率与HSR相当（约80%）。
AI.conclusion: F1 Hand通过模块化设计和新型控制策略，在保证低成本的同时提升了远程操作与自主抓取性能，适用于多样化场景。
