search_text: F1 Hand: A Versatile Fixed-Finger Gripper for Delicate Teleoperation and Autonomous Grasping F1 Hand：多功能固定手指抓手，用于精细遥控操作和自主抓取 Teleoperation is often limited by the ability of an operator to react and predict the behavior of the robot as it interacts with the environment. For example, to grasp small objects on a table, the teleoperator needs to predict the position of the fingertips before the fingers are closed to avoid them hitting the table. For that reason, we developed the F1 hand, a single-motor gripper that facilitates teleoperation with the use of a fixed finger. The hand is capable of grasping objects as thin as a paper clip, and as heavy and large as a cordless drill. The applicability of the hand can be expanded by replacing the fixed finger with different shapes. This flexibility makes the hand highly versatile while being easy and cheap to develop. However, due to the atypical asymmetric structure and actuation of the hand usual grasping strategies no longer apply. Thus, we propose a controller that approximates actuation symmetry by using the motion of the whole arm. The F1 hand and its controller are compared side-by-side with the original Toyota Human Support Robot (HSR) gripper in teleoperation using 22 objects from the YCB dataset in addition to small objects. The grasping time and peak contact forces could be decreased by 20% and 70%, respectively while increasing success rates by 5%. Using an off-the-shelf grasp pose estimator for autonomous grasping, the system achieved similar success rates to the original HSR gripper, at the order of 80%. 远程操作通常受到操作员在机器人与环境交互时做出反应和预测机器人行为的能力的限制。例如，为了抓取桌子上的小物体，远程操作者需要在手指闭合之前预测指尖的位置，以避免手指撞到桌子。因此，我们开发了 F1 手，这是一种单电机夹具，可以使用固定手指进行远程操作。手能够抓住像回形针一样薄的物体，以及像无绳钻一样重和大的物体。通过更换不同形状的固定手指，可以扩展手的适用性。这种灵活性使得该手具有高度的通用性，同时开发起来既简单又便宜。然而，由于非典型的不对称结构和手的驱动，通常的抓取策略不再适用。因此，我们提出了一种通过使用整个手臂的运动来近似驱动对称性的控制器。除了小物体外，还使用 ​​YCB 数据集中的 22 个物体进行远程操作，将 F1 手及其控制器与原始丰田人类支持机器人 (HSR) 抓手进行并排比较。抓取时间和峰值接触力可分别减少 20% 和 70%，同时成功率提高 5%。使用现成的抓取姿态估计器进行自主抓取，该系统实现了与原始 HSR 抓取器类似的成功率，约为 80%。 本文提出一种名为F1 Hand的单电机固定指夹爪，用于精细远程操作和自主抓取，并设计了适配其非对称结构的控制器。 Guilherme Maeda,Naoki Fukaya,Shin-ichi Maeda cs.RO

authors_text: Xiaohong Fan,Yin Yang,Ke Chen,Jianping Zhang,Ke Dong
title: An Interpretable MRI Reconstruction Network with Two-grid-cycle Correction and Geometric Prior Distillation
title_zh: 具有两个网格周期校正和几何先验蒸馏的可解释 MRI 重建网络
comment: 14 pages, accepted to Biomedical Signal Processing and Control,March, 2023
comments: 14 pages, accepted to Biomedical Signal Processing and Control,March, 2023
abstract: Although existing deep learning compressed-sensing-based Magnetic Resonance Imaging (CS-MRI) methods have achieved considerably impressive performance, explainability and generalizability continue to be challenging for such methods since the transition from mathematical analysis to network design not always natural enough, often most of them are not flexible enough to handle multi-sampling-ratio reconstruction assignments. {In this work, to tackle explainability and generalizability, we propose a unifying deep unfolding multi-sampling-ratio interpretable CS-MRI framework.} The combined approach offers more generalizability than previous works whereas deep learning gains explainability through a geometric prior module. Inspired by the multigrid algorithm, we first embed the CS-MRI-based optimization algorithm into correction-distillation scheme that consists of three ingredients: pre-relaxation module, correction module and geometric prior distillation module. Furthermore, we employ a condition module to learn adaptively step-length and noise level, which enables the proposed framework to jointly train multi-ratio tasks through a single model. { The proposed model not only compensates for the lost contextual information of reconstructed image which is refined from low frequency error in geometric characteristic k-space}, but also integrates the theoretical guarantee of model-based methods and the superior reconstruction performances of deep learning-based methods. Therefore, it can give us a novel perspective to design biomedical imaging networks. { Numerical experiments show that our framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of qualitative and quantitative evaluations.} {Our method achieves 3.18 dB improvement at low CS ratio 10\% and average 1.42 dB improvement over other comparison methods on brain dataset using Cartesian sampling mask.
summary: Although existing deep learning compressed-sensing-based Magnetic Resonance Imaging (CS-MRI) methods have achieved considerably impressive performance, explainability and generalizability continue to be challenging for such methods since the transition from mathematical analysis to network design not always natural enough, often most of them are not flexible enough to handle multi-sampling-ratio reconstruction assignments. {In this work, to tackle explainability and generalizability, we propose a unifying deep unfolding multi-sampling-ratio interpretable CS-MRI framework.} The combined approach offers more generalizability than previous works whereas deep learning gains explainability through a geometric prior module. Inspired by the multigrid algorithm, we first embed the CS-MRI-based optimization algorithm into correction-distillation scheme that consists of three ingredients: pre-relaxation module, correction module and geometric prior distillation module. Furthermore, we employ a condition module to learn adaptively step-length and noise level, which enables the proposed framework to jointly train multi-ratio tasks through a single model. { The proposed model not only compensates for the lost contextual information of reconstructed image which is refined from low frequency error in geometric characteristic k-space}, but also integrates the theoretical guarantee of model-based methods and the superior reconstruction performances of deep learning-based methods. Therefore, it can give us a novel perspective to design biomedical imaging networks. { Numerical experiments show that our framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of qualitative and quantitative evaluations.} {Our method achieves 3.18 dB improvement at low CS ratio 10\% and average 1.42 dB improvement over other comparison methods on brain dataset using Cartesian sampling mask.
abstract_zh: 尽管现有的基于深度学习压缩感知的磁共振成像（CS-MRI）方法已经取得了相当令人印象深刻的性能，但这些方法的可解释性和普遍性仍然面临挑战，因为从数学分析到网络设计的过渡并不总是足够自然，而且大多数方法通常不够灵活，无法处理多采样比重建任务。 {在这项工作中，为了解决可解释性和普遍性，我们提出了一种统一的深度展开多采样比可解释 CS-MRI 框架。}这种组合方法比以前的工作提供了更多的普遍性，而深度学习通过几何先验模块获得了可解释性。受多重网格算法的启发，我们首先将基于CS-MRI的优化算法嵌入到校正蒸馏方案中，该方案由三个部分组成：预松弛模块、校正模块和几何先验蒸馏模块。此外，我们采用条件模块来自适应学习步长和噪声水平，这使得所提出的框架能够通过单个模型联合训练多比率任务。 {所提出的模型不仅补偿了从几何特征k空间中的低频误差精炼得到的重建图像丢失的上下文信息}，而且集成了基于模型的方法的理论保证和基于深度学习的方法的优越重建性能。因此，它可以为我们设计生物医学成像网络提供新的视角。 {数值实验表明，我们的框架在定性和定量评估方面优于最先进的方法。} {我们的方法在低 CS 比率 10% 时实现了 3.18 dB 的改进，与使用笛卡尔采样掩模的大脑数据集上的其他比较方法相比，平均改进了 1.42 dB。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合双网格循环校正和几何先验蒸馏的可解释MRI重建网络框架，以解决压缩感知MRI中的可解释性和泛化性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有CS-MRI方法在数学分析向网络设计的转换中缺乏自然性，难以灵活处理多采样率重建任务，且可解释性不足。
AI.method: 基于多网格算法，设计包含预松弛模块、校正模块和几何先验蒸馏模块的修正-蒸馏框架，并引入条件模块自适应学习步长和噪声水平，实现单模型多采样率联合训练。
AI.result: 在低采样率10%时较现有方法提升3.18dB，脑部数据集平均提升1.42dB，定性定量评估均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法融合了模型驱动方法的理论保证与深度学习的重建优势，为生物医学成像网络设计提供新视角。

authors_text: Anssi Kanervisto,Tomi Kinnunen,Ville Hautamäki
title: GAN-Aimbots: Using Machine Learning for Cheating in First Person Shooters
title_zh: GAN-Aimbots：利用机器学习在第一人称射击游戏中作弊
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Games. Source code available at https://github.com/miffyli/gan-aimbots
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Games. Source code available at https://github.com/miffyli/gan-aimbots
abstract: Playing games with cheaters is not fun, and in a multi-billion-dollar video game industry with hundreds of millions of players, game developers aim to improve the security and, consequently, the user experience of their games by preventing cheating. Both traditional software-based methods and statistical systems have been successful in protecting against cheating, but recent advances in the automatic generation of content, such as images or speech, threaten the video game industry; they could be used to generate artificial gameplay indistinguishable from that of legitimate human players. To better understand this threat, we begin by reviewing the current state of multiplayer video game cheating, and then proceed to build a proof-of-concept method, GAN-Aimbot. By gathering data from various players in a first-person shooter game we show that the method improves players' performance while remaining hidden from automatic and manual protection mechanisms. By sharing this work we hope to raise awareness on this issue and encourage further research into protecting the gaming communities.
summary: Playing games with cheaters is not fun, and in a multi-billion-dollar video game industry with hundreds of millions of players, game developers aim to improve the security and, consequently, the user experience of their games by preventing cheating. Both traditional software-based methods and statistical systems have been successful in protecting against cheating, but recent advances in the automatic generation of content, such as images or speech, threaten the video game industry; they could be used to generate artificial gameplay indistinguishable from that of legitimate human players. To better understand this threat, we begin by reviewing the current state of multiplayer video game cheating, and then proceed to build a proof-of-concept method, GAN-Aimbot. By gathering data from various players in a first-person shooter game we show that the method improves players' performance while remaining hidden from automatic and manual protection mechanisms. By sharing this work we hope to raise awareness on this issue and encourage further research into protecting the gaming communities.
abstract_zh: 与作弊者一起玩游戏并不好玩，在价值数十亿美元、拥有数亿玩家的视频游戏行业中，游戏开发商的目标是通过防止作弊来提高安全性，从而提高游戏的用户体验。传统的基于软件的方法和统计系统都成功地防止了作弊，但自动生成内容（例如图像或语音）的最新进展威胁着视频游戏行业；它们可以用来生成与合法人类玩家无法区分的人工游戏玩法。为了更好地理解这种威胁，我们首先回顾多人视频游戏作弊的当前状态，然后继续构建概念验证方法 GAN-Aimbot。通过收集第一人称射击游戏中不同玩家的数据，我们表明该方法可以提高玩家的表现，同时保持对自动和手动保护机制的隐藏。通过分享这项工作，我们希望提高人们对这个问题的认识，并鼓励进一步研究保护游戏社区。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种利用生成对抗网络（GAN）创建作弊工具的方法，用于在第一人称射击游戏中提高玩家表现。
AI.motivation: 游戏开发者希望提高游戏安全性以改善用户体验，但自动内容生成技术可能被用于创建难以察觉的作弊行为，因此需要对此类威胁进行研究。
AI.method: 通过收集第一人称射击游戏中的玩家数据，构建了一个名为GAN-Aimbot的原型方法，以提升玩家表现并绕过自动和人工防护机制。
AI.result: 该方法成功提升了玩家的表现，同时未被现有的自动和人工防护机制检测到。
AI.conclusion: 该研究旨在提高对这一问题的认识，并鼓励进一步研究以保护游戏社区免受此类作弊行为的侵害。

tldr: 该论文提出了一种利用生成对抗网络（GAN）创建作弊工具的方法，用于在第一人称射击游戏中提高玩家表现。
motivation: 游戏开发者希望提高游戏安全性以改善用户体验，但自动内容生成技术可能被用于创建难以察觉的作弊行为，因此需要对此类威胁进行研究。
method: 通过收集第一人称射击游戏中的玩家数据，构建了一个名为GAN-Aimbot的原型方法，以提升玩家表现并绕过自动和人工防护机制。
result: 该方法成功提升了玩家的表现，同时未被现有的自动和人工防护机制检测到。
conclusion: 该研究旨在提高对这一问题的认识，并鼓励进一步研究以保护游戏社区免受此类作弊行为的侵害。
search_text: GAN-Aimbots: Using Machine Learning for Cheating in First Person Shooters GAN-Aimbots：利用机器学习在第一人称射击游戏中作弊 Playing games with cheaters is not fun, and in a multi-billion-dollar video game industry with hundreds of millions of players, game developers aim to improve the security and, consequently, the user experience of their games by preventing cheating. Both traditional software-based methods and statistical systems have been successful in protecting against cheating, but recent advances in the automatic generation of content, such as images or speech, threaten the video game industry; they could be used to generate artificial gameplay indistinguishable from that of legitimate human players. To better understand this threat, we begin by reviewing the current state of multiplayer video game cheating, and then proceed to build a proof-of-concept method, GAN-Aimbot. By gathering data from various players in a first-person shooter game we show that the method improves players' performance while remaining hidden from automatic and manual protection mechanisms. By sharing this work we hope to raise awareness on this issue and encourage further research into protecting the gaming communities. 与作弊者一起玩游戏并不好玩，在价值数十亿美元、拥有数亿玩家的视频游戏行业中，游戏开发商的目标是通过防止作弊来提高安全性，从而提高游戏的用户体验。传统的基于软件的方法和统计系统都成功地防止了作弊，但自动生成内容（例如图像或语音）的最新进展威胁着视频游戏行业；它们可以用来生成与合法人类玩家无法区分的人工游戏玩法。为了更好地理解这种威胁，我们首先回顾多人视频游戏作弊的当前状态，然后继续构建概念验证方法 GAN-Aimbot。通过收集第一人称射击游戏中不同玩家的数据，我们表明该方法可以提高玩家的表现，同时保持对自动和手动保护机制的隐藏。通过分享这项工作，我们希望提高人们对这个问题的认识，并鼓励进一步研究保护游戏社区。 该论文提出了一种利用生成对抗网络（GAN）创建作弊工具的方法，用于在第一人称射击游戏中提高玩家表现。 Anssi Kanervisto,Tomi Kinnunen,Ville Hautamäki cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Jonathan Tremblay,Moustafa Meshry,Alex Evans,Jan Kautz,Alexander Keller,Sameh Khamis,Thomas Müller,Charles Loop,Nathan Morrical,Koki Nagano,Towaki Takikawa,Stan Birchfield
title: RTMV: A Ray-Traced Multi-View Synthetic Dataset for Novel View Synthesis
title_zh: RTMV：用于新颖视图合成的光线追踪多视图合成数据集
comment: ECCV 2022 Workshop on Learning to Generate 3D Shapes and Scenes. Project page at http://www.cs.umd.edu/~mmeshry/projects/rtmv
comments: ECCV 2022 Workshop on Learning to Generate 3D Shapes and Scenes. Project page at http://www.cs.umd.edu/~mmeshry/projects/rtmv
abstract: We present a large-scale synthetic dataset for novel view synthesis consisting of ~300k images rendered from nearly 2000 complex scenes using high-quality ray tracing at high resolution (1600 x 1600 pixels). The dataset is orders of magnitude larger than existing synthetic datasets for novel view synthesis, thus providing a large unified benchmark for both training and evaluation. Using 4 distinct sources of high-quality 3D meshes, the scenes of our dataset exhibit challenging variations in camera views, lighting, shape, materials, and textures. Because our dataset is too large for existing methods to process, we propose Sparse Voxel Light Field (SVLF), an efficient voxel-based light field approach for novel view synthesis that achieves comparable performance to NeRF on synthetic data, while being an order of magnitude faster to train and two orders of magnitude faster to render. SVLF achieves this speed by relying on a sparse voxel octree, careful voxel sampling (requiring only a handful of queries per ray), and reduced network structure; as well as ground truth depth maps at training time. Our dataset is generated by NViSII, a Python-based ray tracing renderer, which is designed to be simple for non-experts to use and share, flexible and powerful through its use of scripting, and able to create high-quality and physically-based rendered images. Experiments with a subset of our dataset allow us to compare standard methods like NeRF and mip-NeRF for single-scene modeling, and pixelNeRF for category-level modeling, pointing toward the need for future improvements in this area.
summary: We present a large-scale synthetic dataset for novel view synthesis consisting of ~300k images rendered from nearly 2000 complex scenes using high-quality ray tracing at high resolution (1600 x 1600 pixels). The dataset is orders of magnitude larger than existing synthetic datasets for novel view synthesis, thus providing a large unified benchmark for both training and evaluation. Using 4 distinct sources of high-quality 3D meshes, the scenes of our dataset exhibit challenging variations in camera views, lighting, shape, materials, and textures. Because our dataset is too large for existing methods to process, we propose Sparse Voxel Light Field (SVLF), an efficient voxel-based light field approach for novel view synthesis that achieves comparable performance to NeRF on synthetic data, while being an order of magnitude faster to train and two orders of magnitude faster to render. SVLF achieves this speed by relying on a sparse voxel octree, careful voxel sampling (requiring only a handful of queries per ray), and reduced network structure; as well as ground truth depth maps at training time. Our dataset is generated by NViSII, a Python-based ray tracing renderer, which is designed to be simple for non-experts to use and share, flexible and powerful through its use of scripting, and able to create high-quality and physically-based rendered images. Experiments with a subset of our dataset allow us to compare standard methods like NeRF and mip-NeRF for single-scene modeling, and pixelNeRF for category-level modeling, pointing toward the need for future improvements in this area.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个用于新颖视图合成的大规模合成数据集，由使用高分辨率（1600 x 1600 像素）的高质量光线追踪从近 2000 个复杂场景渲染的约 300k 图像组成。该数据集比现有的用于新颖视图合成的合成数据集大几个数量级，从而为训练和评估提供了一个大型的统一基准。我们的数据集场景使用 4 个不同的高质量 3D 网格源，在摄像机视图、光照、形状、材质和纹理方面展现出具有挑战性的变化。由于我们的数据集太大，现有方法无法处理，因此我们提出了稀疏体素光场（SVLF），这是一种基于体素的高效光场方法，用于新颖的视图合成，可在合成数据上实现与 NeRF 相当的性能，同时训练速度快一个数量级，渲染速度快两个数量级。 SVLF 通过依赖稀疏体素八叉树、仔细的体素采样（每条射线只需要少量查询）和简化的网络结构来实现这一速度；以及训练时的地面真实深度图。我们的数据集是由 NViSII 生成的，NViSII 是一个基于 Python 的光线追踪渲染器，其设计目的是让非专家能够简单地使用和共享，通过脚本的使用灵活而强大，并且能够创建高质量和基于物理的渲染图像。对数据集子集的实验使我们能够比较用于单场景建模的 NeRF 和 mip-NeRF 以及用于类别级建模的 PixelNeRF 等标准方法，指出了该领域未来改进的需要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为RTMV的大规模合成数据集，用于新视角合成，并设计了一种高效的稀疏体素光场方法SVLF以处理该数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有合成数据集规模有限，难以支持复杂场景的新视角合成研究，且现有方法在处理大规模数据时效率不足。
AI.method: 基于NViSII渲染器生成包含300k张高分辨率图像的RTMV数据集，并提出SVLF方法，利用稀疏体素八叉树、高效采样策略和简化网络结构加速训练与渲染。
AI.result: SVLF在合成数据上达到与NeRF相当的性能，训练速度提升10倍，渲染速度提升100倍；实验表明现有方法在大规模数据集上仍有改进空间。
AI.conclusion: RTMV为新视角合成提供了统一基准，SVLF证明了高效处理大规模数据的可行性，未来需进一步优化模型性能与泛化能力。

search_text: RTMV: A Ray-Traced Multi-View Synthetic Dataset for Novel View Synthesis RTMV：用于新颖视图合成的光线追踪多视图合成数据集 We present a large-scale synthetic dataset for novel view synthesis consisting of ~300k images rendered from nearly 2000 complex scenes using high-quality ray tracing at high resolution (1600 x 1600 pixels). The dataset is orders of magnitude larger than existing synthetic datasets for novel view synthesis, thus providing a large unified benchmark for both training and evaluation. Using 4 distinct sources of high-quality 3D meshes, the scenes of our dataset exhibit challenging variations in camera views, lighting, shape, materials, and textures. Because our dataset is too large for existing methods to process, we propose Sparse Voxel Light Field (SVLF), an efficient voxel-based light field approach for novel view synthesis that achieves comparable performance to NeRF on synthetic data, while being an order of magnitude faster to train and two orders of magnitude faster to render. SVLF achieves this speed by relying on a sparse voxel octree, careful voxel sampling (requiring only a handful of queries per ray), and reduced network structure; as well as ground truth depth maps at training time. Our dataset is generated by NViSII, a Python-based ray tracing renderer, which is designed to be simple for non-experts to use and share, flexible and powerful through its use of scripting, and able to create high-quality and physically-based rendered images. Experiments with a subset of our dataset allow us to compare standard methods like NeRF and mip-NeRF for single-scene modeling, and pixelNeRF for category-level modeling, pointing toward the need for future improvements in this area. 我们提出了一个用于新颖视图合成的大规模合成数据集，由使用高分辨率（1600 x 1600 像素）的高质量光线追踪从近 2000 个复杂场景渲染的约 300k 图像组成。该数据集比现有的用于新颖视图合成的合成数据集大几个数量级，从而为训练和评估提供了一个大型的统一基准。我们的数据集场景使用 4 个不同的高质量 3D 网格源，在摄像机视图、光照、形状、材质和纹理方面展现出具有挑战性的变化。由于我们的数据集太大，现有方法无法处理，因此我们提出了稀疏体素光场（SVLF），这是一种基于体素的高效光场方法，用于新颖的视图合成，可在合成数据上实现与 NeRF 相当的性能，同时训练速度快一个数量级，渲染速度快两个数量级。 SVLF 通过依赖稀疏体素八叉树、仔细的体素采样（每条射线只需要少量查询）和简化的网络结构来实现这一速度；以及训练时的地面真实深度图。我们的数据集是由 NViSII 生成的，NViSII 是一个基于 Python 的光线追踪渲染器，其设计目的是让非专家能够简单地使用和共享，通过脚本的使用灵活而强大，并且能够创建高质量和基于物理的渲染图像。对数据集子集的实验使我们能够比较用于单场景建模的 NeRF 和 mip-NeRF 以及用于类别级建模的 PixelNeRF 等标准方法，指出了该领域未来改进的需要。 本文提出一个名为RTMV的大规模合成数据集，用于新视角合成，并设计了一种高效的稀疏体素光场方法SVLF以处理该数据集。 Jonathan Tremblay,Moustafa Meshry,Alex Evans,Jan Kautz,Alexander Keller,Sameh Khamis,Thomas Müller,Charles Loop,Nathan Morrical,Koki Nagano,Towaki Takikawa,Stan Birchfield cs.CV

authors_text: Hengcan Shi,Munawar Hayat,Jianfei Cai
title: Transformer Scale Gate for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割的 Transformer Scale Gate
abstract: Effectively encoding multi-scale contextual information is crucial for accurate semantic segmentation. Existing transformer-based segmentation models combine features across scales without any selection, where features on sub-optimal scales may degrade segmentation outcomes. Leveraging from the inherent properties of Vision Transformers, we propose a simple yet effective module, Transformer Scale Gate (TSG), to optimally combine multi-scale features.TSG exploits cues in self and cross attentions in Vision Transformers for the scale selection. TSG is a highly flexible plug-and-play module, and can easily be incorporated with any encoder-decoder-based hierarchical vision Transformer architecture. Extensive experiments on the Pascal Context and ADE20K datasets demonstrate that our feature selection strategy achieves consistent gains.
summary: Effectively encoding multi-scale contextual information is crucial for accurate semantic segmentation. Existing transformer-based segmentation models combine features across scales without any selection, where features on sub-optimal scales may degrade segmentation outcomes. Leveraging from the inherent properties of Vision Transformers, we propose a simple yet effective module, Transformer Scale Gate (TSG), to optimally combine multi-scale features.TSG exploits cues in self and cross attentions in Vision Transformers for the scale selection. TSG is a highly flexible plug-and-play module, and can easily be incorporated with any encoder-decoder-based hierarchical vision Transformer architecture. Extensive experiments on the Pascal Context and ADE20K datasets demonstrate that our feature selection strategy achieves consistent gains.
abstract_zh: 有效编码多尺度上下文信息对于准确的语义分割至关重要。现有的基于变压器的分割模型在没有任何选择的情况下组合了跨尺度的特征，其中次优尺度上的特征可能会降低分割结果。利用 Vision Transformers 的固有属性，我们提出了一个简单而有效的模块 Transformer Scale Gate (TSG)，以最佳地组合多尺度特征。TSG 利用 Vision Transformers 中的自注意力和交叉注意力线索进行尺度选择。 TSG 是一种高度灵活的即插即用模块，可以轻松地与任何基于编码器-解码器的分层视觉 Transformer 架构合并。对 Pascal Context 和 ADE20K 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的特征选择策略取得了一致的收益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Transformer Scale Gate（TSG）的模块，用于语义分割中的多尺度特征优化融合。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的分割模型在结合多尺度特征时缺乏选择性，可能导致次优尺度特征干扰分割效果。
AI.method: 设计TSG模块，利用Vision Transformer中的自注意力和交叉注意力机制进行动态尺度选择，作为即插即用组件集成到任意编码器-解码器架构中。
AI.result: 在Pascal Context和ADE20K数据集上实验表明，TSG的特征选择策略显著提升了分割性能。
AI.conclusion: TSG通过有效筛选多尺度特征，解决了语义分割中尺度信息融合的关键问题。

authors_text: Hao Chen,Rongkai Shi,Diego Monteiro,Nilufar Baghaei,Hai-Ning Liang
title: VRCockpit: Mitigating Simulator Sickness in VR Games Using Multiple Egocentric 2D View Frames
title_zh: VRCockpit：使用多个以自我为中心的 2D 视图框架减轻 VR 游戏中的模拟器不适感
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables
abstract: Virtual reality head-mounted displays (VR HMDs) have become a popular platform for gaming. However, simulator sickness (SS) is still an impediment to VR's wider adoption, particularly in gaming. It can induce strong discomfort and impair players' immersion, performance, and enjoyment. Researchers have explored techniques to mitigate SS. While these techniques have been shown to help lessen SS, they may not be applicable to games because they cannot be easily integrated into various types of games without impacting gameplay, immersion, and performance. In this research, we introduce a new SS mitigation technique, VRCockpit. VRCockpit is a visual technique that surrounds the player with four 2D views, one for each cardinal direction, that show 2D copies of the areas of the 3D environment around the player. To study its effectiveness, we conducted two different experiments, one with a car racing game, followed by a first-person shooter game. Our results show that VRCockpit has the potential to mitigate SS and still allows players to have the same level of immersion and gameplay performance.

VRCockpit is a visual technique that surrounds the player with four 2D views, one for each cardinal direction, that show 2D copies of the areas of the 3D environment around the player. Our results show that VRCockpit has the potential to mitigate SS and still allows players to have the same level of immersion and gameplay performance.
abstract_zh: 虚拟现实头戴式显示器 (VR HMD) 已成为流行的游戏平台。然而，模拟器晕动症 (SS) 仍然是 VR 更广泛采用的障碍，尤其是在游戏领域。它会引起强烈的不适并损害玩家的沉浸感、表现和乐趣。研究人员已经探索了缓解 SS 的技术。虽然这些技术已被证明有助于减少 SS，但它们可能不适用于游戏，因为它们无法轻松集成到各种类型的游戏中而不影响游戏玩法、沉浸感和性能。在这项研究中，我们引入了一种新的 SS 缓解技术 VRCockpit。 VRCockpit 是一种视觉技术，在玩家周围有四个 2D 视图，每个视图代表一个基本方向，显示玩家周围 3D 环境区域的 2D 副本。为了研究其有效性，我们进行了两项不同的实验，一项是赛车游戏，另一项是第一人称射击游戏。我们的结果表明，VRCockpit 具有缓解 SS 的潜力，并且仍然允许玩家拥有相同水平的沉浸感和游戏性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VRCockpit的新技术，用于减轻虚拟现实游戏中的模拟器眩晕。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有技术可以减轻模拟器眩晕，但这些技术难以集成到各种游戏中而不影响游戏性、沉浸感和性能。
AI.method: VRCockpit通过在玩家周围提供四个2D视图，展示3D环境周围区域的2D副本，以减轻眩晕。
AI.result: 实验表明，VRCockpit能够有效减轻模拟器眩晕，同时保持玩家的沉浸感和游戏表现。
AI.conclusion: VRCockpit是一种可行的减轻虚拟现实游戏中的模拟器眩晕的方法，且不影响游戏体验。

authors_text: Koray Kavaklı,Yuta Itoh,Hakan Urey,Kaan Akşit
title: Realistic Defocus Blur for Multiplane Computer-Generated Holography
title_zh: 多平面计算机生成全息术的逼真散焦模糊
comment: 16 pages in total, first 9 pages are for the manuscript, remaining pages are for supplementary. For more visit: https://complightlab.com/publications/realistic_defocus_cgh For our codebase visit https://github.com/complight/realistic_defocus
comments: 16 pages in total, first 9 pages are for the manuscript, remaining pages are for supplementary. For more visit: https://complightlab.com/publications/realistic_defocus_cgh For our codebase visit https://github.com/complight/realistic_defocus
abstract: This paper introduces a new multiplane CGH computation method to reconstruct artefact-free high-quality holograms with natural-looking defocus blur. Our method introduces a new targeting scheme and a new loss function. While the targeting scheme accounts for defocused parts of the scene at each depth plane, the new loss function analyzes focused and defocused parts separately in reconstructed images. Our method support phase-only CGH calculations using various iterative (e.g., Gerchberg-Saxton, Gradient Descent) and non-iterative (e.g., Double Phase) CGH techniques. We achieve our best image quality using a modified gradient descent-based optimization recipe where we introduce a constraint inspired by the double phase method. We validate our method experimentally using our proof-of-concept holographic display, comparing various algorithms, including multi-depth scenes with sparse and dense contents.
summary: This paper introduces a new multiplane CGH computation method to reconstruct artefact-free high-quality holograms with natural-looking defocus blur. Our method introduces a new targeting scheme and a new loss function. While the targeting scheme accounts for defocused parts of the scene at each depth plane, the new loss function analyzes focused and defocused parts separately in reconstructed images. Our method support phase-only CGH calculations using various iterative (e.g., Gerchberg-Saxton, Gradient Descent) and non-iterative (e.g., Double Phase) CGH techniques. We achieve our best image quality using a modified gradient descent-based optimization recipe where we introduce a constraint inspired by the double phase method. We validate our method experimentally using our proof-of-concept holographic display, comparing various algorithms, including multi-depth scenes with sparse and dense contents.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的多平面 CGH 计算方法，用于重建具有自然散焦模糊的无伪影高质量全息图。我们的方法引入了新的目标方案和新的损失函数。虽然目标方案考虑了场景在每个深度平面的散焦部分，但新的损失函数分别分析重建图像中的聚焦和散焦部分。我们的方法支持使用各种迭代（例如，Gerchberg-Saxton、梯度下降）和非迭代（例如，双相）CGH 技术的纯相位 CGH 计算。我们使用修改后的基于梯度下降的优化方法来实现最佳图像质量，其中我们引入了受双相方法启发的约束。我们使用概念验证全息显示来实验验证我们的方法，比较各种算法，包括具有稀疏和密集内容的多深度场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多平面计算全息新方法，通过引入新目标方案和损失函数，实现无伪影且具有自然失焦模糊的高质量全息重建。
AI.motivation: 现有全息重建方法在处理多深度场景时易产生伪影，且难以模拟真实失焦效果，影响图像质量与视觉自然度。
AI.method: 设计新目标方案处理各深度平面的失焦区域，并采用分离分析聚焦/失焦区域的损失函数；结合改进的梯度下降优化算法，引入双相位约束实现相位仅全息计算。
AI.result: 实验验证显示，该方法在概念验证全息显示器上优于传统算法，成功生成多深度场景（含稀疏/密集内容）的高质量全息图像，显著减少伪影并提升失焦真实性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了多平面全息重建中的失真问题，通过创新损失函数与优化策略，为自然视觉效果的全息显示提供了可行方案。

search_text: Realistic Defocus Blur for Multiplane Computer-Generated Holography 多平面计算机生成全息术的逼真散焦模糊 This paper introduces a new multiplane CGH computation method to reconstruct artefact-free high-quality holograms with natural-looking defocus blur. Our method introduces a new targeting scheme and a new loss function. While the targeting scheme accounts for defocused parts of the scene at each depth plane, the new loss function analyzes focused and defocused parts separately in reconstructed images. Our method support phase-only CGH calculations using various iterative (e.g., Gerchberg-Saxton, Gradient Descent) and non-iterative (e.g., Double Phase) CGH techniques. We achieve our best image quality using a modified gradient descent-based optimization recipe where we introduce a constraint inspired by the double phase method. We validate our method experimentally using our proof-of-concept holographic display, comparing various algorithms, including multi-depth scenes with sparse and dense contents. 本文介绍了一种新的多平面 CGH 计算方法，用于重建具有自然散焦模糊的无伪影高质量全息图。我们的方法引入了新的目标方案和新的损失函数。虽然目标方案考虑了场景在每个深度平面的散焦部分，但新的损失函数分别分析重建图像中的聚焦和散焦部分。我们的方法支持使用各种迭代（例如，Gerchberg-Saxton、梯度下降）和非迭代（例如，双相）CGH 技术的纯相位 CGH 计算。我们使用修改后的基于梯度下降的优化方法来实现最佳图像质量，其中我们引入了受双相方法启发的约束。我们使用概念验证全息显示来实验验证我们的方法，比较各种算法，包括具有稀疏和密集内容的多深度场景。 本文提出一种多平面计算全息新方法，通过引入新目标方案和损失函数，实现无伪影且具有自然失焦模糊的高质量全息重建。 Koray Kavaklı,Yuta Itoh,Hakan Urey,Kaan Akşit cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Xu Kaixin,Liu Liyang,Zhao Ziyuan,Zeng Zeng,Bharadwaj Veeravalli
title: Object-Aware Self-supervised Multi-Label Learning
title_zh: 对象感知自监督多标签学习
comment: Accepted by IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP 2022)
comments: Accepted by IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP 2022)
abstract: Multi-label Learning on Image data has been widely exploited with deep learning models. However, supervised training on deep CNN models often cannot discover sufficient discriminative features for classification. As a result, numerous self-supervision methods are proposed to learn more robust image representations. However, most self-supervised approaches focus on single-instance single-label data and fall short on more complex images with multiple objects. Therefore, we propose an Object-Aware Self-Supervision (OASS) method to obtain more fine-grained representations for multi-label learning, dynamically generating auxiliary tasks based on object locations. Secondly, the robust representation learned by OASS can be leveraged to efficiently generate Class-Specific Instances (CSI) in a proposal-free fashion to better guide multi-label supervision signal transfer to instances. Extensive experiments on the VOC2012 dataset for multi-label classification demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method against the state-of-the-art counterparts.
summary: Multi-label Learning on Image data has been widely exploited with deep learning models. However, supervised training on deep CNN models often cannot discover sufficient discriminative features for classification. As a result, numerous self-supervision methods are proposed to learn more robust image representations. However, most self-supervised approaches focus on single-instance single-label data and fall short on more complex images with multiple objects. Therefore, we propose an Object-Aware Self-Supervision (OASS) method to obtain more fine-grained representations for multi-label learning, dynamically generating auxiliary tasks based on object locations. Secondly, the robust representation learned by OASS can be leveraged to efficiently generate Class-Specific Instances (CSI) in a proposal-free fashion to better guide multi-label supervision signal transfer to instances. Extensive experiments on the VOC2012 dataset for multi-label classification demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method against the state-of-the-art counterparts.
abstract_zh: 图像数据的多标签学习已被深度学习模型广泛利用。然而，深度 CNN 模型的监督训练通常无法发现足够的分类特征。因此，人们提出了许多自监督方法来学习更鲁棒的图像表示。然而，大多数自监督方法都专注于单实例单标签数据，而无法处理具有多个对象的更复杂的图像。因此，我们提出了一种对象感知自监督（OASS）方法，以获得更细粒度的多标签学习表示，根据对象位置动态生成辅助任务。其次，可以利用 OASS 学习到的鲁棒表示以无提议的方式有效生成类特定实例（CSI），以更好地指导多标签监督信号传输到实例。在 VOC2012 数据集上进行的多标签分类的大量实验证明了所提出的方法相对于最先进的同行方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向对象的自监督多标签学习方法（OASS），通过动态生成辅助任务和类特定实例来提升多标签分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督方法多针对单标签数据，在复杂多物体图像中难以学习到足够判别性的特征，导致多标签学习效果受限。
AI.method: 设计Object-Aware Self-Supervision（OASS）方法，基于物体位置动态生成辅助任务，并利用OASS学习的鲁棒表征以无提案方式生成类特定实例（CSI）以增强监督信号传递。
AI.result: 在VOC2012数据集上的实验表明，该方法在多标签分类任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: OASS通过对象感知的自监督机制有效提升了多标签学习的表示能力，为复杂场景下的多标签分类提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种面向对象的自监督多标签学习方法（OASS），通过动态生成辅助任务和类特定实例来提升多标签分类性能。

ai_content.result: 在VOC2012数据集上的实验表明，该方法在多标签分类任务中优于现有最先进方法。

search_text: Object-Aware Self-supervised Multi-Label Learning 对象感知自监督多标签学习 Multi-label Learning on Image data has been widely exploited with deep learning models. However, supervised training on deep CNN models often cannot discover sufficient discriminative features for classification. As a result, numerous self-supervision methods are proposed to learn more robust image representations. However, most self-supervised approaches focus on single-instance single-label data and fall short on more complex images with multiple objects. Therefore, we propose an Object-Aware Self-Supervision (OASS) method to obtain more fine-grained representations for multi-label learning, dynamically generating auxiliary tasks based on object locations. Secondly, the robust representation learned by OASS can be leveraged to efficiently generate Class-Specific Instances (CSI) in a proposal-free fashion to better guide multi-label supervision signal transfer to instances. Extensive experiments on the VOC2012 dataset for multi-label classification demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method against the state-of-the-art counterparts. 图像数据的多标签学习已被深度学习模型广泛利用。然而，深度 CNN 模型的监督训练通常无法发现足够的分类特征。因此，人们提出了许多自监督方法来学习更鲁棒的图像表示。然而，大多数自监督方法都专注于单实例单标签数据，而无法处理具有多个对象的更复杂的图像。因此，我们提出了一种对象感知自监督（OASS）方法，以获得更细粒度的多标签学习表示，根据对象位置动态生成辅助任务。其次，可以利用 OASS 学习到的鲁棒表示以无提议的方式有效生成类特定实例（CSI），以更好地指导多标签监督信号传输到实例。在 VOC2012 数据集上进行的多标签分类的大量实验证明了所提出的方法相对于最先进的同行方法的有效性。 本文提出一种面向对象的自监督多标签学习方法（OASS），通过动态生成辅助任务和类特定实例来提升多标签分类性能。 Xu Kaixin,Liu Liyang,Zhao Ziyuan,Zeng Zeng,Bharadwaj Veeravalli cs.CV

authors_text: Ziyuan Zhao,Wenjing Lu,Zeng Zeng,Kaixin Xu,Bharadwaj Veeravalli,Cuntai Guan
title: Self-supervised Assisted Active Learning for Skin Lesion Segmentation
title_zh: 用于皮肤病变分割的自我监督辅助主动学习
comment: Accepted by the 44th Annual International Conference of the IEEE Engineering in Medicine and Biology Society (EMBC 2022)
comments: Accepted by the 44th Annual International Conference of the IEEE Engineering in Medicine and Biology Society (EMBC 2022)
abstract: Label scarcity has been a long-standing issue for biomedical image segmentation, due to high annotation costs and professional requirements. Recently, active learning (AL) strategies strive to reduce annotation costs by querying a small portion of data for annotation, receiving much traction in the field of medical imaging. However, most of the existing AL methods have to initialize models with some randomly selected samples followed by active selection based on various criteria, such as uncertainty and diversity. Such random-start initialization methods inevitably introduce under-value redundant samples and unnecessary annotation costs. For the purpose of addressing the issue, we propose a novel self-supervised assisted active learning framework in the cold-start setting, in which the segmentation model is first warmed up with self-supervised learning (SSL), and then SSL features are used for sample selection via latent feature clustering without accessing labels. We assess our proposed methodology on skin lesions segmentation task. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach is capable of achieving promising performance with substantial improvements over existing baselines.
summary: Label scarcity has been a long-standing issue for biomedical image segmentation, due to high annotation costs and professional requirements. Recently, active learning (AL) strategies strive to reduce annotation costs by querying a small portion of data for annotation, receiving much traction in the field of medical imaging. However, most of the existing AL methods have to initialize models with some randomly selected samples followed by active selection based on various criteria, such as uncertainty and diversity. Such random-start initialization methods inevitably introduce under-value redundant samples and unnecessary annotation costs. For the purpose of addressing the issue, we propose a novel self-supervised assisted active learning framework in the cold-start setting, in which the segmentation model is first warmed up with self-supervised learning (SSL), and then SSL features are used for sample selection via latent feature clustering without accessing labels. We assess our proposed methodology on skin lesions segmentation task. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach is capable of achieving promising performance with substantial improvements over existing baselines.
abstract_zh: 由于标注成本高和专业要求高，标签稀缺一直是生物医学图像分割中长期存在的问题。最近，主动学习（AL）策略致力于通过查询一小部分数据进行注释来降低注释成本，在医学成像领域受到广泛关注。然而，大多数现有的 AL 方法必须使用一些随机选择的样本来初始化模型，然后根据各种标准（例如不确定性和多样性）进行主动选择。这种随机启动初始化方法不可避免地会引入低值冗余样本和不必要的注释成本。为了解决这个问题，我们在冷启动环境中提出了一种新颖的自监督辅助主动学习框架，其中首先通过自监督学习（SSL）对分割模型进行预热，然后通过潜在特征聚类使用 SSL 特征进行样本选择，而无需访问标签。我们评估了我们提出的皮肤病变分割任务方法。大量的实验表明，我们的方法能够实现有希望的性能，并在现有基线的基础上进行实质性改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督辅助主动学习框架，用于解决皮肤病变分割中的标签稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 现有主动学习方法依赖随机初始化导致冗余样本和高标注成本，需更高效的冷启动策略。
AI.method: 框架分两阶段：首先用自监督学习预热分割模型，再基于SSL特征进行无标签样本聚类选择。
AI.result: 在皮肤病变分割任务中显著优于现有基线方法，验证了自监督辅助策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自监督预热降低标注依赖，为医学图像分割提供高效主动学习新思路。

authors_text: Yihao Liu,Hengyuan Zhao,Jinjin Gu,Yu Qiao,Chao Dong
title: Evaluating the Generalization Ability of Super-Resolution Networks
title_zh: 评估超分辨率网络的泛化能力
comment: Accepted by TPAMI
comments: Accepted by TPAMI
abstract: Performance and generalization ability are two important aspects to evaluate the deep learning models. However, research on the generalization ability of Super-Resolution (SR) networks is currently absent. Assessing the generalization ability of deep models not only helps us to understand their intrinsic mechanisms, but also allows us to quantitatively measure their applicability boundaries, which is important for unrestricted real-world applications. To this end, we make the first attempt to propose a Generalization Assessment Index for SR networks, namely SRGA. SRGA exploits the statistical characteristics of the internal features of deep networks to measure the generalization ability. Specially, it is a non-parametric and non-learning metric. To better validate our method, we collect a patch-based image evaluation set (PIES) that includes both synthetic and real-world images, covering a wide range of degradations. With SRGA and PIES dataset, we benchmark existing SR models on the generalization ability. This work provides insights and tools for future research on model generalization in low-level vision.
summary: Performance and generalization ability are two important aspects to evaluate the deep learning models. However, research on the generalization ability of Super-Resolution (SR) networks is currently absent. Assessing the generalization ability of deep models not only helps us to understand their intrinsic mechanisms, but also allows us to quantitatively measure their applicability boundaries, which is important for unrestricted real-world applications. To this end, we make the first attempt to propose a Generalization Assessment Index for SR networks, namely SRGA. SRGA exploits the statistical characteristics of the internal features of deep networks to measure the generalization ability. Specially, it is a non-parametric and non-learning metric. To better validate our method, we collect a patch-based image evaluation set (PIES) that includes both synthetic and real-world images, covering a wide range of degradations. With SRGA and PIES dataset, we benchmark existing SR models on the generalization ability. This work provides insights and tools for future research on model generalization in low-level vision.
abstract_zh: 性能和泛化能力是评价深度学习模型的两个重要方面。然而，目前缺乏对超分辨率（SR）网络泛化能力的研究。评估深度模型的泛化能力不仅有助于我们理解其内在机制，而且还使我们能够定量测量其适用范围，这对于不受限制的现实世界应用非常重要。为此，我们首次尝试提出SR网络的泛化评估指数，即SRGA。 SRGA利用深度网络内部特征的统计特性来衡量泛化能力。特别地，它是一种非参数和非学习指标。为了更好地验证我们的方法，我们收集了基于补丁的图像评估集（PIES），其中包括合成图像和真实图像，涵盖了广泛的退化。通过 SRGA 和 PIES 数据集，我们对现有 SR 模型的泛化能力进行了基准测试。这项工作为未来低级视觉模型泛化的研究提供了见解和工具。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估超分辨率网络的泛化能力，提出了一种新的评估指标SRGA和对应的PIES数据集。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏对超分辨率网络泛化能力的系统研究，而泛化能力的评估对理解模型机制及实际应用至关重要。
AI.method: 提出非参数非学习的SRGA指标，基于网络内部特征的统计特性；构建包含合成与真实退化图像的PIES数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 通过SRGA和PIES数据集对现有SR模型进行泛化能力基准测试，揭示了模型在不同退化场景下的适用边界。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为低层次视觉领域模型泛化能力的分析提供了新工具和理论依据，推动了实际应用中的模型可靠性评估。

authors_text: Daqi Liu,Miroslaw Bober,Josef Kittler
title: Importance Weighted Structure Learning for Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: 用于场景图生成的重要性加权结构学习
abstract: Scene graph generation is a structured prediction task aiming to explicitly model objects and their relationships via constructing a visually-grounded scene graph for an input image. Currently, the message passing neural network based mean field variational Bayesian methodology is the ubiquitous solution for such a task, in which the variational inference objective is often assumed to be the classical evidence lower bound. However, the variational approximation inferred from such loose objective generally underestimates the underlying posterior, which often leads to inferior generation performance. In this paper, we propose a novel importance weighted structure learning method aiming to approximate the underlying log-partition function with a tighter importance weighted lower bound, which is computed from multiple samples drawn from a reparameterizable Gumbel-Softmax sampler. A generic entropic mirror descent algorithm is applied to solve the resulting constrained variational inference task. The proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on various popular scene graph generation benchmarks.
summary: Scene graph generation is a structured prediction task aiming to explicitly model objects and their relationships via constructing a visually-grounded scene graph for an input image. Currently, the message passing neural network based mean field variational Bayesian methodology is the ubiquitous solution for such a task, in which the variational inference objective is often assumed to be the classical evidence lower bound. However, the variational approximation inferred from such loose objective generally underestimates the underlying posterior, which often leads to inferior generation performance. In this paper, we propose a novel importance weighted structure learning method aiming to approximate the underlying log-partition function with a tighter importance weighted lower bound, which is computed from multiple samples drawn from a reparameterizable Gumbel-Softmax sampler. A generic entropic mirror descent algorithm is applied to solve the resulting constrained variational inference task. The proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on various popular scene graph generation benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 场景图生成是一种结构化预测任务，旨在通过为输入图像构建基于视觉的场景图来显式建模对象及其关系。目前，基于平均场变分贝叶斯方法的消息传递神经网络是此类任务的普遍解决方案，其中变分推理目标通常被假设为经典证据下界。然而，从这种松散的目标推断出的变分近似通常会低估潜在的后验，这通常会导致生成性能较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的重要性加权结构学习方法，旨在以更严格的重要性加权下界来近似底层对数划分函数，该下界是根据从可重新参数化的 Gumbel-Softmax 采样器中抽取的多个样本计算得出的。应用通用熵镜下降算法来解决由此产生的约束变分推理任务。所提出的方法在各种流行的场景图生成基准上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种重要性加权结构学习方法，以提升场景图生成的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有变分推断方法因使用宽松的证据下界目标，导致后验近似不足，生成效果受限。
AI.method: 通过多样本Gumbel-Softmax采样计算更紧的加权下界，并应用熵镜像下降算法进行优化。
AI.result: 在多个场景图生成基准测试中取得最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 重要性加权方法有效提升了场景图生成的结构学习质量。

search_text: Importance Weighted Structure Learning for Scene Graph Generation 用于场景图生成的重要性加权结构学习 Scene graph generation is a structured prediction task aiming to explicitly model objects and their relationships via constructing a visually-grounded scene graph for an input image. Currently, the message passing neural network based mean field variational Bayesian methodology is the ubiquitous solution for such a task, in which the variational inference objective is often assumed to be the classical evidence lower bound. However, the variational approximation inferred from such loose objective generally underestimates the underlying posterior, which often leads to inferior generation performance. In this paper, we propose a novel importance weighted structure learning method aiming to approximate the underlying log-partition function with a tighter importance weighted lower bound, which is computed from multiple samples drawn from a reparameterizable Gumbel-Softmax sampler. A generic entropic mirror descent algorithm is applied to solve the resulting constrained variational inference task. The proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on various popular scene graph generation benchmarks. 场景图生成是一种结构化预测任务，旨在通过为输入图像构建基于视觉的场景图来显式建模对象及其关系。目前，基于平均场变分贝叶斯方法的消息传递神经网络是此类任务的普遍解决方案，其中变分推理目标通常被假设为经典证据下界。然而，从这种松散的目标推断出的变分近似通常会低估潜在的后验，这通常会导致生成性能较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的重要性加权结构学习方法，旨在以更严格的重要性加权下界来近似底层对数划分函数，该下界是根据从可重新参数化的 Gumbel-Softmax 采样器中抽取的多个样本计算得出的。应用通用熵镜下降算法来解决由此产生的约束变分推理任务。所提出的方法在各种流行的场景图生成基准上实现了最先进的性能。 提出一种重要性加权结构学习方法，以提升场景图生成的性能。 Daqi Liu,Miroslaw Bober,Josef Kittler cs.CV

authors_text: Ryan Sullivan,J. K. Terry,Benjamin Black,John P. Dickerson
title: Cliff Diving: Exploring Reward Surfaces in Reinforcement Learning Environments
title_zh: 悬崖跳水：探索强化学习环境中的奖励表面
comment: Accepted at ICML 2022 Camera-Ready Version
comments: Accepted at ICML 2022 Camera-Ready Version
abstract: Visualizing optimization landscapes has led to many fundamental insights in numeric optimization, and novel improvements to optimization techniques. However, visualizations of the objective that reinforcement learning optimizes (the "reward surface") have only ever been generated for a small number of narrow contexts. This work presents reward surfaces and related visualizations of 27 of the most widely used reinforcement learning environments in Gym for the first time. We also explore reward surfaces in the policy gradient direction and show for the first time that many popular reinforcement learning environments have frequent "cliffs" (sudden large drops in expected return). We demonstrate that A2C often "dives off" these cliffs into low reward regions of the parameter space while PPO avoids them, confirming a popular intuition for PPO's improved performance over previous methods. We additionally introduce a highly extensible library that allows researchers to easily generate these visualizations in the future. Our findings provide new intuition to explain the successes and failures of modern RL methods, and our visualizations concretely characterize several failure modes of reinforcement learning agents in novel ways.
summary: Visualizing optimization landscapes has led to many fundamental insights in numeric optimization, and novel improvements to optimization techniques. However, visualizations of the objective that reinforcement learning optimizes (the "reward surface") have only ever been generated for a small number of narrow contexts. This work presents reward surfaces and related visualizations of 27 of the most widely used reinforcement learning environments in Gym for the first time. We also explore reward surfaces in the policy gradient direction and show for the first time that many popular reinforcement learning environments have frequent "cliffs" (sudden large drops in expected return). We demonstrate that A2C often "dives off" these cliffs into low reward regions of the parameter space while PPO avoids them, confirming a popular intuition for PPO's improved performance over previous methods. We additionally introduce a highly extensible library that allows researchers to easily generate these visualizations in the future. Our findings provide new intuition to explain the successes and failures of modern RL methods, and our visualizations concretely characterize several failure modes of reinforcement learning agents in novel ways.
abstract_zh: 可视化优化景观带来了数值优化方面的许多基本见解，以及优化技术的新颖改进。然而，强化学习优化的目标（“奖励表面”）的可视化仅在少数狭窄的上下文中生成。这项工作首次展示了 Gym 中 27 个最广泛使用的强化学习环境的奖励表面和相关可视化。我们还探索了策略梯度方向的奖励表面，并首次表明许多流行的强化学习环境经常出现“悬崖”（预期回报突然大幅下降）。我们证明，A2C 经常“跳出”这些悬崖，进入参数空间的低奖励区域，而 PPO 则避免它们，这证实了人们普遍的直觉，即 PPO 比以前的方法性能有所提高。我们还引入了一个高度可扩展的库，使研究人员能够在未来轻松生成这些可视化。我们的研究结果提供了新的直觉来解释现代强化学习方法的成功和失败，并且我们的可视化以新颖的方式具体描述了强化学习代理的几种失败模式。

AI.tldr: 本文首次为Gym中27个常用强化学习环境生成奖励表面可视化，揭示算法在参数空间中的行为差异，并开发可视化工具库。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对强化学习优化目标（奖励表面）的系统可视化，限制了对算法行为模式和失败原因的理解。
AI.method: 通过生成奖励表面可视化、分析策略梯度方向的优化路径，并对比A2C与PPO算法在悬崖区域的表现差异，开发可扩展的可视化工具库。
AI.result: 发现多个环境存在预期回报的突然下降（悬崖），A2C易陷入低回报区域而PPO能有效规避，验证了PPO的性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 可视化分析为理解现代RL方法的成功与失败提供了新视角，揭示了算法在参数空间中的典型失效模式。

ai_content.tldr: 本文首次为Gym中27个常用强化学习环境生成奖励表面可视化，揭示算法在参数空间中的行为差异，并开发可视化工具库。

authors_text: Violeta Menéndez González,Andrew Gilbert,Graeme Phillipson,Stephen Jolly,Simon Hadfield
title: SaiNet: Stereo aware inpainting behind objects with generative networks
title_zh: SaiNet：使用生成网络在物体后面进行立体感知修复
comment: Presented at AI4CC workshop at CVPR
comments: Presented at AI4CC workshop at CVPR
abstract: In this work, we present an end-to-end network for stereo-consistent image inpainting with the objective of inpainting large missing regions behind objects. The proposed model consists of an edge-guided UNet-like network using Partial Convolutions. We enforce multi-view stereo consistency by introducing a disparity loss. More importantly, we develop a training scheme where the model is learned from realistic stereo masks representing object occlusions, instead of the more common random masks. The technique is trained in a supervised way. Our evaluation shows competitive results compared to previous state-of-the-art techniques.
summary: In this work, we present an end-to-end network for stereo-consistent image inpainting with the objective of inpainting large missing regions behind objects. The proposed model consists of an edge-guided UNet-like network using Partial Convolutions. We enforce multi-view stereo consistency by introducing a disparity loss. More importantly, we develop a training scheme where the model is learned from realistic stereo masks representing object occlusions, instead of the more common random masks. The technique is trained in a supervised way. Our evaluation shows competitive results compared to previous state-of-the-art techniques.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于立体一致图像修复的端到端网络，其目标是修复对象后面的大缺失区域。所提出的模型由使用部分卷积的边缘引导类 UNet 网络组成。我们通过引入视差损失来强制多视图立体一致性。更重要的是，我们开发了一种训练方案，其中模型是从代表对象遮挡的真实立体掩模而不是更常见的随机掩模中学习的。该技术以监督方式进行训练。与之前最先进的技术相比，我们的评估显示出具有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的立体感知图像修复网络SaiNet，旨在修复物体后方的大面积缺失区域并保持立体一致性。
AI.motivation: 传统图像修复方法使用随机掩码训练，难以模拟真实场景中的物体遮挡，导致修复结果缺乏立体一致性。
AI.method: 基于边缘引导的UNet-like网络和部分卷积，引入视差损失约束多视图立体一致性，并采用真实立体掩码进行监督训练。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，SaiNet的修复效果与现有最先进方法相比具有竞争力，尤其在立体一致性方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过真实掩码训练和视差损失约束，SaiNet有效提升了立体场景下物体后方区域的修复质量，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Nasser Ghadiri,Rasoul Samani,Fahime Shahrokh
title: Integration of Text and Graph-based Features for Detecting Mental Health Disorders from Voice
title_zh: 集成文本和基于图形的特征​​，用于从语音中检测心理健康障碍
abstract: With the availability of voice-enabled devices such as smart phones, mental health disorders could be detected and treated earlier, particularly post-pandemic. The current methods involve extracting features directly from audio signals. In this paper, two methods are used to enrich voice analysis for depression detection: graph transformation of voice signals, and natural language processing of the transcript based on representational learning, fused together to produce final class labels. The results of experiments with the DAIC-WOZ dataset suggest that integration of text-based voice classification and learning from low level and graph-based voice signal features can improve the detection of mental disorders like depression.
summary: With the availability of voice-enabled devices such as smart phones, mental health disorders could be detected and treated earlier, particularly post-pandemic. The current methods involve extracting features directly from audio signals. In this paper, two methods are used to enrich voice analysis for depression detection: graph transformation of voice signals, and natural language processing of the transcript based on representational learning, fused together to produce final class labels. The results of experiments with the DAIC-WOZ dataset suggest that integration of text-based voice classification and learning from low level and graph-based voice signal features can improve the detection of mental disorders like depression.
abstract_zh: 随着智能手机等支持语音的设备的出现，可以更早地发现和治疗精神健康障碍，特别是在大流行后。当前的方法涉及直接从音频信号中提取特征。在本文中，使用两种方法来丰富抑郁症检测的语音分析：语音信号的图形转换和基于表征学习的文本自然语言处理，两者融合在一起以产生最终的类别标签。 DAIC-WOZ 数据集的实验结果表明，基于文本的语音分类与低级和基于图形的语音信号特征学习的集成可以改善对抑郁症等精神疾病的检测。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过整合文本和图基特征，提升基于语音的心理健康障碍（如抑郁症）检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖音频信号特征，难以全面捕捉语音中的复杂模式，需结合文本与图结构信息以提高检测准确性，并满足疫情后早期干预的需求。
AI.method: 方法包括将语音信号转换为图结构以捕捉时序依赖关系，同时利用自然语言处理技术对转录文本进行表示学习，最终通过融合两种特征进行分类。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，结合文本分类与图基及低级语音特征的方法显著提升了抑郁症检测的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 整合文本与图基特征能有效提升心理健康障碍检测性能，为基于语音的自动化评估提供新思路。

authors_text: Jinke Li,Xiao He,Yang Wen,Yuan Gao,Xiaoqiang Cheng,Dan Zhang
title: Panoptic-PHNet: Towards Real-Time and High-Precision LiDAR Panoptic Segmentation via Clustering Pseudo Heatmap
title_zh: Panoptic-PHNet：通过聚类伪热图实现实时高精度 LiDAR 全景分割
abstract: As a rising task, panoptic segmentation is faced with challenges in both semantic segmentation and instance segmentation. However, in terms of speed and accuracy, existing LiDAR methods in the field are still limited. In this paper, we propose a fast and high-performance LiDAR-based framework, referred to as Panoptic-PHNet, with three attractive aspects: 1) We introduce a clustering pseudo heatmap as a new paradigm, which, followed by a center grouping module, yields instance centers for efficient clustering without object-level learning tasks. 2) A knn-transformer module is proposed to model the interaction among foreground points for accurate offset regression. 3) For backbone design, we fuse the fine-grained voxel features and the 2D Bird's Eye View (BEV) features with different receptive fields to utilize both detailed and global information. Extensive experiments on both SemanticKITTI dataset and nuScenes dataset show that our Panoptic-PHNet surpasses state-of-the-art methods by remarkable margins with a real-time speed. We achieve the 1st place on the public leaderboard of SemanticKITTI and leading performance on the recently released leaderboard of nuScenes.
summary: As a rising task, panoptic segmentation is faced with challenges in both semantic segmentation and instance segmentation. However, in terms of speed and accuracy, existing LiDAR methods in the field are still limited. In this paper, we propose a fast and high-performance LiDAR-based framework, referred to as Panoptic-PHNet, with three attractive aspects: 1) We introduce a clustering pseudo heatmap as a new paradigm, which, followed by a center grouping module, yields instance centers for efficient clustering without object-level learning tasks. 2) A knn-transformer module is proposed to model the interaction among foreground points for accurate offset regression. 3) For backbone design, we fuse the fine-grained voxel features and the 2D Bird's Eye View (BEV) features with different receptive fields to utilize both detailed and global information. Extensive experiments on both SemanticKITTI dataset and nuScenes dataset show that our Panoptic-PHNet surpasses state-of-the-art methods by remarkable margins with a real-time speed. We achieve the 1st place on the public leaderboard of SemanticKITTI and leading performance on the recently released leaderboard of nuScenes.
abstract_zh: 作为一项新兴任务，全景分割在语义分割和实例分割方面都面临着挑战。然而，在速度和精度方面，该领域现有的激光雷达方法仍然有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 LiDAR 的快速高性能框架，称为 Panoptic-PHNet，具有三个吸引人的方面：1）我们引入了聚类伪热图作为新范例，随后是中心分组模块，产生实例中心，无需对象级学习任务即可进行高效聚类。 2）提出了一个knn-transformer模块来模拟前景点之间的相互作用，以实现精确的偏移回归。 3）对于主干设计，我们将细粒度体素特征和具有不同感受野的二维鸟瞰图（BEV）特征融合在一起，以利用详细信息和全局信息。对 SemanticKITTI 数据集和 nuScenes 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的 Panoptic-PHNet 在实时速度上以显着的优势超越了最先进的方法。我们在 SemanticKITTI 公共排行榜上获得第一名，并在最近发布的 nuScenes 排行榜上表现领先。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于激光雷达的实时高精度全景分割框架Panoptic-PHNet，解决现有方法在速度和精度上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有激光雷达全景分割方法在速度和精度方面存在局限，难以同时满足实时性和高精度需求。
AI.method: 通过引入聚类伪热图与中心分组模块实现高效实例聚类，结合knn-transformer模块优化前景点交互，并融合体素特征与BEV特征以获取局部与全局信息。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes数据集上显著超越现有方法，SemanticKITTI公开榜单排名第一，nuScenes榜单性能领先。
AI.conclusion: Panoptic-PHNet通过创新模块设计与特征融合策略，有效解决了激光雷达全景分割的实时性与精度矛盾，取得了领先性能。

authors_text: Rajarshi Roy,Jonathan Raiman,Neel Kant,Ilyas Elkin,Robert Kirby,Michael Siu,Stuart Oberman,Saad Godil,Bryan Catanzaro
title: PrefixRL: Optimization of Parallel Prefix Circuits using Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: PrefixRL：使用深度强化学习优化并行前缀电路
comment: Copyright 2021 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works
abstract: In this work, we present a reinforcement learning (RL) based approach to designing parallel prefix circuits such as adders or priority encoders that are fundamental to high-performance digital design. Unlike prior methods, our approach designs solutions tabula rasa purely through learning with synthesis in the loop. We design a grid-based state-action representation and an RL environment for constructing legal prefix circuits. Deep Convolutional RL agents trained on this environment produce prefix adder circuits that Pareto-dominate existing baselines with up to 16.0% and 30.2% lower area for the same delay in the 32b and 64b settings respectively. We observe that agents trained with open-source synthesis tools and cell library can design adder circuits that achieve lower area and delay than commercial tool adders in an industrial cell library.
summary: In this work, we present a reinforcement learning (RL) based approach to designing parallel prefix circuits such as adders or priority encoders that are fundamental to high-performance digital design. Unlike prior methods, our approach designs solutions tabula rasa purely through learning with synthesis in the loop. We design a grid-based state-action representation and an RL environment for constructing legal prefix circuits. Deep Convolutional RL agents trained on this environment produce prefix adder circuits that Pareto-dominate existing baselines with up to 16.0% and 30.2% lower area for the same delay in the 32b and 64b settings respectively. We observe that agents trained with open-source synthesis tools and cell library can design adder circuits that achieve lower area and delay than commercial tool adders in an industrial cell library.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）的方法来设计并行前缀电路，例如加法器或优先级编码器，这是高性能数字设计的基础。与之前的方法不同，我们的方法纯粹通过循环中的学习和综合来设计白板解决方案。我们设计了一个基于网格的状态动作表示和一个用于构建合法前缀电路的强化学习环境。在此环境中训练的深度卷积 RL 代理会生成前缀加法器电路，该电路在 32b 和 64b 设置中的相同延迟下分别降低了 16.0% 和 30.2% 的面积，从而在现有基线上占据帕累托主导地位。我们观察到，使用开源综合工具和单元库训练的代理可以设计出比工业单元库中的商业工具加法器更低的面积和延迟的加法器电路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的方法，用于优化并行前缀电路（如加法器）的设计。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在设计并行前缀电路时存在效率与性能局限，需探索新型自动化设计方法以提升电路面积与延迟指标。
AI.method: 构建基于网格的状态-动作表示及强化学习环境，训练深度卷积RL智能体进行电路结构生成与优化。
AI.result: 在32位和64位设置中，生成的加法器电路面积分别降低16.0%和30.2%，且延迟表现优于商业工具设计的电路。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习能有效优化并行前缀电路设计，在工业级单元库中展现优于传统工具的性能优势。

method: 构建基于网格的状态-动作表示及强化学习环境，训练深度卷积RL智能体进行电路结构生成与优化。
result: 在32位和64位设置中，生成的加法器电路面积分别降低16.0%和30.2%，且延迟表现优于商业工具设计的电路。
conclusion: 深度强化学习能有效优化并行前缀电路设计，在工业级单元库中展现优于传统工具的性能优势。
search_text: PrefixRL: Optimization of Parallel Prefix Circuits using Deep Reinforcement Learning PrefixRL：使用深度强化学习优化并行前缀电路 In this work, we present a reinforcement learning (RL) based approach to designing parallel prefix circuits such as adders or priority encoders that are fundamental to high-performance digital design. Unlike prior methods, our approach designs solutions tabula rasa purely through learning with synthesis in the loop. We design a grid-based state-action representation and an RL environment for constructing legal prefix circuits. Deep Convolutional RL agents trained on this environment produce prefix adder circuits that Pareto-dominate existing baselines with up to 16.0% and 30.2% lower area for the same delay in the 32b and 64b settings respectively. We observe that agents trained with open-source synthesis tools and cell library can design adder circuits that achieve lower area and delay than commercial tool adders in an industrial cell library. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）的方法来设计并行前缀电路，例如加法器或优先级编码器，这是高性能数字设计的基础。与之前的方法不同，我们的方法纯粹通过循环中的学习和综合来设计白板解决方案。我们设计了一个基于网格的状态动作表示和一个用于构建合法前缀电路的强化学习环境。在此环境中训练的深度卷积 RL 代理会生成前缀加法器电路，该电路在 32b 和 64b 设置中的相同延迟下分别降低了 16.0% 和 30.2% 的面积，从而在现有基线上占据帕累托主导地位。我们观察到，使用开源综合工具和单元库训练的代理可以设计出比工业单元库中的商业工具加法器更低的面积和延迟的加法器电路。 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的方法，用于优化并行前缀电路（如加法器）的设计。 Rajarshi Roy,Jonathan Raiman,Neel Kant,Ilyas Elkin,Robert Kirby,Michael Siu,Stuart Oberman,Saad Godil,Bryan Catanzaro cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.AR

authors_text: Chae Eun Lee,Hyelim Park,Yeong-Gil Shin,Minyoung Chung
title: Voxel-wise Adversarial Semi-supervised Learning for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于医学图像分割的体素对抗半监督学习
abstract: Semi-supervised learning for medical image segmentation is an important area of research for alleviating the huge cost associated with the construction of reliable large-scale annotations in the medical domain. Recent semi-supervised approaches have demonstrated promising results by employing consistency regularization, pseudo-labeling techniques, and adversarial learning. These methods primarily attempt to learn the distribution of labeled and unlabeled data by enforcing consistency in the predictions or embedding context. However, previous approaches have focused only on local discrepancy minimization or context relations across single classes. In this paper, we introduce a novel adversarial learning-based semi-supervised segmentation method that effectively embeds both local and global features from multiple hidden layers and learns context relations between multiple classes. Our voxel-wise adversarial learning method utilizes a voxel-wise feature discriminator, which considers multilayer voxel-wise features (involving both local and global features) as an input by embedding class-specific voxel-wise feature distribution. Furthermore, we improve our previous representation learning method by overcoming information loss and learning stability problems, which enables rich representations of labeled data. Our method outperforms current best-performing state-of-the-art semi-supervised learning approaches on the image segmentation of the left atrium (single class) and multiorgan datasets (multiclass). Moreover, our visual interpretation of the feature space demonstrates that our proposed method enables a well-distributed and separated feature space from both labeled and unlabeled data, which improves the overall prediction results.
summary: Semi-supervised learning for medical image segmentation is an important area of research for alleviating the huge cost associated with the construction of reliable large-scale annotations in the medical domain. Recent semi-supervised approaches have demonstrated promising results by employing consistency regularization, pseudo-labeling techniques, and adversarial learning. These methods primarily attempt to learn the distribution of labeled and unlabeled data by enforcing consistency in the predictions or embedding context. However, previous approaches have focused only on local discrepancy minimization or context relations across single classes. In this paper, we introduce a novel adversarial learning-based semi-supervised segmentation method that effectively embeds both local and global features from multiple hidden layers and learns context relations between multiple classes. Our voxel-wise adversarial learning method utilizes a voxel-wise feature discriminator, which considers multilayer voxel-wise features (involving both local and global features) as an input by embedding class-specific voxel-wise feature distribution. Furthermore, we improve our previous representation learning method by overcoming information loss and learning stability problems, which enables rich representations of labeled data. Our method outperforms current best-performing state-of-the-art semi-supervised learning approaches on the image segmentation of the left atrium (single class) and multiorgan datasets (multiclass). Moreover, our visual interpretation of the feature space demonstrates that our proposed method enables a well-distributed and separated feature space from both labeled and unlabeled data, which improves the overall prediction results.
abstract_zh: 用于医学图像分割的半监督学习是减轻与在医学领域构建可靠的大规模注释相关的巨大成本的一个重要研究领域。最近的半监督方法通过采用一致性正则化、伪标记技术和对抗性学习已经证明了有希望的结果。这些方法主要尝试通过强制预测或嵌入上下文的一致性来学习标记和未标记数据的分布。然而，以前的方法只关注局部差异最小化或单个类之间的上下文关系。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的基于对抗性学习的半监督分割方法，该方法有效地嵌入来自多个隐藏层的局部和全局特征，并学习多个类之间的上下文关系。我们的体素对抗学习方法利用体素特征鉴别器，该鉴别器通过嵌入特定于类的体素特征分布将多层体素特征（涉及局部和全局特征）作为输入。此外，我们通过克服信息丢失和学习稳定性问题改进了之前的表示学习方法，从而实现了标记数据的丰富表示。我们的方法在左心房（单类）和多器官数据集（多类）的图像分割方面优于当前表现最好的最先进的半监督学习方法。此外，我们对特征空间的视觉解释表明，我们提出的方法能够从标记和未标记的数据中获得分布良好且分离的特征空间，从而改善整体预测结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于体素级对抗学习的半监督医学图像分割方法，通过结合局部和全局特征提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割中高质量标注数据成本高昂，现有半监督方法在局部差异最小化或单类上下文关系建模上存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计体素级特征判别器，融合多层特征（包含局部与全局信息）并建模多类间上下文关系，改进表征学习以减少信息损失。
AI.result: 在左心房单类和多器官多类数据集上优于现有最佳半监督方法，可视化显示标签与未标签数据特征空间分布更清晰分离。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效利用未标注数据的全局-局部特征关联，显著提升了医学图像分割的准确性和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Zhaoxi Zhang,Leo Yu Zhang,Xufei Zheng,Bilal Hussain Abbasi,Shengshan Hu
title: Evaluating Membership Inference Through Adversarial Robustness
title_zh: 通过对抗鲁棒性评估成员资格推断
comment: Accepted by The Computer Journal. Pre-print version
comments: Accepted by The Computer Journal. Pre-print version
abstract: The usage of deep learning is being escalated in many applications. Due to its outstanding performance, it is being used in a variety of security and privacy-sensitive areas in addition to conventional applications. One of the key aspects of deep learning efficacy is to have abundant data. This trait leads to the usage of data which can be highly sensitive and private, which in turn causes wariness with regard to deep learning in the general public. Membership inference attacks are considered lethal as they can be used to figure out whether a piece of data belongs to the training dataset or not. This can be problematic with regards to leakage of training data information and its characteristics. To highlight the significance of these types of attacks, we propose an enhanced methodology for membership inference attacks based on adversarial robustness, by adjusting the directions of adversarial perturbations through label smoothing under a white-box setting. We evaluate our proposed method on three datasets: Fashion-MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100. Our experimental results reveal that the performance of our method surpasses that of the existing adversarial robustness-based method when attacking normally trained models. Additionally, through comparing our technique with the state-of-the-art metric-based membership inference methods, our proposed method also shows better performance when attacking adversarially trained models. The code for reproducing the results of this work is available at \url{https://github.com/plll4zzx/Evaluating-Membership-Inference-Through-Adversarial-Robustness}.
summary: The usage of deep learning is being escalated in many applications. Due to its outstanding performance, it is being used in a variety of security and privacy-sensitive areas in addition to conventional applications. One of the key aspects of deep learning efficacy is to have abundant data. This trait leads to the usage of data which can be highly sensitive and private, which in turn causes wariness with regard to deep learning in the general public. Membership inference attacks are considered lethal as they can be used to figure out whether a piece of data belongs to the training dataset or not. This can be problematic with regards to leakage of training data information and its characteristics. To highlight the significance of these types of attacks, we propose an enhanced methodology for membership inference attacks based on adversarial robustness, by adjusting the directions of adversarial perturbations through label smoothing under a white-box setting. We evaluate our proposed method on three datasets: Fashion-MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100. Our experimental results reveal that the performance of our method surpasses that of the existing adversarial robustness-based method when attacking normally trained models. Additionally, through comparing our technique with the state-of-the-art metric-based membership inference methods, our proposed method also shows better performance when attacking adversarially trained models. The code for reproducing the results of this work is available at \url{https://github.com/plll4zzx/Evaluating-Membership-Inference-Through-Adversarial-Robustness}.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在许多应用中的使用正在不断升级。由于其出色的性能，除了传统应用之外，它还被用于各种安全和隐私敏感领域。深度学习功效的关键之一是拥有丰富的数据。这一特征导致数据的使用可能高度敏感和私密，进而引起公众对深度学习的警惕。成员推理攻击被认为是致命的，因为它们可用于确定一段数据是否属于训练数据集。这可能会导致训练数据信息及其特征的泄漏。为了强调这些类型攻击的重要性，我们提出了一种基于对抗鲁棒性的成员推理攻击的增强方法，通过在白盒设置下进行标签平滑来调整对抗扰动的方向。我们在三个数据集上评估我们提出的方法：Fashion-MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100。我们的实验结果表明，在攻击正常训练的模型时，我们的方法的性能超过了现有的基于对抗性鲁棒性的方法。此外，通过将我们的技术与最先进的基于度量的隶属推理方法进行比较，我们提出的方法在攻击对抗性训练的模型时也表现出更好的性能。用于重现这项工作结果的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/plll4zzx/Evaluating-Membership-Inference-Through-Adversarial-Robustness} 处找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对抗鲁棒性的增强型成员推理攻击方法，通过调整对抗扰动方向提升攻击效果。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在隐私敏感领域广泛应用，但成员推理攻击可能泄露训练数据信息，现有对抗鲁棒性方法在攻击对抗训练模型时效果有限。
AI.method: 在白盒设置下通过标签平滑调整对抗扰动方向，结合对抗鲁棒性进行成员推理攻击，并在Fashion-MNIST、CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100数据集上验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在攻击正常训练模型时优于现有对抗鲁棒性方法，在攻击对抗训练模型时也优于最先进的度量基方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于对抗扰动方向调整的成员推理方法有效，尤其在对抗训练模型场景下表现突出，代码已开源。

The code for reproducing the results of this work is available at \url{https://github.com/plll4zzx/Evaluating-Membership-Inference-Through-Adversarial-Robustness}. 深度学习在许多应用中的使用正在不断升级。由于其出色的性能，除了传统应用之外，它还被用于各种安全和隐私敏感领域。深度学习功效的关键之一是拥有丰富的数据。这一特征导致数据的使用可能高度敏感和私密，进而引起公众对深度学习的警惕。成员推理攻击被认为是致命的，因为它们可用于确定一段数据是否属于训练数据集。这可能会导致训练数据信息及其特征的泄漏。为了强调这些类型攻击的重要性，我们提出了一种基于对抗鲁棒性的成员推理攻击的增强方法，通过在白盒设置下进行标签平滑来调整对抗扰动的方向。我们在三个数据集上评估我们提出的方法：Fashion-MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100。我们的实验结果表明，在攻击正常训练的模型时，我们的方法的性能超过了现有的基于对抗性鲁棒性的方法。此外，通过将我们的技术与最先进的基于度量的隶属推理方法进行比较，我们提出的方法在攻击对抗性训练的模型时也表现出更好的性能。用于重现这项工作结果的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/plll4zzx/Evaluating-Membership-Inference-Through-Adversarial-Robustness} 处找到。 本文提出了一种基于对抗鲁棒性的增强型成员推理攻击方法，通过调整对抗扰动方向提升攻击效果。 Zhaoxi Zhang,Leo Yu Zhang,Xufei Zheng,Bilal Hussain Abbasi,Shengshan Hu cs.CR,cs.AI

authors_text: Jiexing Qi,Jingyao Tang,Ziwei He,Xiangpeng Wan,Yu Cheng,Chenghu Zhou,Xinbing Wang,Quanshi Zhang,Zhouhan Lin
title: RASAT: Integrating Relational Structures into Pretrained Seq2Seq Model for Text-to-SQL
title_zh: RASAT：将关系结构集成到文本转 SQL 的预训练 Seq2Seq 模型中
comment: EMNLP 2022
comments: EMNLP 2022
abstract: Relational structures such as schema linking and schema encoding have been validated as a key component to qualitatively translating natural language into SQL queries. However, introducing these structural relations comes with prices: they often result in a specialized model structure, which largely prohibits using large pretrained models in text-to-SQL. To address this problem, we propose RASAT: a Transformer seq2seq architecture augmented with relation-aware self-attention that could leverage a variety of relational structures while inheriting the pretrained parameters from the T5 model effectively. Our model can incorporate almost all types of existing relations in the literature, and in addition, we propose introducing co-reference relations for the multi-turn scenario. Experimental results on three widely used text-to-SQL datasets, covering both single-turn and multi-turn scenarios, have shown that RASAT could achieve state-of-the-art results across all three benchmarks (75.5% EX on Spider, 52.6% IEX on SParC, and 37.4% IEX on CoSQL).
summary: Relational structures such as schema linking and schema encoding have been validated as a key component to qualitatively translating natural language into SQL queries. However, introducing these structural relations comes with prices: they often result in a specialized model structure, which largely prohibits using large pretrained models in text-to-SQL. To address this problem, we propose RASAT: a Transformer seq2seq architecture augmented with relation-aware self-attention that could leverage a variety of relational structures while inheriting the pretrained parameters from the T5 model effectively. Our model can incorporate almost all types of existing relations in the literature, and in addition, we propose introducing co-reference relations for the multi-turn scenario. Experimental results on three widely used text-to-SQL datasets, covering both single-turn and multi-turn scenarios, have shown that RASAT could achieve state-of-the-art results across all three benchmarks (75.5% EX on Spider, 52.6% IEX on SParC, and 37.4% IEX on CoSQL).
abstract_zh: 模式链接和模式编码等关系结构已被验证为将自然语言定性转换为 SQL 查询的关键组件。然而，引入这些结构关系是有代价的：它们通常会产生专门的模型结构，这在很大程度上禁止在文本到 SQL 中使用大型预训练模型。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 RASAT：一种增强了关系感知自注意力的 Transformer seq2seq 架构，它可以利用各种关系结构，同时有效地继承 T5 模型的预训练参数。我们的模型可以包含文献中几乎所有类型的现有关系，此外，我们建议为多轮场景引入共指关系。三个广泛使用的文本到 SQL 数据集（涵盖单轮和多轮场景）的实验结果表明，RASAT 可以在所有三个基准测试中实现最先进的结果（Spider 上的 EX 为 75.5%，SParC 上的 IEX 为 52.6%，CoSQL 上的 IEX 为 37.4%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RASAT模型，通过将关系结构整合到预训练的序列到序列模型中，以提升文本到SQL查询的生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法引入关系结构（如模式链接和编码）时需设计专用模型，导致难以复用大型预训练模型，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 基于Transformer的seq2seq架构，引入关系感知自注意力机制，继承T5预训练参数，并新增共指关系以支持多轮对话场景。
AI.result: 在Spider（EX 75.5%）、SParC（IEX 52.6%）和CoSQL（IEX 37.4%）三个基准数据集上达到最优性能。
AI.conclusion: RASAT有效结合关系结构与预训练模型优势，通过关系感知机制和共指关系设计，在单轮与多轮文本到SQL任务中均取得领先结果。

authors_text: Sonia K. Murthy,Kyle Lo,Daniel King,Chandra Bhagavatula,Bailey Kuehl,Sophie Johnson,Jonathan Borchardt,Daniel S. Weld,Tom Hope,Doug Downey
title: ACCoRD: A Multi-Document Approach to Generating Diverse Descriptions of Scientific Concepts
title_zh: ACCoRD：生成科学概念多样化描述的多文档方法
abstract: Systems that can automatically define unfamiliar terms hold the promise of improving the accessibility of scientific texts, especially for readers who may lack prerequisite background knowledge. However, current systems assume a single "best" description per concept, which fails to account for the many potentially useful ways a concept can be described. We present ACCoRD, an end-to-end system tackling the novel task of generating sets of descriptions of scientific concepts. Our system takes advantage of the myriad ways a concept is mentioned across the scientific literature to produce distinct, diverse descriptions of target scientific concepts in terms of different reference concepts. To support research on the task, we release an expert-annotated resource, the ACCoRD corpus, which includes 1,275 labeled contexts and 1,787 hand-authored concept descriptions. We conduct a user study demonstrating that (1) users prefer descriptions produced by our end-to-end system, and (2) users prefer multiple descriptions to a single "best" description.
summary: Systems that can automatically define unfamiliar terms hold the promise of improving the accessibility of scientific texts, especially for readers who may lack prerequisite background knowledge. However, current systems assume a single "best" description per concept, which fails to account for the many potentially useful ways a concept can be described. We present ACCoRD, an end-to-end system tackling the novel task of generating sets of descriptions of scientific concepts. Our system takes advantage of the myriad ways a concept is mentioned across the scientific literature to produce distinct, diverse descriptions of target scientific concepts in terms of different reference concepts. To support research on the task, we release an expert-annotated resource, the ACCoRD corpus, which includes 1,275 labeled contexts and 1,787 hand-authored concept descriptions. We conduct a user study demonstrating that (1) users prefer descriptions produced by our end-to-end system, and (2) users prefer multiple descriptions to a single "best" description.
abstract_zh: 能够自动定义不熟悉术语的系统有望提高科学文本的可访问性，特别是对于可能缺乏必要背景知识的读者而言。然而，当前的系统假设每个概念有一个“最佳”描述，这未能考虑到描述概念的许多潜在有用的方式。我们提出了 ACCoRD，这是一个端到端系统，用于解决生成科学概念描述集的新任务。我们的系统利用科学文献中提及概念的多种方式，根据不同的参考概念对目标科学概念进行独特、多样化的描述。为了支持该任务的研究，我们发布了专家注释的资源 ACCoRD 语料库，其中包括 1,275 个标记上下文和 1,787 个手工编写的概念描述。我们进行了一项用户研究，证明（1）用户更喜欢我们的端到端系统生成的描述，（2）用户更喜欢多个描述而不是单个“最佳”描述。

AI.tldr: 开发ACCoRD系统，生成科学概念的多样化描述以提高可访问性
AI.motivation: 现有系统仅提供单一描述，无法满足不同读者对科学概念多样化理解的需求
AI.method: 采用多文档方法，利用科学文献中的多种提及方式生成不同参考概念的描述，并构建专家标注的ACCoRD语料库
AI.result: 用户研究显示，用户更偏好系统生成的多样化描述而非单一最佳描述
AI.conclusion: ACCoRD系统通过多样化描述有效提升科学文本可访问性，满足不同用户需求
