authors_text: Samer Alashhab,Antonio Javier Gallego,Miguel Ángel Lozano
title: Efficient Gesture Recognition for the Assistance of Visually Impaired People using Multi-Head Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用多头神经网络进行高效手势识别以帮助视障人士
comment: mber:114
comments: mber:114
abstract: This paper proposes an interactive system for mobile devices controlled by hand gestures aimed at helping people with visual impairments. This system allows the user to interact with the device by making simple static and dynamic hand gestures. Each gesture triggers a different action in the system, such as object recognition, scene description or image scaling (e.g., pointing a finger at an object will show a description of it). The system is based on a multi-head neural network architecture, which initially detects and classifies the gestures, and subsequently, depending on the gesture detected, performs a second stage that carries out the corresponding action. This multi-head architecture optimizes the resources required to perform different tasks simultaneously, and takes advantage of the information obtained from an initial backbone to perform different processes in a second stage. To train and evaluate the system, a dataset with about 40k images was manually compiled and labeled including different types of hand gestures, backgrounds (indoors and outdoors), lighting conditions, etc. This dataset contains synthetic gestures (whose objective is to pre-train the system in order to improve the results) and real images captured using different mobile phones. The results obtained and the comparison made with the state of the art show competitive results as regards the different actions performed by the system, such as the accuracy of classification and localization of gestures, or the generation of descriptions for objects and scenes.
summary: This paper proposes an interactive system for mobile devices controlled by hand gestures aimed at helping people with visual impairments. This system allows the user to interact with the device by making simple static and dynamic hand gestures. Each gesture triggers a different action in the system, such as object recognition, scene description or image scaling (e.g., pointing a finger at an object will show a description of it). The system is based on a multi-head neural network architecture, which initially detects and classifies the gestures, and subsequently, depending on the gesture detected, performs a second stage that carries out the corresponding action. This multi-head architecture optimizes the resources required to perform different tasks simultaneously, and takes advantage of the information obtained from an initial backbone to perform different processes in a second stage. To train and evaluate the system, a dataset with about 40k images was manually compiled and labeled including different types of hand gestures, backgrounds (indoors and outdoors), lighting conditions, etc. This dataset contains synthetic gestures (whose objective is to pre-train the system in order to improve the results) and real images captured using different mobile phones. The results obtained and the comparison made with the state of the art show competitive results as regards the different actions performed by the system, such as the accuracy of classification and localization of gestures, or the generation of descriptions for objects and scenes.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种由手势控制的移动设备交互系统，旨在帮助视力障碍人士。该系统允许用户通过简单的静态和动态手势与设备进行交互。每个手势都会触发系统中的不同动作，例如对象识别、场景描述或图像缩放（例如，将手指指向对象将显示其描述）。该系统基于多头神经网络架构，首先检测手势并对其进行分类，然后根据检测到的手势执行第二阶段，执行相应的操作。这种多头架构优化了同时执行不同任务所需的资源，并利用从初始主干获得的信息在第二阶段执行不同的过程。为了训练和评估系统，手动编译并标记了约 40k 图像的数据集，包括不同类型的手势、背景（室内和室外）、照明条件等。该数据集包含合成手势（其目的是预训练系统以提高结果）和使用不同手机捕获的真实图像。获得的结果以及与现有技术的比较显示了系统执行的不同动作方面的竞争结果，例如手势的分类和定位的准确性，或者对象和场景的描述的生成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多头神经网络的移动设备交互系统，通过手部手势帮助视障人士完成物体识别、场景描述等任务。
AI.motivation: 为视障人士提供更高效、直观的移动设备交互方式，提升其生活独立性与信息获取能力。
AI.method: 采用多头神经网络架构，首先检测并分类手势，再根据手势触发对应功能（如物体识别或图像缩放）。使用包含4万张图像的数据集进行训练，涵盖合成手势与真实场景数据。
AI.result: 系统在手势分类准确率、定位精度及场景描述生成方面表现优异，结果优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 多头神经网络有效提升了手势识别效率与任务执行能力，为视障人士提供了实用的辅助工具。

search_text: Efficient Gesture Recognition for the Assistance of Visually Impaired People using Multi-Head Neural Networks 使用多头神经网络进行高效手势识别以帮助视障人士 This paper proposes an interactive system for mobile devices controlled by hand gestures aimed at helping people with visual impairments. This system allows the user to interact with the device by making simple static and dynamic hand gestures. Each gesture triggers a different action in the system, such as object recognition, scene description or image scaling (e.g., pointing a finger at an object will show a description of it). The system is based on a multi-head neural network architecture, which initially detects and classifies the gestures, and subsequently, depending on the gesture detected, performs a second stage that carries out the corresponding action. This multi-head architecture optimizes the resources required to perform different tasks simultaneously, and takes advantage of the information obtained from an initial backbone to perform different processes in a second stage. To train and evaluate the system, a dataset with about 40k images was manually compiled and labeled including different types of hand gestures, backgrounds (indoors and outdoors), lighting conditions, etc. This dataset contains synthetic gestures (whose objective is to pre-train the system in order to improve the results) and real images captured using different mobile phones. The results obtained and the comparison made with the state of the art show competitive results as regards the different actions performed by the system, such as the accuracy of classification and localization of gestures, or the generation of descriptions for objects and scenes. 本文提出了一种由手势控制的移动设备交互系统，旨在帮助视力障碍人士。该系统允许用户通过简单的静态和动态手势与设备进行交互。每个手势都会触发系统中的不同动作，例如对象识别、场景描述或图像缩放（例如，将手指指向对象将显示其描述）。该系统基于多头神经网络架构，首先检测手势并对其进行分类，然后根据检测到的手势执行第二阶段，执行相应的操作。这种多头架构优化了同时执行不同任务所需的资源，并利用从初始主干获得的信息在第二阶段执行不同的过程。为了训练和评估系统，手动编译并标记了约 40k 图像的数据集，包括不同类型的手势、背景（室内和室外）、照明条件等。该数据集包含合成手势（其目的是预训练系统以提高结果）和使用不同手机捕获的真实图像。获得的结果以及与现有技术的比较显示了系统执行的不同动作方面的竞争结果，例如手势的分类和定位的准确性，或者对象和场景的描述的生成。 本文提出了一种基于多头神经网络的移动设备交互系统，通过手部手势帮助视障人士完成物体识别、场景描述等任务。 Samer Alashhab,Antonio Javier Gallego,Miguel Ángel Lozano cs.CV

authors_text: Yang Ni,Danny Abraham,Mariam Issa,Yeseong Kim,Pietro Mercati,Mohsen Imani
title: Efficient Off-Policy Reinforcement Learning via Brain-Inspired Computing
title_zh: 通过类脑计算实现高效的离策略强化学习
comment: In Proceedings of the Great Lakes Symposium on VLSI 2023(GLSVLSI 2023)
comments: In Proceedings of the Great Lakes Symposium on VLSI 2023(GLSVLSI 2023)
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has opened up new opportunities to enhance existing smart systems that generally include a complex decision-making process. However, modern RL algorithms, e.g., Deep Q-Networks (DQN), are based on deep neural networks, resulting in high computational costs. In this paper, we propose QHD, an off-policy value-based Hyperdimensional Reinforcement Learning, that mimics brain properties toward robust and real-time learning. QHD relies on a lightweight brain-inspired model to learn an optimal policy in an unknown environment. On both desktop and power-limited embedded platforms, QHD achieves significantly better overall efficiency than DQN while providing higher or comparable rewards. QHD is also suitable for highly-efficient reinforcement learning with great potential for online and real-time learning. Our solution supports a small experience replay batch size that provides 12.3 times speedup compared to DQN while ensuring minimal quality loss. Our evaluation shows QHD capability for real-time learning, providing 34.6 times speedup and significantly better quality of learning than DQN.
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has opened up new opportunities to enhance existing smart systems that generally include a complex decision-making process. However, modern RL algorithms, e.g., Deep Q-Networks (DQN), are based on deep neural networks, resulting in high computational costs. In this paper, we propose QHD, an off-policy value-based Hyperdimensional Reinforcement Learning, that mimics brain properties toward robust and real-time learning. QHD relies on a lightweight brain-inspired model to learn an optimal policy in an unknown environment. On both desktop and power-limited embedded platforms, QHD achieves significantly better overall efficiency than DQN while providing higher or comparable rewards. QHD is also suitable for highly-efficient reinforcement learning with great potential for online and real-time learning. Our solution supports a small experience replay batch size that provides 12.3 times speedup compared to DQN while ensuring minimal quality loss. Our evaluation shows QHD capability for real-time learning, providing 34.6 times speedup and significantly better quality of learning than DQN.
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 为增强现有智能系统开辟了新的机会，这些系统通常包括复杂的决策过程。然而，现代强化学习算法，例如深度 Q 网络（DQN），是基于深度神经网络的，导致计算成本很高。在本文中，我们提出了 QHD，一种基于离策略价值的超维强化学习，它模仿大脑特性以实现稳健和实时的学习。 QHD 依靠轻量级的类脑模型来学习未知环境中的最优策略。在桌面和功率有限的嵌入式平台上，QHD 的整体效率明显优于 DQN，同时提供更高或相当的奖励。 QHD还适合高效的强化学习，具有巨大的在线和实时学习潜力。我们的解决方案支持较小的体验重播批量大小，与 DQN 相比，速度提高了 12.3 倍，同时确保最小的质量损失。我们的评估显示了 QHD 的实时学习能力，比 DQN 提供 34.6 倍的加速和明显更好的学习质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于脑启发计算的高效离线强化学习方法QHD，旨在解决传统深度强化学习算法计算成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 现代强化学习算法（如DQN）依赖深度神经网络导致计算成本高，难以满足实时性和资源受限场景需求。
AI.method: 设计轻量级脑启发模型QHD，通过超维度计算模拟大脑特性，优化经验回放机制以提升学习效率。
AI.result: 在桌面和嵌入式平台实现比DQN快12.3倍的速度提升，同时保持相近奖励值；实时学习场景下速度提升达34.6倍。
AI.conclusion: QHD在保证学习质量的前提下显著提升计算效率，为在线实时强化学习提供了高效可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Yunseok Jang,Ruben Villegas,Jimei Yang,Duygu Ceylan,Xin Sun,Honglak Lee
title: RiCS: A 2D Self-Occlusion Map for Harmonizing Volumetric Objects
title_zh: RiCS：用于协调体积对象的 2D 自遮挡贴图
comment: Accepted paper at AI for Content Creation Workshop (AICC) at CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted paper at AI for Content Creation Workshop (AICC) at CVPR 2022
abstract: There have been remarkable successes in computer vision with deep learning. While such breakthroughs show robust performance, there have still been many challenges in learning in-depth knowledge, like occlusion or predicting physical interactions. Although some recent works show the potential of 3D data in serving such context, it is unclear how we efficiently provide 3D input to the 2D models due to the misalignment in dimensionality between 2D and 3D. To leverage the successes of 2D models in predicting self-occlusions, we design Ray-marching in Camera Space (RiCS), a new method to represent the self-occlusions of foreground objects in 3D into a 2D self-occlusion map. We test the effectiveness of our representation on the human image harmonization task by predicting shading that is coherent with a given background image. Our experiments demonstrate that our representation map not only allows us to enhance the image quality but also to model temporally coherent complex shadow effects compared with the simulation-to-real and harmonization methods, both quantitatively and qualitatively. We further show that we can significantly improve the performance of human parts segmentation networks trained on existing synthetic datasets by enhancing the harmonization quality with our method.
summary: There have been remarkable successes in computer vision with deep learning. While such breakthroughs show robust performance, there have still been many challenges in learning in-depth knowledge, like occlusion or predicting physical interactions. Although some recent works show the potential of 3D data in serving such context, it is unclear how we efficiently provide 3D input to the 2D models due to the misalignment in dimensionality between 2D and 3D. To leverage the successes of 2D models in predicting self-occlusions, we design Ray-marching in Camera Space (RiCS), a new method to represent the self-occlusions of foreground objects in 3D into a 2D self-occlusion map. We test the effectiveness of our representation on the human image harmonization task by predicting shading that is coherent with a given background image. Our experiments demonstrate that our representation map not only allows us to enhance the image quality but also to model temporally coherent complex shadow effects compared with the simulation-to-real and harmonization methods, both quantitatively and qualitatively. We further show that we can significantly improve the performance of human parts segmentation networks trained on existing synthetic datasets by enhancing the harmonization quality with our method.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的计算机视觉领域已经取得了显着的成功。虽然这些突破显示出强大的性能，但在学习深度知识方面仍然存在许多挑战，例如遮挡或预测物理交互。尽管最近的一些工作显示了 3D 数据在服务此类上下文中的潜力，但由于 2D 和 3D 之间的维度不一致，目前尚不清楚我们如何有效地向 2D 模型提供 3D 输入。为了利用 2D 模型在预测自遮挡方面的成功经验，我们设计了相机空间中的光线行进 (RiCS)，这是一种将 3D 中前景对象的自遮挡表示为 2D 自遮挡图的新方法。我们通过预测与给定背景图像一致的阴影来测试我们在人类图像协调任务上的表示的有效性。我们的实验表明，与模拟真实和协调方法相比，我们的表示图不仅可以提高图像质量，而且可以定量和定性地模拟时间相干的复杂阴影效果。我们进一步表明，通过使用我们的方法提高协调质量，我们可以显着提高在现有合成数据集上训练的人体部位分割网络的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RiCS方法，将三维对象的自遮挡信息转换为二维自遮挡图，用于提升体积对象的图像融合效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在计算机视觉中取得进展，但处理遮挡和物理交互仍具挑战性，且现有方法难以高效地将三维数据输入二维模型。
AI.method: 设计基于相机空间的光线追踪算法（RiCS），将三维自遮挡信息映射为二维遮挡图，用于预测与背景图像一致的阴影。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在图像质量提升和复杂阴影建模方面优于现有方法，同时显著提高人体分割网络的性能。
AI.conclusion: RiCS有效解决了二维与三维数据的对齐问题，为体积对象的图像融合任务提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: RiCS: A 2D Self-Occlusion Map for Harmonizing Volumetric Objects RiCS：用于协调体积对象的 2D 自遮挡贴图 There have been remarkable successes in computer vision with deep learning. While such breakthroughs show robust performance, there have still been many challenges in learning in-depth knowledge, like occlusion or predicting physical interactions. Although some recent works show the potential of 3D data in serving such context, it is unclear how we efficiently provide 3D input to the 2D models due to the misalignment in dimensionality between 2D and 3D. To leverage the successes of 2D models in predicting self-occlusions, we design Ray-marching in Camera Space (RiCS), a new method to represent the self-occlusions of foreground objects in 3D into a 2D self-occlusion map. We test the effectiveness of our representation on the human image harmonization task by predicting shading that is coherent with a given background image. Our experiments demonstrate that our representation map not only allows us to enhance the image quality but also to model temporally coherent complex shadow effects compared with the simulation-to-real and harmonization methods, both quantitatively and qualitatively. We further show that we can significantly improve the performance of human parts segmentation networks trained on existing synthetic datasets by enhancing the harmonization quality with our method. 深度学习的计算机视觉领域已经取得了显着的成功。虽然这些突破显示出强大的性能，但在学习深度知识方面仍然存在许多挑战，例如遮挡或预测物理交互。尽管最近的一些工作显示了 3D 数据在服务此类上下文中的潜力，但由于 2D 和 3D 之间的维度不一致，目前尚不清楚我们如何有效地向 2D 模型提供 3D 输入。为了利用 2D 模型在预测自遮挡方面的成功经验，我们设计了相机空间中的光线行进 (RiCS)，这是一种将 3D 中前景对象的自遮挡表示为 2D 自遮挡图的新方法。我们通过预测与给定背景图像一致的阴影来测试我们在人类图像协调任务上的表示的有效性。我们的实验表明，与模拟真实和协调方法相比，我们的表示图不仅可以提高图像质量，而且可以定量和定性地模拟时间相干的复杂阴影效果。我们进一步表明，通过使用我们的方法提高协调质量，我们可以显着提高在现有合成数据集上训练的人体部位分割网络的性能。 本文提出RiCS方法，将三维对象的自遮挡信息转换为二维自遮挡图，用于提升体积对象的图像融合效果。 Yunseok Jang,Ruben Villegas,Jimei Yang,Duygu Ceylan,Xin Sun,Honglak Lee cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Peng Xu,Hu Cheng,Jiankun Wang,Max Q. -H. Meng
title: Learning to Reorient Objects with Stable Placements Afforded by Extrinsic Supports
title_zh: 学习通过外部支撑提供的稳定放置来重新定向对象
abstract: Reorienting objects by using supports is a practical yet challenging manipulation task. Owing to the intricate geometry of objects and the constrained feasible motions of the robot, multiple manipulation steps are required for object reorientation. In this work, we propose a pipeline for predicting various object placements from point clouds. This pipeline comprises three stages: a pose generation stage, followed by a pose refinement stage, and culminating in a placement classification stage. We also propose an algorithm to construct manipulation graphs based on point clouds. Feasible manipulation sequences are determined for the robot to transfer object placements. Both simulated and real-world experiments demonstrate that our approach is effective. The simulation results underscore our pipeline's capacity to generalize to novel objects in random start poses. Our predicted placements exhibit a 20% enhancement in accuracy compared to the state-of-the-art baseline. Furthermore, the robot finds feasible sequential steps in the manipulation graphs constructed by our algorithm to accomplish object reorientation manipulation.
summary: Reorienting objects by using supports is a practical yet challenging manipulation task. Owing to the intricate geometry of objects and the constrained feasible motions of the robot, multiple manipulation steps are required for object reorientation. In this work, we propose a pipeline for predicting various object placements from point clouds. This pipeline comprises three stages: a pose generation stage, followed by a pose refinement stage, and culminating in a placement classification stage. We also propose an algorithm to construct manipulation graphs based on point clouds. Feasible manipulation sequences are determined for the robot to transfer object placements. Both simulated and real-world experiments demonstrate that our approach is effective. The simulation results underscore our pipeline's capacity to generalize to novel objects in random start poses. Our predicted placements exhibit a 20% enhancement in accuracy compared to the state-of-the-art baseline. Furthermore, the robot finds feasible sequential steps in the manipulation graphs constructed by our algorithm to accomplish object reorientation manipulation.
abstract_zh: 使用支撑物重新定向对象是一项实用但具有挑战性的操作任务。由于物体的复杂几何形状和机器人的可行运动受到限制，物体重新定向需要多个操作步骤。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于从点云预测各种对象放置的管道。该管道包括三个阶段：姿势生成阶段，随后是姿势细化阶段，最后是放置分类阶段。我们还提出了一种基于点云构建操作图的算法。确定机器人传送物体放置的可行操作序列。模拟和现实实验都证明我们的方法是有效的。模拟结果强调了我们的管道泛化到随机起始姿势的新物体的能力。与最先进的基线相比，我们预测的展示位置准确度提高了 20%。此外，机器人在我们的算法构建的操作图中找到可行的顺序步骤来完成对象重新定向操作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过外部支撑实现物体稳定重新定向的管道，解决机器人复杂几何物体重新定向的挑战。
AI.motivation: 物体重新定向需要多步操作且受几何形状和机器人运动约束，现有方法难以高效实现。
AI.method: 设计包含姿态生成、优化和分类的三阶段管道，并构建基于点云的操控图算法以确定可行操作序列。
AI.result: 仿真和真实实验显示方法有效，新物体随机初始姿态下准确率提升20%，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过操控图和姿态预测管道，实现了复杂场景下物体重新定向的高效解决方案。

authors_text: Heli Qi,Sashi Novitasari,Sakriani Sakti,Satoshi Nakamura
title: Improved Consistency Training for Semi-Supervised Sequence-to-Sequence ASR via Speech Chain Reconstruction and Self-Transcribing
title_zh: 通过语音链重建和自转录改进半监督序列到序列 ASR 的一致性训练
comment: Submitted to INTERSPEECH 2022
comments: Submitted to INTERSPEECH 2022
abstract: Consistency regularization has recently been applied to semi-supervised sequence-to-sequence (S2S) automatic speech recognition (ASR). This principle encourages an ASR model to output similar predictions for the same input speech with different perturbations. The existing paradigm of semi-supervised S2S ASR utilizes SpecAugment as data augmentation and requires a static teacher model to produce pseudo transcripts for untranscribed speech. However, this paradigm fails to take full advantage of consistency regularization. First, the masking operations of SpecAugment may damage the linguistic contents of the speech, thus influencing the quality of pseudo labels. Second, S2S ASR requires both input speech and prefix tokens to make the next prediction. The static prefix tokens made by the offline teacher model cannot match dynamic pseudo labels during consistency training. In this work, we propose an improved consistency training paradigm of semi-supervised S2S ASR. We utilize speech chain reconstruction as the weak augmentation to generate high-quality pseudo labels. Moreover, we demonstrate that dynamic pseudo transcripts produced by the student ASR model benefit the consistency training. Experiments on LJSpeech and LibriSpeech corpora show that compared to supervised baselines, our improved paradigm achieves a 12.2% CER improvement in the single-speaker setting and 38.6% in the multi-speaker setting.
summary: Consistency regularization has recently been applied to semi-supervised sequence-to-sequence (S2S) automatic speech recognition (ASR). This principle encourages an ASR model to output similar predictions for the same input speech with different perturbations. The existing paradigm of semi-supervised S2S ASR utilizes SpecAugment as data augmentation and requires a static teacher model to produce pseudo transcripts for untranscribed speech. However, this paradigm fails to take full advantage of consistency regularization. First, the masking operations of SpecAugment may damage the linguistic contents of the speech, thus influencing the quality of pseudo labels. Second, S2S ASR requires both input speech and prefix tokens to make the next prediction. The static prefix tokens made by the offline teacher model cannot match dynamic pseudo labels during consistency training. In this work, we propose an improved consistency training paradigm of semi-supervised S2S ASR. We utilize speech chain reconstruction as the weak augmentation to generate high-quality pseudo labels. Moreover, we demonstrate that dynamic pseudo transcripts produced by the student ASR model benefit the consistency training. Experiments on LJSpeech and LibriSpeech corpora show that compared to supervised baselines, our improved paradigm achieves a 12.2% CER improvement in the single-speaker setting and 38.6% in the multi-speaker setting.
abstract_zh: 一致性正则化最近已应用于半监督序列到序列（S2S）自动语音识别（ASR）。这一原则鼓励 ASR 模型对具有不同扰动的相同输入语音输出相似的预测。现有的半监督 S2S ASR 范式利用 SpecAugment 作为数据增强，并需要静态教师模型来为未转录的语音生成伪转录本。然而，这种范式未能充分利用一致性正则化。首先，SpecAugment的屏蔽操作可能会损害语音的语言内容，从而影响伪标签的质量。其次，S2S ASR 需要输入语音和前缀标记才能进行下一个预测。离线教师模型制作的静态前缀标记在一致性训练期间无法匹配动态伪标签。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种改进的半监督 S2S ASR 一致性训练范例。我们利用语音链重建作为弱增强来生成高质量的伪标签。此外，我们证明学生 ASR 模型生成的动态伪成绩单有利于一致性训练。 LJSpeech 和 LibriSpeech 语料库的实验表明，与监督基线相比，我们的改进范例在单说话人设置中实现了 12.2% 的 CER 改进，在多说话人设置中实现了 38.6% 的 CER 改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的半监督序列到序列语音识别（S2S ASR）一致性训练方法，通过语音链重建和自转录技术提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督S2S ASR方法依赖SpecAugment数据增强和静态教师模型生成伪标签，但存在掩码操作破坏语音语义、静态前缀无法匹配动态伪标签的问题，限制了一致性正则化的有效性。
AI.method: 采用语音链重建作为弱增强生成高质量伪标签，并利用学生模型动态生成伪转录文本，替代传统静态教师模型的固定前缀 tokens。
AI.result: 在LJSpeech和LibriSpeech数据集上，单说话人场景下相对监督基线提升12.2%字符错误率（CER），多说话人场景下提升38.6%。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态伪标签生成和语音链重建的改进范式，显著提升了半监督S2S ASR的性能，验证了动态一致性训练的有效性。

authors_text: Fei Meng,Liangliang Chen,Han Ma,Jiankun Wang,Max Q. -H. Meng
title: NR-RRT: Neural Risk-Aware Near-Optimal Path Planning in Uncertain Nonconvex Environments
title_zh: NR-RRT：不确定非凸环境中的神经风险感知近最优路径规划
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, 2022
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering, 2022
abstract: Balancing the trade-off between safety and efficiency is of significant importance for path planning under uncertainty. Many risk-aware path planners have been developed to explicitly limit the probability of collision to an acceptable bound in uncertain environments. However, convex obstacles or Gaussian uncertainties are usually assumed to make the problem tractable in the existing method. These assumptions limit the generalization and application of path planners in real-world implementations. In this article, we propose to apply deep learning methods to the sampling-based planner, developing a novel risk bounded near-optimal path planning algorithm named neural risk-aware RRT (NR-RRT). Specifically, a deterministic risk contours map is maintained by perceiving the probabilistic nonconvex obstacles, and a neural network sampler is proposed to predict the next most-promising safe state. Furthermore, the recursive divide-and-conquer planning and bidirectional search strategies are used to accelerate the convergence to a near-optimal solution with guaranteed bounded risk. Worst-case theoretical guarantees can also be proven owing to a standby safety guaranteed planner utilizing a uniform sampling distribution. Simulation experiments demonstrate that the proposed algorithm outperforms the state-of-the-art remarkably for finding risk bounded low-cost paths in seen and unseen environments with uncertainty and nonconvex constraints.
summary: Balancing the trade-off between safety and efficiency is of significant importance for path planning under uncertainty. Many risk-aware path planners have been developed to explicitly limit the probability of collision to an acceptable bound in uncertain environments. However, convex obstacles or Gaussian uncertainties are usually assumed to make the problem tractable in the existing method. These assumptions limit the generalization and application of path planners in real-world implementations. In this article, we propose to apply deep learning methods to the sampling-based planner, developing a novel risk bounded near-optimal path planning algorithm named neural risk-aware RRT (NR-RRT). Specifically, a deterministic risk contours map is maintained by perceiving the probabilistic nonconvex obstacles, and a neural network sampler is proposed to predict the next most-promising safe state. Furthermore, the recursive divide-and-conquer planning and bidirectional search strategies are used to accelerate the convergence to a near-optimal solution with guaranteed bounded risk. Worst-case theoretical guarantees can also be proven owing to a standby safety guaranteed planner utilizing a uniform sampling distribution. Simulation experiments demonstrate that the proposed algorithm outperforms the state-of-the-art remarkably for finding risk bounded low-cost paths in seen and unseen environments with uncertainty and nonconvex constraints.
abstract_zh: 平衡安全性和效率之间的权衡对于不确定性下的路径规划具有重要意义。许多具有风险意识的路径规划器已被开发出来，以明确地将不确定环境中的碰撞概率限制在可接受的范围内。然而，现有方法通常假设凸障碍物或高斯不确定性使问题易于处理。这些假设限制了路径规划器在现实世界中的推广和应用。在本文中，我们建议将深度学习方法应用于基于采样的规划器，开发一种新颖的风险有界近最优路径规划算法，称为神经风险感知 RRT（NR-RRT）。具体来说，通过感知概率非凸障碍来维护确定性风险等值线图，并提出神经网络采样器来预测下一个最有希望的安全状态。此外，递归分治规划和双向搜索策略用于加速收敛到保证有界风险的接近最优解。由于备用安全保证规划器利用均匀抽样分布，最坏情况的理论保证也可以得到证明。仿真实验表明，所提出的算法在具有不确定性和非凸约束的可见和不可见环境中寻找风险有限的低成本路径方面显着优于最先进的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为NR-RRT的神经风险感知路径规划算法，用于在存在不确定性和非凸约束的环境中实现近似最优路径规划。
AI.motivation: 现有风险感知路径规划方法通常假设凸障碍物或高斯不确定性，限制了其在现实环境中的泛化能力，需开发能处理非凸障碍和复杂不确定性的新方法。
AI.method: 通过感知概率非凸障碍物生成确定性风险轮廓图，结合神经网络采样器预测安全状态，并采用分治策略与双向搜索加速收敛，同时利用均匀采样备用规划器保证安全。
AI.result: 仿真实验表明，NR-RRT在已知和未知的不确定非凸环境中显著优于现有方法，能有效找到风险可控的低代价路径。
AI.conclusion: NR-RRT通过深度学习与采样规划结合，在安全与效率间取得平衡，为复杂现实环境中的路径规划提供了更通用的解决方案。

search_text: NR-RRT: Neural Risk-Aware Near-Optimal Path Planning in Uncertain Nonconvex Environments NR-RRT：不确定非凸环境中的神经风险感知近最优路径规划 Balancing the trade-off between safety and efficiency is of significant importance for path planning under uncertainty. Many risk-aware path planners have been developed to explicitly limit the probability of collision to an acceptable bound in uncertain environments. However, convex obstacles or Gaussian uncertainties are usually assumed to make the problem tractable in the existing method. These assumptions limit the generalization and application of path planners in real-world implementations. In this article, we propose to apply deep learning methods to the sampling-based planner, developing a novel risk bounded near-optimal path planning algorithm named neural risk-aware RRT (NR-RRT). Specifically, a deterministic risk contours map is maintained by perceiving the probabilistic nonconvex obstacles, and a neural network sampler is proposed to predict the next most-promising safe state. Furthermore, the recursive divide-and-conquer planning and bidirectional search strategies are used to accelerate the convergence to a near-optimal solution with guaranteed bounded risk. Worst-case theoretical guarantees can also be proven owing to a standby safety guaranteed planner utilizing a uniform sampling distribution. Simulation experiments demonstrate that the proposed algorithm outperforms the state-of-the-art remarkably for finding risk bounded low-cost paths in seen and unseen environments with uncertainty and nonconvex constraints. 平衡安全性和效率之间的权衡对于不确定性下的路径规划具有重要意义。许多具有风险意识的路径规划器已被开发出来，以明确地将不确定环境中的碰撞概率限制在可接受的范围内。然而，现有方法通常假设凸障碍物或高斯不确定性使问题易于处理。这些假设限制了路径规划器在现实世界中的推广和应用。在本文中，我们建议将深度学习方法应用于基于采样的规划器，开发一种新颖的风险有界近最优路径规划算法，称为神经风险感知 RRT（NR-RRT）。具体来说，通过感知概率非凸障碍来维护确定性风险等值线图，并提出神经网络采样器来预测下一个最有希望的安全状态。此外，递归分治规划和双向搜索策略用于加速收敛到保证有界风险的接近最优解。由于备用安全保证规划器利用均匀抽样分布，最坏情况的理论保证也可以得到证明。仿真实验表明，所提出的算法在具有不确定性和非凸约束的可见和不可见环境中寻找风险有限的低成本路径方面显着优于最先进的算法。 本文提出一种名为NR-RRT的神经风险感知路径规划算法，用于在存在不确定性和非凸约束的环境中实现近似最优路径规划。 Fei Meng,Liangliang Chen,Han Ma,Jiankun Wang,Max Q. -H. authors_text: Wenhao Huang,Haifan Gong,Huan Zhang,Yu Wang,Haofeng Li,Guanbin Li,Hong Shen
title: BronchusNet: Region and Structure Prior Embedded Representation Learning for Bronchus Segmentation and Classification
title_zh: BronchusNet：用于支气管分割和分类的区域和结构先验嵌入式表示学习
abstract: CT-based bronchial tree analysis plays an important role in the computer-aided diagnosis for respiratory diseases, as it could provide structured information for clinicians. The basis of airway analysis is bronchial tree reconstruction, which consists of bronchus segmentation and classification. However, there remains a challenge for accurate bronchial analysis due to the individual variations and the severe class imbalance. In this paper, we propose a region and structure prior embedded framework named BronchusNet to achieve accurate segmentation and classification of bronchial regions in CT images. For bronchus segmentation, we propose an adaptive hard region-aware UNet that incorporates multi-level prior guidance of hard pixel-wise samples in the general Unet segmentation network to achieve better hierarchical feature learning. For the classification of bronchial branches, we propose a hybrid point-voxel graph learning module to fully exploit bronchial structure priors and to support simultaneous feature interactions across different branches. To facilitate the study of bronchial analysis, we contribute~\textbf{BRSC}: an open-access benchmark of \textbf{BR}onchus imaging analysis with high-quality pixel-wise \textbf{S}egmentation masks and the \textbf{C}lass of bronchial segments. Experimental results on BRSC show that our proposed method not only achieves the state-of-the-art performance for binary segmentation of bronchial region but also exceeds the best existing method on bronchial branches classification by 6.9\%.
summary: CT-based bronchial tree analysis plays an important role in the computer-aided diagnosis for respiratory diseases, as it could provide structured information for clinicians. The basis of airway analysis is bronchial tree reconstruction, which consists of bronchus segmentation and classification. However, there remains a challenge for accurate bronchial analysis due to the individual variations and the severe class imbalance. In this paper, we propose a region and structure prior embedded framework named BronchusNet to achieve accurate segmentation and classification of bronchial regions in CT images. For bronchus segmentation, we propose an adaptive hard region-aware UNet that incorporates multi-level prior guidance of hard pixel-wise samples in the general Unet segmentation network to achieve better hierarchical feature learning. For the classification of bronchial branches, we propose a hybrid point-voxel graph learning module to fully exploit bronchial structure priors and to support simultaneous feature interactions across different branches. To facilitate the study of bronchial analysis, we contribute~\textbf{BRSC}: an open-access benchmark of \textbf{BR}onchus imaging analysis with high-quality pixel-wise \textbf{S}egmentation masks and the \textbf{C}lass of bronchial segments. Experimental results on BRSC show that our proposed method not only achieves the state-of-the-art performance for binary segmentation of bronchial region but also exceeds the best existing method on bronchial branches classification by 6.9\%.
abstract_zh: 基于CT的支气管树分析在呼吸系统疾病的计算机辅助诊断中发挥着重要作用，因为它可以为临床医生提供结构化信息。气道分析的基础是支气管树重建，包括支气管分割和分类。然而，由于个体差异和严重的类别不平衡，准确的支气管分析仍然存在挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为BronchusNet的区域和结构先验嵌入框架，以实现CT图像中支气管区域的精确分割和分类。对于支气管分割，我们提出了一种自适应硬区域感知 UNet，它在通用 Unet 分割网络中结合了硬像素级样本的多级先验指导，以实现更好的分层特征学习。对于支气管分支的分类，我们提出了一种混合点体素图学习模块，以充分利用支气管结构先验并支持不同分支之间的同时特征交互。为了促进支气管分析的研究，我们贡献了~\textbf{BRSC}：一个开放获取的 \textbf{BR}onchus 成像分析基准，具有高质量的像素级 \textbf{S} 分割掩模和 \textbf{C} 支气管段。 BRSC 上的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法不仅实现了支气管区域二元分割的最先进性能，而且在支气管分支分类方面超过了现有最佳方法 6.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合区域和结构先验信息的深度学习框架BronchusNet，用于CT图像中支气管的分割与分类。
AI.motivation: 支气管分析在呼吸系统疾病辅助诊断中至关重要，但个体差异和类别不平衡导致现有方法精度不足。
AI.method: 设计自适应硬区域感知UNet进行分割，并引入混合点-体素图学习模块挖掘结构先验，同时构建BRSC基准数据集。
AI.result: 在BRSC数据集上，支气管区域二分类分割达到SOTA，支气管分支分类准确率超越现有最佳方法6.9%。
AI.conclusion: BronchusNet通过融合区域与结构先验有效解决了支气管分析难题，BRSC数据集为后续研究提供重要支持。

To facilitate the study of bronchial analysis, we contribute~\textbf{BRSC}: an open-access benchmark of \textbf{BR}onchus imaging analysis with high-quality pixel-wise \textbf{S}egmentation masks and the \textbf{C}lass of bronchial segments. authors_text: Woong Gyu La,Sunil Muralidhara,Lingjie Kong,Pratik Nichat
title: Unified Distributed Environment
title_zh: 统一分布式环境
abstract: We propose Unified Distributed Environment (UDE), an environment virtualization toolkit for reinforcement learning research. UDE is designed to integrate environments built on any simulation platform such as Gazebo, Unity, Unreal, and OpenAI Gym. Through environment virtualization, UDE enables offloading the environment for execution on a remote machine while still maintaining a unified interface. The UDE interface is designed to support multi-agent by default. With environment virtualization and its interface design, the agent policies can be trained in multiple machines for a multi-agent environment. Furthermore, UDE supports integration with existing major RL toolkits for researchers to leverage the benefits. This paper discusses the components of UDE and its design decisions.
summary: We propose Unified Distributed Environment (UDE), an environment virtualization toolkit for reinforcement learning research. UDE is designed to integrate environments built on any simulation platform such as Gazebo, Unity, Unreal, and OpenAI Gym. Through environment virtualization, UDE enables offloading the environment for execution on a remote machine while still maintaining a unified interface. The UDE interface is designed to support multi-agent by default. With environment virtualization and its interface design, the agent policies can be trained in multiple machines for a multi-agent environment. Furthermore, UDE supports integration with existing major RL toolkits for researchers to leverage the benefits. This paper discusses the components of UDE and its design decisions.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了统一分布式环境（UDE），这是一种用于强化学习研究的环境虚拟化工具包。 UDE 旨在集成在任何模拟平台（例如 Gazebo、Unity、Unreal 和 OpenAI Gym）上构建的环境。通过环境虚拟化，UDE 可以卸载环境以在远程计算机上执行，同时仍保持统一的界面。 UDE 接口设计为默认支持多代理。通过环境虚拟化及其界面设计，可以在多台机器上训练代理策略以实现多代理环境。此外，UDE 支持与现有主要 RL 工具包集成，以便研究人员充分利用其优势。本文讨论了 UDE 的组件及其设计决策。

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一分布式环境（UDE）工具包，通过环境虚拟化技术整合多种模拟平台，为强化学习研究提供统一接口和分布式训练支持。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习环境分散于不同模拟平台，缺乏统一接口和分布式训练能力，限制了多智能体研究的效率与扩展性。
AI.method: 设计环境虚拟化框架，将异构环境抽象为统一接口，支持远程执行与多机器分布式训练，兼容主流RL工具包。
AI.result: 实现跨Gazebo、Unity等平台的环境整合，验证了多智能体分布式训练可行性，并提升实验效率。
AI.conclusion: UDE为强化学习提供了灵活的分布式环境解决方案，促进跨平台研究与规模化训练。

search_text: Unified Distributed Environment 统一分布式环境 We propose Unified Distributed Environment (UDE), an environment virtualization toolkit for reinforcement learning research. UDE is designed to integrate environments built on any simulation platform such as Gazebo, Unity, Unreal, and OpenAI Gym. Through environment virtualization, UDE enables offloading the environment for execution on a remote machine while still maintaining a unified interface. The UDE interface is designed to support multi-agent by default. With environment virtualization and its interface design, the agent policies can be trained in multiple machines for a multi-agent environment. Furthermore, UDE supports integration with existing major RL toolkits for researchers to leverage the benefits. This paper discusses the components of UDE and its design decisions. 我们提出了统一分布式环境（UDE），这是一种用于强化学习研究的环境虚拟化工具包。 UDE 旨在集成在任何模拟平台（例如 Gazebo、Unity、Unreal 和 OpenAI Gym）上构建的环境。通过环境虚拟化，UDE 可以卸载环境以在远程计算机上执行，同时仍保持统一的界面。 UDE 接口设计为默认支持多代理。通过环境虚拟化及其界面设计，可以在多台机器上训练代理策略以实现多代理环境。此外，UDE 支持与现有主要 RL 工具包集成，以便研究人员充分利用其优势。本文讨论了 UDE 的组件及其设计决策。 本文提出统一分布式环境（UDE）工具包，通过环境虚拟化技术整合多种模拟平台，为强化学习研究提供统一接口和分布式训练支持。 Woong Gyu La,Sunil Muralidhara,Lingjie Kong,Pratik Nichat cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Chao Yao,Shuo Jin,Meiqin Liu,Xiaojuan Ban
title: Dense residual Transformer for image denoising
title_zh: 用于图像去噪的密集残差 Transformer
comment: Updated on 0514
comments: Updated on 0514
abstract: Image denoising is an important low-level computer vision task, which aims to reconstruct a noise-free and high-quality image from a noisy image. With the development of deep learning, convolutional neural network (CNN) has been gradually applied and achieved great success in image denoising, image compression, image enhancement, etc. Recently, Transformer has been a hot technique, which is widely used to tackle computer vision tasks. However, few Transformer-based methods have been proposed for low-level vision tasks. In this paper, we proposed an image denoising network structure based on Transformer, which is named DenSformer. DenSformer consists of three modules, including a preprocessing module, a local-global feature extraction module, and a reconstruction module. Specifically, the local-global feature extraction module consists of several Sformer groups, each of which has several ETransformer layers and a convolution layer, together with a residual connection. These Sformer groups are densely skip-connected to fuse the feature of different layers, and they jointly capture the local and global information from the given noisy images. We conduct our model on comprehensive experiments. Experimental results prove that our DenSformer achieves improvement compared to some state-of-the-art methods, both for the synthetic noise data and real noise data, in the objective and subjective evaluations.
summary: Image denoising is an important low-level computer vision task, which aims to reconstruct a noise-free and high-quality image from a noisy image. With the development of deep learning, convolutional neural network (CNN) has been gradually applied and achieved great success in image denoising, image compression, image enhancement, etc. Recently, Transformer has been a hot technique, which is widely used to tackle computer vision tasks. However, few Transformer-based methods have been proposed for low-level vision tasks. In this paper, we proposed an image denoising network structure based on Transformer, which is named DenSformer. DenSformer consists of three modules, including a preprocessing module, a local-global feature extraction module, and a reconstruction module. Specifically, the local-global feature extraction module consists of several Sformer groups, each of which has several ETransformer layers and a convolution layer, together with a residual connection. These Sformer groups are densely skip-connected to fuse the feature of different layers, and they jointly capture the local and global information from the given noisy images. We conduct our model on comprehensive experiments. Experimental results prove that our DenSformer achieves improvement compared to some state-of-the-art methods, both for the synthetic noise data and real noise data, in the objective and subjective evaluations.
abstract_zh: 图像去噪是一项重要的低级计算机视觉任务，其目的是从噪声图像中重建无噪声的高质量图像。随着深度学习的发展，卷积神经网络（CNN）逐渐得到应用，并在图像去噪、图像压缩、图像增强等方面取得了巨大成功。近年来，Transformer成为热门技术，被广泛应用于解决计算机视觉任务。然而，针对低级视觉任务提出的基于 Transformer 的方法很少。本文提出了一种基于Transformer的图像去噪网络结构，命名为DenSformer。 DenSformer由三个模块组成，包括预处理模块、局部-全局特征提取模块和重建模块。具体来说，局部-全局特征提取模块由多个Sformer组组成，每个Sformer组都有多个ETransformer层和一个卷积层，以及一个残差连接。这些 Sformer 组密集地跳跃连接以融合不同层的特征，并且它们共同从给定的噪声图像中捕获局部和全局信息。我们通过综合实验来建立我们的模型。实验结果证明，无论是对于合成噪声数据还是真实噪声数据，我们的 DenSformer 在客观和主观评估方面都比一些最先进的方法取得了进步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的图像去噪网络DenSformer，通过结合局部与全局特征提取模块提升去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管卷积神经网络（CNN）在图像去噪中取得成功，但基于Transformer的方法在低级视觉任务中研究较少，需探索Transformer在该领域的应用潜力。
AI.method: DenSformer包含预处理模块、局部-全局特征提取模块（含密集跳连接的Sformer组，每组包含多个ETransformer层与卷积层）及重建模块，通过残差连接融合多层特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，DenSformer在合成噪声和真实噪声数据集上均优于现有先进方法，客观指标与主观评价均表现更优。
AI.conclusion: DenSformer通过融合Transformer的全局建模能力与CNN的局部特征提取，有效提升了图像去噪性能，验证了Transformer在低级视觉任务中的可行性。

authors_text: Chenming Li,Han Ma,Peng Xu,Jiankun Wang,Max Q. -H. Meng
title: BiAIT*: Symmetrical Bidirectional Optimal Path Planning with Adaptive Heuristic
title_zh: BiAIT*：具有自适应启发式的对称双向最优路径规划
abstract: Adaptively Informed Trees (AIT*) is an algorithm that uses the problem-specific heuristic to avoid unnecessary searches, which significantly improves its performance, especially when collision checking is expensive. However, the heuristic estimation in AIT* consumes lots of computational resources, and its asymmetric bidirectional searching strategy cannot fully exploit the potential of the bidirectional method. In this article, we propose an extension of AIT* called BiAIT*. Unlike AIT*, BiAIT* uses symmetrical bidirectional search for both the heuristic and space searching. The proposed method allows BiAIT* to find the initial solution faster than AIT*, and update the heuristic with less computation when a collision occurs. We evaluated the performance of BiAIT* through simulations and experiments, and the results show that BiAIT* can find the solution faster than state-of-the-art methods. We also analyze the reasons for the different performances between BiAIT* and AIT*. Furthermore, we discuss two simple but effective modifications to fully exploit the potential of the adaptively heuristic method.
summary: Adaptively Informed Trees (AIT*) is an algorithm that uses the problem-specific heuristic to avoid unnecessary searches, which significantly improves its performance, especially when collision checking is expensive. However, the heuristic estimation in AIT* consumes lots of computational resources, and its asymmetric bidirectional searching strategy cannot fully exploit the potential of the bidirectional method. In this article, we propose an extension of AIT* called BiAIT*. Unlike AIT*, BiAIT* uses symmetrical bidirectional search for both the heuristic and space searching. The proposed method allows BiAIT* to find the initial solution faster than AIT*, and update the heuristic with less computation when a collision occurs. We evaluated the performance of BiAIT* through simulations and experiments, and the results show that BiAIT* can find the solution faster than state-of-the-art methods. We also analyze the reasons for the different performances between BiAIT* and AIT*. Furthermore, we discuss two simple but effective modifications to fully exploit the potential of the adaptively heuristic method.
abstract_zh: 自适应知情树 (AIT*) 是一种使用针对特定问题的启发式算法来避免不必要的搜索的算法，这显着提高了其性能，尤其是在碰撞检查成本高昂的情况下。然而，AIT*中的启发式估计消耗大量的计算资源，并且其非对称双向搜索策略不能充分发挥双向方法的潜力。在本文中，我们提出了 AIT* 的扩展，称为 BiAIT*。与 AIT* 不同，BiAIT* 使用对称双向搜索进行启发式搜索和空间搜索。所提出的方法允许 BiAIT* 比 AIT* 更快地找到初始解，并在发生碰撞时以更少的计算更新启发式。我们通过模拟和实验评估了 BiAIT* 的性能，结果表明 BiAIT* 可以比最先进的方法更快地找到解决方案。我们还分析了 BiAIT* 和 AIT* 性能不同的原因。此外，我们讨论了两种简单但有效的修改，以充分发挥自适应启发式方法的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的双向最优路径规划算法BiAIT*，通过对称双向搜索策略优化启发式估计和空间搜索，提升路径规划效率。
AI.motivation: 现有AIT*算法的启发式估计计算成本高，且非对称双向搜索策略未能充分发挥双向方法的潜力，导致在碰撞检测复杂场景下效率不足。
AI.method: 设计对称双向搜索框架，同步优化启发式估计与空间搜索；引入碰撞发生时的低计算量启发式更新机制，并提出两种改进策略以增强启发式方法的适应性。
AI.result: 仿真与实验表明，BiAIT*在求解速度上优于当前主流方法，且对称搜索策略有效降低了计算资源消耗。
AI.conclusion: BiAIT*通过对称双向搜索和启发式优化显著提升了路径规划效率，提出的改进策略为适应性启发式方法的应用提供了新思路。

method: 设计对称双向搜索框架，同步优化启发式估计与空间搜索；引入碰撞发生时的低计算量启发式更新机制，并提出两种改进策略以增强启发式方法的适应性。
result: 仿真与实验表明，BiAIT*在求解速度上优于当前主流方法，且对称搜索策略有效降低了计算资源消耗。
conclusion: BiAIT*通过对称双向搜索和启发式优化显著提升了路径规划效率，提出的改进策略为适应性启发式方法的应用提供了新思路。
search_text: BiAIT*: Symmetrical Bidirectional Optimal Path Planning with Adaptive Heuristic BiAIT*：具有自适应启发式的对称双向最优路径规划 Adaptively Informed Trees (AIT*) is an algorithm that uses the problem-specific heuristic to avoid unnecessary searches, which significantly improves its performance, especially when collision checking is expensive. However, the heuristic estimation in AIT* consumes lots of computational resources, and its asymmetric bidirectional searching strategy cannot fully exploit the potential of the bidirectional method. In this article, we propose an extension of AIT* called BiAIT*. Unlike AIT*, BiAIT* uses symmetrical bidirectional search for both the heuristic and space searching. The proposed method allows BiAIT* to find the initial solution faster than AIT*, and update the heuristic with less computation when a collision occurs. We evaluated the performance of BiAIT* through simulations and experiments, and the results show that BiAIT* can find the solution faster than state-of-the-art methods. We also analyze the reasons for the different performances between BiAIT* and AIT*. Furthermore, we discuss two simple but effective modifications to fully exploit the potential of the adaptively heuristic method. 自适应知情树 (AIT*) 是一种使用针对特定问题的启发式算法来避免不必要的搜索的算法，这显着提高了其性能，尤其是在碰撞检查成本高昂的情况下。然而，AIT*中的启发式估计消耗大量的计算资源，并且其非对称双向搜索策略不能充分发挥双向方法的潜力。在本文中，我们提出了 AIT* 的扩展，称为 BiAIT*。与 AIT* 不同，BiAIT* 使用对称双向搜索进行启发式搜索和空间搜索。所提出的方法允许 BiAIT* 比 AIT* 更快地找到初始解，并在发生碰撞时以更少的计算更新启发式。我们通过模拟和实验评估了 BiAIT* 的性能，结果表明 BiAIT* 可以比最先进的方法更快地找到解决方案。我们还分析了 BiAIT* 和 AIT* 性能不同的原因。此外，我们讨论了两种简单但有效的修改，以充分发挥自适应启发式方法的潜力。 本文提出了一种改进的双向最优路径规划算法BiAIT*，通过对称双向搜索策略优化启发式估计和空间搜索，提升路径规划效率。 Chenming Li,Han Ma,Peng Xu,Jiankun Wang,Max Q. -H. Meng cs.RO

authors_text: Cori Faklaris,Laura Dabbish,Jason I. Hong
title: Experimental Evidence for Using a TTM Stages of Change Model in Boosting Progress Toward 2FA Adoption
title_zh: 使用 TTM 变革阶段模型促进 2FA 采用进展的实验证据
comment: 41 pages, including the stage algorithm programmed on Mturk, the survey flow and specific items used, and a link to download the five informational handouts used for the control condition and the 2FA intervention conditions
comments: 41 pages, including the stage algorithm programmed on Mturk, the survey flow and specific items used, and a link to download the five informational handouts used for the control condition and the 2FA intervention conditions
abstract: Behavior change ideas from health psychology can also help boost end user compliance with security recommendations, such as adopting two-factor authentication (2FA). Our research adapts the Transtheoretical Model Stages of Change from health and wellness research to a cybersecurity context. We first create and validate an assessment to identify workers on Amazon Mechanical Turk who have not enabled 2FA for their accounts as being in Stage 1 (no intention to adopt 2FA) or Stages 2-3 (some intention to adopt 2FA). We randomly assigned participants to receive an informational intervention with varied content (highlighting process, norms, or both) or not. After three days, we again surveyed workers for Stage of Amazon 2FA adoption. We found that those in the intervention group showed more progress toward action/maintenance (Stages 4-5) than those in the control group, and those who received content highlighting the process of enabling 2FA were significantly more likely to progress toward 2FA adoption. Our work contributes support for applying a Stages of Change Model in usable security.
summary: Behavior change ideas from health psychology can also help boost end user compliance with security recommendations, such as adopting two-factor authentication (2FA). Our research adapts the Transtheoretical Model Stages of Change from health and wellness research to a cybersecurity context. We first create and validate an assessment to identify workers on Amazon Mechanical Turk who have not enabled 2FA for their accounts as being in Stage 1 (no intention to adopt 2FA) or Stages 2-3 (some intention to adopt 2FA). We randomly assigned participants to receive an informational intervention with varied content (highlighting process, norms, or both) or not. After three days, we again surveyed workers for Stage of Amazon 2FA adoption. We found that those in the intervention group showed more progress toward action/maintenance (Stages 4-5) than those in the control group, and those who received content highlighting the process of enabling 2FA were significantly more likely to progress toward 2FA adoption. Our work contributes support for applying a Stages of Change Model in usable security.
abstract_zh: 来自健康心理学的行为改变想法还可以帮助提高最终用户对安全建议的遵从性，例如采用双因素身份验证 (2FA)。我们的研究采用了从健康和保健研究到网络安全背景的跨理论变革模型阶段。我们首先创建并验证一项评估，以确定 Amazon Mechanical Turk 上未为其账户启用 2FA 的工作人员处于第 1 阶段（无意采用 2FA）或第 2-3 阶段（部分有意采用 2FA）。我们随机分配参与者接受或不接受不同内容（强调过程、规范或两者）的信息干预。三天后，我们再次对员工进行了 Stage of Amazon 2FA 采用情况调查。我们发现，干预组的人比对照组的人在行动/维护（第 4-5 阶段）方面取得了更多进展，而那些收到强调启用 2FA 过程的内容的人更有可能在采用 2FA 方面取得进展。我们的工作为在可用安全性中应用变革阶段模型提供了支持。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了使用阶段变化模型（TTM）来促进用户采用双重身份验证（2FA）的实验性证据。
AI.motivation: 论文的动机是利用健康心理学中的行为改变理论来提高用户对安全建议的遵守程度，例如采用双重身份验证（2FA）。
AI.method: 研究者通过创建并验证一个评估工具，识别出尚未启用2FA的Amazon Mechanical Turk工人处于阶段1（无采用意图）或阶段2-3（有一定采用意图）。然后将参与者随机分配到接受不同内容的信息干预组（强调过程、规范或两者）或对照组。
AI.result: 结果显示，干预组的参与者比对照组更有可能向行动/维持阶段（阶段4-5）进展，特别是那些接收到强调启用2FA过程内容的参与者更可能进展到2FA采用。
AI.conclusion: 论文支持在可用安全领域应用阶段变化模型，以促进用户行为改变并提高2FA的采用率。

Our research adapts the Transtheoretical Model Stages of Change from health and wellness research to a cybersecurity context. We first create and validate an assessment to identify workers on Amazon Mechanical Turk who have not enabled 2FA for their accounts as being in Stage 1 (no intention to adopt 2FA) or Stages 2-3 (some intention to adopt 2FA). We randomly assigned participants to receive an informational intervention with varied content (highlighting process, norms, or both) or not. After three days, we again surveyed workers for Stage of Amazon 2FA adoption. We found that those in the intervention group showed more progress toward action/maintenance (Stages 4-5) than those in the control group, and those who received content highlighting the process of enabling 2FA were significantly more likely to progress toward 2FA adoption. Our work contributes support for applying a Stages of Change Model in usable security. 来自健康心理学的行为改变想法还可以帮助提高最终用户对安全建议的遵从性，例如采用双因素身份验证 (2FA)。我们的研究采用了从健康和保健研究到网络安全背景的跨理论变革模型阶段。我们首先创建并验证一项评估，以确定 Amazon Mechanical Turk 上未为其账户启用 2FA 的工作人员处于第 1 阶段（无意采用 2FA）或第 2-3 阶段（部分有意采用 2FA）。我们随机分配参与者接受或不接受不同内容（强调过程、规范或两者）的信息干预。三天后，我们再次对员工进行了 Stage of Amazon 2FA 采用情况调查。我们发现，干预组的人比对照组的人在行动/维护（第 4-5 阶段）方面取得了更多进展，而那些收到强调启用 2FA 过程的内容的人更有可能在采用 2FA 方面取得进展。我们的工作为在可用安全性中应用变革阶段模型提供了支持。 该论文研究了使用阶段变化模型（TTM）来促进用户采用双重身份验证（2FA）的实验性证据。 Cori Faklaris,Laura Dabbish,Jason I. authors_text: Bishwamittra Ghosh,Dmitry Malioutov,Kuldeep S. Meel
title: Efficient Learning of Interpretable Classification Rules
title_zh: 可解释分类规则的高效学习
comment: 41 Pages, Published in JAIR Vol. 74 (2022)
comments: 41 Pages, Published in JAIR Vol. 74 (2022)
abstract: Machine learning has become omnipresent with applications in various safety-critical domains such as medical, law, and transportation. In these domains, high-stake decisions provided by machine learning necessitate researchers to design interpretable models, where the prediction is understandable to a human. In interpretable machine learning, rule-based classifiers are particularly effective in representing the decision boundary through a set of rules comprising input features. The interpretability of rule-based classifiers is in general related to the size of the rules, where smaller rules are considered more interpretable. To learn such a classifier, the brute-force direct approach is to consider an optimization problem that tries to learn the smallest classification rule that has close to maximum accuracy. This optimization problem is computationally intractable due to its combinatorial nature and thus, the problem is not scalable in large datasets. To this end, in this paper we study the triangular relationship among the accuracy, interpretability, and scalability of learning rule-based classifiers. The contribution of this paper is an interpretable learning framework IMLI, that is based on maximum satisfiability (MaxSAT) for synthesizing classification rules expressible in proposition logic. Despite the progress of MaxSAT solving in the last decade, the straightforward MaxSAT-based solution cannot scale. Therefore, we incorporate an efficient incremental learning technique inside the MaxSAT formulation by integrating mini-batch learning and iterative rule-learning. In our experiments, IMLI achieves the best balance among prediction accuracy, interpretability, and scalability. As an application, we deploy IMLI in learning popular interpretable classifiers such as decision lists and decision sets.
summary: Machine learning has become omnipresent with applications in various safety-critical domains such as medical, law, and transportation. In these domains, high-stake decisions provided by machine learning necessitate researchers to design interpretable models, where the prediction is understandable to a human. In interpretable machine learning, rule-based classifiers are particularly effective in representing the decision boundary through a set of rules comprising input features. The interpretability of rule-based classifiers is in general related to the size of the rules, where smaller rules are considered more interpretable. To learn such a classifier, the brute-force direct approach is to consider an optimization problem that tries to learn the smallest classification rule that has close to maximum accuracy. This optimization problem is computationally intractable due to its combinatorial nature and thus, the problem is not scalable in large datasets. To this end, in this paper we study the triangular relationship among the accuracy, interpretability, and scalability of learning rule-based classifiers. The contribution of this paper is an interpretable learning framework IMLI, that is based on maximum satisfiability (MaxSAT) for synthesizing classification rules expressible in proposition logic. Despite the progress of MaxSAT solving in the last decade, the straightforward MaxSAT-based solution cannot scale. Therefore, we incorporate an efficient incremental learning technique inside the MaxSAT formulation by integrating mini-batch learning and iterative rule-learning. In our experiments, IMLI achieves the best balance among prediction accuracy, interpretability, and scalability. As an application, we deploy IMLI in learning popular interpretable classifiers such as decision lists and decision sets.
abstract_zh: 机器学习在医疗、法律和交通等各种安全关键领域的应用已经无处不在。在这些领域，机器学习提供的高风险决策要求研究人员设计可解释的模型，其中的预测是人类可以理解的。在可解释的机器学习中，基于规则的分类器在通过一组包含输入特征的规则表示决策边界方面特别有效。基于规则的分类器的可解释性通常与规则的大小有关，其中较小的规则被认为更容易解释。为了学习这样的分类器，暴力直接方法是考虑一个优化问题，试图学习接近最大准确度的最小分类规则。由于其组合性质，该优化问题在计算上很难处理，因此该问题在大型数据集中不可扩展。为此，在本文中，我们研究了基于规则的学习分类器的准确性、可解释性和可扩展性之间的三角关系。本文的贡献是一个可解释的学习框架 IMLI，它基于最大可满足性（MaxSAT），用于合成可在命题逻辑中表达的分类规则。尽管 MaxSAT 解决方案在过去十年中取得了进步，但基于 MaxSAT 的简单解决方案无法扩展。因此，我们通过集成小批量学习和迭代规则学习，在 MaxSAT 公式中融入了高效的增量学习技术。在我们的实验中，IMLI 在预测准确性、可解释性和可扩展性之间实现了最佳平衡。作为一个应用程序，我们部署 IMLI 来学习流行的可解释分类器，例如决策列表和决策集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效可解释分类规则学习框架IMLI，通过结合最大可满足性（MaxSAT）与增量学习技术，解决规则分类器在准确率、可解释性和可扩展性间的平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 在医疗、法律等安全关键领域，机器学习模型需具备可解释性以确保人类可理解其决策，但传统规则分类器面临准确率、可解释性与可扩展性难以兼顾的挑战。
AI.method: 设计基于MaxSAT的IMLI框架，通过集成小批量学习与迭代规则学习的增量技术，优化分类规则的生成过程，提升大规模数据下的效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，IMLI在预测准确率、规则简洁性（可解释性）及数据规模适应性上均优于现有方法，成功应用于决策列表和决策集等经典可解释模型的学习。
AI.conclusion: IMLI通过将MaxSAT与增量学习结合，有效解决了规则分类器的三重矛盾，为安全关键领域的可解释AI提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: Efficient Learning of Interpretable Classification Rules 可解释分类规则的高效学习 Machine learning has become omnipresent with applications in various safety-critical domains such as medical, law, and transportation. In these domains, high-stake decisions provided by machine learning necessitate researchers to design interpretable models, where the prediction is understandable to a human. In interpretable machine learning, rule-based classifiers are particularly effective in representing the decision boundary through a set of rules comprising input features. The interpretability of rule-based classifiers is in general related to the size of the rules, where smaller rules are considered more interpretable. To learn such a classifier, the brute-force direct approach is to consider an optimization problem that tries to learn the smallest classification rule that has close to maximum accuracy. This optimization problem is computationally intractable due to its combinatorial nature and thus, the problem is not scalable in large datasets. To this end, in this paper we study the triangular relationship among the accuracy, interpretability, and scalability of learning rule-based classifiers. The contribution of this paper is an interpretable learning framework IMLI, that is based on maximum satisfiability (MaxSAT) for synthesizing classification rules expressible in proposition logic. Despite the progress of MaxSAT solving in the last decade, the straightforward MaxSAT-based solution cannot scale. Therefore, we incorporate an efficient incremental learning technique inside the MaxSAT formulation by integrating mini-batch learning and iterative rule-learning. In our experiments, IMLI achieves the best balance among prediction accuracy, interpretability, and scalability. As an application, we deploy IMLI in learning popular interpretable classifiers such as decision lists and decision sets. 机器学习在医疗、法律和交通等各种安全关键领域的应用已经无处不在。在这些领域，机器学习提供的高风险决策要求研究人员设计可解释的模型，其中的预测是人类可以理解的。在可解释的机器学习中，基于规则的分类器在通过一组包含输入特征的规则表示决策边界方面特别有效。基于规则的分类器的可解释性通常与规则的大小有关，其中较小的规则被认为更容易解释。为了学习这样的分类器，暴力直接方法是考虑一个优化问题，试图学习接近最大准确度的最小分类规则。由于其组合性质，该优化问题在计算上很难处理，因此该问题在大型数据集中不可扩展。为此，在本文中，我们研究了基于规则的学习分类器的准确性、可解释性和可扩展性之间的三角关系。本文的贡献是一个可解释的学习框架 IMLI，它基于最大可满足性（MaxSAT），用于合成可在命题逻辑中表达的分类规则。尽管 MaxSAT 解决方案在过去十年中取得了进步，但基于 MaxSAT 的简单解决方案无法扩展。因此，我们通过集成小批量学习和迭代规则学习，在 MaxSAT 公式中融入了高效的增量学习技术。在我们的实验中，IMLI 在预测准确性、可解释性和可扩展性之间实现了最佳平衡。作为一个应用程序，我们部署 IMLI 来学习流行的可解释分类器，例如决策列表和决策集。 本文提出一种高效可解释分类规则学习框架IMLI，通过结合最大可满足性（MaxSAT）与增量学习技术，解决规则分类器在准确率、可解释性和可扩展性间的平衡问题。 Bishwamittra Ghosh,Dmitry Malioutov,Kuldeep S. Meel cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Donald Bertucci,Md Montaser Hamid,Yashwanthi Anand,Anita Ruangrotsakun,Delyar Tabatabai,Melissa Perez,Minsuk Kahng
title: DendroMap: Visual Exploration of Large-Scale Image Datasets for Machine Learning with Treemaps
title_zh: DendroMap：使用树形图进行机器学习的大规模图像数据集的可视化探索
comment: This paper has been accepted for the IEEE VIS 2022 Conference and will be published in the IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
comments: This paper has been accepted for the IEEE VIS 2022 Conference and will be published in the IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
abstract: In this paper, we present DendroMap, a novel approach to interactively exploring large-scale image datasets for machine learning (ML). ML practitioners often explore image datasets by generating a grid of images or projecting high-dimensional representations of images into 2-D using dimensionality reduction techniques (e.g., t-SNE). However, neither approach effectively scales to large datasets because images are ineffectively organized and interactions are insufficiently supported. To address these challenges, we develop DendroMap by adapting Treemaps, a well-known visualization technique. DendroMap effectively organizes images by extracting hierarchical cluster structures from high-dimensional representations of images. It enables users to make sense of the overall distributions of datasets and interactively zoom into specific areas of interests at multiple levels of abstraction. Our case studies with widely-used image datasets for deep learning demonstrate that users can discover insights about datasets and trained models by examining the diversity of images, identifying underperforming subgroups, and analyzing classification errors. We conducted a user study that evaluates the effectiveness of DendroMap in grouping and searching tasks by comparing it with a gridified version of t-SNE and found that participants preferred DendroMap. DendroMap is available at https://div-lab.github.io/dendromap/.
summary: In this paper, we present DendroMap, a novel approach to interactively exploring large-scale image datasets for machine learning (ML). ML practitioners often explore image datasets by generating a grid of images or projecting high-dimensional representations of images into 2-D using dimensionality reduction techniques (e.g., t-SNE). However, neither approach effectively scales to large datasets because images are ineffectively organized and interactions are insufficiently supported. To address these challenges, we develop DendroMap by adapting Treemaps, a well-known visualization technique. DendroMap effectively organizes images by extracting hierarchical cluster structures from high-dimensional representations of images. It enables users to make sense of the overall distributions of datasets and interactively zoom into specific areas of interests at multiple levels of abstraction. Our case studies with widely-used image datasets for deep learning demonstrate that users can discover insights about datasets and trained models by examining the diversity of images, identifying underperforming subgroups, and analyzing classification errors. We conducted a user study that evaluates the effectiveness of DendroMap in grouping and searching tasks by comparing it with a gridified version of t-SNE and found that participants preferred DendroMap. DendroMap is available at https://div-lab.github.io/dendromap/.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 DendroMap，这是一种交互式探索机器学习 (ML) 大规模图像数据集的新方法。机器学习从业者通常通过生成图像网格或使用降维技术（例如 t-SNE）将图像的高维表示投影为二维来探索图像数据集。然而，这两种方法都无法有效地扩展到大型数据集，因为图像组织无效并且交互支持不足。为了应对这些挑战，我们通过采用众所周知的可视化技术 Treemaps 来开发 DendroMap。 DendroMap 通过从图像的高维表示中提取层次聚类结构来有效地组织图像。它使用户能够了解数据集的整体分布，并以交互方式放大多个抽象级别的特定兴趣领域。我们对广泛使用的深度学习图像数据集进行的案例研究表明，用户可以通过检查图像的多样性、识别表现不佳的子组和分析分类错误来发现有关数据集和训练模型的见解。我们进行了一项用户研究，通过将 DendroMap 与网格化版本的 t-SNE 进行比较来评估 DendroMap 在分组和搜索任务中的有效性，并发现参与者更喜欢 DendroMap。 DendroMap 可在 https://div-lab.github.io/dendromap/ 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DendroMap，一种基于树状图的交互式方法，用于探索大规模图像数据集以支持机器学习。
AI.motivation: 传统方法如图像网格或t-SNE投影在处理大规模数据集时存在组织效率低和交互支持不足的问题。
AI.method: 通过适应树状图技术，从高维图像表示中提取分层聚类结构，实现多层级抽象的交互式探索。
AI.result: 案例研究表明用户能发现数据集多样性、识别欠佳子群并分析分类错误，用户研究显示DendroMap优于t-SNE网格。
AI.conclusion: DendroMap有效解决了大规模图像数据集的可视化探索问题，提升了机器学习实践中的数据分析效率。

authors_text: Chuanbo Hu,Shan Jia,Fan Zhang,Xin Li
title: A Saliency-Guided Street View Image Inpainting Framework for Efficient Last-Meters Wayfinding
title_zh: 用于高效最后一米寻路的显着性引导街景图像修复框架
abstract: Global Positioning Systems (GPS) have played a crucial role in various navigation applications. Nevertheless, localizing the perfect destination within the last few meters remains an important but unresolved problem. Limited by the GPS positioning accuracy, navigation systems always show users a vicinity of a destination, but not its exact location. Street view images (SVI) in maps as an immersive media technology have served as an aid to provide the physical environment for human last-meters wayfinding. However, due to the large diversity of geographic context and acquisition conditions, the captured SVI always contains various distracting objects (e.g., pedestrians and vehicles), which will distract human visual attention from efficiently finding the destination in the last few meters. To address this problem, we highlight the importance of reducing visual distraction in image-based wayfinding by proposing a saliency-guided image inpainting framework. It aims at redirecting human visual attention from distracting objects to destination-related objects for more efficient and accurate wayfinding in the last meters. Specifically, a context-aware distracting object detection method driven by deep salient object detection has been designed to extract distracting objects from three semantic levels in SVI. Then we employ a large-mask inpainting method with fast Fourier convolutions to remove the detected distracting objects. Experimental results with both qualitative and quantitative analysis show that our saliency-guided inpainting method can not only achieve great perceptual quality in street view images but also redirect the human's visual attention to focus more on static location-related objects than distracting ones. The human-based evaluation also justified the effectiveness of our method in improving the efficiency of locating the target destination.
summary: Global Positioning Systems (GPS) have played a crucial role in various navigation applications. Nevertheless, localizing the perfect destination within the last few meters remains an important but unresolved problem. Limited by the GPS positioning accuracy, navigation systems always show users a vicinity of a destination, but not its exact location. Street view images (SVI) in maps as an immersive media technology have served as an aid to provide the physical environment for human last-meters wayfinding. However, due to the large diversity of geographic context and acquisition conditions, the captured SVI always contains various distracting objects (e.g., pedestrians and vehicles), which will distract human visual attention from efficiently finding the destination in the last few meters. To address this problem, we highlight the importance of reducing visual distraction in image-based wayfinding by proposing a saliency-guided image inpainting framework. It aims at redirecting human visual attention from distracting objects to destination-related objects for more efficient and accurate wayfinding in the last meters. Specifically, a context-aware distracting object detection method driven by deep salient object detection has been designed to extract distracting objects from three semantic levels in SVI. Then we employ a large-mask inpainting method with fast Fourier convolutions to remove the detected distracting objects. Experimental results with both qualitative and quantitative analysis show that our saliency-guided inpainting method can not only achieve great perceptual quality in street view images but also redirect the human's visual attention to focus more on static location-related objects than distracting ones. The human-based evaluation also justified the effectiveness of our method in improving the efficiency of locating the target destination.
abstract_zh: 全球定位系统（GPS）在各种导航应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，在最后几米内定位完美目的地仍然是一个重要但尚未解决的问题。受GPS定位精度的限制，导航系统总是向用户显示目的地的附近区域，而不是其确切位置。地图中的街景图像 (SVI) 作为一种沉浸式媒体技术，为人类最后一米寻路提供了物理环境。然而，由于地理环境和采集条件的巨大多样性，捕获的SVI总是包含各种分散注意力的物体（例如行人和车辆），这会分散人类的视觉注意力，无法有效地找到最后几米的目的地。为了解决这个问题，我们通过提出显着性引导的图像修复框架来强调减少基于图像的寻路中视觉干扰的重要性。它的目的是将人类的视觉注意力从分散注意力的物体转移到与目的地相关的物体上，以便在最后几米内更高效、更准确地寻路。具体来说，设计了一种由深度显着对象检测驱动的上下文感知干扰对象检测方法，用于从 SVI 的三个语义级别中提取干扰对象。然后，我们采用具有快速傅里叶卷积的大掩模修复方法来去除检测到的干扰对象。定性和定量分析的实验结果表明，我们的显着性引导修复方法不仅可以在街景图像中实现良好的感知质量，而且可以将人类的视觉注意力更多地集中在静态位置相关的物体上，而不是分散注意力的物体。基于人的评估也证明了我们的方法在提高目标目的地定位效率方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于显著性引导的街景图像修复框架，旨在通过去除图像中的干扰物来提高最后一米导航的效率。
AI.motivation: GPS定位精度限制导致导航系统无法精确显示目的地位置，而街景图像中的行人、车辆等干扰物会分散用户视觉注意力，影响最后一米导航效率。
AI.method: 设计基于深度显著性检测的上下文感知干扰物检测方法，从三个语义层级提取干扰物，并采用大掩码修复算法结合快速傅里叶卷积去除干扰物。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在感知质量上表现优异，能有效引导用户视觉注意力聚焦于静态目标相关物体，人类评估验证了其提升定位效率的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显著性引导的图像修复方法可有效减少街景图像干扰，为最后一米导航提供更精准的视觉辅助，提升定位效率与准确性。

search_text: A Saliency-Guided Street View Image Inpainting Framework for Efficient Last-Meters Wayfinding 用于高效最后一米寻路的显着性引导街景图像修复框架 Global Positioning Systems (GPS) have played a crucial role in various navigation applications. Nevertheless, localizing the perfect destination within the last few meters remains an important but unresolved problem. Limited by the GPS positioning accuracy, navigation systems always show users a vicinity of a destination, but not its exact location. Street view images (SVI) in maps as an immersive media technology have served as an aid to provide the physical environment for human last-meters wayfinding. However, due to the large diversity of geographic context and acquisition conditions, the captured SVI always contains various distracting objects (e.g., pedestrians and vehicles), which will distract human visual attention from efficiently finding the destination in the last few meters. To address this problem, we highlight the importance of reducing visual distraction in image-based wayfinding by proposing a saliency-guided image inpainting framework. It aims at redirecting human visual attention from distracting objects to destination-related objects for more efficient and accurate wayfinding in the last meters. Specifically, a context-aware distracting object detection method driven by deep salient object detection has been designed to extract distracting objects from three semantic levels in SVI. Then we employ a large-mask inpainting method with fast Fourier convolutions to remove the detected distracting objects. Experimental results with both qualitative and quantitative analysis show that our saliency-guided inpainting method can not only achieve great perceptual quality in street view images but also redirect the human's visual attention to focus more on static location-related objects than distracting ones. The human-based evaluation also justified the effectiveness of our method in improving the efficiency of locating the target destination. 全球定位系统（GPS）在各种导航应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，在最后几米内定位完美目的地仍然是一个重要但尚未解决的问题。受GPS定位精度的限制，导航系统总是向用户显示目的地的附近区域，而不是其确切位置。地图中的街景图像 (SVI) 作为一种沉浸式媒体技术，为人类最后一米寻路提供了物理环境。然而，由于地理环境和采集条件的巨大多样性，捕获的SVI总是包含各种分散注意力的物体（例如行人和车辆），这会分散人类的视觉注意力，无法有效地找到最后几米的目的地。为了解决这个问题，我们通过提出显着性引导的图像修复框架来强调减少基于图像的寻路中视觉干扰的重要性。它的目的是将人类的视觉注意力从分散注意力的物体转移到与目的地相关的物体上，以便在最后几米内更高效、更准确地寻路。具体来说，设计了一种由深度显着对象检测驱动的上下文感知干扰对象检测方法，用于从 SVI 的三个语义级别中提取干扰对象。然后，我们采用具有快速傅里叶卷积的大掩模修复方法来去除检测到的干扰对象。定性和定量分析的实验结果表明，我们的显着性引导修复方法不仅可以在街景图像中实现良好的感知质量，而且可以将人类的视觉注意力更多地集中在静态位置相关的物体上，而不是分散注意力的物体。基于人的评估也证明了我们的方法在提高目标目的地定位效率方面的有效性。 本文提出一种基于显著性引导的街景图像修复框架，旨在通过去除图像中的干扰物来提高最后一米导航的效率。 Chuanbo Hu,Shan Jia,Fan Zhang,Xin Li cs.CV

authors_text: Sebastian Braun,Maria Luis Valero
title: Task splitting for DNN-based acoustic echo and noise removal
title_zh: 基于 DNN 的声学回声和噪声消除的任务分割
comment: to appear in IEEE IWAENC 2022
comments: to appear in IEEE IWAENC 2022
abstract: Neural networks have led to tremendous performance gains for single-task speech enhancement, such as noise suppression and acoustic echo cancellation (AEC). In this work, we evaluate whether it is more useful to use a single joint or separate modules to tackle these problems. We describe different possible implementations and give insights into their performance and efficiency. We show that using a separate echo cancellation module and a module for noise and residual echo removal results in less near-end speech distortion and better performance during double-talk at same complexity.
summary: Neural networks have led to tremendous performance gains for single-task speech enhancement, such as noise suppression and acoustic echo cancellation (AEC). In this work, we evaluate whether it is more useful to use a single joint or separate modules to tackle these problems. We describe different possible implementations and give insights into their performance and efficiency. We show that using a separate echo cancellation module and a module for noise and residual echo removal results in less near-end speech distortion and better performance during double-talk at same complexity.
abstract_zh: 神经网络为单任务语音增强带来了巨大的性能提升，例如噪声抑制和声学回声消除 (AEC)。在这项工作中，我们评估使用单个联合或单独的模块来解决这些问题是否更有用。我们描述了不同的可能实现，并深入了解它们的性能和效率。我们表明，使用单独的回声消除模块以及噪声和残留回声消除模块可以减少近端语音失真，并在相同复杂度的双讲过程中获得更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于深度神经网络的声学回声和噪声去除任务中，采用联合模块与分离模块的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管神经网络在单任务语音增强中表现优异，但未明确联合处理回声消除与噪声抑制是否优于分离处理，需探索最优任务划分方式。
AI.method: 设计并比较两种模块结构：1) 联合处理回声与噪声的单一模块；2) 分离的回声消除模块与噪声/残留回声去除模块，分析其性能与效率。
AI.result: 分离模块方案在相同复杂度下显著降低近端语音失真，且在双讲场景中表现优于联合模块。
AI.conclusion: 任务分离架构能更有效处理回声与噪声，尤其在双讲情况下可兼顾性能与语音质量。

authors_text: Mohamed R. Ibrahim,Terry Lyons
title: ImageSig: A signature transform for ultra-lightweight image recognition
title_zh: ImageSig：用于超轻量级图像识别的签名变换
comment: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE conference on computer vision and pattern recognition (CVPR) workshops,2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE conference on computer vision and pattern recognition (CVPR) workshops,2022
abstract: This paper introduces a new lightweight method for image recognition. ImageSig is based on computing signatures and does not require a convolutional structure or an attention-based encoder. It is striking to the authors that it achieves: a) an accuracy for 64 X 64 RGB images that exceeds many of the state-of-the-art methods and simultaneously b) requires orders of magnitude less FLOPS, power and memory footprint. The pretrained model can be as small as 44.2 KB in size. ImageSig shows unprecedented performance on hardware such as Raspberry Pi and Jetson-nano. ImageSig treats images as streams with multiple channels. These streams are parameterized by spatial directions. We contribute to the functionality of signature and rough path theory to stream-like data and vision tasks on static images beyond temporal streams. With very few parameters and small size models, the key advantage is that one could have many of these "detectors" assembled on the same chip; moreover, the feature acquisition can be performed once and shared between different models of different tasks - further accelerating the process. This contributes to energy efficiency and the advancements of embedded AI at the edge.
summary: This paper introduces a new lightweight method for image recognition. ImageSig is based on computing signatures and does not require a convolutional structure or an attention-based encoder. It is striking to the authors that it achieves: a) an accuracy for 64 X 64 RGB images that exceeds many of the state-of-the-art methods and simultaneously b) requires orders of magnitude less FLOPS, power and memory footprint. The pretrained model can be as small as 44.2 KB in size. ImageSig shows unprecedented performance on hardware such as Raspberry Pi and Jetson-nano. ImageSig treats images as streams with multiple channels. These streams are parameterized by spatial directions. We contribute to the functionality of signature and rough path theory to stream-like data and vision tasks on static images beyond temporal streams. With very few parameters and small size models, the key advantage is that one could have many of these "detectors" assembled on the same chip; moreover, the feature acquisition can be performed once and shared between different models of different tasks - further accelerating the process. This contributes to energy efficiency and the advancements of embedded AI at the edge.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的轻量级图像识别方法。 ImageSig 基于计算签名，不需要卷积结构或基于注意力的编码器。令作者惊讶的是，它实现了：a) 64 X 64 RGB 图像的精度超过了许多最先进的方法，同时 b) 所需的 FLOPS、功耗和内存占用量减少了几个数量级。预训练模型的大小可以小至 44.2 KB。 ImageSig 在 Raspberry Pi 和 Jetson-nano 等硬件上展示了前所未有的性能。 ImageSig 将图像视为具有多个通道的流。这些流由空间方向参数化。我们为超越时间流的静态图像上的类流数据和视觉任务的签名和粗糙路径理论的功能做出了贡献。由于参数很少且模型尺寸较小，其关键优势在于可以将许多此类“探测器”组装在同一芯片上；此外，特征获取可以执行一次并在不同任务的不同模型之间共享——进一步加速该过程。这有助于提高能源效率和边缘嵌入式人工智能的进步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种超轻量级图像识别方法ImageSig，无需卷积结构或注意力机制，实现高精度低资源消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有图像识别模型计算量大、能耗高，难以部署在边缘设备。本文旨在开发一种参数少、内存占用小且高效能的图像识别方案。
AI.method: 将图像视为多通道流，通过空间方向参数化并应用签名与粗路径理论，直接计算图像特征，避免传统卷积和注意力结构。
AI.result: 在64x64 RGB图像上精度超越SOTA方法，模型体积小至44.2 KB，FLOPS、功耗和内存需求降低多个数量级，在树莓派等硬件上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: ImageSig为边缘AI提供了高效能、低资源消耗的解决方案，通过特征共享和多检测器集成推动嵌入式视觉系统发展。

authors_text: Sergio Machaca,Eric Cao,Amy Chi,Gina Adrales,Katherine J Kuchenbecker,Jeremy D Brown
title: Wrist-Squeezing Force Feedback Improves Accuracy and Speed in Robotic Surgery Training
title_zh: 手腕挤压力反馈提高了机器人手术训练的准确性和速度
comment: 6 figures, 8 pages
comments: 6 figures, 8 pages
abstract: Current robotic minimally invasive surgery (RMIS) platforms provide surgeons with no haptic feedback of the robot's physical interactions. This limitation forces surgeons to rely heavily on visual feedback and can make it challenging for surgical trainees to manipulate tissue gently. Prior research has demonstrated that haptic feedback can increase task accuracy in RMIS training. However, it remains unclear whether these improvements represent a fundamental improvement in skill, or if they simply stem from re-prioritizing accuracy over task completion time. In this study, we provide haptic feedback of the force applied by the surgical instruments using custom wrist-squeezing devices. We hypothesize that individuals receiving haptic feedback will increase accuracy (produce less force) while increasing their task completion time, compared to a control group receiving no haptic feedback. To test this hypothesis, N=21 novice participants were asked to repeatedly complete a ring rollercoaster surgical training task as quickly as possible. Results show that participants receiving haptic feedback apply significantly less force (0.67 N) than the control group, and they complete the task no faster or slower than the control group after twelve repetitions. Furthermore, participants in the feedback group decreased their task completion times significantly faster (7.68%) than participants in the control group (5.26%). This form of haptic feedback, therefore, has the potential to help trainees improve their technical accuracy without compromising speed.

Results show that participants receiving haptic feedback apply significantly less force (0.67 N) than the control group, and they complete the task no faster or slower than the control group after twelve repetitions. Furthermore, participants in the feedback group decreased their task completion times significantly faster (7.68%) than participants in the control group (5.26%). This form of haptic feedback, therefore, has the potential to help trainees improve their technical accuracy without compromising speed.
abstract_zh: 当前的机器人微创手术（RMIS）平台为外科医生提供了机器人物理交互的无触觉反馈。这种限制迫使外科医生严重依赖视觉反馈，并且使外科受训者难以轻轻地操纵组织。先前的研究表明，触觉反馈可以提高 RMIS 训练中的任务准确性。然而，目前尚不清楚这些改进是否代表了技能的根本改进，或者它们是否只是源于重新优先考虑准确性而不是任务完成时间。在这项研究中，我们使用定制的手腕挤压设备提供手术器械施加的力的触觉反馈。我们假设，与没有接收触觉反馈的对照组相比，接收触觉反馈的个体会提高准确性（产生更少的力），同时增加任务完成时间。为了检验这一假设，N=21 名新手参与者被要求尽快重复完成环形过山车手术训练任务。结果显示，接受触觉反馈的参与者所施加的力明显小于对照组（0.67 N），并且在重复 12 次后，他们完成任务的速度并不比对照组快或慢。此外，反馈组的参与者减少任务完成时间的速度 (7.68%) 明显快于对照组的参与者 (5.26%)。因此，这种形式的触觉反馈有可能帮助学员在不影响速度的情况下提高技术准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文主要评估了手腕挤压式触觉反馈对机器人手术训练中准确性和速度的影响。
AI.motivation: 当前机器人微创手术平台缺乏触觉反馈，导致学员难以精确控制力度，仅依赖视觉反馈可能影响训练效果。
AI.method: 使用定制手腕挤压装置提供触觉反馈，21名新手参与者重复完成环形过山车任务，比较有无反馈组的力度和完成时间。
AI.result: 反馈组施加的力度显著较低（0.67N），且任务完成时间改善更快（7.68% vs 5.26%）。
AI.conclusion: 该触觉反馈能提升学员技术准确性，且不牺牲速度，有望应用于手术培训。
