search_text: Wrist-Squeezing Force Feedback Improves Accuracy and Speed in Robotic Surgery Training 手腕挤压力反馈提高了机器人手术训练的准确性和速度 Current robotic minimally invasive surgery (RMIS) platforms provide surgeons with no haptic feedback of the robot's physical interactions. This limitation forces surgeons to rely heavily on visual feedback and can make it challenging for surgical trainees to manipulate tissue gently. Prior research has demonstrated that haptic feedback can increase task accuracy in RMIS training. However, it remains unclear whether these improvements represent a fundamental improvement in skill, or if they simply stem from re-prioritizing accuracy over task completion time. In this study, we provide haptic feedback of the force applied by the surgical instruments using custom wrist-squeezing devices. We hypothesize that individuals receiving haptic feedback will increase accuracy (produce less force) while increasing their task completion time, compared to a control group receiving no haptic feedback. To test this hypothesis, N=21 novice participants were asked to repeatedly complete a ring rollercoaster surgical training task as quickly as possible. Results show that participants receiving haptic feedback apply significantly less force (0.67 N) than the control group, and they complete the task no faster or slower than the control group after twelve repetitions. Furthermore, participants in the feedback group decreased their task completion times significantly faster (7.68%) than participants in the control group (5.26%). This form of haptic feedback, therefore, has the potential to help trainees improve their technical accuracy without compromising speed. 当前的机器人微创手术（RMIS）平台为外科医生提供了机器人物理交互的无触觉反馈。这种限制迫使外科医生严重依赖视觉反馈，并且使外科受训者难以轻轻地操纵组织。先前的研究表明，触觉反馈可以提高 RMIS 训练中的任务准确性。然而，目前尚不清楚这些改进是否代表了技能的根本改进，或者它们是否只是源于重新优先考虑准确性而不是任务完成时间。在这项研究中，我们使用定制的手腕挤压设备提供手术器械施加的力的触觉反馈。我们假设，与没有接收触觉反馈的对照组相比，接收触觉反馈的个体会提高准确性（产生更少的力），同时增加任务完成时间。为了检验这一假设，N=21 名新手参与者被要求尽快重复完成环形过山车手术训练任务。结果显示，接受触觉反馈的参与者所施加的力明显小于对照组（0.67 N），并且在重复 12 次后，他们完成任务的速度并不比对照组快或慢。此外，反馈组的参与者减少任务完成时间的速度 (7.68%) 明显快于对照组的参与者 (5.26%)。因此，这种形式的触觉反馈有可能帮助学员在不影响速度的情况下提高技术准确性。 本文主要评估了手腕挤压式触觉反馈对机器人手术训练中准确性和速度的影响。 Sergio Machaca,Eric Cao,Amy Chi,Gina Adrales,Katherine J Kuchenbecker,Jeremy D Brown cs.RO

authors_text: Romain Cosentino,Anirvan Sengupta,Salman Avestimehr,Mahdi Soltanolkotabi,Antonio Ortega,Ted Willke,Mariano Tepper
title: Toward a Geometrical Understanding of Self-supervised Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 对自监督对比学习的几何理解
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) is currently one of the premier techniques to create data representations that are actionable for transfer learning in the absence of human annotations. Despite their success, the underlying geometry of these representations remains elusive, which obfuscates the quest for more robust, trustworthy, and interpretable models. In particular, mainstream SSL techniques rely on a specific deep neural network architecture with two cascaded neural networks: the encoder and the projector. When used for transfer learning, the projector is discarded since empirical results show that its representation generalizes more poorly than the encoder's. In this paper, we investigate this curious phenomenon and analyze how the strength of the data augmentation policies affects the data embedding. We discover a non-trivial relation between the encoder, the projector, and the data augmentation strength: with increasingly larger augmentation policies, the projector, rather than the encoder, is more strongly driven to become invariant to the augmentations. It does so by eliminating crucial information about the data by learning to project it into a low-dimensional space, a noisy estimate of the data manifold tangent plane in the encoder representation. This analysis is substantiated through a geometrical perspective with theoretical and empirical results.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) is currently one of the premier techniques to create data representations that are actionable for transfer learning in the absence of human annotations. Despite their success, the underlying geometry of these representations remains elusive, which obfuscates the quest for more robust, trustworthy, and interpretable models. In particular, mainstream SSL techniques rely on a specific deep neural network architecture with two cascaded neural networks: the encoder and the projector. When used for transfer learning, the projector is discarded since empirical results show that its representation generalizes more poorly than the encoder's. In this paper, we investigate this curious phenomenon and analyze how the strength of the data augmentation policies affects the data embedding. We discover a non-trivial relation between the encoder, the projector, and the data augmentation strength: with increasingly larger augmentation policies, the projector, rather than the encoder, is more strongly driven to become invariant to the augmentations. It does so by eliminating crucial information about the data by learning to project it into a low-dimensional space, a noisy estimate of the data manifold tangent plane in the encoder representation. This analysis is substantiated through a geometrical perspective with theoretical and empirical results.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习 (SSL) 目前是创建数据表示的主要技术之一，这些数据表示在没有人工注释的情况下可用于迁移学习。尽管取得了成功，但这些表示的底层几何结构仍然难以捉摸，这阻碍了对更强大、更值得信赖和可解释模型的探索。特别是，主流 SSL 技术依赖于具有两个级联神经网络的特定深度神经网络架构：编码器和投影仪。当用于迁移学习时，投影仪被丢弃，因为经验结果表明它的表示泛化能力比编码器的更差。在本文中，我们研究了这种奇怪的现象，并分析了数据增强策略的强度如何影响数据嵌入。我们发现编码器、投影仪和数据增强强度之间存在重要关系：随着增强策略越来越大，投影仪（而不是编码器）更强烈地驱动对增强保持不变。它通过学习将数据投影到低维空间（编码器表示中数据流形切平面的噪声估计）来消除有关数据的关键信息来实现这一点。该分析通过几何角度的理论和实证结果得到证实。

AI.tldr: 探讨自监督对比学习中编码器与投影器的几何关系及数据增强策略的影响
AI.motivation: 解释SSL中投影器与编码器表现差异的几何机制，以提升模型的鲁棒性和可解释性
AI.method: 通过几何分析结合理论与实证研究，探讨数据增强策略对编码器和投影器表示的影响
AI.result: 发现增强策略强度与投影器不变性之间的非线性关系，投影器在强增强下更易消除数据关键信息
AI.conclusion: 几何分析揭示了投影器与编码器的差异机制，为构建更鲁棒的SSL模型提供理论指导

authors_text: Wesley Hanwen Deng,Manish Nagireddy,Michelle Seng Ah Lee,Jatinder Singh,Zhiwei Steven Wu,Kenneth Holstein,Haiyi Zhu
title: Exploring How Machine Learning Practitioners (Try To) Use Fairness Toolkits
title_zh: 探索机器学习从业者（尝试）如何使用公平工具包
comment: ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (ACM FAccT 2022)
comments: ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (ACM FAccT 2022)
abstract: Recent years have seen the development of many open-source ML fairness toolkits aimed at helping ML practitioners assess and address unfairness in their systems. However, there has been little research investigating how ML practitioners actually use these toolkits in practice. In this paper, we conducted the first in-depth empirical exploration of how industry practitioners (try to) work with existing fairness toolkits. In particular, we conducted think-aloud interviews to understand how participants learn about and use fairness toolkits, and explored the generality of our findings through an anonymous online survey. We identified several opportunities for fairness toolkits to better address practitioner needs and scaffold them in using toolkits effectively and responsibly. Based on these findings, we highlight implications for the design of future open-source fairness toolkits that can support practitioners in better contextualizing, communicating, and collaborating around ML fairness efforts.
summary: Recent years have seen the development of many open-source ML fairness toolkits aimed at helping ML practitioners assess and address unfairness in their systems. However, there has been little research investigating how ML practitioners actually use these toolkits in practice. In this paper, we conducted the first in-depth empirical exploration of how industry practitioners (try to) work with existing fairness toolkits. In particular, we conducted think-aloud interviews to understand how participants learn about and use fairness toolkits, and explored the generality of our findings through an anonymous online survey. We identified several opportunities for fairness toolkits to better address practitioner needs and scaffold them in using toolkits effectively and responsibly. Based on these findings, we highlight implications for the design of future open-source fairness toolkits that can support practitioners in better contextualizing, communicating, and collaborating around ML fairness efforts.
abstract_zh: 近年来，许多开源机器学习公平工具包的开发旨在帮助机器学习从业者评估和解决系统中的不公平问题。然而，很少有研究调查机器学习从业者在实践中如何实际使用这些工具包。在本文中，我们对行业从业者如何（尝试）使用现有的公平工具包进行了首次深入的实证探索。特别是，我们进行了有声思考访谈，以了解参与者如何了解和使用公平工具包，并通过匿名在线调查探讨了我们研究结果的普遍性。我们确定了公平工具包的几个机会，以更好地满足从业者的需求，并帮助他们有效和负责任地使用工具包。基于这些发现，我们强调了对未来开源公平工具包设计的影响，这些工具包可以支持从业者更好地围绕机器学习公平工作进行情境化、沟通和协作。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨机器学习从业者如何实际使用公平性工具包，并分析现有工具包的改进方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量开源公平性工具包，但缺乏对从业者实际使用情况的实证研究，需了解工具包在实践中的应用障碍与需求。
AI.method: 通过思考出声访谈和匿名在线调查，研究从业者学习及使用公平性工具包的过程，并分析结果的普遍性。
AI.result: 发现从业者在使用工具包时面临学习门槛高、工具适用性不足等问题，需更贴合实际场景的支持机制。
AI.conclusion: 未来工具包设计应注重提升可解释性、提供场景化指导，并加强从业者间的协作与沟通功能。

tldr: 本文探讨机器学习从业者如何实际使用公平性工具包，并分析现有工具包的改进方向。
motivation: 尽管已有大量开源公平性工具包，但缺乏对从业者实际使用情况的实证研究，需了解工具包在实践中的应用障碍与需求。
method: 通过思考出声访谈和匿名在线调查，研究从业者学习及使用公平性工具包的过程，并分析结果的普遍性。
result: 发现从业者在使用工具包时面临学习门槛高、工具适用性不足等问题，需更贴合实际场景的支持机制。
conclusion: 未来工具包设计应注重提升可解释性、提供场景化指导，并加强从业者间的协作与沟通功能。
search_text: Exploring How Machine Learning Practitioners (Try To) Use Fairness Toolkits 探索机器学习从业者（尝试）如何使用公平工具包 Recent years have seen the development of many open-source ML fairness toolkits aimed at helping ML practitioners assess and address unfairness in their systems. However, there has been little research investigating how ML practitioners actually use these toolkits in practice. In this paper, we conducted the first in-depth empirical exploration of how industry practitioners (try to) work with existing fairness toolkits. In particular, we conducted think-aloud interviews to understand how participants learn about and use fairness toolkits, and explored the generality of our findings through an anonymous online survey. We identified several opportunities for fairness toolkits to better address practitioner needs and scaffold them in using toolkits effectively and responsibly. Based on these findings, we highlight implications for the design of future open-source fairness toolkits that can support practitioners in better contextualizing, communicating, and collaborating around ML fairness efforts. 近年来，许多开源机器学习公平工具包的开发旨在帮助机器学习从业者评估和解决系统中的不公平问题。然而，很少有研究调查机器学习从业者在实践中如何实际使用这些工具包。在本文中，我们对行业从业者如何（尝试）使用现有的公平工具包进行了首次深入的实证探索。特别是，我们进行了有声思考访谈，以了解参与者如何了解和使用公平工具包，并通过匿名在线调查探讨了我们研究结果的普遍性。我们确定了公平工具包的几个机会，以更好地满足从业者的需求，并帮助他们有效和负责任地使用工具包。基于这些发现，我们强调了对未来开源公平工具包设计的影响，这些工具包可以支持从业者更好地围绕机器学习公平工作进行情境化、沟通和协作。 本文探讨机器学习从业者如何实际使用公平性工具包，并分析现有工具包的改进方向。 Wesley Hanwen Deng,Manish Nagireddy,Michelle Seng Ah Lee,Jatinder Singh,Zhiwei Steven Wu,Kenneth Holstein,Haiyi Zhu cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.LG

authors_text: Wesley Hanwen Deng,Nikita Mehandru,Samantha Robertson,Niloufar Salehi
title: Beyond General Purpose Machine Translation: The Need for Context-specific Empirical Research to Design for Appropriate User Trust
title_zh: 超越通用机器翻译：需要针对特定​​上下文进行实证研究来设计适当的用户信任
comment: Workshop on Trust and Reliance in AI-Human Teams (TRAIT): https://doi.org/10.1145/3491101.3503704
comments: Workshop on Trust and Reliance in AI-Human Teams (TRAIT): https://doi.org/10.1145/3491101.3503704
abstract: Machine Translation (MT) has the potential to help people overcome language barriers and is widely used in high-stakes scenarios, such as in hospitals. However, in order to use MT reliably and safely, users need to understand when to trust MT outputs and how to assess the quality of often imperfect translation results. In this paper, we discuss research directions to support users to calibrate trust in MT systems. We share findings from an empirical study in which we conducted semi-structured interviews with 20 clinicians to understand how they communicate with patients across language barriers, and if and how they use MT systems. Based on our findings, we advocate for empirical research on how MT systems are used in practice as an important first step to addressing the challenges in building appropriate trust between users and MT tools.
summary: Machine Translation (MT) has the potential to help people overcome language barriers and is widely used in high-stakes scenarios, such as in hospitals. However, in order to use MT reliably and safely, users need to understand when to trust MT outputs and how to assess the quality of often imperfect translation results. In this paper, we discuss research directions to support users to calibrate trust in MT systems. We share findings from an empirical study in which we conducted semi-structured interviews with 20 clinicians to understand how they communicate with patients across language barriers, and if and how they use MT systems. Based on our findings, we advocate for empirical research on how MT systems are used in practice as an important first step to addressing the challenges in building appropriate trust between users and MT tools.
abstract_zh: 机器翻译（MT）有潜力帮助人们克服语言障碍，并广泛应用于医院等高风险场景。然而，为了可靠、安全地使用 MT，用户需要了解何时信任 MT 输出以及如何评估通常不完美的翻译结果的质量。在本文中，我们讨论了支持用户校准机器翻译系统信任的研究方向。我们分享了一项实证研究的结果，在该研究中，我们对 20 名临床医生进行了半结构化访谈，以了解他们如何跨越语言障碍与患者沟通，以及他们是否以及如何使用 MT 系统。根据我们的发现，我们主张对机器翻译系统如何在实践中使用进行实证研究，作为解决在用户和机器翻译工具之间建立适当信任的挑战的重要第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过实证研究帮助用户校准对机器翻译系统的信任，特别是在医疗等高风险场景中。
AI.motivation: 机器翻译在医疗等高风险场景中被广泛使用，但用户需要明确何时信任翻译结果及如何评估质量，现有研究缺乏针对实际使用场景的信任机制设计。
AI.method: 通过半结构化访谈20名临床医生，研究其跨语言沟通方式及机器翻译系统的使用情况。
AI.result: 发现临床医生在跨语言沟通中对MT的依赖程度及评估翻译质量的策略，强调需基于实际使用场景进行信任校准研究。
AI.conclusion: 应开展针对具体使用场景的实证研究，以设计更符合实际需求的机器翻译信任机制。

authors_text: Deepa Singh,Michal Slupczynski,Ajit G. Pillai,Vinoth Pandian Sermuga Pandian
title: Grounding Explainability Within the Context of Global South in XAI
title_zh: XAI 中全球南方背景下的接地解释
comment: 4 pages, Presented at CHI 2022 Workshop on Human-Centered Explainable AI (HCXAI): Beyond Opening the Black-Box of AI
comments: 4 pages, Presented at CHI 2022 Workshop on Human-Centered Explainable AI (HCXAI): Beyond Opening the Black-Box of AI
abstract: In this position paper, we propose building a broader and deeper understanding around Explainability in AI by 'grounding' it in social contexts, the socio-technical systems operate in. We situate our understanding of grounded explainability in the 'Global South' in general and India in particular and express the need for more research within the global south context when it comes to explainability and AI.
summary: In this position paper, we propose building a broader and deeper understanding around Explainability in AI by 'grounding' it in social contexts, the socio-technical systems operate in. We situate our understanding of grounded explainability in the 'Global South' in general and India in particular and express the need for more research within the global south context when it comes to explainability and AI.
abstract_zh: 在这篇立场文件中，我们建议通过将人工智能的可解释性“扎根”于社会背景、社会技术系统的运作中，围绕人工智能的可解释性建立更广泛、更深入的理解。我们将我们对扎根可解释性的理解置于“南半球”，特别是印度，并表示在可解释性和人工智能方面需要在南半球背景下进行更多研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将可解释性人工智能（XAI）的解释能力根植于全球南方的社会背景，特别是印度，以推动更符合当地需求的研究。
AI.motivation: 当前AI可解释性研究主要基于西方语境，忽视了全球南方国家的社会技术系统差异，导致算法可能产生文化偏差或不适应当地需求。
AI.method: 通过立场论文形式，结合全球南方（尤其是印度）的社会背景与技术系统，分析现有XAI框架的局限性，并提出需加强本土化研究的方向。
AI.result: 明确了全球南方在AI可解释性研究中的独特需求，指出需结合当地社会、经济和文化因素开发更公平的解释方法。
AI.conclusion: 未来XAI研究应超越技术中心主义，深入理解全球南方的社会技术语境，以实现更具包容性和公平性的AI系统。

authors_text: Michael O'Connell,Guanya Shi,Xichen Shi,Kamyar Azizzadenesheli,Anima Anandkumar,Yisong Yue,Soon-Jo Chung
title: Neural-Fly Enables Rapid Learning for Agile Flight in Strong Winds
title_zh: Neural-Fly 实现强风中敏捷飞行的快速学习
comment: This is the accepted version of Science Robotics Vol. 7, Issue 66, eabm6597 (2022). Video: https://youtu.be/TuF9teCZX0U
comments: This is the accepted version of Science Robotics Vol. 7, Issue 66, eabm6597 (2022). Video: https://youtu.be/TuF9teCZX0U
abstract: Executing safe and precise flight maneuvers in dynamic high-speed winds is important for the ongoing commoditization of uninhabited aerial vehicles (UAVs). However, because the relationship between various wind conditions and its effect on aircraft maneuverability is not well understood, it is challenging to design effective robot controllers using traditional control design methods. We present Neural-Fly, a learning-based approach that allows rapid online adaptation by incorporating pretrained representations through deep learning. Neural-Fly builds on two key observations that aerodynamics in different wind conditions share a common representation and that the wind-specific part lies in a low-dimensional space. To that end, Neural-Fly uses a proposed learning algorithm, domain adversarially invariant meta-learning (DAIML), to learn the shared representation, only using 12 minutes of flight data. With the learned representation as a basis, Neural-Fly then uses a composite adaptation law to update a set of linear coefficients for mixing the basis elements. When evaluated under challenging wind conditions generated with the Caltech Real Weather Wind Tunnel, with wind speeds up to 43.6 kilometers/hour (12.1 meters/second), Neural-Fly achieves precise flight control with substantially smaller tracking error than state-of-the-art nonlinear and adaptive controllers. In addition to strong empirical performance, the exponential stability of Neural-Fly results in robustness guarantees. Last, our control design extrapolates to unseen wind conditions, is shown to be effective for outdoor flights with only onboard sensors, and can transfer across drones with minimal performance degradation.
summary: Executing safe and precise flight maneuvers in dynamic high-speed winds is important for the ongoing commoditization of uninhabited aerial vehicles (UAVs). However, because the relationship between various wind conditions and its effect on aircraft maneuverability is not well understood, it is challenging to design effective robot controllers using traditional control design methods. We present Neural-Fly, a learning-based approach that allows rapid online adaptation by incorporating pretrained representations through deep learning. Neural-Fly builds on two key observations that aerodynamics in different wind conditions share a common representation and that the wind-specific part lies in a low-dimensional space. To that end, Neural-Fly uses a proposed learning algorithm, domain adversarially invariant meta-learning (DAIML), to learn the shared representation, only using 12 minutes of flight data. With the learned representation as a basis, Neural-Fly then uses a composite adaptation law to update a set of linear coefficients for mixing the basis elements. When evaluated under challenging wind conditions generated with the Caltech Real Weather Wind Tunnel, with wind speeds up to 43.6 kilometers/hour (12.1 meters/second), Neural-Fly achieves precise flight control with substantially smaller tracking error than state-of-the-art nonlinear and adaptive controllers. In addition to strong empirical performance, the exponential stability of Neural-Fly results in robustness guarantees. Last, our control design extrapolates to unseen wind conditions, is shown to be effective for outdoor flights with only onboard sensors, and can transfer across drones with minimal performance degradation.
abstract_zh: 在动态高速风中执行安全、精确的飞行机动对于无人飞行器（UAV）的持续商品化非常重要。然而，由于各种风况之间的关系及其对飞机机动性的影响尚不清楚，因此使用传统的控制设计方法设计有效的机器人控制器具有挑战性。我们提出了 Neural-Fly，这是一种基于学习的方法，可以通过深度学习结合预训练的表示来实现快速在线适应。 Neural-Fly 建立在两个关键观察的基础上，即不同风力条件下的空气动力学具有共同的表示形式，并且风特定部分位于低维空间中。为此，Neural-Fly 使用提出的学习算法，即域对抗不变元学习 (DAIML)，仅使用 12 分钟的飞行数据来学习共享表示。以学习到的表示为基础，Neural-Fly 然后使用复合适应律来更新一组线性系数以混合基本元素。在加州理工学院真实天气风洞产生的具有挑战性的风力条件下进行评估时，风速高达 43.6 公里/小时（12.1 米/秒），Neural-Fly 实现了精确的飞行控制，跟踪误差比最先进的非线性和自适应控制器小得多。除了强大的经验性能之外，Neural-Fly 的指数稳定性还带来了鲁棒性保证。最后，我们的控制设计可以推断出看不见的风况，事实证明，它对于仅使用机载传感器的户外飞行是有效的，并且可以在无人机之间传输，而性能下降最小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Neural-Fly方法，通过深度学习实现无人机在强风环境下的快速学习与精准飞行控制。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法难以应对动态强风中无人机飞行的复杂性，因风条件与飞行机动性关系复杂且缺乏有效建模。
AI.method: 基于深度学习的预训练表示，结合领域对抗不变元学习（DAIML）算法提取共享气动特征，并通过复合适应律动态调整线性系数实现快速适应。
AI.result: 在43.6km/h强风环境下，Neural-Fly的跟踪误差显著低于现有非线性控制器；具备指数稳定性保证，可泛化至未见风况及户外场景，并实现跨无人机的性能迁移。
AI.conclusion: Neural-Fly通过分离共享气动表示与风特定低维参数，为强风环境下的无人机控制提供了高效、鲁棒且可迁移的解决方案。

search_text: Neural-Fly Enables Rapid Learning for Agile Flight in Strong Winds Neural-Fly 实现强风中敏捷飞行的快速学习 Executing safe and precise flight maneuvers in dynamic high-speed winds is important for the ongoing commoditization of uninhabited aerial vehicles (UAVs). However, because the relationship between various wind conditions and its effect on aircraft maneuverability is not well understood, it is challenging to design effective robot controllers using traditional control design methods. We present Neural-Fly, a learning-based approach that allows rapid online adaptation by incorporating pretrained representations through deep learning. Neural-Fly builds on two key observations that aerodynamics in different wind conditions share a common representation and that the wind-specific part lies in a low-dimensional space. To that end, Neural-Fly uses a proposed learning algorithm, domain adversarially invariant meta-learning (DAIML), to learn the shared representation, only using 12 minutes of flight data. With the learned representation as a basis, Neural-Fly then uses a composite adaptation law to update a set of linear coefficients for mixing the basis elements. When evaluated under challenging wind conditions generated with the Caltech Real Weather Wind Tunnel, with wind speeds up to 43.6 kilometers/hour (12.1 meters/second), Neural-Fly achieves precise flight control with substantially smaller tracking error than state-of-the-art nonlinear and adaptive controllers. In addition to strong empirical performance, the exponential stability of Neural-Fly results in robustness guarantees. Last, our control design extrapolates to unseen wind conditions, is shown to be effective for outdoor flights with only onboard sensors, and can transfer across drones with minimal performance degradation. 在动态高速风中执行安全、精确的飞行机动对于无人飞行器（UAV）的持续商品化非常重要。然而，由于各种风况之间的关系及其对飞机机动性的影响尚不清楚，因此使用传统的控制设计方法设计有效的机器人控制器具有挑战性。我们提出了 Neural-Fly，这是一种基于学习的方法，可以通过深度学习结合预训练的表示来实现快速在线适应。 Neural-Fly 建立在两个关键观察的基础上，即不同风力条件下的空气动力学具有共同的表示形式，并且风特定部分位于低维空间中。为此，Neural-Fly 使用提出的学习算法，即域对抗不变元学习 (DAIML)，仅使用 12 分钟的飞行数据来学习共享表示。以学习到的表示为基础，Neural-Fly 然后使用复合适应律来更新一组线性系数以混合基本元素。在加州理工学院真实天气风洞产生的具有挑战性的风力条件下进行评估时，风速高达 43.6 公里/小时（12.1 米/秒），Neural-Fly 实现了精确的飞行控制，跟踪误差比最先进的非线性和自适应控制器小得多。除了强大的经验性能之外，Neural-Fly 的指数稳定性还带来了鲁棒性保证。最后，我们的控制设计可以推断出看不见的风况，事实证明，它对于仅使用机载传感器的户外飞行是有效的，并且可以在无人机之间传输，而性能下降最小。 本文提出Neural-Fly方法，通过深度学习实现无人机在强风环境下的快速学习与精准飞行控制。 Michael O'Connell,Guanya Shi,Xichen Shi,Kamyar Azizzadenesheli,Anima Anandkumar,Yisong Yue,Soon-Jo Chung cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.SY

authors_text: Jianan Liu,Hao Li,Tao Huang,Euijoon Ahn,Kang Han,Adeel Razi,Wei Xiang,Jinman Kim,David Dagan Feng
title: Unsupervised Representation Learning for 3D MRI Super Resolution with Degradation Adaptation
title_zh: 具有退化适应能力的 3D MRI 超分辨率无监督表示学习
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Artificial Intelligence
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Artificial Intelligence
abstract: High-resolution (HR) magnetic resonance imaging is critical in aiding doctors in their diagnoses and image-guided treatments. However, acquiring HR images can be time-consuming and costly. Consequently, deep learning-based super-resolution reconstruction (SRR) has emerged as a promising solution for generating super-resolution (SR) images from low-resolution (LR) images. Unfortunately, training such neural networks requires aligned authentic HR and LR image pairs, which are challenging to obtain due to patient movements during and between image acquisitions. While rigid movements of hard tissues can be corrected with image registration, aligning deformed soft tissues is complex, making it impractical to train neural networks with authentic HR and LR image pairs. Previous studies have focused on SRR using authentic HR images and down-sampled synthetic LR images. However, the difference in degradation representations between synthetic and authentic LR images suppresses the quality of SR images reconstructed from authentic LR images. To address this issue, we propose a novel Unsupervised Degradation Adaptation Network (UDEAN). Our network consists of a degradation learning network and an SRR network. The degradation learning network downsamples the HR images using the degradation representation learned from the misaligned or unpaired LR images. The SRR network then learns the mapping from the down-sampled HR images to the original ones. Experimental results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art networks and is a promising solution to the challenges in clinical settings.
summary: High-resolution (HR) magnetic resonance imaging is critical in aiding doctors in their diagnoses and image-guided treatments. However, acquiring HR images can be time-consuming and costly. Consequently, deep learning-based super-resolution reconstruction (SRR) has emerged as a promising solution for generating super-resolution (SR) images from low-resolution (LR) images. Unfortunately, training such neural networks requires aligned authentic HR and LR image pairs, which are challenging to obtain due to patient movements during and between image acquisitions. While rigid movements of hard tissues can be corrected with image registration, aligning deformed soft tissues is complex, making it impractical to train neural networks with authentic HR and LR image pairs. Previous studies have focused on SRR using authentic HR images and down-sampled synthetic LR images. However, the difference in degradation representations between synthetic and authentic LR images suppresses the quality of SR images reconstructed from authentic LR images. To address this issue, we propose a novel Unsupervised Degradation Adaptation Network (UDEAN). Our network consists of a degradation learning network and an SRR network. The degradation learning network downsamples the HR images using the degradation representation learned from the misaligned or unpaired LR images. The SRR network then learns the mapping from the down-sampled HR images to the original ones. Experimental results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art networks and is a promising solution to the challenges in clinical settings.
abstract_zh: 高分辨率 (HR) 磁共振成像对于帮助医生进行诊断和图像引导治疗至关重要。然而，获取 HR 图像可能非常耗时且成本高昂。因此，基于深度学习的超分辨率重建（SRR）已成为从低分辨率（LR）图像生成超分辨率（SR）图像的有前途的解决方案。不幸的是，训练这样的神经网络需要对齐真实的 HR 和 LR 图像对，由于图像采集期间和图像采集之间的患者移动，这很难获得。虽然可以通过图像配准来校正硬组织的刚性运动，但对齐变形的软组织很复杂，因此使用真实的 HR 和 LR 图像对训练神经网络是不切实际的。之前的研究主要集中在使用真实 HR 图像和下采样合成 LR 图像的 SRR。然而，合成和真实 LR 图像之间退化表示的差异抑制了从真实 LR 图像重建的 SR 图像的质量。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的无监督退化适应网络（UDEAN）。我们的网络由退化学习网络和 SRR 网络组成。退化学习网络使用从未对齐或不成对的 LR 图像中学习到的退化表示对 HR 图像进行下采样。然后，SRR 网络学习从下采样 HR 图像到原始图像的映射。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于最先进的网络，是应对临床环境挑战的有前途的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督退化自适应网络（UDEAN），用于解决3D MRI超分辨率重建中真实低分辨率（LR）图像与合成LR图像退化表示不匹配的问题。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率MRI对临床诊断至关重要，但获取配对的真实HR-LR图像对因患者运动难以实现，且合成LR图像与真实LR图像的退化差异会降低重建质量。
AI.method: 设计包含退化学习网络和超分辨率重建网络（SRR）的UDEAN框架，通过从未配对LR图像中学习退化表示，对HR图像进行下采样，并训练SRR网络实现从退化HR到原始HR的映射。
AI.result: 实验表明，UDEAN在多个指标上优于现有最先进方法，有效解决了真实临床场景中HR-LR图像配对困难导致的重建质量下降问题。
AI.conclusion: UDEAN通过无监督退化自适应机制，为临床MRI超分辨率重建提供了无需真实配对数据的可行解决方案，具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Marisa Ponti,Anastasia Skarpeti,Bruno Kestemont
title: AI and Citizen Science for Serendipity
title_zh: 人工智能和公民科学带来意外发现
abstract: It has been argued that introducing AI to creative practices destroys spontaneity, intuition and serendipity. However, the design of systems that leverage complex interactions between citizen scientists (members of the public engaged in research tasks) and computational AI methods have the potential to facilitate creative exploration and chance encounters. Drawing from theories and literature about serendipity and computation, this article points to three interrelated aspects that support the emergence of serendipity in hybrid citizen science systems: the task environment; the characteristics of citizen scientists; and anomalies and errors.
summary: It has been argued that introducing AI to creative practices destroys spontaneity, intuition and serendipity. However, the design of systems that leverage complex interactions between citizen scientists (members of the public engaged in research tasks) and computational AI methods have the potential to facilitate creative exploration and chance encounters. Drawing from theories and literature about serendipity and computation, this article points to three interrelated aspects that support the emergence of serendipity in hybrid citizen science systems: the task environment; the characteristics of citizen scientists; and anomalies and errors.
abstract_zh: 有人认为，将人工智能引入创意实践会破坏自发性、直觉和偶然性。然而，利用公民科学家（从事研究任务的公众成员）和计算人工智能方法之间复杂交互的系统设计有可能促进创造性探索和偶遇。本文借鉴有关偶然性和计算的理论和文献，指出了支持混合公民科学系统中偶然性出现的三个相互关联的方面：任务环境；公民科学家的特征；以及异常和错误。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过AI与公民科学的结合促进创造性偶然性，提出任务环境、参与者特征及异常错误是关键因素。
AI.motivation: 反驳AI破坏创造性偶然性的观点，探索混合公民科学系统中AI与公众协作的新可能性。
AI.method: 基于偶然性理论与计算文献，分析公民科学系统中AI与人类互动的三重影响维度。
AI.result: 识别出任务环境设计、公民科学家特质、系统异常/错误三类促进偶然发现的核心要素。
AI.conclusion: 合理设计混合系统可使AI增强而非削弱偶然性，为未来公民科学平台开发提供理论框架。

However, the design of systems that leverage complex interactions between citizen scientists (members of the public engaged in research tasks) and computational AI methods have the potential to facilitate creative exploration and chance encounters. Drawing from theories and literature about serendipity and computation, this article points to three interrelated aspects that support the emergence of serendipity in hybrid citizen science systems: the task environment; the characteristics of citizen scientists; and anomalies and errors. 有人认为，将人工智能引入创意实践会破坏自发性、直觉和偶然性。然而，利用公民科学家（从事研究任务的公众成员）和计算人工智能方法之间复杂交互的系统设计有可能促进创造性探索和偶遇。本文借鉴有关偶然性和计算的理论和文献，指出了支持混合公民科学系统中偶然性出现的三个相互关联的方面：任务环境；公民科学家的特征；以及异常和错误。 本文探讨如何通过AI与公民科学的结合促进创造性偶然性，提出任务环境、参与者特征及异常错误是关键因素。 Marisa Ponti,Anastasia Skarpeti,Bruno Kestemont cs.HC

authors_text: Pritam Sarkar,Aaron Posen,Ali Etemad
title: AVCAffe: A Large Scale Audio-Visual Dataset of Cognitive Load and Affect for Remote Work
title_zh: AVCAFfe：远程工作认知负荷和影响的大规模视听数据集
comment: Accepted in AAAI 2023
comments: Accepted in AAAI 2023
abstract: We introduce AVCAffe, the first Audio-Visual dataset consisting of Cognitive load and Affect attributes. We record AVCAffe by simulating remote work scenarios over a video-conferencing platform, where subjects collaborate to complete a number of cognitively engaging tasks. AVCAffe is the largest originally collected (not collected from the Internet) affective dataset in English language. We recruit 106 participants from 18 different countries of origin, spanning an age range of 18 to 57 years old, with a balanced male-female ratio. AVCAffe comprises a total of 108 hours of video, equivalent to more than 58,000 clips along with task-based self-reported ground truth labels for arousal, valence, and cognitive load attributes such as mental demand, temporal demand, effort, and a few others. We believe AVCAffe would be a challenging benchmark for the deep learning research community given the inherent difficulty of classifying affect and cognitive load in particular. Moreover, our dataset fills an existing timely gap by facilitating the creation of learning systems for better self-management of remote work meetings, and further study of hypotheses regarding the impact of remote work on cognitive load and affective states.
summary: We introduce AVCAffe, the first Audio-Visual dataset consisting of Cognitive load and Affect attributes. We record AVCAffe by simulating remote work scenarios over a video-conferencing platform, where subjects collaborate to complete a number of cognitively engaging tasks. AVCAffe is the largest originally collected (not collected from the Internet) affective dataset in English language. We recruit 106 participants from 18 different countries of origin, spanning an age range of 18 to 57 years old, with a balanced male-female ratio. AVCAffe comprises a total of 108 hours of video, equivalent to more than 58,000 clips along with task-based self-reported ground truth labels for arousal, valence, and cognitive load attributes such as mental demand, temporal demand, effort, and a few others. We believe AVCAffe would be a challenging benchmark for the deep learning research community given the inherent difficulty of classifying affect and cognitive load in particular. Moreover, our dataset fills an existing timely gap by facilitating the creation of learning systems for better self-management of remote work meetings, and further study of hypotheses regarding the impact of remote work on cognitive load and affective states.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 AVCAFfe，这是第一个由认知负荷和情感属性组成的视听数据集。我们通过在视频会议平台上模拟远程工作场景来记录 AVCaffe，其中受试者协作完成许多认知参与任务。 AVCAFfe 是最大的最初收集（不是从互联网收集）的英语情感数据集。我们招募了来自18个不同国家的106名参与者，年龄跨度为18岁至57岁，男女比例均衡。 AVCAFfe 包含总共 108 小时的视频，相当于超过 58,000 个剪辑，以及基于任务的自我报告的真实标签，用于唤醒、效价和认知负荷属性，例如心理需求、时间需求、努力等。我们相信，鉴于对情感和认知负荷进行分类的固有困难，AVCAffe 对于深度学习研究界来说将是一个具有挑战性的基准。此外，我们的数据集通过促进创建学习系统来更好地自我管理远程工作会议，并进一步研究有关远程工作对认知负荷和情感状态影响的假设，填补了现有的及时空白。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了AVCAffe数据集，该数据集包含远程工作场景下的认知负荷和情感属性，旨在为深度学习研究提供基准。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏针对远程工作场景中认知负荷和情感状态的高质量音频-视觉数据集，限制了相关算法的发展和远程工作影响的深入研究。
AI.method: 通过模拟远程工作场景，使用视频会议平台录制106名来自18个国家、年龄18-57岁的参与者完成认知任务的音视频数据，并收集任务相关的自我报告标签（如唤醒度、效价、认知负荷等）。
AI.result: 构建了包含108小时视频（超58,000个片段）的英语原生数据集，涵盖认知负荷、情感等多维度标签，填补了远程工作场景下的数据空白。
AI.conclusion: AVCAffe为研究远程工作对认知和情感的影响提供了挑战性基准，可推动自适应会议管理系统及远程工作健康干预技术的发展。

authors_text: Shuo Cheng,Guoxian Song,Wan-Chun Ma,Chao Wang,Linjie Luo
title: Using Augmented Face Images to Improve Facial Recognition Tasks
title_zh: 使用增强的面部图像来改进面部识别任务
comment: CHI 2022 Workshop: AI-Generated Characters: Putting Deepfakes to Good Use
comments: CHI 2022 Workshop: AI-Generated Characters: Putting Deepfakes to Good Use
abstract: We present a framework that uses GAN-augmented images to complement certain specific attributes, usually underrepresented, for machine learning model training. This allows us to improve inference quality over those attributes for the facial recognition tasks.
summary: We present a framework that uses GAN-augmented images to complement certain specific attributes, usually underrepresented, for machine learning model training. This allows us to improve inference quality over those attributes for the facial recognition tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个框架，使用 GAN 增强图像来补充机器学习模型训练中通常代表性不足的某些特定属性。这使我们能够提高面部识别任务的这些属性的推理质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用生成对抗网络（GAN）增强面部图像的框架，以提升面部识别任务中特定属性的识别效果。
AI.motivation: 现有面部识别模型在训练数据中某些特定属性（如光照、姿态等）代表性不足，导致推理质量下降，需通过数据增强技术改善这一问题。
AI.method: 通过GAN生成补充特定属性的增强图像，扩展训练数据集，从而提升机器学习模型对这些属性的识别能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法有效提高了面部识别任务中针对低代表性属性的推理质量。
AI.conclusion: GAN生成的增强数据能有效弥补训练数据不足，提升模型在特定属性上的泛化能力。

authors_text: Jadie Adams,Shireen Elhabian
title: From Images to Probabilistic Anatomical Shapes: A Deep Variational Bottleneck Approach
title_zh: 从图像到概率解剖形状：深度变分瓶颈方法
comment: Provisionally accepted to MICCAI 2022 on May 4, 2022
comments: Provisionally accepted to MICCAI 2022 on May 4, 2022
abstract: Statistical shape modeling (SSM) directly from 3D medical images is an underutilized tool for detecting pathology, diagnosing disease, and conducting population-level morphology analysis. Deep learning frameworks have increased the feasibility of adopting SSM in medical practice by reducing the expert-driven manual and computational overhead in traditional SSM workflows. However, translating such frameworks to clinical practice requires calibrated uncertainty measures as neural networks can produce over-confident predictions that cannot be trusted in sensitive clinical decision-making. Existing techniques for predicting shape with aleatoric (data-dependent) uncertainty utilize a principal component analysis (PCA) based shape representation computed in isolation from the model training. This constraint restricts the learning task to solely estimating pre-defined shape descriptors from 3D images and imposes a linear relationship between this shape representation and the output (i.e., shape) space. In this paper, we propose a principled framework based on the variational information bottleneck theory to relax these assumptions while predicting probabilistic shapes of anatomy directly from images without supervised encoding of shape descriptors. Here, the latent representation is learned in the context of the learning task, resulting in a more scalable, flexible model that better captures data non-linearity. Additionally, this model is self-regularized and generalizes better given limited training data. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed method provides improved accuracy and better calibrated aleatoric uncertainty estimates than state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Statistical shape modeling (SSM) directly from 3D medical images is an underutilized tool for detecting pathology, diagnosing disease, and conducting population-level morphology analysis. Deep learning frameworks have increased the feasibility of adopting SSM in medical practice by reducing the expert-driven manual and computational overhead in traditional SSM workflows. However, translating such frameworks to clinical practice requires calibrated uncertainty measures as neural networks can produce over-confident predictions that cannot be trusted in sensitive clinical decision-making. Existing techniques for predicting shape with aleatoric (data-dependent) uncertainty utilize a principal component analysis (PCA) based shape representation computed in isolation from the model training. This constraint restricts the learning task to solely estimating pre-defined shape descriptors from 3D images and imposes a linear relationship between this shape representation and the output (i.e., shape) space. In this paper, we propose a principled framework based on the variational information bottleneck theory to relax these assumptions while predicting probabilistic shapes of anatomy directly from images without supervised encoding of shape descriptors. Here, the latent representation is learned in the context of the learning task, resulting in a more scalable, flexible model that better captures data non-linearity. Additionally, this model is self-regularized and generalizes better given limited training data. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed method provides improved accuracy and better calibrated aleatoric uncertainty estimates than state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 直接根据 3D 医学图像进行统计形状建模 (SSM) 是一种未充分利用的工具，用于检测病理、诊断疾病和进行群体水平形态分析。深度学习框架通过减少传统 SSM 工作流程中专家驱动的手动和计算开销，提高了在医疗实践中采用 SSM 的可行性。然而，将此类框架转化为临床实践需要校准的不确定性测量，因为神经网络可能会产生过于自信的预测，而这些预测在敏感的临床决策中是不可信的。用于预测具有任意（数据相关）不确定性的形状的现有技术利用基于主成分分析（PCA）的形状表示，该形状表示与模型训练隔离计算。此约束将学习任务限制为仅从 3D 图像估计预定义的形状描述符，并在该形状表示和输出（即形状）空间之间施加线性关系。在本文中，我们提出了一个基于变分信息瓶颈理论的原则框架，以放宽这些假设，同时直接从图像预测解剖结构的概率形状，而无需形状描述符的监督编码。在这里，潜在表示是在学习任务的背景下学习的，从而产生一个更具可扩展性、更灵活的模型，可以更好地捕获数据非线性。此外，该模型是自正则化的，并且在训练数据有限的情况下可以更好地概括。我们的实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法提供了更高的准确性和更好的校准任意不确定性估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分信息瓶颈理论的深度学习框架，直接从3D医学图像中预测具有可校准不确定性的概率解剖形状。
AI.motivation: 现有统计形状建模方法依赖独立于模型训练的PCA形状表示，限制了非线性关系建模并导致神经网络预测过度自信，难以满足临床决策需求。
AI.method: 通过变分信息瓶颈理论学习任务相关的潜在表示，建立图像到概率形状的端到端模型，无需监督编码形状描述子，实现非线性映射与自正则化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在形状预测精度和数据依赖性不确定性估计方面优于现有最先进方法，且在小样本情况下泛化能力更强。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架通过联合学习潜在表示与不确定性，为医学图像中的概率解剖建模提供了更灵活、可扩展且临床可信的解决方案。

This constraint restricts the learning task to solely estimating pre-defined shape descriptors from 3D images and imposes a linear relationship between this shape representation and the output (i.e., shape) space. Here, the latent representation is learned in the context of the learning task, resulting in a more scalable, flexible model that better captures data non-linearity. Additionally, this model is self-regularized and generalizes better given limited training data. authors_text: Andrew Fraser,Brian Lavallee,Blair D. Sullivan
title: Parameterized Complexity of Gerrymandering
title_zh: 选区划分的参数化复杂性
abstract: In a representative democracy, the electoral process involves partitioning geographical space into districts which each elect a single representative. These representatives craft and vote on legislation, incentivizing political parties to win as many districts as possible (ideally a plurality). Gerrymandering is the process by which district boundaries are manipulated to the advantage of a desired candidate or party. We study the parameterized complexity of Gerrymandering, a graph problem (as opposed to Euclidean space) formalized by Cohen-Zemach et al. (AAMAS 2018) and Ito et al. (AAMAS 2019) where districts partition vertices into connected subgraphs. We prove that Unit Weight Gerrymandering is W[2]-hard on trees (even when the depth is two) with respect to the number of districts $k$. Moreover, we show that Unit Weight Gerrymandering remains W[2]-hard in trees with $\ell$ leaves with respect to the combined parameter $k+\ell$. In contrast, Gupta et al. (SAGT 2021) give an FPT algorithm for Gerrymandering on paths with respect to $k$. To complement our results and fill this gap, we provide an algorithm to solve Gerrymandering that is FPT in $k$ when $\ell$ is a fixed constant.
summary: In a representative democracy, the electoral process involves partitioning geographical space into districts which each elect a single representative. These representatives craft and vote on legislation, incentivizing political parties to win as many districts as possible (ideally a plurality). Gerrymandering is the process by which district boundaries are manipulated to the advantage of a desired candidate or party. We study the parameterized complexity of Gerrymandering, a graph problem (as opposed to Euclidean space) formalized by Cohen-Zemach et al. (AAMAS 2018) and Ito et al. (AAMAS 2019) where districts partition vertices into connected subgraphs. We prove that Unit Weight Gerrymandering is W[2]-hard on trees (even when the depth is two) with respect to the number of districts $k$. Moreover, we show that Unit Weight Gerrymandering remains W[2]-hard in trees with $\ell$ leaves with respect to the combined parameter $k+\ell$. In contrast, Gupta et al. (SAGT 2021) give an FPT algorithm for Gerrymandering on paths with respect to $k$. To complement our results and fill this gap, we provide an algorithm to solve Gerrymandering that is FPT in $k$ when $\ell$ is a fixed constant.
abstract_zh: 在代议制民主国家，选举过程涉及将地理空间划分为多个选区，每个选区选举一名代表。这些代表制定立法并进行投票，激励政党赢得尽可能多的选区（最好是多数选区）。选区划分选区是为了对所需候选人或政党有利而操纵选区边界的过程。我们研究了 Gerrymandering 的参数化复杂性，这是一个由 Cohen-Zemach 等人形式化的图问题（与欧几里得空间相对）。 （AAMAS 2018）和伊藤等人。 （AAMAS 2019）其中地区将顶点划分为连接的子图。我们证明，相对于区域数量 $k$，单位权重不公正划分在树上是 W[2]-困难的（即使深度为 2）。此外，我们表明，相对于组合参数 $k+\ell$，单位权重选区划分在具有 $\ell$ 叶子的树中仍然是 W[2]-hard。相比之下，古普塔等人。 (SAGT 2021) 给出了关于 $k$ 的路径上不选区划分的 FPT 算法。为了补充我们的结果并填补这一空白，我们提供了一种算法来解决不公正划分，当 $\ell$ 是固定常数时，该算法是 $k$ 中的 FPT。

AI.tldr: 研究将选区划分问题建模为图论中的参数化复杂性问题，分析其计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 选区划分（Gerrymandering）通过操纵边界影响选举结果，理解其参数化复杂性有助于设计有效算法或限制滥用。
AI.method: 采用参数化复杂性理论，证明单位权重选区划分问题在树结构上的W[2]-难，并设计固定参数 tractable（FPT）算法。
AI.result: 证明单位权重选区划分在树结构上对参数k是W[2]-难，但当叶子数固定时存在FPT算法，填补了路径图算法的空白。
AI.conclusion: 选区划分问题在不同图结构下呈现差异化的复杂性，为后续算法设计和参数化分析提供了理论基础。

authors_text: Jyotima Patel,Biswanath Dutta
title: An Approach for Automatic Construction of an Algorithmic Knowledge Graph from Textual Resources
title_zh: 一种从文本资源自动构建算法知识图的方法
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables
comments: 12 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables
abstract: There is enormous growth in various fields of research. This development is accompanied by new problems. To solve these problems efficiently and in an optimized manner, algorithms are created and described by researchers in the scientific literature. Scientific algorithms are vital for understanding and reusing existing work in numerous domains. However, algorithms are generally challenging to find. Also, the comparison among similar algorithms is difficult because of the disconnected documentation. Information about algorithms is mostly present in websites, code comments, and so on. There is an absence of structured metadata to portray algorithms. As a result, sometimes redundant or similar algorithms are published, and the researchers build them from scratch instead of reusing or expanding upon the already existing algorithm. In this paper, we introduce an approach for automatically developing a knowledge graph (KG) for algorithmic problems from unstructured data. Because it captures information more clearly and extensively, an algorithm KG will give additional context and explainability to the algorithm metadata.
summary: There is enormous growth in various fields of research. This development is accompanied by new problems. To solve these problems efficiently and in an optimized manner, algorithms are created and described by researchers in the scientific literature. Scientific algorithms are vital for understanding and reusing existing work in numerous domains. However, algorithms are generally challenging to find. Also, the comparison among similar algorithms is difficult because of the disconnected documentation. Information about algorithms is mostly present in websites, code comments, and so on. There is an absence of structured metadata to portray algorithms. As a result, sometimes redundant or similar algorithms are published, and the researchers build them from scratch instead of reusing or expanding upon the already existing algorithm. In this paper, we introduce an approach for automatically developing a knowledge graph (KG) for algorithmic problems from unstructured data. Because it captures information more clearly and extensively, an algorithm KG will give additional context and explainability to the algorithm metadata.
abstract_zh: 各个研究领域都有巨大的增长。这种发展也伴随着新的问题。为了以优化的方式有效地解决这些问题，研究人员在科学文献中创建和描述了算法。科学算法对于理解和重用众多领域的现有工作至关重要。然而，算法通常很难找到。此外，由于文档不连贯，类似算法之间的比较也很困难。有关算法的信息大多存在于网站、代码注释等中。缺乏描述算法的结构化元数据。因此，有时会发布冗余或类似的算法，研究人员从头开始构建它们，而不是重用或扩展现有的算法。在本文中，我们介绍了一种针对非结构化数据的算法问题自动开发知识图（KG）的方法。因为它更清晰、更广泛地捕获信息，所以算法知识图谱将为算法元数据提供额外的上下文和可解释性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种从非结构化文本中自动构建算法知识图谱的方法，以解决算法信息分散和缺乏结构化元数据的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有算法信息分散且缺乏结构化元数据，导致重复开发和难以比较，需通过知识图谱提升可解释性和复用性。
AI.method: 利用自然语言处理和知识抽取技术，从非结构化文本中自动提取算法信息并构建知识图谱。

search_text: An Approach for Automatic Construction of an Algorithmic Knowledge Graph from Textual Resources 一种从文本资源自动构建算法知识图的方法 There is enormous growth in various fields of research. This development is accompanied by new problems. To solve these problems efficiently and in an optimized manner, algorithms are created and described by researchers in the scientific literature. Scientific algorithms are vital for understanding and reusing existing work in numerous domains. However, algorithms are generally challenging to find. Also, the comparison among similar algorithms is difficult because of the disconnected documentation. Information about algorithms is mostly present in websites, code comments, and so on. There is an absence of structured metadata to portray algorithms. As a result, sometimes redundant or similar algorithms are published, and the researchers build them from scratch instead of reusing or expanding upon the already existing algorithm. In this paper, we introduce an approach for automatically developing a knowledge graph (KG) for algorithmic problems from unstructured data. Because it captures information more clearly and extensively, an algorithm KG will give additional context and explainability to the algorithm metadata. 各个研究领域都有巨大的增长。这种发展也伴随着新的问题。为了以优化的方式有效地解决这些问题，研究人员在科学文献中创建和描述了算法。科学算法对于理解和重用众多领域的现有工作至关重要。然而，算法通常很难找到。此外，由于文档不连贯，类似算法之间的比较也很困难。有关算法的信息大多存在于网站、代码注释等中。缺乏描述算法的结构化元数据。因此，有时会发布冗余或类似的算法，研究人员从头开始构建它们，而不是重用或扩展现有的算法。在本文中，我们介绍了一种针对非结构化数据的算法问题自动开发知识图（KG）的方法。因为它更清晰、更广泛地捕获信息，所以算法知识图谱将为算法元数据提供额外的上下文和可解释性。 提出一种从非结构化文本中自动构建算法知识图谱的方法，以解决算法信息分散和缺乏结构化元数据的问题。 Jyotima Patel,Biswanath Dutta cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Gregor Lenz,Serge Picaud,Sio-Hoi Ieng
title: A Framework for Event-based Computer Vision on a Mobile Device
title_zh: 移动设备上基于事件的计算机视觉框架
abstract: We present the first publicly available Android framework to stream data from an event camera directly to a mobile phone. Today's mobile devices handle a wider range of workloads than ever before and they incorporate a growing gamut of sensors that make devices smarter, more user friendly and secure. Conventional cameras in particular play a central role in such tasks, but they cannot record continuously, as the amount of redundant information recorded is costly to process. Bio-inspired event cameras on the other hand only record changes in a visual scene and have shown promising low-power applications that specifically suit mobile tasks such as face detection, gesture recognition or gaze tracking. Our prototype device is the first step towards embedding such an event camera into a battery-powered handheld device. The mobile framework allows us to stream events in real-time and opens up the possibilities for always-on and on-demand sensing on mobile phones. To liaise the asynchronous event camera output with synchronous von Neumann hardware, we look at how buffering events and processing them in batches can benefit mobile applications. We evaluate our framework in terms of latency and throughput and show examples of computer vision tasks that involve both event-by-event and pre-trained neural network methods for gesture recognition, aperture robust optical flow and grey-level image reconstruction from events. The code is available at https://github.com/neuromorphic-paris/frog
summary: We present the first publicly available Android framework to stream data from an event camera directly to a mobile phone. Today's mobile devices handle a wider range of workloads than ever before and they incorporate a growing gamut of sensors that make devices smarter, more user friendly and secure. Conventional cameras in particular play a central role in such tasks, but they cannot record continuously, as the amount of redundant information recorded is costly to process. Bio-inspired event cameras on the other hand only record changes in a visual scene and have shown promising low-power applications that specifically suit mobile tasks such as face detection, gesture recognition or gaze tracking. Our prototype device is the first step towards embedding such an event camera into a battery-powered handheld device. The mobile framework allows us to stream events in real-time and opens up the possibilities for always-on and on-demand sensing on mobile phones. To liaise the asynchronous event camera output with synchronous von Neumann hardware, we look at how buffering events and processing them in batches can benefit mobile applications. We evaluate our framework in terms of latency and throughput and show examples of computer vision tasks that involve both event-by-event and pre-trained neural network methods for gesture recognition, aperture robust optical flow and grey-level image reconstruction from events. The code is available at https://github.com/neuromorphic-paris/frog
abstract_zh: 我们推出了第一个公开可用的 Android 框架，可将数据从事件摄像头直接传输到手机。当今的移动设备能够处理比以往更广泛的工作负载，并且采用了越来越多的传感器，使设备变得更加智能、更加用户友好和安全。传统相机在此类任务中尤其发挥着核心作用，但它们无法连续记录，因为记录的冗余信息量的处理成本很高。另一方面，仿生事件相机仅记录视觉场景中的变化，并已显示出有前景的低功耗应用，特别适合面部检测、手势识别或视线跟踪等移动任务。我们的原型设备是将此类事件相机嵌入电池供电的手持设备的第一步。移动框架使我们能够实时传输事件，并为移动电话上始终在线和按需传感提供了可能性。为了将异步事件相机输出与同步冯诺依曼硬件联系起来，我们研究了缓冲事件并批量处理它们如何使移动应用程序受益。我们从延迟和吞吐量方面评估了我们的框架，并展示了计算机视觉任务的示例，这些任务涉及逐个事件和预训练的神经网络方法，用于手势识别、孔径鲁棒光流和事件的灰度图像重建。代码可在 https://github.com/neuromorphic-paris/frog 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个公开的Android框架，用于将事件相机数据实时传输至移动设备，实现基于事件的计算机视觉应用。
AI.motivation: 传统摄像头因冗余信息处理成本高难以持续记录，而事件相机仅记录视觉变化，更适合移动设备的低功耗任务如手势识别。
AI.method: 开发原型设备与移动框架，通过缓冲和批量处理异步事件数据，结合事件驱动与预训练神经网络方法实现视觉任务。
AI.result: 评估框架的延迟与吞吐量，展示手势识别、光流计算和灰度图像重建等任务的实现实例。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为在电池供电的移动设备中嵌入事件相机提供了可行方案，推动始终在线的移动感知应用发展。

authors_text: Kaitlyn Zhou,Su Lin Blodgett,Adam Trischler,Hal Daumé III,Kaheer Suleman,Alexandra Olteanu
title: Deconstructing NLG Evaluation: Evaluation Practices, Assumptions, and Their Implications
title_zh: 解构 NLG 评估：评估实践、假设及其含义
comment: Camera Ready for NAACL 2022 (Main Conference)
comments: Camera Ready for NAACL 2022 (Main Conference)
abstract: There are many ways to express similar things in text, which makes evaluating natural language generation (NLG) systems difficult. Compounding this difficulty is the need to assess varying quality criteria depending on the deployment setting. While the landscape of NLG evaluation has been well-mapped, practitioners' goals, assumptions, and constraints -- which inform decisions about what, when, and how to evaluate -- are often partially or implicitly stated, or not stated at all. Combining a formative semi-structured interview study of NLG practitioners (N=18) with a survey study of a broader sample of practitioners (N=61), we surface goals, community practices, assumptions, and constraints that shape NLG evaluations, examining their implications and how they embody ethical considerations.
summary: There are many ways to express similar things in text, which makes evaluating natural language generation (NLG) systems difficult. Compounding this difficulty is the need to assess varying quality criteria depending on the deployment setting. While the landscape of NLG evaluation has been well-mapped, practitioners' goals, assumptions, and constraints -- which inform decisions about what, when, and how to evaluate -- are often partially or implicitly stated, or not stated at all. Combining a formative semi-structured interview study of NLG practitioners (N=18) with a survey study of a broader sample of practitioners (N=61), we surface goals, community practices, assumptions, and constraints that shape NLG evaluations, examining their implications and how they embody ethical considerations.
abstract_zh: 在文本中表达类似事物的方法有很多种，这使得评估自然语言生成（NLG）系统变得困难。使这一困难变得更加复杂的是需要根据部署设置评估不同的质量标准。虽然 NLG 评估的情况已经被很好地描绘出来，但从业者的目标、假设和约束——它们为有关评估内容、何时以及如何评估的决策提供信息——通常是部分或隐含地陈述，或者根本没有陈述。将 NLG 从业者 (N=18) 的形成性半结构化访谈研究与更广泛的从业者样本 (N=61) 的调查研究相结合，我们提出了塑造 NLG 评估的目标、社区实践、假设和限制，检验其含义以及它们如何体现道德考虑。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解构自然语言生成（NLG）评估的实践、假设及其影响，揭示从业者的目标、约束条件和伦理考量。
AI.motivation: 现有NLG评估方法缺乏对从业者目标、假设和约束条件的明确说明，导致评估标准不统一且可能忽视伦理问题。
AI.method: 通过半结构化访谈（N=18）和问卷调查（N=61）收集NLG从业者数据，分析其评估实践、假设及约束条件。
AI.result: 研究发现评估目标、社区实践和隐含假设存在显著差异，且评估过程常受资源限制影响，需更多关注伦理问题。
AI.conclusion: 需建立更透明、系统化的NLG评估框架，明确目标与约束条件，并融入伦理考量以提升评估有效性。

Compounding this difficulty is the need to assess varying quality criteria depending on the deployment setting. While the landscape of NLG evaluation has been well-mapped, practitioners' goals, assumptions, and constraints -- which inform decisions about what, when, and how to evaluate -- are often partially or implicitly stated, or not stated at all. Combining a formative semi-structured interview study of NLG practitioners (N=18) with a survey study of a broader sample of practitioners (N=61), we surface goals, community practices, assumptions, and constraints that shape NLG evaluations, examining their implications and how they embody ethical considerations. 在文本中表达类似事物的方法有很多种，这使得评估自然语言生成（NLG）系统变得困难。使这一困难变得更加复杂的是需要根据部署设置评估不同的质量标准。虽然 NLG 评估的情况已经被很好地描绘出来，但从业者的目标、假设和约束——它们为有关评估内容、何时以及如何评估的决策提供信息——通常是部分或隐含地陈述，或者根本没有陈述。将 NLG 从业者 (N=18) 的形成性半结构化访谈研究与更广泛的从业者样本 (N=61) 的调查研究相结合，我们提出了塑造 NLG 评估的目标、社区实践、假设和限制，检验其含义以及它们如何体现道德考虑。 本文旨在解构自然语言生成（NLG）评估的实践、假设及其影响，揭示从业者的目标、约束条件和伦理考量。 Kaitlyn Zhou,Su Lin Blodgett,Adam Trischler,Hal Daumé III,Kaheer Suleman,Alexandra Olteanu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Abbas Akbarpour-Kasgari,Mehrdad Ardebilipour
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning in mmW-NOMA: Joint Power Allocation and Hybrid Beamforming
title_zh: mmW-NOMA 中的深度强化学习：联合功率分配和混合波束形成
comment: 20 pages (single Column), 9 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.06489
comments: 20 pages (single Column), 9 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.06489
abstract: High demand of data rate in the next generation of wireless communication could be ensured by Non-Orthogonal Multiple Access (NOMA) approach in the millimetre-wave (mmW) frequency band. Decreasing the interference on the other users while maintaining the bit rate via joint power allocation and beamforming is mandatory to guarantee the high demand of bit-rate. Furthermore, mmW frequency bands dictates the hybrid structure for beamforming because of the trade-off in implementation and performance, simultaneously. In this paper, joint power allocation and hybrid beamforming of mmW-NOMA systems is brought up via recent advances in machine learning and control theory approaches called Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL). Actor-critic phenomena is exploited to measure the immediate reward and providing the new action to maximize the overall Q-value of the network. Additionally, to improve the stability of the approach, we have utilized Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) approach where overall reward and action entropy is maximized, simultaneously. The immediate reward has been defined based on the soft weighted summation of the rate of all the users. The soft weighting is based on the achieved rate and allocated power of each user. Furthermore, the channel responses between the users and base station (BS) is defined as the state of environment, while action space is involved of the digital and analog beamforming weights and allocated power to each user. The simulation results represent the superiority of the proposed approach rather than the Time-Division Multiple Access (TDMA) and Non-Line of Sight (NLOS)-NOMA in terms of sum-rate of the users. It's outperformance is caused by the joint optimization and independency of the proposed approach to the channel responses.

Decreasing the interference on the other users while maintaining the bit rate via joint power allocation and beamforming is mandatory to guarantee the high demand of bit-rate. Furthermore, mmW frequency bands dictates the hybrid structure for beamforming because of the trade-off in implementation and performance, simultaneously. In this paper, joint power allocation and hybrid beamforming of mmW-NOMA systems is brought up via recent advances in machine learning and control theory approaches called Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL). Actor-critic phenomena is exploited to measure the immediate reward and providing the new action to maximize the overall Q-value of the network. Additionally, to improve the stability of the approach, we have utilized Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) approach where overall reward and action entropy is maximized, simultaneously. The immediate reward has been defined based on the soft weighted summation of the rate of all the users. The soft weighting is based on the achieved rate and allocated power of each user. Furthermore, the channel responses between the users and base station (BS) is defined as the state of environment, while action space is involved of the digital and analog beamforming weights and allocated power to each user. The simulation results represent the superiority of the proposed approach rather than the Time-Division Multiple Access (TDMA) and Non-Line of Sight (NLOS)-NOMA in terms of sum-rate of the users. It's outperformance is caused by the joint optimization and independency of the proposed approach to the channel responses.
abstract_zh: 毫米波（mmW）频段的非正交多址（NOMA）方法可以保证下一代无线通信对数据速率的高要求。为了保证比特率的高需求，必须通过联合功率分配和波束成形来减少对其他用户的干扰，同时保持比特率。此外，由于实现和性能的同时权衡，毫米波频段决定了波束成形的混合结构。本文通过称为深度强化学习（DRL）的机器学习和控制理论方法的最新进展，提出了 mmW-NOMA 系统的联合功率分配和混合波束成形。利用演员批评现象来衡量即时奖励并提供新的行动以最大化网络的整体 Q 值。此外，为了提高该方法的稳定性，我们使用了 Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) 方法，其中总体奖励和动作熵同时最大化。即时奖励是根据所有用户的比率的软加权总和来定义的。软加权基于每个用户所达到的速率和分配的功率。此外，用户和基站（BS）之间的信道响应被定义为环境状态，而动作空间涉及数字和模拟波束成形权重以及分配给每个用户的功率。仿真结果表明该方法在用户总速率方面优于时分多址（TDMA）和非视距（NLOS）-NOMA。它的优异性能是由于所提出的信道响应方法的联合优化和独立性造成的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用深度强化学习（DRL）解决毫米波非正交多址接入（mmW-NOMA）系统中联合功率分配与混合波束成形优化问题。
AI.motivation: 毫米波频段高数据率需求与干扰管理矛盾突出，传统TDMA和NLOS-NOMA方法无法兼顾速率与干扰抑制，需通过智能算法实现联合优化。
AI.method: 基于Actor-Critic框架设计软演员评论家（SAC）算法，以信道状态为环境状态，数字/模拟波束成形权重及功率分配为动作空间，通过软加权速率和功率的即时奖励函数最大化系统总速率。
AI.result: 仿真表明所提方法在用户总速率上优于TDMA和NLOS-NOMA，优势源于联合优化机制与对信道响应的独立性。
AI.conclusion: DRL有效解决了mmW-NOMA的联合优化难题，SAC算法通过熵最大化提升稳定性，为未来高可靠通信提供新思路。

Furthermore, mmW frequency bands dictates the hybrid structure for beamforming because of the trade-off in implementation and performance, simultaneously. authors_text: Jess Banks,Jorge Garza-Vargas,Nikhil Srivastava
title: Global Convergence of Hessenberg Shifted QR II: Numerical Stability
title_zh: Hessenberg 移动 QR II 的全局收敛：数值稳定性
abstract: We develop a framework for proving rapid convergence of shifted QR algorithms which use Ritz values as shifts, in finite arithmetic. Our key contribution is a dichotomy result which addresses the known forward-instability issues surrounding the shifted QR iteration [Parlett and Le 1993]: we give a procedure which provably either computes a set of approximate Ritz values of a Hessenberg matrix with good forward stability properties, or leads to early decoupling of the matrix via a small number of QR steps. Using this framework, we show that the shifting strategy introduced in Part I of this series [Banks, Garza-Vargas, and Srivastava 2021] converges rapidly in finite arithmetic with a polylogarithmic bound on the number of bits of precision required, when invoked on matrices of controlled eigenvector condition number and minimum eigenvalue gap.
summary: We develop a framework for proving rapid convergence of shifted QR algorithms which use Ritz values as shifts, in finite arithmetic. Our key contribution is a dichotomy result which addresses the known forward-instability issues surrounding the shifted QR iteration [Parlett and Le 1993]: we give a procedure which provably either computes a set of approximate Ritz values of a Hessenberg matrix with good forward stability properties, or leads to early decoupling of the matrix via a small number of QR steps. Using this framework, we show that the shifting strategy introduced in Part I of this series [Banks, Garza-Vargas, and Srivastava 2021] converges rapidly in finite arithmetic with a polylogarithmic bound on the number of bits of precision required, when invoked on matrices of controlled eigenvector condition number and minimum eigenvalue gap.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一个框架，用于证明在有限算术中使用 Ritz 值作为移位的移位 QR 算法的快速收敛。我们的关键贡献是二分法结果，它解决了围绕移位 QR 迭代的已知前向不稳定问题 [Parlett 和 Le 1993]：我们给出了一个过程，该过程可证明计算具有良好前向稳定性属性的 Hessenberg 矩阵的一组近似 Ritz 值，或者通过少量 QR 步骤导致矩阵的早期解耦。使用这个框架，我们表明，当在受控特征向量条件数和最小特征值间隙的矩阵上调用时，本系列第一部分 [Banks、Garza-Vargas 和 Srivastava 2021] 中引入的移位策略在有限算术中快速收敛，并在所需精度位数上具有多对数界限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种框架，用于解决有限算术中使用Ritz值作为移位的QR算法的数值稳定性问题，并证明其快速收敛性。
AI.motivation: 现有移位QR算法在有限精度计算中存在前向不稳定性问题，导致收敛性难以保证，需改进数值稳定性以确保算法可靠性。
AI.method: 通过构建二分法框架，证明两种可能路径：要么计算具有良好前向稳定性的近似Ritz值，要么通过少量QR步骤实现矩阵早期解耦。
AI.result: 证明了Part I中提出的移位策略在有限算术中可快速收敛，且所需精度位数具有对数界，适用于特征向量条件数和最小特征值间隙受控的矩阵。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为数值线性代数中QR算法的全局收敛性提供了理论保障，确保了有限精度下的高效与稳定计算。

authors_text: Fabricio Olivetti de Franca
title: Transformation-Interaction-Rational Representation for Symbolic Regression
title_zh: 符号回归的变换交互有理表示
comment: Accepted at the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference 2022 (GECCO'22) Genetic Programming Track - Full paper
comments: Accepted at the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference 2022 (GECCO'22) Genetic Programming Track - Full paper
abstract: Symbolic Regression searches for a function form that approximates a dataset often using Genetic Programming. Since there is usually no restriction to what form the function can have, Genetic Programming may return a hard to understand model due to non-linear function chaining or long expressions. A novel representation called Interaction-Transformation was recently proposed to alleviate this problem. In this representation, the function form is restricted to an affine combination of terms generated as the application of a single univariate function to the interaction of selected variables. This representation obtained competing solutions on standard benchmarks. Despite the initial success, a broader set of benchmarking functions revealed the limitations of the constrained representation. In this paper we propose an extension to this representation, called Transformation-Interaction-Rational representation that defines a new function form as the rational of two Interaction-Transformation functions. Additionally, the target variable can also be transformed with an univariate function. The main goal is to improve the approximation power while still constraining the overall complexity of the expression. We tested this representation with a standard Genetic Programming with crossover and mutation. The results show a great improvement when compared to its predecessor and a state-of-the-art performance for a large benchmark.
summary: Symbolic Regression searches for a function form that approximates a dataset often using Genetic Programming. Since there is usually no restriction to what form the function can have, Genetic Programming may return a hard to understand model due to non-linear function chaining or long expressions. A novel representation called Interaction-Transformation was recently proposed to alleviate this problem. In this representation, the function form is restricted to an affine combination of terms generated as the application of a single univariate function to the interaction of selected variables. This representation obtained competing solutions on standard benchmarks. Despite the initial success, a broader set of benchmarking functions revealed the limitations of the constrained representation. In this paper we propose an extension to this representation, called Transformation-Interaction-Rational representation that defines a new function form as the rational of two Interaction-Transformation functions. Additionally, the target variable can also be transformed with an univariate function. The main goal is to improve the approximation power while still constraining the overall complexity of the expression. We tested this representation with a standard Genetic Programming with crossover and mutation. The results show a great improvement when compared to its predecessor and a state-of-the-art performance for a large benchmark.
abstract_zh: 符号回归通常使用遗传编程来搜索近似数据集的函数形式。由于函数的形式通常没有限制，遗传编程可能会由于非线性函数链接或长表达式而返回难以理解的模型。最近提出了一种称为交互转换的新颖表示来缓解这个问题。在此表示中，函数形式仅限于将单个单变量函数应用于所选变量的交互时生成的项的仿射组合。该表示获得了标准基准上的竞争解决方案。尽管取得了初步成功，但更广泛的基准测试函数集揭示了约束表示的局限性。在本文中，我们提出了这种表示的扩展，称为变换交互有理表示，它将新的函数形式定义为两个交互变换函数的有理数。此外，目标变量也可以用单变量函数进行变换。主要目标是提高近似能力，同时仍然限制表达式的整体复杂性。我们使用带有交叉和变异的标准遗传编程测试了这种表示。结果显示，与前代产品相比有了很大的改进，并且在大型基准测试中具有最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Transformation-Interaction-Rational的新型符号回归表示方法，通过结合两个Interaction-Transformation函数的比值形式提升模型表达能力。
AI.motivation: 现有Interaction-Transformation表示虽能简化符号回归模型，但其约束形式在复杂基准测试中表现不足，需在保持表达简洁性的同时提升拟合能力。
AI.method: 将目标变量转换为单变量函数形式，并定义新的函数结构为两个Interaction-Transformation函数的比值，结合标准遗传编程实现进化优化。
AI.result: 在大规模基准测试中，新方法相较原有表示及现有先进方法展现出显著性能提升，成功平衡了表达复杂度与拟合精度。
AI.conclusion: Transformation-Interaction-Rational表示通过结构创新有效解决了符号回归中表达复杂性与拟合能力的矛盾，为该领域提供新思路。

authors_text: Shyam Sudhakaran,Elias Najarro,Sebastian Risi
title: Goal-Guided Neural Cellular Automata: Learning to Control Self-Organising Systems
title_zh: 目标引导神经细胞自动机：学习控制自组织系统
abstract: Inspired by cellular growth and self-organization, Neural Cellular Automata (NCAs) have been capable of "growing" artificial cells into images, 3D structures, and even functional machines. NCAs are flexible and robust computational systems but -- similarly to many other self-organizing systems -- inherently uncontrollable during and after their growth process. We present an approach to control these type of systems called Goal-Guided Neural Cellular Automata (GoalNCA), which leverages goal encodings to control cell behavior dynamically at every step of cellular growth. This approach enables the NCA to continually change behavior, and in some cases, generalize its behavior to unseen scenarios. We also demonstrate the robustness of the NCA with its ability to preserve task performance, even when only a portion of cells receive goal information.
summary: Inspired by cellular growth and self-organization, Neural Cellular Automata (NCAs) have been capable of "growing" artificial cells into images, 3D structures, and even functional machines. NCAs are flexible and robust computational systems but -- similarly to many other self-organizing systems -- inherently uncontrollable during and after their growth process. We present an approach to control these type of systems called Goal-Guided Neural Cellular Automata (GoalNCA), which leverages goal encodings to control cell behavior dynamically at every step of cellular growth. This approach enables the NCA to continually change behavior, and in some cases, generalize its behavior to unseen scenarios. We also demonstrate the robustness of the NCA with its ability to preserve task performance, even when only a portion of cells receive goal information.
abstract_zh: 受细胞生长和自组织的启发，神经细胞自动机 (NCAs) 已经能够将人造细胞“生长”成图像、3D 结构，甚至功能机器。 NCA 是灵活而强大的计算系统，但与许多其他自组织系统类似，在其生长过程中和生长后本质上是不可控的。我们提出了一种控制此类系统的方法，称为目标引导神经细胞自动机（GoalNCA），它利用目标编码在细胞生长的每一步动态控制细胞行为。这种方法使 NCA 能够不断改变行为，并在某些情况下将其行为推广到未见过的场景。我们还证明了 NCA 的稳健性及其保持任务性能的能力，即使只有一部分细胞接收目标信息也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Goal-Guided Neural Cellular Automata（GoalNCA）的方法，通过动态目标编码控制自组织系统的生长过程，解决传统神经细胞自动机（NCA）在生长过程中不可控的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统NCA虽能生成复杂结构，但生长过程缺乏动态控制，导致行为不可预测且难以适应新场景，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: 通过引入目标编码机制，使每个细胞在生长步骤中根据全局目标动态调整行为，同时允许部分细胞接收目标信息以保持系统鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，GoalNCA能够实现生长过程的动态行为调整，推广至未见过的场景，并在部分细胞缺失目标信息时仍保持任务性能。
AI.conclusion: GoalNCA通过目标引导有效控制了自组织系统，为生成复杂结构和适应动态环境提供了新方法，展示了其在可控自组织系统中的潜力。

authors_text: Yuchao Gu,Xintao Wang,Liangbin Xie,Chao Dong,Gen Li,Ying Shan,Ming-Ming Cheng
title: VQFR: Blind Face Restoration with Vector-Quantized Dictionary and Parallel Decoder
title_zh: VQFR：使用矢量量化字典和并行解码器进行盲脸恢复
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022 (Oral). Project webpage is available at https://ycgu.site/projects/vqfr
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022 (Oral). Project webpage is available at https://ycgu.site/projects/vqfr
abstract: Although generative facial prior and geometric prior have recently demonstrated high-quality results for blind face restoration, producing fine-grained facial details faithful to inputs remains a challenging problem. Motivated by the classical dictionary-based methods and the recent vector quantization (VQ) technique, we propose a VQ-based face restoration method - VQFR. VQFR takes advantage of high-quality low-level feature banks extracted from high-quality faces and can thus help recover realistic facial details. However, the simple application of the VQ codebook cannot achieve good results with faithful details and identity preservation. Therefore, we further introduce two special network designs. 1). We first investigate the compression patch size in the VQ codebook and find that the VQ codebook designed with a proper compression patch size is crucial to balance the quality and fidelity. 2). To further fuse low-level features from inputs while not "contaminating" the realistic details generated from the VQ codebook, we proposed a parallel decoder consisting of a texture decoder and a main decoder. Those two decoders then interact with a texture warping module with deformable convolution. Equipped with the VQ codebook as a facial detail dictionary and the parallel decoder design, the proposed VQFR can largely enhance the restored quality of facial details while keeping the fidelity to previous methods.
summary: Although generative facial prior and geometric prior have recently demonstrated high-quality results for blind face restoration, producing fine-grained facial details faithful to inputs remains a challenging problem. Motivated by the classical dictionary-based methods and the recent vector quantization (VQ) technique, we propose a VQ-based face restoration method - VQFR. VQFR takes advantage of high-quality low-level feature banks extracted from high-quality faces and can thus help recover realistic facial details. However, the simple application of the VQ codebook cannot achieve good results with faithful details and identity preservation. Therefore, we further introduce two special network designs. 1). We first investigate the compression patch size in the VQ codebook and find that the VQ codebook designed with a proper compression patch size is crucial to balance the quality and fidelity. 2). To further fuse low-level features from inputs while not "contaminating" the realistic details generated from the VQ codebook, we proposed a parallel decoder consisting of a texture decoder and a main decoder. Those two decoders then interact with a texture warping module with deformable convolution. Equipped with the VQ codebook as a facial detail dictionary and the parallel decoder design, the proposed VQFR can largely enhance the restored quality of facial details while keeping the fidelity to previous methods.
abstract_zh: 尽管生成面部先验和几何先验最近已经证明了盲人面部恢复的高质量结果，但生成忠实于输入的细粒度面部细节仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。受经典的基于字典的方法和最近的矢量量化（VQ）技术的启发，我们提出了一种基于 VQ 的人脸恢复方法 - VQFR。 VQFR 利用从高质量人脸中提取的高质量低级特征库，因此可以帮助恢复真实的面部细节。然而，VQ码本的简单应用并不能达到忠实细节和身份保存的良好效果。因此，我们进一步介绍两种特殊的网络设计。 1）。我们首先研究了 VQ 码本中的压缩补丁大小，发现使用适当的压缩补丁大小设计的 VQ 码本对于平衡质量和保真度至关重要。 2）。为了进一步融合输入的低级特征，同时不“污染”VQ码本生成的真实细节，我们提出了一种由纹理解码器和主解码器组成的并行解码器。然后，这两个解码器与具有可变形卷积的纹理变形模块交互。配备VQ码本作为面部细节字典和并行解码器设计，所提出的VQFR可以很大程度上提高面部细节的恢复质量，同时保持对先前方法的保真度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于向量量化字典和并行解码器的盲脸修复方法VQFR，旨在提升面部细节的还原质量与身份一致性。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有方法在盲脸修复中取得进展，但如何忠实还原输入图像的精细面部细节并保持身份特征仍是挑战。受传统字典方法与向量量化技术启发，作者提出改进方案。
AI.method: 1) 设计优化压缩块尺寸的向量量化字典作为面部细节字典；2) 构建包含纹理解码器与主解码器的并行结构，并通过可变形卷积纹理扭曲模块实现特征融合，避免细节污染。
AI.result: 实验表明，VQFR在面部细节恢复质量上优于现有方法，同时保持了身份特征的忠实度与修复结果的真实性。
AI.conclusion: 通过向量量化字典与并行解码器的协同设计，VQFR有效平衡了面部修复的细节质量与身份保真度，为盲脸修复提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于向量量化字典和并行解码器的盲脸修复方法VQFR，旨在提升面部细节的还原质量与身份一致性。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管现有方法在盲脸修复中取得进展，但如何忠实还原输入图像的精细面部细节并保持身份特征仍是挑战。受传统字典方法与向量量化技术启发，作者提出改进方案。
ai_content.method: 1) 设计优化压缩块尺寸的向量量化字典作为面部细节字典；2) 构建包含纹理解码器与主解码器的并行结构，并通过可变形卷积纹理扭曲模块实现特征融合，避免细节污染。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，VQFR在面部细节恢复质量上优于现有方法，同时保持了身份特征的忠实度与修复结果的真实性。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过向量量化字典与并行解码器的协同设计，VQFR有效平衡了面部修复的细节质量与身份保真度，为盲脸修复提供了新思路。

search_text: VQFR: Blind Face Restoration with Vector-Quantized Dictionary and Parallel Decoder VQFR：使用矢量量化字典和并行解码器进行盲脸恢复 Although generative facial prior and geometric prior have recently demonstrated high-quality results for blind face restoration, producing fine-grained facial details faithful to inputs remains a challenging problem. Motivated by the classical dictionary-based methods and the recent vector quantization (VQ) technique, we propose a VQ-based face restoration method - VQFR. VQFR takes advantage of high-quality low-level feature banks extracted from high-quality faces and can thus help recover realistic facial details. However, the simple application of the VQ codebook cannot achieve good results with faithful details and identity preservation. Therefore, we further introduce two special network designs. 1). We first investigate the compression patch size in the VQ codebook and find that the VQ codebook designed with a proper compression patch size is crucial to balance the quality and fidelity. 2). To further fuse low-level features from inputs while not "contaminating" the realistic details generated from the VQ codebook, we proposed a parallel decoder consisting of a texture decoder and a main decoder. Those two decoders then interact with a texture warping module with deformable convolution. Equipped with the VQ codebook as a facial detail dictionary and the parallel decoder design, the proposed VQFR can largely enhance the restored quality of facial details while keeping the fidelity to previous methods. 尽管生成面部先验和几何先验最近已经证明了盲人面部恢复的高质量结果，但生成忠实于输入的细粒度面部细节仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。受经典的基于字典的方法和最近的矢量量化（VQ）技术的启发，我们提出了一种基于 VQ 的人脸恢复方法 - VQFR。 VQFR 利用从高质量人脸中提取的高质量低级特征库，因此可以帮助恢复真实的面部细节。然而，VQ码本的简单应用并不能达到忠实细节和身份保存的良好效果。因此，我们进一步介绍两种特殊的网络设计。 1）。我们首先研究了 VQ 码本中的压缩补丁大小，发现使用适当的压缩补丁大小设计的 VQ 码本对于平衡质量和保真度至关重要。 2）。为了进一步融合输入的低级特征，同时不“污染”VQ码本生成的真实细节，我们提出了一种由纹理解码器和主解码器组成的并行解码器。然后，这两个解码器与具有可变形卷积的纹理变形模块交互。配备VQ码本作为面部细节字典和并行解码器设计，所提出的VQFR可以很大程度上提高面部细节的恢复质量，同时保持对先前方法的保真度。 本文提出了一种基于向量量化字典和并行解码器的盲脸修复方法VQFR，旨在提升面部细节的还原质量与身份一致性。 Yuchao Gu,Xintao Wang,Liangbin Xie,Chao Dong,Gen Li,Ying Shan,Ming-Ming Cheng cs.CV

authors_text: Danial Toufani-Movaghar,Mohammad-Reza Feizi-Derakhshi
title: Word Embeddings and Validity Indexes in Fuzzy Clustering
title_zh: 模糊聚类中的词嵌入和有效性索引
comment: 10 Pages, 2 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1907.07672 by other authors
comments: 10 Pages, 2 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1907.07672 by other authors
abstract: In the new era of internet systems and applications, a concept of detecting distinguished topics from huge amounts of text has gained a lot of attention. These methods use representation of text in a numerical format -- called embeddings -- to imitate human-based semantic similarity between words. In this study, we perform a fuzzy-based analysis of various vector representations of words, i.e., word embeddings. Also we introduce new methods of fuzzy clustering based on hybrid implementation of fuzzy clustering methods with an evolutionary algorithm named Forest Optimization. We use two popular fuzzy clustering algorithms on count-based word embeddings, with different methods and dimensionality. Words about covid from Kaggle dataset gathered and calculated into vectors and clustered. The results indicate that fuzzy clustering algorithms are very sensitive to high-dimensional data, and parameter tuning can dramatically change their performance. We evaluate results of experiments with various clustering validity indexes to compare different algorithm variation with different embeddings accuracy.
summary: In the new era of internet systems and applications, a concept of detecting distinguished topics from huge amounts of text has gained a lot of attention. These methods use representation of text in a numerical format -- called embeddings -- to imitate human-based semantic similarity between words. In this study, we perform a fuzzy-based analysis of various vector representations of words, i.e., word embeddings. Also we introduce new methods of fuzzy clustering based on hybrid implementation of fuzzy clustering methods with an evolutionary algorithm named Forest Optimization. We use two popular fuzzy clustering algorithms on count-based word embeddings, with different methods and dimensionality. Words about covid from Kaggle dataset gathered and calculated into vectors and clustered. The results indicate that fuzzy clustering algorithms are very sensitive to high-dimensional data, and parameter tuning can dramatically change their performance. We evaluate results of experiments with various clustering validity indexes to compare different algorithm variation with different embeddings accuracy.
abstract_zh: 在互联网系统和应用的新时代，从大量文本中检测独特主题的概念引起了广泛关注。这些方法使用数字格式的文本表示（称为嵌入）来模仿单词之间基于人类的语义相似性。在本研究中，我们对单词的各种向量表示（即单词嵌入）进行基于模糊的分析。我们还介绍了基于模糊聚类方法与称为森林优化的进化算法的混合实现的模糊聚类新方法。我们在基于计数的词嵌入上使用两种流行的模糊聚类算法，具有不同的方法和维度。来自 Kaggle 数据集的有关 covid 的词语被收集并计算成向量并进行聚类。结果表明，模糊聚类算法对高维数据非常敏感，参数调整可以显着改变其性能。我们使用各种聚类有效性指标评估实验结果，以比较具有不同嵌入精度的不同算法变化。

AI.tldr: 本研究结合词嵌入与模糊聚类方法，利用有效性指数评估不同算法在处理高维文本数据时的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理高维文本数据时存在不足，需探索更有效的聚类方法以提高主题检测准确性。
AI.method: 采用两种模糊聚类算法与进化算法Forest Optimization结合，基于计数型词嵌入进行实验，并使用多种有效性指数评估结果。
AI.result: 模糊聚类算法对高维数据敏感，参数调整显著影响性能，不同算法与嵌入方法效果差异明显。
AI.conclusion: 模糊聚类结合词嵌入及优化算法在文本聚类中具有潜力，需精细参数调整，有效性指数可辅助方法比较。
