authors_text: Zahra Movahedi Nia,Ali Ahmadi,Bruce Mellado,Jianhong Wu,James Orbinski,Ali Agary,Jude Dzevela Kong
title: Twitter-Based Gender Recognition Using Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformers 基于 Twitter 的性别识别
abstract: Social media contains useful information about people and the society that could help advance research in many different areas (e.g. by applying opinion mining, emotion/sentiment analysis, and statistical analysis) such as business and finance, health, socio-economic inequality and gender vulnerability. User demographics provide rich information that could help study the subject further. However, user demographics such as gender are considered private and are not freely available. In this study, we propose a model based on transformers to predict the user's gender from their images and tweets. We fine-tune a model based on Vision Transformers (ViT) to stratify female and male images. Next, we fine-tune another model based on Bidirectional Encoders Representations from Transformers (BERT) to recognize the user's gender by their tweets. This is highly beneficial, because not all users provide an image that indicates their gender. The gender of such users could be detected form their tweets. The combination model improves the accuracy of image and text classification models by 6.98% and 4.43%, respectively. This shows that the image and text classification models are capable of complementing each other by providing additional information to one another. We apply our method to the PAN-2018 dataset, and obtain an accuracy of 85.52%.
summary: Social media contains useful information about people and the society that could help advance research in many different areas (e.g. by applying opinion mining, emotion/sentiment analysis, and statistical analysis) such as business and finance, health, socio-economic inequality and gender vulnerability. User demographics provide rich information that could help study the subject further. However, user demographics such as gender are considered private and are not freely available. In this study, we propose a model based on transformers to predict the user's gender from their images and tweets. We fine-tune a model based on Vision Transformers (ViT) to stratify female and male images. Next, we fine-tune another model based on Bidirectional Encoders Representations from Transformers (BERT) to recognize the user's gender by their tweets. This is highly beneficial, because not all users provide an image that indicates their gender. The gender of such users could be detected form their tweets. The combination model improves the accuracy of image and text classification models by 6.98% and 4.43%, respectively. This shows that the image and text classification models are capable of complementing each other by providing additional information to one another. We apply our method to the PAN-2018 dataset, and obtain an accuracy of 85.52%.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体包含有关人和社会的有用信息，可以帮助推进许多不同领域的研究（例如通过应用意见挖掘、情感/情感分析和统计分析），例如商业和金融、健康、社会经济不平等和性别脆弱性。用户人口统计数据提供了丰富的信息，可以帮助进一步研究该主题。然而，诸如性别之类的用户人口统计数据被认为是私密的，并且不能免费获得。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个基于 Transformer 的模型，可以根据用户的图像和推文来预测用户的性别。我们对基于 Vision Transformers (ViT) 的模型进行微调，以对女性和男性图像进行分层。接下来，我们微调另一个基于 Transformers 双向编码器表示 (BERT) 的模型，以通过推文识别用户的性别。这是非常有益的，因为并非所有用户都提供表明其性别的图像。可以从这些用户的推文中检测出他们的性别。组合模型将图像和文本分类模型的准确率分别提高了6.98%和4.43%。这表明图像和文本分类模型能够通过相互提供附加信息来相互补充。我们将我们的方法应用于 PAN-2018 数据集，并获得 85.52% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本研究提出基于Transformer模型的组合方法，通过用户图像和推文预测性别。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体中的性别等人口统计数据属于隐私且不易获取，需从公开内容（如图像和推文）中推断性别以辅助研究。
AI.method: 使用Vision Transformer（ViT）处理图像，BERT模型分析推文，并通过组合模型融合两种模态信息提升预测效果。
AI.result: 组合模型使图像分类准确率提升6.98%，文本分类提升4.43%，在PAN-2018数据集上总体准确率达85.52%。
AI.conclusion: 图像与文本分类模型可互补增强，结合多模态信息能有效提升性别识别性能。

The combination model improves the accuracy of image and text classification models by 6.98% and 4.43%, respectively. This shows that the image and text classification models are capable of complementing each other by providing additional information to one another. We apply our method to the PAN-2018 dataset, and obtain an accuracy of 85.52%. 社交媒体包含有关人和社会的有用信息，可以帮助推进许多不同领域的研究（例如通过应用意见挖掘、情感/情感分析和统计分析），例如商业和金融、健康、社会经济不平等和性别脆弱性。用户人口统计数据提供了丰富的信息，可以帮助进一步研究该主题。然而，诸如性别之类的用户人口统计数据被认为是私密的，并且不能免费获得。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个基于 Transformer 的模型，可以根据用户的图像和推文来预测用户的性别。我们对基于 Vision Transformers (ViT) 的模型进行微调，以对女性和男性图像进行分层。接下来，我们微调另一个基于 Transformers 双向编码器表示 (BERT) 的模型，以通过推文识别用户的性别。这是非常有益的，因为并非所有用户都提供表明其性别的图像。可以从这些用户的推文中检测出他们的性别。组合模型将图像和文本分类模型的准确率分别提高了6.98%和4.43%。这表明图像和文本分类模型能够通过相互提供附加信息来相互补充。我们将我们的方法应用于 PAN-2018 数据集，并获得 85.52% 的准确率。 本研究提出基于Transformer模型的组合方法，通过用户图像和推文预测性别。 Zahra Movahedi Nia,Ali Ahmadi,Bruce Mellado,Jianhong Wu,James Orbinski,Ali Agary,Jude Dzevela Kong cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.SI

authors_text: Björn W. Schuller,Anton Batliner,Shahin Amiriparian,Christian Bergler,Maurice Gerczuk,Natalie Holz,Pauline Larrouy-Maestri,Sebastian P. Bayerl,Korbinian Riedhammer,Adria Mallol-Ragolta,Maria Pateraki,Harry Coppock,Ivan Kiskin,Marianne Sinka,Stephen Roberts
title: The ACM Multimedia 2022 Computational Paralinguistics Challenge: Vocalisations, Stuttering, Activity, & Mosquitoes
title_zh: ACM 多媒体 2022 年计算副语言学挑战：发声、口吃、活动和蚊子
comment: 5 pages, part of the ACM Multimedia 2022 Grand Challenge "The ACM Multimedia 2022 Computational Paralinguistics Challenge (ComParE 2022)"
comments: 5 pages, part of the ACM Multimedia 2022 Grand Challenge "The ACM Multimedia 2022 Computational Paralinguistics Challenge (ComParE 2022)"
abstract: The ACM Multimedia 2022 Computational Paralinguistics Challenge addresses four different problems for the first time in a research competition under well-defined conditions: In the Vocalisations and Stuttering Sub-Challenges, a classification on human non-verbal vocalisations and speech has to be made; the Activity Sub-Challenge aims at beyond-audio human activity recognition from smartwatch sensor data; and in the Mosquitoes Sub-Challenge, mosquitoes need to be detected. We describe the Sub-Challenges, baseline feature extraction, and classifiers based on the usual ComPaRE and BoAW features, the auDeep toolkit, and deep feature extraction from pre-trained CNNs using the DeepSpectRum toolkit; in addition, we add end-to-end sequential modelling, and a log-mel-128-BNN.
summary: The ACM Multimedia 2022 Computational Paralinguistics Challenge addresses four different problems for the first time in a research competition under well-defined conditions: In the Vocalisations and Stuttering Sub-Challenges, a classification on human non-verbal vocalisations and speech has to be made; the Activity Sub-Challenge aims at beyond-audio human activity recognition from smartwatch sensor data; and in the Mosquitoes Sub-Challenge, mosquitoes need to be detected. We describe the Sub-Challenges, baseline feature extraction, and classifiers based on the usual ComPaRE and BoAW features, the auDeep toolkit, and deep feature extraction from pre-trained CNNs using the DeepSpectRum toolkit; in addition, we add end-to-end sequential modelling, and a log-mel-128-BNN.
abstract_zh: ACM 多媒体 2022 计算副语言学挑战赛首次在明确条件下的研究竞赛中解决了四个不同的问题： 在发声和口吃子挑战中，必须对人类非语言发声和言语进行分类；活动子挑战旨在从智能手表传感器数据中进行超音频人类活动识别；在蚊子子挑战中，需要检测蚊子。我们描述了子挑战、基线特征提取和基于常见的 ComPaRE 和 BoAW 特征的分类器、auDeep 工具包以及使用 DeepSpectRum 工具包从预训练的 CNN 中进行深度特征提取；此外，我们添加了端到端顺序建模和 log-mel-128-BNN。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了ACM多媒体2022计算副语言挑战赛，包含四个子挑战：非言语发声分类、口吃检测、智能手表活动识别及蚊子检测。
AI.motivation: 通过标准化竞赛形式推动计算副语言领域研究，促进多任务方法比较与基准测试。
AI.method: 采用ComPaRE/BoAW特征、auDeep工具包、深度CNN特征提取（DeepSpectRum）及端到端序列建模（log-mel-128-BNN）等方法。
AI.result: 提供了各子挑战的基线特征提取与分类方法，并比较了不同模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛为多模态计算副语言研究提供了标准化基准，推动了跨学科方法的融合与工具共享。

authors_text: Temenuzhka Avramova,Riccardo Maderna,Alessandro Benetton,Christian Cardenio
title: Innovations in the field of on-board scheduling technologies
title_zh: 车载调度技术领域的创新
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures
comments: 7 pages, 4 figures
abstract: Space missions are characterized by long distances, difficult or unavailable communication and high operating costs. Moreover, complexity has been constantly increasing in recent years. For this reason, improving the autonomy of space operators is an attractive goal to increase the mission reward with lower costs. This paper proposes an onboard scheduler, that integrates inside an onboard software framework for mission autonomy. Given a set of activities, it is responsible for determining the starting time of each activity according to their priority, order constraints, and resource consumption. The presented scheduler is based on linear integer programming and relies on the use of a branch-and-cut solver. The technology has been tested on an Earth Observation scenario, comparing its performance against the state-of-the-art scheduling technology.
summary: Space missions are characterized by long distances, difficult or unavailable communication and high operating costs. Moreover, complexity has been constantly increasing in recent years. For this reason, improving the autonomy of space operators is an attractive goal to increase the mission reward with lower costs. This paper proposes an onboard scheduler, that integrates inside an onboard software framework for mission autonomy. Given a set of activities, it is responsible for determining the starting time of each activity according to their priority, order constraints, and resource consumption. The presented scheduler is based on linear integer programming and relies on the use of a branch-and-cut solver. The technology has been tested on an Earth Observation scenario, comparing its performance against the state-of-the-art scheduling technology.
abstract_zh: 太空任务的特点是距离远、通信困难或不可用以及运营成本高。此外，近年来，复杂性不断增加。因此，提高太空操作员的自主性是一个有吸引力的目标，可以以更低的成本增加任务奖励。本文提出了一种机载调度程序，它集成在机载软件框架内以实现任务自主。给定一组活动，它负责根据其优先级、顺序约束和资源消耗来确定每个活动的开始时间。所提出的调度程序基于线性整数规划并依赖于分支切割求解器的使用。该技术已经在地球观测场景中进行了测试，并将其性能与最先进的调度技术进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于线性整数规划和分支定界求解器的航天器 onboard 调度器，旨在提升空间任务自主性。
AI.motivation: 空间任务面临通信困难、成本高昂及复杂度增加等挑战，提升自主性可降低运营成本并提高任务收益。
AI.method: 设计集成于自主软件框架的调度器，通过线性整数规划与分支定界算法确定活动启动时间，并在地球观测场景中验证性能。
AI.result: 测试表明该调度器在任务自主性方面优于现有调度技术，能有效处理优先级、约束条件和资源分配问题。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法为复杂空间任务提供了高效自主调度方案，验证了其在实际应用中的可行性和优越性。

authors_text: Shyamgopal Karthik,Massimiliano Mancini,Zeynep Akata
title: KG-SP: Knowledge Guided Simple Primitives for Open World Compositional Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: KG-SP：用于开放世界组合零样本学习的知识引导简单原语
comment: CVPR 2022
comments: CVPR 2022
abstract: The goal of open-world compositional zero-shot learning (OW-CZSL) is to recognize compositions of state and objects in images, given only a subset of them during training and no prior on the unseen compositions. In this setting, models operate on a huge output space, containing all possible state-object compositions. While previous works tackle the problem by learning embeddings for the compositions jointly, here we revisit a simple CZSL baseline and predict the primitives, i.e. states and objects, independently. To ensure that the model develops primitive-specific features, we equip the state and object classifiers with separate, non-linear feature extractors. Moreover, we estimate the feasibility of each composition through external knowledge, using this prior to remove unfeasible compositions from the output space. Finally, we propose a new setting, i.e. CZSL under partial supervision (pCZSL), where either only objects or state labels are available during training, and we can use our prior to estimate the missing labels. Our model, Knowledge-Guided Simple Primitives (KG-SP), achieves state of the art in both OW-CZSL and pCZSL, surpassing most recent competitors even when coupled with semi-supervised learning techniques. Code available at: https://github.com/ExplainableML/KG-SP.
summary: The goal of open-world compositional zero-shot learning (OW-CZSL) is to recognize compositions of state and objects in images, given only a subset of them during training and no prior on the unseen compositions. In this setting, models operate on a huge output space, containing all possible state-object compositions. While previous works tackle the problem by learning embeddings for the compositions jointly, here we revisit a simple CZSL baseline and predict the primitives, i.e. states and objects, independently. To ensure that the model develops primitive-specific features, we equip the state and object classifiers with separate, non-linear feature extractors. Moreover, we estimate the feasibility of each composition through external knowledge, using this prior to remove unfeasible compositions from the output space. Finally, we propose a new setting, i.e. CZSL under partial supervision (pCZSL), where either only objects or state labels are available during training, and we can use our prior to estimate the missing labels. Our model, Knowledge-Guided Simple Primitives (KG-SP), achieves state of the art in both OW-CZSL and pCZSL, surpassing most recent competitors even when coupled with semi-supervised learning techniques. Code available at: https://github.com/ExplainableML/KG-SP.
abstract_zh: 开放世界组合零样本学习（OW-CZSL）的目标是识别图像中状态和对象的组合，在训练期间仅给出其中的子集，并且没有先验的未见过的组合。在这种情况下，模型在巨大的输出空间上运行，包含所有可能的状态-对象组合。虽然之前的工作通过联合学习组合的嵌入来解决这个问题，但在这里我们重新审视一个简单的 CZSL 基线并独立预测基元，即状态和对象。为了确保模型开发特定于基元的特征，我们为状态和对象分类器配备了单独的非线性特征提取器。此外，我们通过外部知识估计每个组合的可行性，并使用此先验从输出空间中删除不可行的组合。最后，我们提出了一个新的设置，即部分监督下的 CZSL（pCZSL），其中在训练期间只有对象或状态标签可用，并且我们可以使用先验来估计丢失的标签。我们的模型知识引导简单原语 (KG-SP) 在 OW-CZSL 和 pCZSL 方面均达到了最先进的水平，即使与半监督学习技术相结合，也超越了最近的竞争对手。代码位于：https://github.com/ExplainableML/KG-SP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为KG-SP的知识引导简单基元方法，用于解决开放世界组合零样本学习（OW-CZSL）问题，旨在通过训练数据中的部分状态和对象组合来识别图像中未见过的组合。
AI.motivation: 在开放世界组合零样本学习中，模型需要在没有先验知识的情况下识别大量可能的组合，而现有方法通常联合学习组合嵌入，导致模型难以提取基元（状态和对象）特定的特征。
AI.method: 本文方法通过独立预测状态和对象基元，使用独立的非线性特征提取器来确保模型提取基元特定特征，并利用外部知识估计组合的可行性以去除不可行组合。此外，提出了一种新的部分监督设置（pCZSL）以处理训练数据中缺失的标签。
AI.result: KG-SP在OW-CZSL和pCZSL任务中均达到最先进的性能，即使结合半监督学习技术也优于大多数最新方法。
AI.conclusion: KG-SP通过独立预测基元和利用外部知识显著提升了开放世界组合零样本学习的性能，为未来研究提供了新的思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为KG-SP的知识引导简单基元方法，用于解决开放世界组合零样本学习（OW-CZSL）问题，旨在通过训练数据中的部分状态和对象组合来识别图像中未见过的组合。
ai_content.motivation: 在开放世界组合零样本学习中，模型需要在没有先验知识的情况下识别大量可能的组合，而现有方法通常联合学习组合嵌入，导致模型难以提取基元（状态和对象）特定的特征。

ai_content.result: KG-SP在OW-CZSL和pCZSL任务中均达到最先进的性能，即使结合半监督学习技术也优于大多数最新方法。
ai_content.conclusion: KG-SP通过独立预测基元和利用外部知识显著提升了开放世界组合零样本学习的性能，为未来研究提供了新的思路。

search_text: KG-SP: Knowledge Guided Simple Primitives for Open World Compositional Zero-Shot Learning KG-SP：用于开放世界组合零样本学习的知识引导简单原语 The goal of open-world compositional zero-shot learning (OW-CZSL) is to recognize compositions of state and objects in images, given only a subset of them during training and no prior on the unseen compositions. In this setting, models operate on a huge output space, containing all possible state-object compositions. While previous works tackle the problem by learning embeddings for the compositions jointly, here we revisit a simple CZSL baseline and predict the primitives, i.e. states and objects, independently. To ensure that the model develops primitive-specific features, we equip the state and object classifiers with separate, non-linear feature extractors. Moreover, we estimate the feasibility of each composition through external knowledge, using this prior to remove unfeasible compositions from the output space. Finally, we propose a new setting, i.e. CZSL under partial supervision (pCZSL), where either only objects or state labels are available during training, and we can use our prior to estimate the missing labels. Our model, Knowledge-Guided Simple Primitives (KG-SP), achieves state of the art in both OW-CZSL and pCZSL, surpassing most recent competitors even when coupled with semi-supervised learning techniques. Code available at: https://github.com/ExplainableML/KG-SP. 开放世界组合零样本学习（OW-CZSL）的目标是识别图像中状态和对象的组合，在训练期间仅给出其中的子集，并且没有先验的未见过的组合。在这种情况下，模型在巨大的输出空间上运行，包含所有可能的状态-对象组合。虽然之前的工作通过联合学习组合的嵌入来解决这个问题，但在这里我们重新审视一个简单的 CZSL 基线并独立预测基元，即状态和对象。为了确保模型开发特定于基元的特征，我们为状态和对象分类器配备了单独的非线性特征提取器。此外，我们通过外部知识估计每个组合的可行性，并使用此先验从输出空间中删除不可行的组合。最后，我们提出了一个新的设置，即部分监督下的 CZSL（pCZSL），其中在训练期间只有对象或状态标签可用，并且我们可以使用先验来估计丢失的标签。我们的模型知识引导简单原语 (KG-SP) 在 OW-CZSL 和 pCZSL 方面均达到了最先进的水平，即使与半监督学习技术相结合，也超越了最近的竞争对手。代码位于：https://github.com/ExplainableML/KG-SP。 本文提出了一种名为KG-SP的知识引导简单基元方法，用于解决开放世界组合零样本学习（OW-CZSL）问题，旨在通过训练数据中的部分状态和对象组合来识别图像中未见过的组合。 Shyamgopal Karthik,Massimiliano Mancini,Zeynep Akata cs.CV

authors_text: Qiuhui Chen,Yi Hong
title: Scribble2D5: Weakly-Supervised Volumetric Image Segmentation via Scribble Annotations
title_zh: Scribble2D5：通过 Scribble 注释进行弱监督体积图像分割
comment: Accepted by MICCAI 2022
comments: Accepted by MICCAI 2022
abstract: Recently, weakly-supervised image segmentation using weak annotations like scribbles has gained great attention, since such annotations are much easier to obtain compared to time-consuming and label-intensive labeling at the pixel/voxel level. However, because scribbles lack structure information of region of interest (ROI), existing scribble-based methods suffer from poor boundary localization. Furthermore, most current methods are designed for 2D image segmentation, which do not fully leverage the volumetric information if directly applied to image slices. In this paper, we propose a scribble-based volumetric image segmentation, Scribble2D5, which tackles 3D anisotropic image segmentation and improves boundary prediction. To achieve this, we augment a 2.5D attention UNet with a proposed label propagation module to extend semantic information from scribbles and a combination of static and active boundary prediction to learn ROI's boundary and regularize its shape. Extensive experiments on three public datasets demonstrate Scribble2D5 significantly outperforms current scribble-based methods and approaches the performance of fully-supervised ones. Our code is available online.
summary: Recently, weakly-supervised image segmentation using weak annotations like scribbles has gained great attention, since such annotations are much easier to obtain compared to time-consuming and label-intensive labeling at the pixel/voxel level. However, because scribbles lack structure information of region of interest (ROI), existing scribble-based methods suffer from poor boundary localization. Furthermore, most current methods are designed for 2D image segmentation, which do not fully leverage the volumetric information if directly applied to image slices. In this paper, we propose a scribble-based volumetric image segmentation, Scribble2D5, which tackles 3D anisotropic image segmentation and improves boundary prediction. To achieve this, we augment a 2.5D attention UNet with a proposed label propagation module to extend semantic information from scribbles and a combination of static and active boundary prediction to learn ROI's boundary and regularize its shape. Extensive experiments on three public datasets demonstrate Scribble2D5 significantly outperforms current scribble-based methods and approaches the performance of fully-supervised ones. Our code is available online.
abstract_zh: 最近，使用诸如涂鸦之类的弱注释的弱监督图像分割引起了极大的关注，因为与像素/体素级别的耗时且标签密集的标记相比，此类注释更容易获得。然而，由于涂鸦缺乏感兴趣区域（ROI）的结构信息，现有的基于涂鸦的方法存在边界定位不佳的问题。此外，大多数当前方法都是为二维图像分割而设计的，如果直接应用于图像切片，则不能充分利用体积信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于涂鸦的体积图像分割 Scribble2D5，它解决 3D 各向异性图像分割问题并改进边界预测。为了实现这一目标，我们使用提议的标签传播模块来增强 2.5D 注意力 UNet，以扩展来自涂鸦的语义信息，并结合静态和主动边界预测来学习 ROI 的边界并规范其形状。对三个公共数据集的广泛实验表明，Scribble2D5 显着优于当前基于涂鸦的方法，并接近完全监督方法的性能。我们的代码可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于涂鸦注释的弱监督三维图像分割方法Scribble2D5，旨在解决现有方法在边界定位和利用体积信息方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于涂鸦的图像分割方法在边界定位上表现不佳，且多数方法仅适用于二维图像，无法充分利用三维图像的体积信息。
AI.method: 作者通过增强2.5D注意力UNet并引入标签传播模块与静态和主动边界预测相结合的方法，以扩展语义信息并学习感兴趣区域的边界。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上的实验表明，Scribble2D5显著优于当前基于涂鸦的方法，并接近全监督方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: Scribble2D5有效解决了弱监督三维图像分割中的边界定位问题，并充分挖掘了体积信息，具有较高的应用价值。

authors_text: Caitlin Grasso,Josh Bongard
title: Empowered Neural Cellular Automata
title_zh: 增强神经细胞自动机
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Information-theoretic fitness functions are becoming increasingly popular to produce generally useful, task-independent behaviors. One such universal function, dubbed empowerment, measures the amount of control an agent exerts on its environment via its sensorimotor system. Specifically, empowerment attempts to maximize the mutual information between an agent's actions and its received sensor states at a later point in time. Traditionally, empowerment has been applied to a conventional sensorimotor apparatus, such as a robot. Here, we expand the approach to a distributed, multi-agent sensorimotor system embodied by a neural cellular automaton (NCA). We show that the addition of empowerment as a secondary objective in the evolution of NCA to perform the task of morphogenesis, growing and maintaining a pre-specified shape, results in higher fitness compared to evolving for morphogenesis alone. Results suggest there may be a synergistic relationship between morphogenesis and empowerment. That is, indirectly selecting for coordination between neighboring cells over the duration of development is beneficial to the developmental process itself. Such a finding may have applications in developmental biology by providing potential mechanisms of communication between cells during growth from a single cell to a multicellular, target morphology. Source code for the experiments in this paper can be found at: \url{https://github.com/caitlingrasso/empowered-nca}.
summary: Information-theoretic fitness functions are becoming increasingly popular to produce generally useful, task-independent behaviors. One such universal function, dubbed empowerment, measures the amount of control an agent exerts on its environment via its sensorimotor system. Specifically, empowerment attempts to maximize the mutual information between an agent's actions and its received sensor states at a later point in time. Traditionally, empowerment has been applied to a conventional sensorimotor apparatus, such as a robot. Here, we expand the approach to a distributed, multi-agent sensorimotor system embodied by a neural cellular automaton (NCA). We show that the addition of empowerment as a secondary objective in the evolution of NCA to perform the task of morphogenesis, growing and maintaining a pre-specified shape, results in higher fitness compared to evolving for morphogenesis alone. Results suggest there may be a synergistic relationship between morphogenesis and empowerment. That is, indirectly selecting for coordination between neighboring cells over the duration of development is beneficial to the developmental process itself. Such a finding may have applications in developmental biology by providing potential mechanisms of communication between cells during growth from a single cell to a multicellular, target morphology. Source code for the experiments in this paper can be found at: \url{https://github.com/caitlingrasso/empowered-nca}.
abstract_zh: 信息论适应度函数越来越受欢迎，可以产生普遍有用的、与任务无关的行为。其中一种通用功能被称为赋权，它测量智能体通过其感觉运动系统对其环境施加的控制量。具体来说，授权尝试最大化代理的动作与其在稍后时间点接收到的传感器状态之间的互信息。传统上，赋权已应用于传统的感觉运动设备，例如机器人。在这里，我们将该方法扩展到由神经细胞自动机（NCA）体现的分布式多智能体感觉运动系统。我们表明，在 NCA 进化中，添加赋权作为次要目标来执行形态发生、生长和维持预先指定的形状的任务，与单独形态发生的进化相比，会产生更高的适应性。结果表明形态发生和赋权之间可能存在协同关系。也就是说，在发育过程中间接选择相邻细胞之间的协调有利于发育过程本身。这一发现可能在发育生物学中得到应用，因​​为它提供了从单细胞生长到多细胞目标形态期间细胞之间通讯的潜在机制。本文实验的源代码可以在：\url{https://github.com/caitlingrasso/empowered-nca} 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文将信息论中的控制能力（empowerment）引入神经细胞自动机（NCA），用于提升形态发生任务的适应度。
AI.motivation: 传统empowerment应用于机器人等单体系统，但分布式多智能体系统的协调机制尚不明确，需探索其在形态发生中的潜在协同效应。
AI.method: 在NCA进化过程中，将形态发生任务与empowerment作为双重目标进行联合优化，通过最大化细胞间动作与传感器状态的互信息促进协调。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合empowerment的NCA在形态发生任务中适应度显著提升，揭示了形态生成与控制能力之间的协同关系。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为发育生物学中细胞通讯机制提供了新视角，开源代码可促进相关领域研究。

motivation: 传统empowerment应用于机器人等单体系统，但分布式多智能体系统的协调机制尚不明确，需探索其在形态发生中的潜在协同效应。
method: 在NCA进化过程中，将形态发生任务与empowerment作为双重目标进行联合优化，通过最大化细胞间动作与传感器状态的互信息促进协调。
result: 实验表明，结合empowerment的NCA在形态发生任务中适应度显著提升，揭示了形态生成与控制能力之间的协同关系。
conclusion: 该研究为发育生物学中细胞通讯机制提供了新视角，开源代码可促进相关领域研究。
search_text: Empowered Neural Cellular Automata 增强神经细胞自动机 Information-theoretic fitness functions are becoming increasingly popular to produce generally useful, task-independent behaviors. One such universal function, dubbed empowerment, measures the amount of control an agent exerts on its environment via its sensorimotor system. Specifically, empowerment attempts to maximize the mutual information between an agent's actions and its received sensor states at a later point in time. Traditionally, empowerment has been applied to a conventional sensorimotor apparatus, such as a robot. Here, we expand the approach to a distributed, multi-agent sensorimotor system embodied by a neural cellular automaton (NCA). We show that the addition of empowerment as a secondary objective in the evolution of NCA to perform the task of morphogenesis, growing and maintaining a pre-specified shape, results in higher fitness compared to evolving for morphogenesis alone. Results suggest there may be a synergistic relationship between morphogenesis and empowerment. That is, indirectly selecting for coordination between neighboring cells over the duration of development is beneficial to the developmental process itself. Such a finding may have applications in developmental biology by providing potential mechanisms of communication between cells during growth from a single cell to a multicellular, target morphology. Source code for the experiments in this paper can be found at: \url{https://github.com/caitlingrasso/empowered-nca}. 信息论适应度函数越来越受欢迎，可以产生普遍有用的、与任务无关的行为。其中一种通用功能被称为赋权，它测量智能体通过其感觉运动系统对其环境施加的控制量。具体来说，授权尝试最大化代理的动作与其在稍后时间点接收到的传感器状态之间的互信息。传统上，赋权已应用于传统的感觉运动设备，例如机器人。在这里，我们将该方法扩展到由神经细胞自动机（NCA）体现的分布式多智能体感觉运动系统。我们表明，在 NCA 进化中，添加赋权作为次要目标来执行形态发生、生长和维持预先指定的形状的任务，与单独形态发生的进化相比，会产生更高的适应性。结果表明形态发生和赋权之间可能存在协同关系。也就是说，在发育过程中间接选择相邻细胞之间的协调有利于发育过程本身。这一发现可能在发育生物学中得到应用，因​​为它提供了从单细胞生长到多细胞目标形态期间细胞之间通讯的潜在机制。本文实验的源代码可以在：\url{https://github.com/caitlingrasso/empowered-nca} 找到。 本文将信息论中的控制能力（empowerment）引入神经细胞自动机（NCA），用于提升形态发生任务的适应度。 Caitlin Grasso,Josh Bongard cs.NE,cs.AI

authors_text: Alfredo J. P. Barbosa,Edmilson M. Moreira,Carlos H. V. Moraes,Otávio A. S. Carpinteiro
title: A heuristic to determine the initial gravitational constant of the GSA
title_zh: 确定 GSA 初始引力常数的启发式方法
comment: 27 pages, 2 figures, 8 tables
comments: 27 pages, 2 figures, 8 tables
abstract: The Gravitational Search Algorithm (GSA) is an optimization algorithm based on Newton's laws of gravity and dynamics. Introduced in 2009, the GSA already has several versions and applications. However, its performance depends on the values of its parameters, which are determined empirically. Hence, its generality is compromised, because the parameters that are suitable for a particular application are not necessarily suitable for another. This paper proposes the Gravitational Search Algorithm with Normalized Gravitational Constant (GSA-NGC), which defines a new heuristic to determine the initial gravitational constant of the GSA. The new heuristic is grounded in the Brans-Dicke theory of gravitation and takes into consideration the multiple dimensions of the search space of the application. It aims to improve the final solution and reduce the number of iterations and premature convergences of the GSA. The GSA-NGC is validated experimentally, proving to be suitable for various applications and improving significantly the generality, performance, and efficiency of the GSA.
summary: The Gravitational Search Algorithm (GSA) is an optimization algorithm based on Newton's laws of gravity and dynamics. Introduced in 2009, the GSA already has several versions and applications. However, its performance depends on the values of its parameters, which are determined empirically. Hence, its generality is compromised, because the parameters that are suitable for a particular application are not necessarily suitable for another. This paper proposes the Gravitational Search Algorithm with Normalized Gravitational Constant (GSA-NGC), which defines a new heuristic to determine the initial gravitational constant of the GSA. The new heuristic is grounded in the Brans-Dicke theory of gravitation and takes into consideration the multiple dimensions of the search space of the application. It aims to improve the final solution and reduce the number of iterations and premature convergences of the GSA. The GSA-NGC is validated experimentally, proving to be suitable for various applications and improving significantly the generality, performance, and efficiency of the GSA.
abstract_zh: 引力搜索算法（GSA）是一种基于牛顿引力定律和动力学的优化算法。 GSA 于 2009 年推出，目前已有多个版本和应用程序。然而，其性能取决于其参数值，这些参数是根据经验确定的。因此，它的通用性受到损害，因为适合特定应用的参数不一定适合另一个应用。本文提出了归一化引力常数引力搜索算法（GSA-NGC），该算法定义了一种新的启发式方法来确定 GSA 的初始引力常数。新的启发式方法以布兰斯-迪克万有引力理论为基础，并考虑了应用程序搜索空间的多个维度。其目的是改进最终的解决方案并减少GSA的迭代次数和过早收敛。 GSA-NGC经过实验验证，适用于各种应用，显着提高了GSA的通用性、性能和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Brans-Dicke理论的启发式方法，用于确定引力搜索算法（GSA）的初始引力常数，以提升算法性能。
AI.motivation: 传统GSA参数依赖经验设定，导致算法通用性差，不同应用场景需重新调整参数。
AI.method: 结合Brans-Dicke引力理论，设计考虑多维搜索空间的启发式方法，动态计算初始引力常数。
AI.result: 实验验证GSA-NGC在多种应用中显著提升收敛效率，减少迭代次数并降低早熟收敛风险。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效增强GSA的通用性、性能和计算效率，适用于复杂优化问题求解。

authors_text: Ali Jabbary,Nader Pourmahmoud,Mir Ali Asghar Abdollahi,Marc A. Rosen
title: Artificial Intelligence-Assisted Optimization and Multiphase Analysis of Polygon PEM Fuel Cells
title_zh: 多边形质子交换膜燃料电池的人工智能辅助优化和多相分析
comment: Int. J. Green Energy, vol. 0, no. 0, pp. 1-17, 2023
comments: Int. J. Green Energy, vol. 0, no. 0, pp. 1-17, 2023
abstract: This article presents new hexagonal and pentagonal PEM fuel cell models. The models have been optimized after achieving improved cell performance. The input parameters of the multi-objective optimization algorithm were pressure and temperature at the inlet, and consumption and output powers were the objective parameters. The output data of the numerical simulation has been trained using deep neural networks and then modeled with polynomial regression. The target functions have been extracted using the RSM (Response Surface Method), and the targets were optimized using the multi-objective genetic algorithm (NSGA-II). Compared to the base model, the optimized Pentagonal and Hexagonal models increase the output current density by 21.8% and 39.9%, respectively.
summary: This article presents new hexagonal and pentagonal PEM fuel cell models. The models have been optimized after achieving improved cell performance. The input parameters of the multi-objective optimization algorithm were pressure and temperature at the inlet, and consumption and output powers were the objective parameters. The output data of the numerical simulation has been trained using deep neural networks and then modeled with polynomial regression. The target functions have been extracted using the RSM (Response Surface Method), and the targets were optimized using the multi-objective genetic algorithm (NSGA-II). Compared to the base model, the optimized Pentagonal and Hexagonal models increase the output current density by 21.8% and 39.9%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了新的六边形和五边形 PEM 燃料电池模型。在提高电池性能后，模型得到了优化。多目标优化算法的输入参数为入口压力和温度，消耗功率和输出功率为目标参数。数值模拟的输出数据已使用深度神经网络进行训练，然后使用多项式回归进行建模。使用RSM（响应面法）提取目标函数，并使用多目标遗传算法（NSGA-II）对目标进行优化。与基础模型相比，优化后的五边形和六边形模型的输出电流密度分别提高了21.8%和39.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出新型六边形和五边形PEM燃料电池模型，并通过人工智能辅助优化提升其性能。
AI.motivation: 传统燃料电池模型存在效率不足，需通过参数优化和结构改进提升输出性能以满足应用需求。
AI.method: 采用多目标遗传算法（NSGA-II）结合深度神经网络与多项式回归，基于RSM方法对压力、温度等参数进行多阶段优化。
AI.result: 优化后五边形模型输出电流密度提升21.8%，六边形模型提升39.9%。
AI.conclusion: AI辅助优化方法显著提升多边形PEM燃料电池性能，验证了智能算法在能源系统设计中的有效性。

authors_text: Michael Bradley Johanson,Edward Hughes,Finbarr Timbers,Joel Z. Leibo
title: Emergent Bartering Behaviour in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 多智能体强化学习中的突发易货行为
abstract: Advances in artificial intelligence often stem from the development of new environments that abstract real-world situations into a form where research can be done conveniently. This paper contributes such an environment based on ideas inspired by elementary Microeconomics. Agents learn to produce resources in a spatially complex world, trade them with one another, and consume those that they prefer. We show that the emergent production, consumption, and pricing behaviors respond to environmental conditions in the directions predicted by supply and demand shifts in Microeconomics. We also demonstrate settings where the agents' emergent prices for goods vary over space, reflecting the local abundance of goods. After the price disparities emerge, some agents then discover a niche of transporting goods between regions with different prevailing prices -- a profitable strategy because they can buy goods where they are cheap and sell them where they are expensive. Finally, in a series of ablation experiments, we investigate how choices in the environmental rewards, bartering actions, agent architecture, and ability to consume tradable goods can either aid or inhibit the emergence of this economic behavior. This work is part of the environment development branch of a research program that aims to build human-like artificial general intelligence through multi-agent interactions in simulated societies. By exploring which environment features are needed for the basic phenomena of elementary microeconomics to emerge automatically from learning, we arrive at an environment that differs from those studied in prior multi-agent reinforcement learning work along several dimensions. For example, the model incorporates heterogeneous tastes and physical abilities, and agents negotiate with one another as a grounded form of communication.
summary: Advances in artificial intelligence often stem from the development of new environments that abstract real-world situations into a form where research can be done conveniently. This paper contributes such an environment based on ideas inspired by elementary Microeconomics. Agents learn to produce resources in a spatially complex world, trade them with one another, and consume those that they prefer. We show that the emergent production, consumption, and pricing behaviors respond to environmental conditions in the directions predicted by supply and demand shifts in Microeconomics. We also demonstrate settings where the agents' emergent prices for goods vary over space, reflecting the local abundance of goods. After the price disparities emerge, some agents then discover a niche of transporting goods between regions with different prevailing prices -- a profitable strategy because they can buy goods where they are cheap and sell them where they are expensive. Finally, in a series of ablation experiments, we investigate how choices in the environmental rewards, bartering actions, agent architecture, and ability to consume tradable goods can either aid or inhibit the emergence of this economic behavior. This work is part of the environment development branch of a research program that aims to build human-like artificial general intelligence through multi-agent interactions in simulated societies. By exploring which environment features are needed for the basic phenomena of elementary microeconomics to emerge automatically from learning, we arrive at an environment that differs from those studied in prior multi-agent reinforcement learning work along several dimensions. For example, the model incorporates heterogeneous tastes and physical abilities, and agents negotiate with one another as a grounded form of communication.
abstract_zh: 人工智能的进步通常源于新环境的发展，这些新环境将现实世界的情况抽象为可以方便地进行研究的形式。本文基于受初级微观经济学启发的想法，贡献了这样一个环境。智能体学习在一个空间复杂的世界中生产资源，相互交易，并消耗他们喜欢的资源。我们表明，新兴的生产、消费和定价行为按照微观经济学中供需变化预测的方向对环境条件做出反应。我们还演示了代理的商品紧急价格随空间变化的设置，反映了当地商品的丰富程度。价格差异出现后，一些代理商发现了在不同现行价格的地区之间运输货物的利基——这是一种有利可图的策略，因为他们可以在便宜的地方购买货物，在昂贵的地方出售货物。最后，在一系列消融实验中，我们研究了环境奖励、易货行为、代理架构和消费可贸易商品的能力等方面的选择如何帮助或抑制这种经济行为的出现。这项工作是一个研究项目环境开发分支的一部分，该项目旨在通过模拟社会中的多智能体交互来构建类人的通用人工智能。通过探索基本微观经济学的基本现象从学习中自动出现需要哪些环境特征，我们得到了一个在多个维度上与先前多智能体强化学习工作中研究的环境不同的环境。例如，该模型融合了不同的品味和身体能力，代理人之间的谈判作为一种基础的沟通形式。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个多智能体强化学习环境，使智能体通过生产、交易和消费资源，自主涌现出类似微观经济学中的供需关系、价格差异及跨区域贸易行为。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体环境难以模拟真实经济行为，需探索何种环境特征可促使智能体自主产生基础经济现象，为构建类人通用人工智能提供新框架。
AI.method: 构建空间复杂环境，智能体学习生产资源并交易，通过调整环境奖励、交易机制及智能体异质性（如偏好、能力），结合消融实验分析经济行为涌现条件。
AI.result: 智能体行为符合供需理论预测，价格随地区资源丰度变化，部分智能体通过跨区域运输获利；环境参数显著影响经济行为的涌现。
AI.conclusion: 设计的环境成功促使智能体自主产生微观经济现象，为研究复杂社会交互与AI提供新方向，未来可拓展至更复杂的经济机制。

search_text: Emergent Bartering Behaviour in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning 多智能体强化学习中的突发易货行为 Advances in artificial intelligence often stem from the development of new environments that abstract real-world situations into a form where research can be done conveniently. This paper contributes such an environment based on ideas inspired by elementary Microeconomics. Agents learn to produce resources in a spatially complex world, trade them with one another, and consume those that they prefer. We show that the emergent production, consumption, and pricing behaviors respond to environmental conditions in the directions predicted by supply and demand shifts in Microeconomics. We also demonstrate settings where the agents' emergent prices for goods vary over space, reflecting the local abundance of goods. After the price disparities emerge, some agents then discover a niche of transporting goods between regions with different prevailing prices -- a profitable strategy because they can buy goods where they are cheap and sell them where they are expensive. Finally, in a series of ablation experiments, we investigate how choices in the environmental rewards, bartering actions, agent architecture, and ability to consume tradable goods can either aid or inhibit the emergence of this economic behavior. This work is part of the environment development branch of a research program that aims to build human-like artificial general intelligence through multi-agent interactions in simulated societies. By exploring which environment features are needed for the basic phenomena of elementary microeconomics to emerge automatically from learning, we arrive at an environment that differs from those studied in prior multi-agent reinforcement learning work along several dimensions. For example, the model incorporates heterogeneous tastes and physical abilities, and agents negotiate with one another as a grounded form of communication. 人工智能的进步通常源于新环境的发展，这些新环境将现实世界的情况抽象为可以方便地进行研究的形式。本文基于受初级微观经济学启发的想法，贡献了这样一个环境。智能体学习在一个空间复杂的世界中生产资源，相互交易，并消耗他们喜欢的资源。我们表明，新兴的生产、消费和定价行为按照微观经济学中供需变化预测的方向对环境条件做出反应。我们还演示了代理的商品紧急价格随空间变化的设置，反映了当地商品的丰富程度。价格差异出现后，一些代理商发现了在不同现行价格的地区之间运输货物的利基——这是一种有利可图的策略，因为他们可以在便宜的地方购买货物，在昂贵的地方出售货物。最后，在一系列消融实验中，我们研究了环境奖励、易货行为、代理架构和消费可贸易商品的能力等方面的选择如何帮助或抑制这种经济行为的出现。这项工作是一个研究项目环境开发分支的一部分，该项目旨在通过模拟社会中的多智能体交互来构建类人的通用人工智能。通过探索基本微观经济学的基本现象从学习中自动出现需要哪些环境特征，我们得到了一个在多个维度上与先前多智能体强化学习工作中研究的环境不同的环境。例如，该模型融合了不同的品味和身体能力，代理人之间的谈判作为一种基础的沟通形式。 本文设计了一个多智能体强化学习环境，使智能体通过生产、交易和消费资源，自主涌现出类似微观经济学中的供需关系、价格差异及跨区域贸易行为。 Michael Bradley Johanson,Edward Hughes,Finbarr Timbers,Joel Z. authors_text: Zhaocheng Liu,Luis Herranz,Fei Yang,Saiping Zhang,Shuai Wan,Marta Mrak,Marc Górriz Blanch
title: Slimmable Video Codec
title_zh: 可精简视频编解码器
comment: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshop(CLIC2022)
comments: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshop(CLIC2022)
abstract: Neural video compression has emerged as a novel paradigm combining trainable multilayer neural networks and machine learning, achieving competitive rate-distortion (RD) performances, but still remaining impractical due to heavy neural architectures, with large memory and computational demands. In addition, models are usually optimized for a single RD tradeoff. Recent slimmable image codecs can dynamically adjust their model capacity to gracefully reduce the memory and computation requirements, without harming RD performance. In this paper we propose a slimmable video codec (SlimVC), by integrating a slimmable temporal entropy model in a slimmable autoencoder. Despite a significantly more complex architecture, we show that slimming remains a powerful mechanism to control rate, memory footprint, computational cost and latency, all being important requirements for practical video compression.
summary: Neural video compression has emerged as a novel paradigm combining trainable multilayer neural networks and machine learning, achieving competitive rate-distortion (RD) performances, but still remaining impractical due to heavy neural architectures, with large memory and computational demands. In addition, models are usually optimized for a single RD tradeoff. Recent slimmable image codecs can dynamically adjust their model capacity to gracefully reduce the memory and computation requirements, without harming RD performance. In this paper we propose a slimmable video codec (SlimVC), by integrating a slimmable temporal entropy model in a slimmable autoencoder. Despite a significantly more complex architecture, we show that slimming remains a powerful mechanism to control rate, memory footprint, computational cost and latency, all being important requirements for practical video compression.
abstract_zh: 神经视频压缩已成为一种结合可训练多层神经网络和机器学习的新颖范式，实现了有竞争力的率失真（RD）性能，但由于神经架构繁重、内存和计算需求大，仍然不切实际。此外，模型通常针对单个 RD 权衡进行优化。最近的可精简图像编解码器可以动态调整其模型容量，以适当地减少内存和计算需求，而不会损害 RD 性能。在本文中，我们通过在可精简自动编码器中集成可精简时间熵模型，提出了一种可精简视频编解码器（SlimVC）。尽管架构明显更加复杂，但我们表明，精简仍然是控制速率、内存占用、计算成本和延迟的强大机制，所有这些都是实际视频压缩的重要要求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可瘦身的视频编解码器（SlimVC），通过动态调整模型容量来降低内存和计算需求，同时保持率失真性能。
AI.motivation: 现有神经视频压缩模型结构复杂，资源消耗大且仅优化单一率失真权衡，难以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 结合可瘦身时序熵模型与自编码器架构，设计SlimVC以动态调整模型容量，平衡压缩效率与资源消耗。
AI.result: 实验表明，尽管架构更复杂，SlimVC仍能有效控制码率、内存、计算成本及延迟，满足实际视频压缩需求。
AI.conclusion: 可瘦身机制为神经视频压缩提供了实用化解决方案，实现了性能与资源消耗的平衡。

authors_text: Ipek Goktan,Karen Ly,Thomas R. Groechel,Maja J. Mataric
title: Augmented Reality Appendages for Robots: Design Considerations and Recommendations for Maximizing Social and Functional Perception
title_zh: 机器人的增强现实附件：最大化社交和功能感知的设计考虑因素和建议
comment: In Refereed ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human Robot Interaction (HRI) Workshop on Virtual, Augmented, and Mixed Reality for Human-Robot Interaction (VAM-HRI 2022)
comments: In Refereed ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human Robot Interaction (HRI) Workshop on Virtual, Augmented, and Mixed Reality for Human-Robot Interaction (VAM-HRI 2022)
abstract: In order to address the limitations of gestural capabilities in physical robots, researchers in Virtual, Augmented, Mixed Reality Human-Robot Interaction (VAM-HRI) have been using augmented-reality visualizations that increase robot expressivity and improve user perception (e.g., social presence). While a multitude of virtual robot deictic gestures (e.g., pointing to an object) have been implemented to improve interactions within VAM-HRI, such systems are often reported to have tradeoffs between functional and social user perceptions of robots, creating a need for a unified approach that considers both attributes. We performed a literature analysis that selected factors that were noted to significantly influence either user perception or task efficiency and propose a set of design considerations and recommendations that address those factors by combining anthropomorphic and non-anthropomorphic virtual gestures based on the motivation of the interaction, visibility of the target and robot, salience of the target, and distance between the target and robot. The proposed recommendations provide the VAM-HRI community with starting points for selecting appropriate gesture types for a multitude of interaction contexts.
summary: In order to address the limitations of gestural capabilities in physical robots, researchers in Virtual, Augmented, Mixed Reality Human-Robot Interaction (VAM-HRI) have been using augmented-reality visualizations that increase robot expressivity and improve user perception (e.g., social presence). While a multitude of virtual robot deictic gestures (e.g., pointing to an object) have been implemented to improve interactions within VAM-HRI, such systems are often reported to have tradeoffs between functional and social user perceptions of robots, creating a need for a unified approach that considers both attributes. We performed a literature analysis that selected factors that were noted to significantly influence either user perception or task efficiency and propose a set of design considerations and recommendations that address those factors by combining anthropomorphic and non-anthropomorphic virtual gestures based on the motivation of the interaction, visibility of the target and robot, salience of the target, and distance between the target and robot. The proposed recommendations provide the VAM-HRI community with starting points for selecting appropriate gesture types for a multitude of interaction contexts.
abstract_zh: 为了解决物理机器人手势能力的局限性，虚拟、增强、混合现实人机交互（VAM-HRI）领域的研究人员一直在使用增强现实可视化来提高机器人表达能力并改善用户感知（例如社交存在感）。虽然已经实现了多种虚拟机器人指示手势（例如指向某个物体）来改善 VAM-HRI 内的交互，但据报道，此类系统通常在机器人的功能和社交用户感知之间进行权衡，因此需要一种考虑这两个属性的统一方法。我们进行了文献分析，选择了显着影响用户感知或任务效率的因素，并根据交互动机、目标和机器人的可见性、目标的显着性以及目标和机器人之间的距离，结合拟人化和非拟人化的虚拟手势，提出了一系列设计考虑因素和建议，以解决这些因素。所提出的建议为 VAM-HRI 社区提供了为多种交互环境选择适当手势类型的起点。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过设计考虑和建议，利用增强现实技术提升机器人社交与功能感知，解决物理机器人手势能力的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有虚拟机器人手势系统在功能性和社交性感知之间存在权衡，需统一方法兼顾两者。
AI.method: 通过文献分析筛选影响用户感知或任务效率的关键因素，提出结合拟人化与非拟人化手势的设计考量。
AI.result: 提出基于交互动机、目标可见性、目标显著性及机器人与目标距离的 gesture 选择建议。
AI.conclusion: 为 VAM-HRI 社区提供多场景交互中选择合适手势类型的起点，促进社交与功能感知的平衡。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在通过设计考虑和建议，利用增强现实技术提升机器人社交与功能感知，解决物理机器人手势能力的局限性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有虚拟机器人手势系统在功能性和社交性感知之间存在权衡，需统一方法兼顾两者。
ai_content.method: 通过文献分析筛选影响用户感知或任务效率的关键因素，提出结合拟人化与非拟人化手势的设计考量。
ai_content.result: 提出基于交互动机、目标可见性、目标显著性及机器人与目标距离的 gesture 选择建议。
ai_content.conclusion: 为 VAM-HRI 社区提供多场景交互中选择合适手势类型的起点，促进社交与功能感知的平衡。

search_text: Augmented Reality Appendages for Robots: Design Considerations and Recommendations for Maximizing Social and Functional Perception 机器人的增强现实附件：最大化社交和功能感知的设计考虑因素和建议 In order to address the limitations of gestural capabilities in physical robots, researchers in Virtual, Augmented, Mixed Reality Human-Robot Interaction (VAM-HRI) have been using augmented-reality visualizations that increase robot expressivity and improve user perception (e.g., social presence). While a multitude of virtual robot deictic gestures (e.g., pointing to an object) have been implemented to improve interactions within VAM-HRI, such systems are often reported to have tradeoffs between functional and social user perceptions of robots, creating a need for a unified approach that considers both attributes. We performed a literature analysis that selected factors that were noted to significantly influence either user perception or task efficiency and propose a set of design considerations and recommendations that address those factors by combining anthropomorphic and non-anthropomorphic virtual gestures based on the motivation of the interaction, visibility of the target and robot, salience of the target, and distance between the target and robot. The proposed recommendations provide the VAM-HRI community with starting points for selecting appropriate gesture types for a multitude of interaction contexts. 为了解决物理机器人手势能力的局限性，虚拟、增强、混合现实人机交互（VAM-HRI）领域的研究人员一直在使用增强现实可视化来提高机器人表达能力并改善用户感知（例如社交存在感）。虽然已经实现了多种虚拟机器人指示手势（例如指向某个物体）来改善 VAM-HRI 内的交互，但据报道，此类系统通常在机器人的功能和社交用户感知之间进行权衡，因此需要一种考虑这两个属性的统一方法。我们进行了文献分析，选择了显着影响用户感知或任务效率的因素，并根据交互动机、目标和机器人的可见性、目标的显着性以及目标和机器人之间的距离，结合拟人化和非拟人化的虚拟手势，提出了一系列设计考虑因素和建议，以解决这些因素。所提出的建议为 VAM-HRI 社区提供了为多种交互环境选择适当手势类型的起点。 本文旨在通过设计考虑和建议，利用增强现实技术提升机器人社交与功能感知，解决物理机器人手势能力的局限性。 Ipek Goktan,Karen Ly,Thomas R. Groechel,Maja J. Mataric cs.RO

authors_text: Deeksha Sethi,Nithin Nagaraj,Harikrishnan N B
title: Neurochaos Feature Transformation and Classification for Imbalanced Learning
title_zh: 不平衡学习的神经混沌特征转换和分类
comment: 38 pages, 29 figures, 37 tables
comments: 38 pages, 29 figures, 37 tables
abstract: Learning from limited and imbalanced data is a challenging problem in the Artificial Intelligence community. Real-time scenarios demand decision-making from rare events wherein the data are typically imbalanced. These situations commonly arise in medical applications, cybersecurity, catastrophic predictions etc. This motivates the development of learning algorithms capable of learning from imbalanced data. Human brain effortlessly learns from imbalanced data. Inspired by the chaotic neuronal firing in the human brain, a novel learning algorithm namely Neurochaos Learning (NL) was recently proposed. NL is categorized in three blocks: Feature Transformation, Neurochaos Feature Extraction (CFX), and Classification. In this work, the efficacy of neurochaos feature transformation and extraction for classification in imbalanced learning is studied. We propose a unique combination of neurochaos based feature transformation and extraction with traditional ML algorithms. The explored datasets in this study revolve around medical diagnosis, banknote fraud detection, environmental applications and spoken-digit classification. In this study, experiments are performed in both high and low training sample regime. In the former, five out of nine datasets have shown a performance boost in terms of macro F1-score after using CFX features. The highest performance boost obtained is 25.97% for Statlog (Heart) dataset using CFX+Decision Tree. In the low training sample regime (from just one to nine training samples per class), the highest performance boost of 144.38% is obtained for Haberman's Survival dataset using CFX+Random Forest. NL offers enormous flexibility of combining CFX with any ML classifier to boost its performance, especially for learning tasks with limited and imbalanced data.

In this work, the efficacy of neurochaos feature transformation and extraction for classification in imbalanced learning is studied. We propose a unique combination of neurochaos based feature transformation and extraction with traditional ML algorithms. The explored datasets in this study revolve around medical diagnosis, banknote fraud detection, environmental applications and spoken-digit classification. abstract_zh: 从有限且不平衡的数据中学习是人工智能界的一个具有挑战性的问题。实时场景需要根据数据通常不平衡的罕见事件做出决策。这些情况通常出现在医疗应用、网络安全、灾难性预测等领域。这推动了能够从不平衡数据中学习的学习算法的开发。人脑可以毫不费力地从不平衡的数据中学习。受人脑混沌神经元放电的启发，最近提出了一种新的学习算法，即神经混沌学习（NL）。 NL 分为三个模块：特征转换、神经混沌特征提取 (CFX) 和分类。在这项工作中，研究了神经混沌特征转换和提取在不平衡学习中分类的有效性。我们提出了基于神经混沌的特征转换和提取与传统机器学习算法的独特组合。本研究探索的数据集围绕医学诊断、钞票欺诈检测、环境应用和口语数字分类。在本研究中，实验在高训练样本和低训练样本条件下进行。在前者中，使用 CFX 功能后，九个数据集中有五个在宏观 F1 分数方面显示出性能提升。使用 CFX+决策树的 Statlog (Heart) 数据集获得的最高性能提升为 25.97%。在低训练样本情况下（每类仅 1 到 9 个训练样本），使用 CFX+随机森林的 Haberman 生存数据集获得了 144.38% 的最高性能提升。 NL 提供了巨大的灵活性，可以将 CFX 与任何 ML 分类器结合起来以提高其性能，特别是对于数据有限且不平衡的学习任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经混沌的特征变换与分类方法，用于解决不平衡数据学习问题，并结合传统机器学习算法进行实验验证。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中不平衡数据（如医疗诊断、网络安全等）的分类具有挑战性，传统算法效果有限，而人脑能自然处理不平衡数据，受此启发提出神经混沌学习方法。
AI.method: 提出神经混沌学习（NL）框架，包含特征变换、混沌特征提取（CFX）和分类三部分，将CFX与传统机器学习算法（如决策树、随机森林）结合，测试于医疗、金融等领域的多数据集。
AI.result: 高样本量下5/9数据集的宏F1分数提升，Statlog（Heart）数据集最高提升25.97%；低样本量（每类1-9样本）下Haberman's Survival数据集使用CFX+随机森林提升达144.38%。
AI.conclusion: 神经混沌特征提取（CFX）能显著提升传统算法在不平衡数据分类中的性能，尤其适用于样本稀缺的场景，且具有与多种分类器结合的灵活性。

authors_text: Minesh Mathew,Ajoy Mondal,CV Jawahar
title: Towards Deployable OCR models for Indic languages
title_zh: 面向印度语言的可部署 OCR 模型
comment: presented at ICPR 2024; https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-3-031-78495-8_11
comments: presented at ICPR 2024; https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-3-031-78495-8_11
abstract: Recognition of text on word or line images, without the need for sub-word segmentation has become the mainstream of research and development of text recognition for Indian languages. Modelling unsegmented sequences using Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) is the most commonly used approach for segmentation-free OCR. In this work we present a comprehensive empirical study of various neural network models that uses CTC for transcribing step-wise predictions in the neural network output to a Unicode sequence. The study is conducted for 13 Indian languages, using an internal dataset that has around 1000 pages per language. We study the choice of line vs word as the recognition unit, and use of synthetic data to train the models. We compare our models with popular publicly available OCR tools for end-to-end document image recognition. Our end-to-end pipeline that employ our recognition models and existing text segmentation tools outperform these public OCR tools for 8 out of the 13 languages. We also introduce a new public dataset called Mozhi for word and line recognition in Indian language. The dataset contains more than 1.2 million annotated word images (120 thousand text lines) across 13 Indian languages. Our code, trained models and the Mozhi dataset will be made available at http://cvit.iiit.ac.in/research/projects/cvit-projects/
summary: Recognition of text on word or line images, without the need for sub-word segmentation has become the mainstream of research and development of text recognition for Indian languages. Modelling unsegmented sequences using Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) is the most commonly used approach for segmentation-free OCR. In this work we present a comprehensive empirical study of various neural network models that uses CTC for transcribing step-wise predictions in the neural network output to a Unicode sequence. The study is conducted for 13 Indian languages, using an internal dataset that has around 1000 pages per language. We study the choice of line vs word as the recognition unit, and use of synthetic data to train the models. We compare our models with popular publicly available OCR tools for end-to-end document image recognition. Our end-to-end pipeline that employ our recognition models and existing text segmentation tools outperform these public OCR tools for 8 out of the 13 languages. We also introduce a new public dataset called Mozhi for word and line recognition in Indian language. The dataset contains more than 1.2 million annotated word images (120 thousand text lines) across 13 Indian languages. Our code, trained models and the Mozhi dataset will be made available at http://cvit.iiit.ac.in/research/projects/cvit-projects/
abstract_zh: 在单词或线条图像上进行文本识别，无需进行分词，已成为印度语言文本识别研发的主流。使用联结时间分类 (CTC) 对未分段序列进行建模是无分段 OCR 最常用的方法。在这项工作中，我们对各种神经网络模型进行了全面的实证研究，这些模型使用 CTC 将神经网络输出中的逐步预测转录为 Unicode 序列。该研究针对 13 种印度语言进行，使用的内部数据集每种语言大约有 1000 页。我们研究了行与单词作为识别单元的选择，以及使用合成数据来训练模型。我们将我们的模型与用于端到端文档图像识别的流行的公开 OCR 工具进行比较。我们的端到端管道采用了我们的识别模型和现有的文本分割工具，对于 13 种语言中的 8 种语言，其性能优于这些公共 OCR 工具。我们还引入了一个名为 Mozhi 的新公共数据集，用于印度语言的单词和线条识别。该数据集包含 13 种印度语言的超过 120 万张带注释的文字图像（12 万行文本）。我们的代码、经过训练的模型和 Mozhi 数据集将在 http://cvit.iiit.ac.in/research/projects/cvit-projects/ 上提供

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发适用于印度语言的可部署OCR模型，通过对比不同神经网络架构与CTC方法，优化端到端文本识别流程并发布新数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有OCR工具在印度语言文本识别中存在准确率不足的问题，需探索更有效的分割单元选择与训练策略以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 基于CTC框架构建神经网络模型，对比行级与词级识别单元效果，结合合成数据训练，并整合现有分段工具形成端到端流水线。
AI.result: 提出的模型在8种印度语言上超越主流OCR工具，同时发布包含120万词图像的Mozhi数据集，推动相关研究。
AI.conclusion: CTC结合端到端流水线可有效提升印度语言OCR性能，新数据集为后续研究提供重要资源。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在开发适用于印度语言的可部署OCR模型，通过对比不同神经网络架构与CTC方法，优化端到端文本识别流程并发布新数据集。

search_text: Towards Deployable OCR models for Indic languages 面向印度语言的可部署 OCR 模型 Recognition of text on word or line images, without the need for sub-word segmentation has become the mainstream of research and development of text recognition for Indian languages. Modelling unsegmented sequences using Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) is the most commonly used approach for segmentation-free OCR. In this work we present a comprehensive empirical study of various neural network models that uses CTC for transcribing step-wise predictions in the neural network output to a Unicode sequence. The study is conducted for 13 Indian languages, using an internal dataset that has around 1000 pages per language. We study the choice of line vs word as the recognition unit, and use of synthetic data to train the models. We compare our models with popular publicly available OCR tools for end-to-end document image recognition. Our end-to-end pipeline that employ our recognition models and existing text segmentation tools outperform these public OCR tools for 8 out of the 13 languages. We also introduce a new public dataset called Mozhi for word and line recognition in Indian language. The dataset contains more than 1.2 million annotated word images (120 thousand text lines) across 13 Indian languages. Our code, trained models and the Mozhi dataset will be made available at http://cvit.iiit.ac.in/research/projects/cvit-projects/ 在单词或线条图像上进行文本识别，无需进行分词，已成为印度语言文本识别研发的主流。使用联结时间分类 (CTC) 对未分段序列进行建模是无分段 OCR 最常用的方法。在这项工作中，我们对各种神经网络模型进行了全面的实证研究，这些模型使用 CTC 将神经网络输出中的逐步预测转录为 Unicode 序列。该研究针对 13 种印度语言进行，使用的内部数据集每种语言大约有 1000 页。我们研究了行与单词作为识别单元的选择，以及使用合成数据来训练模型。我们将我们的模型与用于端到端文档图像识别的流行的公开 OCR 工具进行比较。我们的端到端管道采用了我们的识别模型和现有的文本分割工具，对于 13 种语言中的 8 种语言，其性能优于这些公共 OCR 工具。我们还引入了一个名为 Mozhi 的新公共数据集，用于印度语言的单词和线条识别。该数据集包含 13 种印度语言的超过 120 万张带注释的文字图像（12 万行文本）。我们的代码、经过训练的模型和 Mozhi 数据集将在 http://cvit.iiit.ac.in/research/projects/cvit-projects/ 上提供 本文旨在开发适用于印度语言的可部署OCR模型，通过对比不同神经网络架构与CTC方法，优化端到端文本识别流程并发布新数据集。 Minesh Mathew,Ajoy Mondal,CV Jawahar cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Venkatesan Guruswami,Pravesh K. Kothari,Peter Manohar
title: Bypassing the XOR Trick: Stronger Certificates for Hypergraph Clique Number
title_zh: 绕过 XOR 技巧：超图团数的更强证书
abstract: Let $\mathcal{H}(k,n,p)$ be the distribution on $k$-uniform hypergraphs where every subset of $[n]$ of size $k$ is included as an hyperedge with probability $p$ independently. In this work, we design and analyze a simple spectral algorithm that certifies a bound on the size of the largest clique, $ω(H)$, in hypergraphs $H \sim \mathcal{H}(k,n,p)$. For example, for any constant $p$, with high probability over the choice of the hypergraph, our spectral algorithm certifies a bound of $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n})$ on the clique number in polynomial time. This matches, up to $\textrm{polylog}(n)$ factors, the best known certificate for the clique number in random graphs, which is the special case of $k = 2$. Prior to our work, the best known refutation algorithms [CGL04, AOW15] rely on a reduction to the problem of refuting random $k$-XOR via Feige's XOR trick [Fei02], and yield a polynomially worse bound of $\tilde{O}(n^{3/4})$ on the clique number when $p = O(1)$. Our algorithm bypasses the XOR trick and relies instead on a natural generalization of the Lovasz theta semidefinite programming relaxation for cliques in hypergraphs.
summary: Let $\mathcal{H}(k,n,p)$ be the distribution on $k$-uniform hypergraphs where every subset of $[n]$ of size $k$ is included as an hyperedge with probability $p$ independently. In this work, we design and analyze a simple spectral algorithm that certifies a bound on the size of the largest clique, $ω(H)$, in hypergraphs $H \sim \mathcal{H}(k,n,p)$. For example, for any constant $p$, with high probability over the choice of the hypergraph, our spectral algorithm certifies a bound of $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n})$ on the clique number in polynomial time. This matches, up to $\textrm{polylog}(n)$ factors, the best known certificate for the clique number in random graphs, which is the special case of $k = 2$. Prior to our work, the best known refutation algorithms [CGL04, AOW15] rely on a reduction to the problem of refuting random $k$-XOR via Feige's XOR trick [Fei02], and yield a polynomially worse bound of $\tilde{O}(n^{3/4})$ on the clique number when $p = O(1)$. Our algorithm bypasses the XOR trick and relies instead on a natural generalization of the Lovasz theta semidefinite programming relaxation for cliques in hypergraphs.
abstract_zh: 令 $\mathcal{H}(k,n,p)$ 为 $k$-均匀超图上的分布，其中大小为 $k$ 的 $[n]$ 的每个子集都作为超边以独立的概率 $p$ 包含在内。在这项工作中，我们设计并分析了一个简单的谱算法，该算法证明了超图 $H \sim \mathcal{H}(k,n,p)$ 中最大团 $ω(H)$ 的大小的界限。例如，对于任何常数 $p$，超图选择的概率很高，我们的谱算法在多项式时间内证明了团数 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n})$ 的界限。这与随机图中派系编号的最著名证书匹配最多 $\textrm{polylog}(n)$ 个因子，这是 $k = 2$ 的特殊情况。在我们的工作之前，最著名的反驳算法 [CGL04，AOW15] 依赖于通过 Feige 的 XOR 技巧 [Fei02] 来减少反驳随机 $k$-XOR 的问题，并在 $p = O(1)$ 时在团数上产生 $\tilde{O}(n^{3/4})$ 的多项式更差界限。我们的算法绕过了 XOR 技巧，而是依赖于超图中团的 Lovasz theta 半定规划松弛的自然推广。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种谱算法，用于在多项式时间内认证随机超图中最大团的大小，避免了传统XOR技巧的限制。
AI.motivation: 传统基于XOR技巧的算法在认证超图团数时存在多项式级性能缺陷，无法达到随机图的最佳认证界。
AI.method: 提出基于Lovasz theta半定规划松弛的超图团数认证方法，直接利用谱分析而非XOR trick进行推导。
AI.result: 对于任意常数p，算法以高概率在多项式时间内认证超图团数上限为~O(√n)，优于之前~O(n^{3/4})的界。
AI.conclusion: 新方法突破了XOR trick的性能瓶颈，为超图团数问题提供了更优的认证界和算法框架。

authors_text: Issa Khalifeh,Marc Gorriz Blanch,Ebroul Izquierdo,Marta Mrak
title: Multi-encoder Network for Parameter Reduction of a Kernel-based Interpolation Architecture
title_zh: 用于基于内核的插值架构参数减少的多编码器网络
comment: Paper accepted in NTIRE: New Trends in Image Restoration and Enhancement CVPR 2022 Workshop
comments: Paper accepted in NTIRE: New Trends in Image Restoration and Enhancement CVPR 2022 Workshop
abstract: Video frame interpolation involves the synthesis of new frames from existing ones. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been at the forefront of the recent advances in this field. One popular CNN-based approach involves the application of generated kernels to the input frames to obtain an interpolated frame. Despite all the benefits interpolation methods offer, many of these networks require a lot of parameters, with more parameters meaning a heavier computational burden. Reducing the size of the model typically impacts performance negatively. This paper presents a method for parameter reduction for a popular flow-less kernel-based network (Adaptive Collaboration of Flows). Through our technique of removing the layers that require the most parameters and replacing them with smaller encoders, we reduce the number of parameters of the network and even achieve better performance compared to the original method. This is achieved by deploying rotation to force each individual encoder to learn different features from the input images. Ablations are conducted to justify design choices and an evaluation on how our method performs on full-length videos is presented.
summary: Video frame interpolation involves the synthesis of new frames from existing ones. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been at the forefront of the recent advances in this field. One popular CNN-based approach involves the application of generated kernels to the input frames to obtain an interpolated frame. Despite all the benefits interpolation methods offer, many of these networks require a lot of parameters, with more parameters meaning a heavier computational burden. Reducing the size of the model typically impacts performance negatively. This paper presents a method for parameter reduction for a popular flow-less kernel-based network (Adaptive Collaboration of Flows). Through our technique of removing the layers that require the most parameters and replacing them with smaller encoders, we reduce the number of parameters of the network and even achieve better performance compared to the original method. This is achieved by deploying rotation to force each individual encoder to learn different features from the input images. Ablations are conducted to justify design choices and an evaluation on how our method performs on full-length videos is presented.
abstract_zh: 视频帧插值涉及从现有帧合成新帧。卷积神经网络（CNN）一直处于该领域最新进展的前沿。一种流行的基于 CNN 的方法涉及将生成的内核应用于输入帧以获得插值帧。尽管插值方法具有诸多优点，但许多网络需要大量参数，参数越多意味着计算负担越重。减小模型的大小通常会对性能产生负面影响。本文提出了一种流行的基于无流内核的网络（自适应流协作）的参数缩减方法。通过我们删除需要最多参数的层并用较小的编码器替换它们的技术，我们减少了网络参数的数量，甚至与原始方法相比获得了更好的性能。这是通过部署旋转来强制每个单独的编码器从输入图像中学习不同的特征来实现的。进行消融是为了证明设计选择的合理性，并评估我们的方法在完整长度视频上的表现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多编码器网络，通过减少基于核的插值架构的参数数量，同时提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于核的视频帧插值网络参数过多导致计算负担重，而模型压缩通常会损害性能，因此需要一种有效减少参数且保持性能的方法。
AI.method: 移除高参数层并替换为小型编码器，通过旋转输入图像强制各编码器学习不同特征，从而实现参数缩减与性能优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在减少参数的同时，相较原方法实现了更优的插值性能，并通过完整视频评估验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多编码器设计有效平衡了模型轻量化与性能提升，为高效视频插值提供了新思路。

Through our technique of removing the layers that require the most parameters and replacing them with smaller encoders, we reduce the number of parameters of the network and even achieve better performance compared to the original method. This is achieved by deploying rotation to force each individual encoder to learn different features from the input images. Ablations are conducted to justify design choices and an evaluation on how our method performs on full-length videos is presented. 视频帧插值涉及从现有帧合成新帧。卷积神经网络（CNN）一直处于该领域最新进展的前沿。一种流行的基于 CNN 的方法涉及将生成的内核应用于输入帧以获得插值帧。尽管插值方法具有诸多优点，但许多网络需要大量参数，参数越多意味着计算负担越重。减小模型的大小通常会对性能产生负面影响。本文提出了一种流行的基于无流内核的网络（自适应流协作）的参数缩减方法。通过我们删除需要最多参数的层并用较小的编码器替换它们的技术，我们减少了网络参数的数量，甚至与原始方法相比获得了更好的性能。这是通过部署旋转来强制每个单独的编码器从输入图像中学习不同的特征来实现的。进行消融是为了证明设计选择的合理性，并评估我们的方法在完整长度视频上的表现。 本文提出一种多编码器网络，通过减少基于核的插值架构的参数数量，同时提升性能。 Issa Khalifeh,Marc Gorriz Blanch,Ebroul Izquierdo,Marta Mrak cs.CV

authors_text: Nassir Mohammad
title: A Vision Inspired Neural Network for Unsupervised Anomaly Detection in Unordered Data
title_zh: 用于无序数据中无监督异常检测的视觉启发神经网络
abstract: A fundamental problem in the field of unsupervised machine learning is the detection of anomalies corresponding to rare and unusual observations of interest; reasons include for their rejection, accommodation or further investigation. Anomalies are intuitively understood to be something unusual or inconsistent, whose occurrence sparks immediate attention. More formally anomalies are those observations-under appropriate random variable modelling-whose expectation of occurrence with respect to a grouping of prior interest is less than one; such a definition and understanding has been used to develop the parameter-free perception anomaly detection algorithm. The present work seeks to establish important and practical connections between the approach used by the perception algorithm and prior decades of research in neurophysiology and computational neuroscience; particularly that of information processing in the retina and visual cortex. The algorithm is conceptualised as a neuron model which forms the kernel of an unsupervised neural network that learns to signal unexpected observations as anomalies. Both the network and neuron display properties observed in biological processes including: immediate intelligence; parallel processing; redundancy; global degradation; contrast invariance; parameter-free computation, dynamic thresholds and non-linear processing. A robust and accurate model for anomaly detection in univariate and multivariate data is built using this network as a concrete application.
summary: A fundamental problem in the field of unsupervised machine learning is the detection of anomalies corresponding to rare and unusual observations of interest; reasons include for their rejection, accommodation or further investigation. Anomalies are intuitively understood to be something unusual or inconsistent, whose occurrence sparks immediate attention. More formally anomalies are those observations-under appropriate random variable modelling-whose expectation of occurrence with respect to a grouping of prior interest is less than one; such a definition and understanding has been used to develop the parameter-free perception anomaly detection algorithm. The present work seeks to establish important and practical connections between the approach used by the perception algorithm and prior decades of research in neurophysiology and computational neuroscience; particularly that of information processing in the retina and visual cortex. The algorithm is conceptualised as a neuron model which forms the kernel of an unsupervised neural network that learns to signal unexpected observations as anomalies. Both the network and neuron display properties observed in biological processes including: immediate intelligence; parallel processing; redundancy; global degradation; contrast invariance; parameter-free computation, dynamic thresholds and non-linear processing. A robust and accurate model for anomaly detection in univariate and multivariate data is built using this network as a concrete application.
abstract_zh: 无监督机器学习领域的一个基本问题是检测与感兴趣的罕见和不寻常的观察相对应的异常；原因包括拒绝、住宿或进一步调查。异常被直观地理解为不寻常或不一致的事物，其发生立即引起注意。更正式的异常是那些在适当的随机变量建模下的观察结果，其相对于先前感兴趣的分组的发生预期小于 1；这样的定义和理解已被用来开发无参数感知异常检测算法。目前的工作旨在在感知算法所使用的方法与之前几十年的神经生理学和计算神经科学研究之间建立重要且实际的联系；特别是视网膜和视觉皮层的信息处理。该算法被概念化为神经元模型，它构成了无监督神经网络的核心，该网络学习将意外观察结果表示为异常。网络和神经元都显示出在生物过程中观察到的特性，包括：即时智能；并行处理；冗余;全球退化；对比度不变性；无参数计算、动态阈值和非线性处理。使用该网络作为具体应用，构建了用于单变量和多变量数据异常检测的稳健且准确的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受视觉系统启发的神经网络，用于无监督异常检测，通过模仿视网膜和视觉皮层的信息处理机制，实现对无序数据中异常点的检测。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督异常检测方法在处理复杂数据时存在局限性，而生物视觉系统具有并行处理、冗余性和动态阈值等特性，可为异常检测提供新思路。
AI.method: 构建基于神经元模型的无监督神经网络，模仿生物视觉系统的特性（如对比不变性、非线性处理等），通过参数-free计算和动态阈值机制实现异常信号的自动识别。
AI.result: 该网络在单变量和多变量数据上均表现出鲁棒且精确的异常检测能力，验证了生物启发机制在无监督学习中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将神经生理学原理与深度学习结合，为异常检测提供了新的生物启发模型，具有参数-free、动态适应等优势，适用于复杂数据场景。

authors_text: Thomas Lips,Victor-Louis De Gusseme,Francis wyffels
title: Learning Keypoints from Synthetic Data for Robotic Cloth Folding
title_zh: 从机器人折叠布的综合数据中学习要点
comment: Published on the ICRA 2022 Workshop on Representing and Manipulating Deformable Objects
comments: Published on the ICRA 2022 Workshop on Representing and Manipulating Deformable Objects
abstract: Robotic cloth manipulation is challenging due to its deformability, which makes determining its full state infeasible. However, for cloth folding, it suffices to know the position of a few semantic keypoints. Convolutional neural networks (CNN) can be used to detect these keypoints, but require large amounts of annotated data, which is expensive to collect. To overcome this, we propose to learn these keypoint detectors purely from synthetic data, enabling low-cost data collection. In this paper, we procedurally generate images of towels and use them to train a CNN. We evaluate the performance of this detector for folding towels on a unimanual robot setup and find that the grasp and fold success rates are 77% and 53%, respectively. We conclude that learning keypoint detectors from synthetic data for cloth folding and related tasks is a promising research direction, discuss some failures and relate them to future work. A video of the system, as well as the codebase, more details on the CNN architecture and the training setup can be found at https://github.com/tlpss/workshop-icra-2022-cloth-keypoints.git.
summary: Robotic cloth manipulation is challenging due to its deformability, which makes determining its full state infeasible. However, for cloth folding, it suffices to know the position of a few semantic keypoints. Convolutional neural networks (CNN) can be used to detect these keypoints, but require large amounts of annotated data, which is expensive to collect. To overcome this, we propose to learn these keypoint detectors purely from synthetic data, enabling low-cost data collection. In this paper, we procedurally generate images of towels and use them to train a CNN. We evaluate the performance of this detector for folding towels on a unimanual robot setup and find that the grasp and fold success rates are 77% and 53%, respectively. We conclude that learning keypoint detectors from synthetic data for cloth folding and related tasks is a promising research direction, discuss some failures and relate them to future work. A video of the system, as well as the codebase, more details on the CNN architecture and the training setup can be found at https://github.com/tlpss/workshop-icra-2022-cloth-keypoints.git.
abstract_zh: 由于其可变形性，机器人布料操纵具有挑战性，这使得确定其完整状态是不可行的。然而，对于布料折叠来说，知道几个语义关键点的位置就足够了。卷积神经网络（CNN）可用于检测这些关键点，但需要大量带注释的数据，收集起来成本很高。为了克服这个问题，我们建议纯粹从合成数据中学习这些关键点检测器，从而实现低成本的数据收集。在本文中，我们按程序生成毛巾图像并使用它们来训练 CNN。我们评估了该探测器在单手机器人设置上折叠毛巾的性能，发现抓取和折叠成功率分别为 77% 和 53%。我们的结论是，从布料折叠和相关任务的合成数据中学习关键点检测器是一个有前途的研究方向，讨论了一些失败并将其与未来的工作联系起来。有关系统的视频以及代码库、CNN 架构和训练设置的更多详细信息，请访问 https://github.com/tlpss/workshop-icra-2022-cloth-keypoints.git。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从合成数据中学习关键点检测器的方法，用于机器人布料折叠任务。
AI.motivation: 布料变形特性导致其状态难以完全感知，而折叠任务仅需少量语义关键点信息。传统方法依赖昂贵的真实标注数据，因此需探索低成本替代方案。
AI.method: 通过程序化生成毛巾图像作为合成数据，训练卷积神经网络检测关键点，并在单臂机器人系统上验证检测效果。
AI.result: 抓取成功率为77%，折叠成功率为53%。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据训练关键点检测器在布料折叠任务中具有潜力，但仍需解决检测失败案例以完善方法。

authors_text: Paul Escapil-Inchauspé,Gonzalo A. Ruz
title: Hyper-parameter tuning of physics-informed neural networks: Application to Helmholtz problems
title_zh: 物理信息神经网络的超参数调整：在亥姆霍兹问题中的应用
abstract: We consider physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) [Raissi et al., J.~Comput. Phys. 278 (2019) 686-707] for forward physical problems. In order to find optimal PINNs configuration, we introduce a hyper-parameter optimization (HPO) procedure via Gaussian processes-based Bayesian optimization. We apply the HPO to Helmholtz equation for bounded domains and conduct a thorough study, focusing on: (i) performance, (ii) the collocation points density $r$ and (iii) the frequency $κ$, confirming the applicability and necessity of the method. Numerical experiments are performed in two and three dimensions, including comparison to finite element methods.
summary: We consider physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) [Raissi et al., J.~Comput. Phys. 278 (2019) 686-707] for forward physical problems. In order to find optimal PINNs configuration, we introduce a hyper-parameter optimization (HPO) procedure via Gaussian processes-based Bayesian optimization. We apply the HPO to Helmholtz equation for bounded domains and conduct a thorough study, focusing on: (i) performance, (ii) the collocation points density $r$ and (iii) the frequency $κ$, confirming the applicability and necessity of the method. Numerical experiments are performed in two and three dimensions, including comparison to finite element methods.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑物理信息神经网络（PINN）[Raissi et al., J.~Comput.物理。 278 (2019) 686-707]用于前锋身体问题。为了找到最佳的 PINN 配置，我们通过基于高斯过程的贝叶斯优化引入了超参数优化 (HPO) 过程。我们将HPO应用于有界域的亥姆霍兹方程，并进行了深入的研究，重点关注：（i）性能，（ii）搭配点密度$r$和（iii）频率$κ$，证实了该方法的适用性和必要性。数值实验在二维和三维上进行，包括与有限元方法的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于高斯过程的贝叶斯优化方法对物理信息神经网络（PINNs）超参数的调优，并将其应用于Helmholtz方程的求解。
AI.motivation: 物理信息神经网络（PINNs）在求解物理问题时需要合适的超参数配置，但传统方法缺乏系统优化策略，因此提出基于贝叶斯优化的超参数调优方法以提升性能。
AI.method: 采用高斯过程回归的贝叶斯优化框架，对PINNs的超参数进行优化，并在二维和三维有界域中针对Helmholtz方程进行数值实验，对比了不同配点密度和频率下的效果及有限元方法。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在Helmholtz问题中的有效性，证明了超参数优化对提升PINNs性能的必要性，且在不同配点密度和频率下均表现出良好适应性。
AI.conclusion: 基于贝叶斯优化的超参数调优方法能有效提升PINNs求解Helmholtz问题的准确性，为复杂物理问题的数值求解提供了新思路。

search_text: Hyper-parameter tuning of physics-informed neural networks: Application to Helmholtz problems 物理信息神经网络的超参数调整：在亥姆霍兹问题中的应用 We consider physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) [Raissi et al., J.~Comput. Phys. 278 (2019) 686-707] for forward physical problems. In order to find optimal PINNs configuration, we introduce a hyper-parameter optimization (HPO) procedure via Gaussian processes-based Bayesian optimization. We apply the HPO to Helmholtz equation for bounded domains and conduct a thorough study, focusing on: (i) performance, (ii) the collocation points density $r$ and (iii) the frequency $κ$, confirming the applicability and necessity of the method. Numerical experiments are performed in two and three dimensions, including comparison to finite element methods. 我们考虑物理信息神经网络（PINN）[Raissi et al., J.~Comput.物理。 278 (2019) 686-707]用于前锋身体问题。为了找到最佳的 PINN 配置，我们通过基于高斯过程的贝叶斯优化引入了超参数优化 (HPO) 过程。我们将HPO应用于有界域的亥姆霍兹方程，并进行了深入的研究，重点关注：（i）性能，（ii）搭配点密度$r$和（iii）频率$κ$，证实了该方法的适用性和必要性。数值实验在二维和三维上进行，包括与有限元方法的比较。 本文研究了基于高斯过程的贝叶斯优化方法对物理信息神经网络（PINNs）超参数的调优，并将其应用于Helmholtz方程的求解。 Paul Escapil-Inchauspé,Gonzalo A.
