authors_text: Jing Yang,Xiatian Zhu,Adrian Bulat,Brais Martinez,Georgios Tzimiropoulos
title: Knowledge Distillation Meets Open-Set Semi-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 知识蒸馏遇见开放式半监督学习
comment: Accepted by IJCV
comments: Accepted by IJCV
abstract: Existing knowledge distillation methods mostly focus on distillation of teacher's prediction and intermediate activation. However, the structured representation, which arguably is one of the most critical ingredients of deep models, is largely overlooked. In this work, we propose a novel {\em \modelname{}} ({\bf\em \shortname{})} method dedicated for distilling representational knowledge semantically from a pretrained teacher to a target student. The key idea is that we leverage the teacher's classifier as a semantic critic for evaluating the representations of both teacher and student and distilling the semantic knowledge with high-order structured information over all feature dimensions. This is accomplished by introducing a notion of cross-network logit computed through passing student's representation into teacher's classifier. Further, considering the set of seen classes as a basis for the semantic space in a combinatorial perspective, we scale \shortname{} to unseen classes for enabling effective exploitation of largely available, arbitrary unlabeled training data. At the problem level, this establishes an interesting connection between knowledge distillation with open-set semi-supervised learning (SSL). Extensive experiments show that our \shortname{} outperforms significantly previous state-of-the-art knowledge distillation methods on both coarse object classification and fine face recognition tasks, as well as less studied yet practically crucial binary network distillation. Under more realistic open-set SSL settings we introduce, we reveal that knowledge distillation is generally more effective than existing Out-Of-Distribution (OOD) sample detection, and our proposed \shortname{} is superior over both previous distillation and SSL competitors. The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/jingyang2017/SRD\_ossl}.
summary: Existing knowledge distillation methods mostly focus on distillation of teacher's prediction and intermediate activation. However, the structured representation, which arguably is one of the most critical ingredients of deep models, is largely overlooked. In this work, we propose a novel {\em \modelname{}} ({\bf\em \shortname{})} method dedicated for distilling representational knowledge semantically from a pretrained teacher to a target student. The key idea is that we leverage the teacher's classifier as a semantic critic for evaluating the representations of both teacher and student and distilling the semantic knowledge with high-order structured information over all feature dimensions. This is accomplished by introducing a notion of cross-network logit computed through passing student's representation into teacher's classifier. Further, considering the set of seen classes as a basis for the semantic space in a combinatorial perspective, we scale \shortname{} to unseen classes for enabling effective exploitation of largely available, arbitrary unlabeled training data. At the problem level, this establishes an interesting connection between knowledge distillation with open-set semi-supervised learning (SSL). Extensive experiments show that our \shortname{} outperforms significantly previous state-of-the-art knowledge distillation methods on both coarse object classification and fine face recognition tasks, as well as less studied yet practically crucial binary network distillation. Under more realistic open-set SSL settings we introduce, we reveal that knowledge distillation is generally more effective than existing Out-Of-Distribution (OOD) sample detection, and our proposed \shortname{} is superior over both previous distillation and SSL competitors. The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/jingyang2017/SRD\_ossl}.
abstract_zh: 现有的知识蒸馏方法大多集中于教师预测和中间激活的蒸馏。然而，结构化表示可以说是深度模型最关键的组成部分之一，却在很大程度上被忽视了。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的 {\em \modelname{}} ({\bf\em \shortname{})} 方法，专门用于从经过预训练的教师到目标学生的语义上提取表征知识。关键思想是，我们利用教师的分类器作为语义批评家来评估教师和学生的表示，并利用所有特征维度上的高阶结构化信息来提炼语义知识。这是通过引入跨网络逻辑概念来实现的，该概念是通过将学生的表示传递到教师的分类器中来计算的。此外，从组合角度考虑将可见类集作为语义空间的基础，我们将 \shortname{} 扩展到未见类，以便有效利用大量可用的、任意未标记的训练数据。在问题层面，这在知识蒸馏与开放集半监督学习（SSL）之间建立了有趣的联系。大量的实验表明，我们的 \shortname{} 在粗略的对象分类和精细的人脸识别任务以及研究较少但实际上至关重要的二进制网络蒸馏方面都明显优于以前最先进的知识蒸馏方法。在我们引入的更现实的开放集 SSL 设置下，我们发现知识蒸馏通常比现有的分布外 (OOD) 样本检测更有效，并且我们提出的 \shortname{} 优于以前的蒸馏和 SSL 竞争对手。源代码位于\url{https://github.com/jingyang2017/SRD\_ossl}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合知识蒸馏与开放集半监督学习的新方法，通过蒸馏预训练教师模型的结构化表示知识来提升学生模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法主要关注预测和中间激活的蒸馏，忽视了深度模型中关键的结构化表示。本文旨在通过语义化蒸馏结构化知识来提升模型性能。
AI.method: 提出SRD-OSSL方法，利用教师分类器作为语义评估器，通过跨网络logit计算和组合视角扩展至未见类别，实现结构化表示知识的蒸馏。
AI.result: 在粗粒度分类、细粒度人脸识别及二值网络蒸馏任务中显著优于现有方法，且在开放集半监督设置下优于传统OOD检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏在开放集半监督学习中比现有OOD检测更有效，本文方法通过结构化表示蒸馏实现了性能突破。

authors_text: Marvin Eisenberger,Aysim Toker,Laura Leal-Taixé,Florian Bernard,Daniel Cremers
title: A Unified Framework for Implicit Sinkhorn Differentiation
title_zh: 隐式 Sinkhorn 微分的统一框架
comment: To appear at CVPR 2022
comments: To appear at CVPR 2022
abstract: The Sinkhorn operator has recently experienced a surge of popularity in computer vision and related fields. One major reason is its ease of integration into deep learning frameworks. To allow for an efficient training of respective neural networks, we propose an algorithm that obtains analytical gradients of a Sinkhorn layer via implicit differentiation. In comparison to prior work, our framework is based on the most general formulation of the Sinkhorn operator. It allows for any type of loss function, while both the target capacities and cost matrices are differentiated jointly. We further construct error bounds of the resulting algorithm for approximate inputs. Finally, we demonstrate that for a number of applications, simply replacing automatic differentiation with our algorithm directly improves the stability and accuracy of the obtained gradients. Moreover, we show that it is computationally more efficient, particularly when resources like GPU memory are scarce.
summary: The Sinkhorn operator has recently experienced a surge of popularity in computer vision and related fields. One major reason is its ease of integration into deep learning frameworks. To allow for an efficient training of respective neural networks, we propose an algorithm that obtains analytical gradients of a Sinkhorn layer via implicit differentiation. In comparison to prior work, our framework is based on the most general formulation of the Sinkhorn operator. It allows for any type of loss function, while both the target capacities and cost matrices are differentiated jointly. We further construct error bounds of the resulting algorithm for approximate inputs. Finally, we demonstrate that for a number of applications, simply replacing automatic differentiation with our algorithm directly improves the stability and accuracy of the obtained gradients. Moreover, we show that it is computationally more efficient, particularly when resources like GPU memory are scarce.
abstract_zh: Sinkhorn 算子最近在计算机视觉及相关领域经历了人气飙升。一个主要原因是它易于集成到深度学习框架中。为了有效训练各个神经网络，我们提出了一种通过隐式微分获得 Sinkhorn 层的解析梯度的算法。与之前的工作相比，我们的框架基于 Sinkhorn 算子的最通用的公式。它允许任何类型的损失函数，同时目标容量和成本矩阵共同微分。我们进一步为近似输入构建所得算法的误差界限。最后，我们证明，对于许多应用来说，简单地用我们的算法替换自动微分可以直接提高所获得梯度的稳定性和准确性。此外，我们表明它的计算效率更高，特别是当 GPU 内存等资源稀缺时。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于隐式微分的统一框架，用于优化Sinkhorn算子在深度学习中的梯度计算，提升稳定性和效率。
AI.motivation: Sinkhorn算子虽在深度学习中广泛应用，但现有方法在处理复杂损失函数和联合优化参数时存在稳定性与效率问题，需更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过隐式微分推导Sinkhorn层的解析梯度，基于通用算子形式，支持任意损失函数并联合优化目标容量与成本矩阵，同时构建近似输入的误差界。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个应用中提升梯度稳定性与准确性，且计算效率更高，尤其在GPU内存受限场景下优势显著。
AI.conclusion: 本文框架为Sinkhorn算子的高效微分提供了统一方案，验证了其在实际应用中的有效性，为后续研究奠定基础。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于隐式微分的统一框架，用于优化Sinkhorn算子在深度学习中的梯度计算，提升稳定性和效率。

search_text: A Unified Framework for Implicit Sinkhorn Differentiation 隐式 Sinkhorn 微分的统一框架 The Sinkhorn operator has recently experienced a surge of popularity in computer vision and related fields. One major reason is its ease of integration into deep learning frameworks. To allow for an efficient training of respective neural networks, we propose an algorithm that obtains analytical gradients of a Sinkhorn layer via implicit differentiation. In comparison to prior work, our framework is based on the most general formulation of the Sinkhorn operator. It allows for any type of loss function, while both the target capacities and cost matrices are differentiated jointly. We further construct error bounds of the resulting algorithm for approximate inputs. Finally, we demonstrate that for a number of applications, simply replacing automatic differentiation with our algorithm directly improves the stability and accuracy of the obtained gradients. Moreover, we show that it is computationally more efficient, particularly when resources like GPU memory are scarce. Sinkhorn 算子最近在计算机视觉及相关领域经历了人气飙升。一个主要原因是它易于集成到深度学习框架中。为了有效训练各个神经网络，我们提出了一种通过隐式微分获得 Sinkhorn 层的解析梯度的算法。与之前的工作相比，我们的框架基于 Sinkhorn 算子的最通用的公式。它允许任何类型的损失函数，同时目标容量和成本矩阵共同微分。我们进一步为近似输入构建所得算法的误差界限。最后，我们证明，对于许多应用来说，简单地用我们的算法替换自动微分可以直接提高所获得梯度的稳定性和准确性。此外，我们表明它的计算效率更高，特别是当 GPU 内存等资源稀缺时。 本文提出了一种基于隐式微分的统一框架，用于优化Sinkhorn算子在深度学习中的梯度计算，提升稳定性和效率。 Marvin Eisenberger,Aysim Toker,Laura Leal-Taixé,Florian Bernard,Daniel Cremers cs.CV

authors_text: Will Rowan,Nick Pears
title: The Effectiveness of Temporal Dependency in Deepfake Video Detection
title_zh: 时间依赖性在 Deepfake 视频检测中的有效性
abstract: Deepfakes are a form of synthetic image generation used to generate fake videos of individuals for malicious purposes. The resulting videos may be used to spread misinformation, reduce trust in media, or as a form of blackmail. These threats necessitate automated methods of deepfake video detection. This paper investigates whether temporal information can improve the deepfake detection performance of deep learning models. To investigate this, we propose a framework that classifies new and existing approaches by their defining characteristics. These are the types of feature extraction: automatic or manual, and the temporal relationship between frames: dependent or independent. We apply this framework to investigate the effect of temporal dependency on a model's deepfake detection performance. We find that temporal dependency produces a statistically significant (p < 0.05) increase in performance in classifying real images for the model using automatic feature selection, demonstrating that spatio-temporal information can increase the performance of deepfake video detection models.
summary: Deepfakes are a form of synthetic image generation used to generate fake videos of individuals for malicious purposes. The resulting videos may be used to spread misinformation, reduce trust in media, or as a form of blackmail. These threats necessitate automated methods of deepfake video detection. This paper investigates whether temporal information can improve the deepfake detection performance of deep learning models. To investigate this, we propose a framework that classifies new and existing approaches by their defining characteristics. These are the types of feature extraction: automatic or manual, and the temporal relationship between frames: dependent or independent. We apply this framework to investigate the effect of temporal dependency on a model's deepfake detection performance. We find that temporal dependency produces a statistically significant (p < 0.05) increase in performance in classifying real images for the model using automatic feature selection, demonstrating that spatio-temporal information can increase the performance of deepfake video detection models.
abstract_zh: Deepfakes 是一种合成图像生成形式，用于出于恶意目的生成个人的虚假视频。由此产生的视频可能会被用来传播错误信息、降低对媒体的信任或作为一种勒索形式。这些威胁需要深度伪造视频检测的自动化方法。本文研究时间信息是否可以提高深度学习模型的深度伪造检测性能。为了研究这个问题，我们提出了一个框架，根据新方法和现有方法的定义特征对它们进行分类。这些是特征提取的类型：自动或手动，以及帧之间的时间关系：相关或独立。我们应用这个框架来研究时间依赖性对模型深度伪造检测性能的影响。我们发现，时间依赖性在使用自动特征选择对模型的真实图像进行分类时产生了统计上显着的（p < 0.05）性能提升，这表明时空信息可以提高深度伪造视频检测模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了时间依赖性在深度伪造视频检测中的有效性，提出了一种基于特征提取方式和帧间时间关系分类的框架，并验证了时间依赖性对检测性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 深度伪造视频可能被用于传播虚假信息、破坏媒体信任或进行勒索，亟需自动化检测方法。现有研究未明确时间依赖性对检测性能的具体影响，需进一步验证。
AI.method: 提出分类框架，按特征提取方式（自动/手动）和帧间时间关系（依赖/独立）划分方法，通过实验对比分析时间依赖性对模型检测性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，在自动特征选择模型中，时间依赖性显著提升了真实图像分类性能（p<0.05），证明时空信息能增强深度伪造检测效果。
AI.conclusion: 时间依赖性有助于提升深度伪造视频检测模型性能，建议在检测方法中融入时空信息以提高准确性。

authors_text: Hui Guo,Shu Hu,Xin Wang,Ming-Ching Chang,Siwei Lyu
title: Open-Eye: An Open Platform to Study Human Performance on Identifying AI-Synthesized Faces
title_zh: Open-Eye：研究人类识别人工智能合成面孔表现的开放平台
comment: Accepted by IEEE 5th International Conference on Multimedia Information Processing and Retrieval (MIPR), 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2109.00162
comments: Accepted by IEEE 5th International Conference on Multimedia Information Processing and Retrieval (MIPR), 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2109.00162
abstract: AI-synthesized faces are visually challenging to discern from real ones. They have been used as profile images for fake social media accounts, which leads to high negative social impacts. Although progress has been made in developing automatic methods to detect AI-synthesized faces, there is no open platform to study the human performance of AI-synthesized faces detection. In this work, we develop an online platform called Open-eye to study the human performance of AI-synthesized face detection. We describe the design and workflow of the Open-eye in this paper.
summary: AI-synthesized faces are visually challenging to discern from real ones. They have been used as profile images for fake social media accounts, which leads to high negative social impacts. Although progress has been made in developing automatic methods to detect AI-synthesized faces, there is no open platform to study the human performance of AI-synthesized faces detection. In this work, we develop an online platform called Open-eye to study the human performance of AI-synthesized face detection. We describe the design and workflow of the Open-eye in this paper.
abstract_zh: 人工智能合成的面孔在视觉上很难与真实的面孔区分开来。它们被用作虚假社交媒体帐户的个人资料图片，这导致了很高的负面社会影响。尽管在开发自动检测人工智能合成人脸的方法方面取得了进展，但还没有开放平台来研究人工智能合成人脸检测的人类表现。在这项工作中，我们开发了一个名为 Open-eye 的在线平台，用于研究人工智能合成人脸检测的人类表现。我们在本文中描述了 Open-eye 的设计和工作流程。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个名为Open-Eye的在线平台，用于研究人类识别AI生成人脸的能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管自动检测AI生成人脸的技术有所进展，但缺乏开放平台来系统研究人类在识别AI合成面孔方面的表现，而这类面孔被广泛用于虚假社交账号，造成负面影响。
AI.method: 设计并构建了一个名为Open-Eye的在线平台，描述其系统架构、任务流程及数据收集机制，以量化人类识别AI合成面孔的准确率和影响因素。
AI.result: 平台已公开并开始收集人类参与者对AI合成面孔的识别数据，为后续分析人类判断能力与AI检测技术的差异提供基础。
AI.conclusion: Open-Eye平台填补了人类性能研究的空白，未来可结合数据进一步优化AI检测模型并探索人类与机器在该任务中的互补性。

authors_text: Pradeep K. Murukannaiah,Catholijn M. Jonker
title: MOPaC: The Multiple Offers Protocol for Multilateral Negotiations with Partial Consensus
title_zh: MOPaC：部分共识的多边谈判的多重报价协议
abstract: Existing protocols for multilateral negotiation require a full consensus among the negotiating parties. In contrast, we propose a protocol for multilateral negotiation that allows partial consensus, wherein only a subset of the negotiating parties can reach an agreement. We motivate problems that require such a protocol and describe the protocol formally.
summary: Existing protocols for multilateral negotiation require a full consensus among the negotiating parties. In contrast, we propose a protocol for multilateral negotiation that allows partial consensus, wherein only a subset of the negotiating parties can reach an agreement. We motivate problems that require such a protocol and describe the protocol formally.
abstract_zh: 现有的多边谈判议定书需要谈判各方达成充分共识。相比之下，我们提出了一个允许部分共识的多边谈判协议，其中只有一部分谈判方可以达成协议。我们激发需要这样一个协议的问题并正式描述该协议。

AI.tldr: 提出一种允许部分共识的多边谈判协议MOPaC，解决传统需要全体一致的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有协议要求全共识，但实际场景中可能需要部分共识以达成更灵活的协议，因此需要新的协议来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 设计并形式化描述了MOPaC协议，允许部分共识，通过多轮报价机制实现部分参与方的协议达成。
AI.result: 通过实例验证了MOPaC协议在需要部分共识场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MOPaC协议为多边谈判提供了灵活的部分共识机制，适用于无法达成全共识的场景，提升协议达成的可能性。

authors_text: Yuan Bi,Zhongliang Jiang,Yuan Gao,Thomas Wendler,Angelos Karlas,Nassir Navab
title: VesNet-RL: Simulation-based Reinforcement Learning for Real-World US Probe Navigation
title_zh: VesNet-RL：基于模拟的强化学习，用于现实世界的美国探测器导航
comment: Directly accepted by IEEE RAL after the first round of review. Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bzCO07Hquj8 Codes: https://github.com/yuan-12138/VesNet-RL
comments: Directly accepted by IEEE RAL after the first round of review. Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bzCO07Hquj8 Codes: https://github.com/yuan-12138/VesNet-RL
abstract: Ultrasound (US) is one of the most common medical imaging modalities since it is radiation-free, low-cost, and real-time. In freehand US examinations, sonographers often navigate a US probe to visualize standard examination planes with rich diagnostic information. However, reproducibility and stability of the resulting images often suffer from intra- and inter-operator variation. Reinforcement learning (RL), as an interaction-based learning method, has demonstrated its effectiveness in visual navigating tasks; however, RL is limited in terms of generalization. To address this challenge, we propose a simulation-based RL framework for real-world navigation of US probes towards the standard longitudinal views of vessels. A UNet is used to provide binary masks from US images; thereby, the RL agent trained on simulated binary vessel images can be applied in real scenarios without further training. To accurately characterize actual states, a multi-modality state representation structure is introduced to facilitate the understanding of environments. Moreover, considering the characteristics of vessels, a novel standard view recognition approach based on the minimum bounding rectangle is proposed to terminate the searching process. To evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed method, the trained policy is validated virtually on 3D volumes of a volunteer's in-vivo carotid artery, and physically on custom-designed gel phantoms using robotic US. The results demonstrate that proposed approach can effectively and accurately navigate the probe towards the longitudinal view of vessels.
summary: Ultrasound (US) is one of the most common medical imaging modalities since it is radiation-free, low-cost, and real-time. In freehand US examinations, sonographers often navigate a US probe to visualize standard examination planes with rich diagnostic information. However, reproducibility and stability of the resulting images often suffer from intra- and inter-operator variation. Reinforcement learning (RL), as an interaction-based learning method, has demonstrated its effectiveness in visual navigating tasks; however, RL is limited in terms of generalization. To address this challenge, we propose a simulation-based RL framework for real-world navigation of US probes towards the standard longitudinal views of vessels. A UNet is used to provide binary masks from US images; thereby, the RL agent trained on simulated binary vessel images can be applied in real scenarios without further training. To accurately characterize actual states, a multi-modality state representation structure is introduced to facilitate the understanding of environments. Moreover, considering the characteristics of vessels, a novel standard view recognition approach based on the minimum bounding rectangle is proposed to terminate the searching process. To evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed method, the trained policy is validated virtually on 3D volumes of a volunteer's in-vivo carotid artery, and physically on custom-designed gel phantoms using robotic US. The results demonstrate that proposed approach can effectively and accurately navigate the probe towards the longitudinal view of vessels.
abstract_zh: 超声波（US）是最常见的医学成像方式之一，因为它无辐射、低成本且实时。在徒手超声检查中，超声检查人员经常导航超声探头以可视化具有丰富诊断信息的标准检查平面。然而，所得图像的再现性和稳定性常常受到操作者内部和操作者之间的变化的影响。强化学习（RL）作为一种基于交互的学习方法，已经在视觉导航任务中证明了其有效性；然而，强化学习在泛化方面受到限制。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一个基于模拟的强化学习框架，用于美国探测器在现实世界中导航到船舶的标准纵向视图。 UNet 用于提供来自 US 图像的二进制掩模；因此，在模拟二元血管图像上训练的强化学习代理可以应用于真实场景，而无需进一步训练。为了准确地表征实际状态，引入了多模态状态表示结构以促进对环境的理解。此外，考虑到船舶的特点，提出了一种基于最小外接矩形的标准视图识别方法来终止搜索过程。为了评估所提出方法的有效性，训练后的策略在志愿者体内颈动脉的 3D 体积上进行虚拟验证，并使用机器人 US 在定制设计的凝胶体模上进行物理验证。结果表明，所提出的方法可以有效、准确地将探头导航到船舶的纵向视图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于仿真的强化学习框架VesNet-RL，用于在真实世界中导航超声探头以获取血管的标准纵向视图。
AI.motivation: 超声检查中因操作者差异导致图像可重复性和稳定性不足，而传统强化学习在泛化能力上存在局限，需通过仿真训练提升实际应用效果。
AI.method: 采用UNet生成二值掩膜提取血管信息，结合多模态状态表示和最小包围矩形视图识别方法，通过仿真训练策略并在真实场景中验证。
AI.result: 在志愿者颈动脉3D体积和定制凝胶仿体上验证，证明该方法能有效准确导航探头至目标血管纵向视图。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过仿真强化学习实现了超声探头的精准导航，为提升超声成像一致性提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Vishal Kuber,Divakar Yadav,Arun Kr Yadav
title: Univariate and Multivariate LSTM Model for Short-Term Stock Market Prediction
title_zh: 用于短期股市预测的单变量和多元 LSTM 模型
comment: 24 pages, 20 figures, 8 tables
comments: 24 pages, 20 figures, 8 tables
abstract: Designing robust and accurate prediction models has been a viable research area since a long time. While proponents of a well-functioning market predictors believe that it is difficult to accurately predict market prices but many scholars disagree. Robust and accurate prediction systems will not only be helpful to the businesses but also to the individuals in making their financial investments. This paper presents an LSTM model with two different input approaches for predicting the short-term stock prices of two Indian companies, Reliance Industries and Infosys Ltd. Ten years of historic data (2012-2021) is taken from the yahoo finance website to carry out analysis of proposed approaches. In the first approach, closing prices of two selected companies are directly applied on univariate LSTM model. For the approach second, technical indicators values are calculated from the closing prices and then collectively applied on Multivariate LSTM model. Short term market behaviour for upcoming days is evaluated. Experimental outcomes revel that approach one is useful to determine the future trend but multivariate LSTM model with technical indicators found to be useful in accurately predicting the future price behaviours.
summary: Designing robust and accurate prediction models has been a viable research area since a long time. While proponents of a well-functioning market predictors believe that it is difficult to accurately predict market prices but many scholars disagree. Robust and accurate prediction systems will not only be helpful to the businesses but also to the individuals in making their financial investments. This paper presents an LSTM model with two different input approaches for predicting the short-term stock prices of two Indian companies, Reliance Industries and Infosys Ltd. Ten years of historic data (2012-2021) is taken from the yahoo finance website to carry out analysis of proposed approaches. In the first approach, closing prices of two selected companies are directly applied on univariate LSTM model. For the approach second, technical indicators values are calculated from the closing prices and then collectively applied on Multivariate LSTM model. Short term market behaviour for upcoming days is evaluated. Experimental outcomes revel that approach one is useful to determine the future trend but multivariate LSTM model with technical indicators found to be useful in accurately predicting the future price behaviours.
abstract_zh: 长期以来，设计稳健且准确的预测模型一直是一个可行的研究领域。虽然运作良好的市场预测者的支持者认为准确预测市场价格很困难，但许多学者不同意。强大而准确的预测系统不仅对企业有帮助，而且对个人的金融投资也有帮助。本文提出了一种具有两种不同输入方法的 LSTM 模型，用于预测两家印度公司 Reliance Industries 和 Infosys Ltd 的短期股价。从雅虎财经网站获取了十年的历史数据（2012-2021），对所提出的方法进行了分析。在第一种方法中，两家选定公司的收盘价直接应用于单变量 LSTM 模型。对于第二种方法，技术指标值是根据收盘价计算出来的，然后共同应用于多元 LSTM 模型。评估未来几天的短期市场行为。实验结果表明，方法一对于确定未来趋势很有用，但具有技术指标的多元 LSTM 模型对于准确预测未来价格行为很有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种LSTM模型（单变量和多变量）用于预测印度两家公司短期股票价格。
AI.motivation: 准确的股价预测对企业和个人投资决策具有重要意义，但市场预测存在争议，需探索有效模型。
AI.method: 采用单变量LSTM直接输入收盘价，以及多变量LSTM结合技术指标（如均线、RSI等）进行预测，使用2012-2021年雅虎财经数据验证。
AI.result: 单变量模型能捕捉趋势，多变量模型结合技术指标在价格预测准确性上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 多变量LSTM模型通过整合技术指标可提升短期股价预测精度，为金融预测提供新思路。

result: 单变量模型能捕捉趋势，多变量模型结合技术指标在价格预测准确性上表现更优。
conclusion: 多变量LSTM模型通过整合技术指标可提升短期股价预测精度，为金融预测提供新思路。
search_text: Univariate and Multivariate LSTM Model for Short-Term Stock Market Prediction 用于短期股市预测的单变量和多元 LSTM 模型 Designing robust and accurate prediction models has been a viable research area since a long time. While proponents of a well-functioning market predictors believe that it is difficult to accurately predict market prices but many scholars disagree. Robust and accurate prediction systems will not only be helpful to the businesses but also to the individuals in making their financial investments. This paper presents an LSTM model with two different input approaches for predicting the short-term stock prices of two Indian companies, Reliance Industries and Infosys Ltd. Ten years of historic data (2012-2021) is taken from the yahoo finance website to carry out analysis of proposed approaches. In the first approach, closing prices of two selected companies are directly applied on univariate LSTM model. For the approach second, technical indicators values are calculated from the closing prices and then collectively applied on Multivariate LSTM model. Short term market behaviour for upcoming days is evaluated. Experimental outcomes revel that approach one is useful to determine the future trend but multivariate LSTM model with technical indicators found to be useful in accurately predicting the future price behaviours. 长期以来，设计稳健且准确的预测模型一直是一个可行的研究领域。虽然运作良好的市场预测者的支持者认为准确预测市场价格很困难，但许多学者不同意。强大而准确的预测系统不仅对企业有帮助，而且对个人的金融投资也有帮助。本文提出了一种具有两种不同输入方法的 LSTM 模型，用于预测两家印度公司 Reliance Industries 和 Infosys Ltd 的短期股价。从雅虎财经网站获取了十年的历史数据（2012-2021），对所提出的方法进行了分析。在第一种方法中，两家选定公司的收盘价直接应用于单变量 LSTM 模型。对于第二种方法，技术指标值是根据收盘价计算出来的，然后共同应用于多元 LSTM 模型。评估未来几天的短期市场行为。实验结果表明，方法一对于确定未来趋势很有用，但具有技术指标的多元 LSTM 模型对于准确预测未来价格行为很有用。 本文提出两种LSTM模型（单变量和多变量）用于预测印度两家公司短期股票价格。 Vishal Kuber,Divakar Yadav,Arun Kr Yadav q-fin.ST,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Daniel Reisenbüchler,Sophia J. Wagner,Melanie Boxberg,Tingying Peng
title: Local Attention Graph-based Transformer for Multi-target Genetic Alteration Prediction
title_zh: 用于多目标遗传改变预测的基于局部注意图的变压器
abstract: Classical multiple instance learning (MIL) methods are often based on the identical and independent distributed assumption between instances, hence neglecting the potentially rich contextual information beyond individual entities. On the other hand, Transformers with global self-attention modules have been proposed to model the interdependencies among all instances. However, in this paper we question: Is global relation modeling using self-attention necessary, or can we appropriately restrict self-attention calculations to local regimes in large-scale whole slide images (WSIs)? We propose a general-purpose local attention graph-based Transformer for MIL (LA-MIL), introducing an inductive bias by explicitly contextualizing instances in adaptive local regimes of arbitrary size. Additionally, an efficiently adapted loss function enables our approach to learn expressive WSI embeddings for the joint analysis of multiple biomarkers. We demonstrate that LA-MIL achieves state-of-the-art results in mutation prediction for gastrointestinal cancer, outperforming existing models on important biomarkers such as microsatellite instability for colorectal cancer. Our findings suggest that local self-attention sufficiently models dependencies on par with global modules. Our LA-MIL implementation is available at https://github.com/agentdr1/LA_MIL.
summary: Classical multiple instance learning (MIL) methods are often based on the identical and independent distributed assumption between instances, hence neglecting the potentially rich contextual information beyond individual entities. On the other hand, Transformers with global self-attention modules have been proposed to model the interdependencies among all instances. However, in this paper we question: Is global relation modeling using self-attention necessary, or can we appropriately restrict self-attention calculations to local regimes in large-scale whole slide images (WSIs)? We propose a general-purpose local attention graph-based Transformer for MIL (LA-MIL), introducing an inductive bias by explicitly contextualizing instances in adaptive local regimes of arbitrary size. Additionally, an efficiently adapted loss function enables our approach to learn expressive WSI embeddings for the joint analysis of multiple biomarkers. We demonstrate that LA-MIL achieves state-of-the-art results in mutation prediction for gastrointestinal cancer, outperforming existing models on important biomarkers such as microsatellite instability for colorectal cancer. Our findings suggest that local self-attention sufficiently models dependencies on par with global modules. Our LA-MIL implementation is available at https://github.com/agentdr1/LA_MIL.
abstract_zh: 经典的多实例学习（MIL）方法通常基于实例之间相同且独立的分布式假设，因此忽略了个体实体之外潜在的丰富上下文信息。另一方面，具有全局自注意力模块的 Transformer 被提出来对所有实例之间的相互依赖关系进行建模。然而，在本文中，我们提出疑问：使用自注意力的全局关系建模是否必要，或者我们是否可以适当地将自注意力计算限制在大规模全幻灯片图像（WSI）中的局部区域？我们提出了一种通用的基于局部注意力图的 MIL Transformer (LA-MIL)，通过在任意大小的自适应局部机制中显式地关联实例来引入归纳偏差。此外，有效适应的损失函数使我们的方法能够学习富有表现力的 WSI 嵌入，以便对多个生物标志物进行联合分析。我们证明 LA-MIL 在胃肠癌突变预测方面取得了最先进的结果，在重要生物标志物（例如结直肠癌的微卫星不稳定性）方面优于现有模型。我们的研究结果表明，局部自注意力足以模拟与全局模块相同的依赖关系。我们的 LA-MIL 实施可在 https://github.com/agentdr1/LA_MIL 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于局部注意力图的Transformer模型（LA-MIL），用于多目标基因改变预测。
AI.motivation: 传统多实例学习方法忽略了实例之间的上下文信息，而全局自注意力机制在处理大规模全切片图像时可能效率低下，因此需要一种局部注意力机制来建模实例间的依赖关系。
AI.method: 本文引入了一种基于局部注意力图的Transformer模型（LA-MIL），通过在任意大小的局部区域内显式上下文化实例，引入归纳偏置。同时，采用一种高效适应的损失函数来学习表达性强的WSI嵌入，用于多生物标志物的联合分析。
AI.result: LA-MIL在胃肠道癌症的突变预测中取得了最先进的结果，优于现有模型，特别是在结直肠癌的微卫星不稳定性等重要生物标志物上。
AI.conclusion: 局部自注意力机制能够与全局模块一样有效地建模依赖关系，LA-MIL是一种有效且高效的多实例学习方法。

authors_text: Catalina Goanta,Thales Bertaglia,Adriana Iamnitchi
title: The Case for a Legal Compliance API for the Enforcement of the EU's Digital Services Act on Social Media Platforms
title_zh: 在社交媒体平台上执行欧盟数字服务法案的法律合规 API 案例
comment: Accepted for publication at ACM FAccT Conference 2022
comments: Accepted for publication at ACM FAccT Conference 2022
abstract: In the course of under a year, the European Commission has launched some of the most important regulatory proposals to date on platform governance. The Commission's goals behind cross-sectoral regulation of this sort include the protection of markets and democracies alike. While all these acts propose sophisticated rules for setting up new enforcement institutions and procedures, one aspect remains highly unclear: how digital enforcement will actually take place in practice. Focusing on the Digital Services Act (DSA), this discussion paper critically addresses issues around social media data access for the purpose of digital enforcement and proposes the use of a legal compliance application programming interface (API) as a means to facilitate compliance with the DSA and complementary European and national regulation. To contextualize this discussion, the paper pursues two scenarios that exemplify the harms arising out of content monetization affecting a particularly vulnerable category of social media users: children. The two scenarios are used to further reflect upon essential issues surrounding data access and legal compliance with the DSA and further applicable legal standards in the field of labour and consumer law.
summary: In the course of under a year, the European Commission has launched some of the most important regulatory proposals to date on platform governance. The Commission's goals behind cross-sectoral regulation of this sort include the protection of markets and democracies alike. While all these acts propose sophisticated rules for setting up new enforcement institutions and procedures, one aspect remains highly unclear: how digital enforcement will actually take place in practice. Focusing on the Digital Services Act (DSA), this discussion paper critically addresses issues around social media data access for the purpose of digital enforcement and proposes the use of a legal compliance application programming interface (API) as a means to facilitate compliance with the DSA and complementary European and national regulation. To contextualize this discussion, the paper pursues two scenarios that exemplify the harms arising out of content monetization affecting a particularly vulnerable category of social media users: children. The two scenarios are used to further reflect upon essential issues surrounding data access and legal compliance with the DSA and further applicable legal standards in the field of labour and consumer law.
abstract_zh: 在不到一年的时间里，欧盟委员会就平台治理推出了一些迄今为止最重要的监管提案。委员会此类跨部门监管的目标包括保护市场和民主国家。尽管所有这些法案都提出了建立新的执法机构和程序的复杂规则，但有一个方面仍然非常不清楚：数字执法在实践中将如何实际进行。本讨论文件重点关注《数字服务法》(DSA)，批判性地讨论了出于数字执行目的而访问社交媒体数据的问题，并建议使用法律合规性应用程序编程接口 (API) 作为促进遵守 DSA 以及补充性欧洲和国家法规的手段。为了将这一讨论置于背景下，本文探讨了两种场景，以例证内容货币化对社交媒体用户中特别脆弱的一类人（即儿童）造成的危害。这两个场景用于进一步反思围绕数据访问和 DSA 法律合规性以及劳动和消费者法领域进一步适用的法律标准的基本问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过法律合规API来实现实现欧盟《数字服务法》（DSA）对社交媒体平台的执法，解决数字执法中数据访问的实践难题。
AI.motivation: 欧盟《数字服务法》等监管框架缺乏明确的数字执法操作路径，尤其在保护弱势群体（如儿童）免受内容变现危害方面存在数据访问和合规挑战。
AI.method: 通过构建两个涉及儿童内容变现危害的场景，分析数据访问与法律合规的核心问题，并提出法律合规API作为解决方案。
AI.result: 提出法律合规API的设计框架，用以协调DSA及劳动法、消费者法等领域的合规要求，明确执法机构与平台间的数据交互机制。
AI.conclusion: 法律合规API可作为DSA执法的技术基础设施，平衡监管效率与用户隐私，需在立法层面明确其法律地位与技术标准。

Focusing on the Digital Services Act (DSA), this discussion paper critically addresses issues around social media data access for the purpose of digital enforcement and proposes the use of a legal compliance application programming interface (API) as a means to facilitate compliance with the DSA and complementary European and national regulation. To contextualize this discussion, the paper pursues two scenarios that exemplify the harms arising out of content monetization affecting a particularly vulnerable category of social media users: children. The two scenarios are used to further reflect upon essential issues surrounding data access and legal compliance with the DSA and further applicable legal standards in the field of labour and consumer law. 在不到一年的时间里，欧盟委员会就平台治理推出了一些迄今为止最重要的监管提案。委员会此类跨部门监管的目标包括保护市场和民主国家。尽管所有这些法案都提出了建立新的执法机构和程序的复杂规则，但有一个方面仍然非常不清楚：数字执法在实践中将如何实际进行。本讨论文件重点关注《数字服务法》(DSA)，批判性地讨论了出于数字执行目的而访问社交媒体数据的问题，并建议使用法律合规性应用程序编程接口 (API) 作为促进遵守 DSA 以及补充性欧洲和国家法规的手段。为了将这一讨论置于背景下，本文探讨了两种场景，以例证内容货币化对社交媒体用户中特别脆弱的一类人（即儿童）造成的危害。这两个场景用于进一步反思围绕数据访问和 DSA 法律合规性以及劳动和消费者法领域进一步适用的法律标准的基本问题。 本文提出通过法律合规API来实现实现欧盟《数字服务法》（DSA）对社交媒体平台的执法，解决数字执法中数据访问的实践难题。 Catalina Goanta,Thales Bertaglia,Adriana Iamnitchi cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Soumyajit Mitra,Swayambhu Nath Ray,Bharat Padi,Arunasish Sen,Raghavendra Bilgi,Harish Arsikere,Shalini Ghosh,Ajay Srinivasamurthy,Sri Garimella
title: Unified Modeling of Multi-Domain Multi-Device ASR Systems
title_zh: 多域多设备ASR系统的统一建模
comment: We will update the paper completely with our latest experiments and analysis
comments: We will update the paper completely with our latest experiments and analysis
abstract: Modern Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems often use a portfolio of domain-specific models in order to get high accuracy for distinct user utterance types across different devices. In this paper, we propose an innovative approach that integrates the different per-domain per-device models into a unified model, using a combination of domain embedding, domain experts, mixture of experts and adversarial training. We run careful ablation studies to show the benefit of each of these innovations in contributing to the accuracy of the overall unified model. Experiments show that our proposed unified modeling approach actually outperforms the carefully tuned per-domain models, giving relative gains of up to 10% over a baseline model with negligible increase in the number of parameters.
summary: Modern Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems often use a portfolio of domain-specific models in order to get high accuracy for distinct user utterance types across different devices. In this paper, we propose an innovative approach that integrates the different per-domain per-device models into a unified model, using a combination of domain embedding, domain experts, mixture of experts and adversarial training. We run careful ablation studies to show the benefit of each of these innovations in contributing to the accuracy of the overall unified model. Experiments show that our proposed unified modeling approach actually outperforms the carefully tuned per-domain models, giving relative gains of up to 10% over a baseline model with negligible increase in the number of parameters.
abstract_zh: 现代自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统通常使用特定领域模型的组合，以便在不同设备上获得不同用户话语类型的高精度。在本文中，我们提出了一种创新方法，结合使用域嵌入、领域专家、专家混合和对抗训练，将不同的每域每设备模型集成到一个统一的模型中。我们进行了仔细的消融研究，以展示每项创新在提高整体统一模型准确性方面的好处。实验表明，我们提出的统一建模方法实际上优于精心调整的每个域模型，与基线模型相比，相对增益高达 10%，而参数数量的增加可以忽略不计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一多领域多设备自动语音识别（ASR）系统的建模方法，通过整合不同领域和设备的模型以提高准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有ASR系统需依赖多个领域特定模型以适应不同设备和语音类型，导致模型复杂度高且管理困难，亟需一种高效统一的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合领域嵌入、领域专家模块、专家混合（MoE）架构及对抗训练，将多领域多设备模型整合为统一架构，并通过消融实验验证各模块贡献。
AI.result: 统一模型在保持参数量几乎不变的情况下，相对基线模型提升了最高10%的准确率，优于单独优化的领域模型。
AI.conclusion: 统一建模方法能有效提升多领域多设备ASR性能，为资源高效利用和模型管理提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Antonis Maronikolakis,Philip Baader,Hinrich Schütze
title: Analyzing Hate Speech Data along Racial, Gender and Intersectional Axes
title_zh: 沿着种族、性别和交叉轴分析仇恨言论数据
comment: Accepted at "4th Workshop on Gender Bias in Natural Language Processing", NAACL 2022
comments: Accepted at "4th Workshop on Gender Bias in Natural Language Processing", NAACL 2022
abstract: To tackle the rising phenomenon of hate speech, efforts have been made towards data curation and analysis. When it comes to analysis of bias, previous work has focused predominantly on race. In our work, we further investigate bias in hate speech datasets along racial, gender and intersectional axes. We identify strong bias against African American English (AAE), masculine and AAE+Masculine tweets, which are annotated as disproportionately more hateful and offensive than from other demographics. We provide evidence that BERT-based models propagate this bias and show that balancing the training data for these protected attributes can lead to fairer models with regards to gender, but not race.
summary: To tackle the rising phenomenon of hate speech, efforts have been made towards data curation and analysis. When it comes to analysis of bias, previous work has focused predominantly on race. In our work, we further investigate bias in hate speech datasets along racial, gender and intersectional axes. We identify strong bias against African American English (AAE), masculine and AAE+Masculine tweets, which are annotated as disproportionately more hateful and offensive than from other demographics. We provide evidence that BERT-based models propagate this bias and show that balancing the training data for these protected attributes can lead to fairer models with regards to gender, but not race.
abstract_zh: 为了应对日益严重的仇恨言论现象，我们在数据整理和分析方面做出了努力。在分析偏见时，之前的工作主要集中在种族上。在我们的工作中，我们沿着种族、性别和交叉轴进一步调查仇恨言论数据集中的偏见。我们发现对非裔美式英语 (AAE)、男性和 AAE+男性推文存在强烈偏见，这些推文被注释为比其他人口统计数据更具仇恨性和攻击性。我们提供的证据表明，基于 BERT 的模型会传播这种偏见，并表明平衡这些受保护属性的训练数据可以产生在性别方面更公平的模型，但在种族方面则不然。

AI.tldr: 本文分析仇恨言论数据在种族、性别及交叉维度上的偏见，发现对非裔美国人英语（AAE）、男性及交叉群体存在显著标注偏差，并验证BERT模型会传播此类偏见。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注种族偏见，缺乏对性别及交叉维度的系统分析，需进一步揭示多维度偏见对模型公平性的影响。
AI.method: 通过分析数据集中的标注分布，结合BERT模型验证偏见传播，并采用平衡训练数据的方法测试公平性改进效果。
AI.result: 发现AAE、男性及交叉群体被过度标注为仇恨言论，BERT模型继承该偏见，平衡数据可提升性别公平性但无法改善种族偏见。
AI.conclusion: 需关注交叉维度偏见，平衡数据有助于缓解性别歧视，但种族公平性问题仍需更深入研究与技术优化。

authors_text: Tobias Domhan,Eva Hasler,Ke Tran,Sony Trenous,Bill Byrne,Felix Hieber
title: The Devil is in the Details: On the Pitfalls of Vocabulary Selection in Neural Machine Translation
title_zh: 细节决定成败：论神经机器翻译中词汇选择的陷阱
comment: NAACL 2022
comments: NAACL 2022
abstract: Vocabulary selection, or lexical shortlisting, is a well-known technique to improve latency of Neural Machine Translation models by constraining the set of allowed output words during inference. The chosen set is typically determined by separately trained alignment model parameters, independent of the source-sentence context at inference time. While vocabulary selection appears competitive with respect to automatic quality metrics in prior work, we show that it can fail to select the right set of output words, particularly for semantically non-compositional linguistic phenomena such as idiomatic expressions, leading to reduced translation quality as perceived by humans. Trading off latency for quality by increasing the size of the allowed set is often not an option in real-world scenarios. We propose a model of vocabulary selection, integrated into the neural translation model, that predicts the set of allowed output words from contextualized encoder representations. This restores translation quality of an unconstrained system, as measured by human evaluations on WMT newstest2020 and idiomatic expressions, at an inference latency competitive with alignment-based selection using aggressive thresholds, thereby removing the dependency on separately trained alignment models.
summary: Vocabulary selection, or lexical shortlisting, is a well-known technique to improve latency of Neural Machine Translation models by constraining the set of allowed output words during inference. The chosen set is typically determined by separately trained alignment model parameters, independent of the source-sentence context at inference time. While vocabulary selection appears competitive with respect to automatic quality metrics in prior work, we show that it can fail to select the right set of output words, particularly for semantically non-compositional linguistic phenomena such as idiomatic expressions, leading to reduced translation quality as perceived by humans. Trading off latency for quality by increasing the size of the allowed set is often not an option in real-world scenarios. We propose a model of vocabulary selection, integrated into the neural translation model, that predicts the set of allowed output words from contextualized encoder representations. This restores translation quality of an unconstrained system, as measured by human evaluations on WMT newstest2020 and idiomatic expressions, at an inference latency competitive with alignment-based selection using aggressive thresholds, thereby removing the dependency on separately trained alignment models.
abstract_zh: 词汇选择或词汇入围是一种众所周知的技术，它通过在推理过程中限制允许的输出单词集来改善神经机器翻译模型的延迟。所选择的集合通常由单独训练的对齐模型参数确定，独立于推理时的源句上下文。虽然词汇选择在之前的工作中与自动质量指标相比似乎具有竞争力，但我们表明它可能无法选择正确的输出单词集，特别是对于语义上的非组合语言现象（例如惯用表达），导致人类感知的翻译质量降低。在现实场景中，通过增加允许集的大小来权衡延迟以换取质量通常不是一种选择。我们提出了一种词汇选择模型，集成到神经翻译模型中，该模型可以根据上下文编码器表示来预测允许的输出单词集。这恢复了无约束系统的翻译质量（通过对 WMT newstest2020 和惯用表达的人工评估来衡量），其推理延迟与使用激进阈值的基于对齐的选择相媲美，从而消除了对单独训练的对齐模型的依赖。

AI.tldr: 本文研究神经机器翻译中词汇选择方法的缺陷，并提出一种基于上下文的词汇选择模型以提升翻译质量。
AI.motivation: 传统词汇选择方法依赖独立训练的对齐模型，无法适应语义非组合性现象（如习语），导致人类感知的翻译质量下降。
AI.method: 将词汇选择模块集成到神经翻译模型中，利用上下文编码器表示动态预测允许的输出词汇集。
AI.result: 在WMT newstest2020和习语数据集上的人类评估显示，该方法在保持推理延迟竞争力的同时恢复了无约束系统的翻译质量。
AI.conclusion: 上下文感知的词汇选择模型能有效解决传统方法的局限性，在质量和延迟间实现更优平衡。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究神经机器翻译中词汇选择方法的缺陷，并提出一种基于上下文的词汇选择模型以提升翻译质量。
ai_content.motivation: 传统词汇选择方法依赖独立训练的对齐模型，无法适应语义非组合性现象（如习语），导致人类感知的翻译质量下降。
ai_content.method: 将词汇选择模块集成到神经翻译模型中，利用上下文编码器表示动态预测允许的输出词汇集。

search_text: The Devil is in the Details: On the Pitfalls of Vocabulary Selection in Neural Machine Translation 细节决定成败：论神经机器翻译中词汇选择的陷阱 Vocabulary selection, or lexical shortlisting, is a well-known technique to improve latency of Neural Machine Translation models by constraining the set of allowed output words during inference. The chosen set is typically determined by separately trained alignment model parameters, independent of the source-sentence context at inference time. While vocabulary selection appears competitive with respect to automatic quality metrics in prior work, we show that it can fail to select the right set of output words, particularly for semantically non-compositional linguistic phenomena such as idiomatic expressions, leading to reduced translation quality as perceived by humans. Trading off latency for quality by increasing the size of the allowed set is often not an option in real-world scenarios. We propose a model of vocabulary selection, integrated into the neural translation model, that predicts the set of allowed output words from contextualized encoder representations. This restores translation quality of an unconstrained system, as measured by human evaluations on WMT newstest2020 and idiomatic expressions, at an inference latency competitive with alignment-based selection using aggressive thresholds, thereby removing the dependency on separately trained alignment models. 词汇选择或词汇入围是一种众所周知的技术，它通过在推理过程中限制允许的输出单词集来改善神经机器翻译模型的延迟。所选择的集合通常由单独训练的对齐模型参数确定，独立于推理时的源句上下文。虽然词汇选择在之前的工作中与自动质量指标相比似乎具有竞争力，但我们表明它可能无法选择正确的输出单词集，特别是对于语义上的非组合语言现象（例如惯用表达），导致人类感知的翻译质量降低。在现实场景中，通过增加允许集的大小来权衡延迟以换取质量通常不是一种选择。我们提出了一种词汇选择模型，集成到神经翻译模型中，该模型可以根据上下文编码器表示来预测允许的输出单词集。这恢复了无约束系统的翻译质量（通过对 WMT newstest2020 和惯用表达的人工评估来衡量），其推理延迟与使用激进阈值的基于对齐的选择相媲美，从而消除了对单独训练的对齐模型的依赖。 本文研究神经机器翻译中词汇选择方法的缺陷，并提出一种基于上下文的词汇选择模型以提升翻译质量。 Tobias Domhan,Eva Hasler,Ke Tran,Sony Trenous,Bill Byrne,Felix Hieber cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Gunhee Lee,Jonghwa Yim,Chanran Kim,Minjae Kim
title: StyLandGAN: A StyleGAN based Landscape Image Synthesis using Depth-map
title_zh: StyLandGAN：使用深度图的基于 StyleGAN 的景观图像合成
comment: AI for Content Creation Workshop, CVPR 2022
comments: AI for Content Creation Workshop, CVPR 2022
abstract: Despite recent success in conditional image synthesis, prevalent input conditions such as semantics and edges are not clear enough to express `Linear (Ridges)' and `Planar (Scale)' representations. To address this problem, we propose a novel framework StyLandGAN, which synthesizes desired landscape images using a depth map which has higher expressive power. Our StyleLandGAN is extended from the unconditional generation model to accept input conditions. We also propose a '2-phase inference' pipeline which generates diverse depth maps and shifts local parts so that it can easily reflect user's intend. As a comparison, we modified the existing semantic image synthesis models to accept a depth map as well. Experimental results show that our method is superior to existing methods in quality, diversity, and depth-accuracy.
summary: Despite recent success in conditional image synthesis, prevalent input conditions such as semantics and edges are not clear enough to express `Linear (Ridges)' and `Planar (Scale)' representations. To address this problem, we propose a novel framework StyLandGAN, which synthesizes desired landscape images using a depth map which has higher expressive power. Our StyleLandGAN is extended from the unconditional generation model to accept input conditions. We also propose a '2-phase inference' pipeline which generates diverse depth maps and shifts local parts so that it can easily reflect user's intend. As a comparison, we modified the existing semantic image synthesis models to accept a depth map as well. Experimental results show that our method is superior to existing methods in quality, diversity, and depth-accuracy.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近在条件图像合成方面取得了成功，但普遍的输入条件（例如语义和边缘）还不够清晰，无法表达“线性（脊）”和“平面（比例）”表示。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的框架 StyLandGAN，它使用具有更高表达能力的深度图合成所需的景观图像。我们的 StyleLandGAN 从无条件生成模型扩展到接受输入条件。我们还提出了一个“两阶段推理”管道，它生成不同的深度图并移动局部部分，以便它可以轻松反映用户的意图。作为比较，我们修改了现有的语义图像合成模型以接受深度图。实验结果表明，我们的方法在质量、多样性和深度精度方面优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于StyleGAN的景观图像生成框架StyLandGAN，通过深度图作为条件输入，解决传统语义和边缘条件表达不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有条件图像合成方法中，语义和边缘等输入条件无法清晰表达景观的线性（脊线）和平面（比例）特征，需更精确的深度图条件输入。
AI.method: 扩展StyleGAN接受深度图作为条件输入，设计两阶段推理流程生成多样化深度图并调整局部结构，同时改进现有语义合成模型以兼容深度图输入。
AI.result: 实验表明StyLandGAN在图像质量、生成多样性及深度图准确性方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度图条件输入和两阶段推理机制，StyLandGAN有效提升了景观图像合成的精度与表现力。

authors_text: Yu Lin,Zhecheng An,Peihao Wu,Zejun Ma
title: Improving Contextual Representation with Gloss Regularized Pre-training
title_zh: 通过光泽正则化预训练改善上下文表示
comment: Accepted to Findings of NAACL 2022
comments: Accepted to Findings of NAACL 2022
abstract: Though achieving impressive results on many NLP tasks, the BERT-like masked language models (MLM) encounter the discrepancy between pre-training and inference. In light of this gap, we investigate the contextual representation of pre-training and inference from the perspective of word probability distribution. We discover that BERT risks neglecting the contextual word similarity in pre-training. To tackle this issue, we propose an auxiliary gloss regularizer module to BERT pre-training (GR-BERT), to enhance word semantic similarity. By predicting masked words and aligning contextual embeddings to corresponding glosses simultaneously, the word similarity can be explicitly modeled. We design two architectures for GR-BERT and evaluate our model in downstream tasks. Experimental results show that the gloss regularizer benefits BERT in word-level and sentence-level semantic representation. The GR-BERT achieves new state-of-the-art in lexical substitution task and greatly promotes BERT sentence representation in both unsupervised and supervised STS tasks.
summary: Though achieving impressive results on many NLP tasks, the BERT-like masked language models (MLM) encounter the discrepancy between pre-training and inference. In light of this gap, we investigate the contextual representation of pre-training and inference from the perspective of word probability distribution. We discover that BERT risks neglecting the contextual word similarity in pre-training. To tackle this issue, we propose an auxiliary gloss regularizer module to BERT pre-training (GR-BERT), to enhance word semantic similarity. By predicting masked words and aligning contextual embeddings to corresponding glosses simultaneously, the word similarity can be explicitly modeled. We design two architectures for GR-BERT and evaluate our model in downstream tasks. Experimental results show that the gloss regularizer benefits BERT in word-level and sentence-level semantic representation. The GR-BERT achieves new state-of-the-art in lexical substitution task and greatly promotes BERT sentence representation in both unsupervised and supervised STS tasks.
abstract_zh: 尽管在许多 NLP 任务上取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但类似 ​​BERT 的掩码语言模型（MLM）遇到了预训练和推理之间的差异。鉴于这一差距，我们从单词概率分布的角度研究了预训练和推理的上下文表示。我们发现 BERT 存在忽视预训练中上下文单词相似度的风险。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个用于 BERT 预训练的辅助光泽正则化模块（GR-BERT），以增强单词语义相似度。通过预测屏蔽词并同时将上下文嵌入与相应的注释对齐，可以显式地对单词相似度进行建模。我们为 GR-BERT 设计了两种架构，并在下游任务中评估我们的模型。实验结果表明，注释正则化器在词级和句子级语义表示方面有利于 BERT。 GR-BERT 在词汇替换任务中实现了新的最先进水平，并极大地促进了 BERT 在无监督和监督 STS 任务中的句子表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GR-BERT模型，通过词义正则化预训练改进上下文表示，解决BERT在预训练与推理阶段的差异问题。
AI.motivation: BERT等模型在预训练阶段可能忽视上下文词相似性，导致预训练与推理阶段的表示差异，影响语义理解效果。
AI.method: 提出GR-BERT模型，引入词义正则化模块，通过同时预测掩码词并对其上下文嵌入与对应词义对齐，显式建模词语义相似性，设计两种架构进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明GR-BERT在词级和句级语义表示上优于基线模型，在词替换任务和STS任务中达到新SOTA，显著提升BERT的句表示能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过词义正则化预训练，GR-BERT有效提升了BERT的上下文表示能力，在多项任务中表现优异，验证了显式建模词语义相似性的有效性。

The GR-BERT achieves new state-of-the-art in lexical substitution task and greatly promotes BERT sentence representation in both unsupervised and supervised STS tasks. 尽管在许多 NLP 任务上取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但类似 ​​BERT 的掩码语言模型（MLM）遇到了预训练和推理之间的差异。鉴于这一差距，我们从单词概率分布的角度研究了预训练和推理的上下文表示。我们发现 BERT 存在忽视预训练中上下文单词相似度的风险。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个用于 BERT 预训练的辅助光泽正则化模块（GR-BERT），以增强单词语义相似度。通过预测屏蔽词并同时将上下文嵌入与相应的注释对齐，可以显式地对单词相似度进行建模。我们为 GR-BERT 设计了两种架构，并在下游任务中评估我们的模型。实验结果表明，注释正则化器在词级和句子级语义表示方面有利于 BERT。 GR-BERT 在词汇替换任务中实现了新的最先进水平，并极大地促进了 BERT 在无监督和监督 STS 任务中的句子表示。 本文提出GR-BERT模型，通过词义正则化预训练改进上下文表示，解决BERT在预训练与推理阶段的差异问题。 Yu Lin,Zhecheng An,Peihao Wu,Zejun Ma cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jenny Schmalfuss,Erik Scheurer,Heng Zhao,Nikolaos Karantzas,Andrés Bruhn,Demetrio Labate
title: Blind Image Inpainting with Sparse Directional Filter Dictionaries for Lightweight CNNs
title_zh: 使用稀疏定向滤波器字典进行轻量级 CNN 的盲图像修复
abstract: Blind inpainting algorithms based on deep learning architectures have shown a remarkable performance in recent years, typically outperforming model-based methods both in terms of image quality and run time. However, neural network strategies typically lack a theoretical explanation, which contrasts with the well-understood theory underlying model-based methods. In this work, we leverage the advantages of both approaches by integrating theoretically founded concepts from transform domain methods and sparse approximations into a CNN-based approach for blind image inpainting. To this end, we present a novel strategy to learn convolutional kernels that applies a specifically designed filter dictionary whose elements are linearly combined with trainable weights. Numerical experiments demonstrate the competitiveness of this approach. Our results show not only an improved inpainting quality compared to conventional CNNs but also significantly faster network convergence within a lightweight network design.
summary: Blind inpainting algorithms based on deep learning architectures have shown a remarkable performance in recent years, typically outperforming model-based methods both in terms of image quality and run time. However, neural network strategies typically lack a theoretical explanation, which contrasts with the well-understood theory underlying model-based methods. In this work, we leverage the advantages of both approaches by integrating theoretically founded concepts from transform domain methods and sparse approximations into a CNN-based approach for blind image inpainting. To this end, we present a novel strategy to learn convolutional kernels that applies a specifically designed filter dictionary whose elements are linearly combined with trainable weights. Numerical experiments demonstrate the competitiveness of this approach. Our results show not only an improved inpainting quality compared to conventional CNNs but also significantly faster network convergence within a lightweight network design.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于深度学习架构的盲修复算法表现出了卓越的性能，在图像质量和运行时间方面通常优于基于模型的方法。然而，神经网络策略通常缺乏理论解释，这与基于模型的方法背后众所周知的理论形成鲜明对比。在这项工作中，我们利用两种方法的优势，将变换域方法和稀疏近似的理论概念整合到基于 CNN 的盲图像修复方法中。为此，我们提出了一种学习卷积核的新颖策略，该策略应用专门设计的滤波器字典，其元素与可训练权重线性组合。数值实验证明了该方法的竞争力。我们的结果表明，与传统 CNN 相比，修复质量不仅得到了提高，而且轻量级网络设计中的网络收敛速度也显着加快。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合稀疏方向滤波字典的轻量级CNN盲图像修复方法。
AI.motivation: 深度学习盲修复算法虽性能优异但缺乏理论支撑，而传统模型方法理论完善但效率较低，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 设计可学习卷积核的滤波字典，通过线性组合可训练权重集成稀疏近似与变换域理论至CNN框架。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在图像修复质量及轻量网络收敛速度上均优于传统CNN。
AI.conclusion: 本方法有效结合理论模型与深度学习优势，为盲图像修复提供高效可行的新方案。

authors_text: Miroslav Štrupl,Francesco Faccio,Dylan R. Ashley,Jürgen Schmidhuber,Rupesh Kumar Srivastava
title: Upside-Down Reinforcement Learning Can Diverge in Stochastic Environments With Episodic Resets
title_zh: 颠倒强化学习在具有情景重置的随机环境中可能会出现分歧
comment: presented at the 5th Multidisciplinary Conference on Reinforcement Learning and Decision Making; 5 pages in main text + 1 page of references + 3 pages of appendices, 1 figure in main text; source code available at https://github.com/struplm/UDRL-GCSL-counterexample.git
comments: presented at the 5th Multidisciplinary Conference on Reinforcement Learning and Decision Making; 5 pages in main text + 1 page of references + 3 pages of appendices, 1 figure in main text; source code available at https://github.com/struplm/UDRL-GCSL-counterexample.git
abstract: Upside-Down Reinforcement Learning (UDRL) is an approach for solving RL problems that does not require value functions and uses only supervised learning, where the targets for given inputs in a dataset do not change over time. Ghosh et al. proved that Goal-Conditional Supervised Learning (GCSL) -- which can be viewed as a simplified version of UDRL -- optimizes a lower bound on goal-reaching performance. This raises expectations that such algorithms may enjoy guaranteed convergence to the optimal policy in arbitrary environments, similar to certain well-known traditional RL algorithms. Here we show that for a specific episodic UDRL algorithm (eUDRL, including GCSL), this is not the case, and give the causes of this limitation. To do so, we first introduce a helpful rewrite of eUDRL as a recursive policy update. This formulation helps to disprove its convergence to the optimal policy for a wide class of stochastic environments. Finally, we provide a concrete example of a very simple environment where eUDRL diverges. Since the primary aim of this paper is to present a negative result, and the best counterexamples are the simplest ones, we restrict all discussions to finite (discrete) environments, ignoring issues of function approximation and limited sample size.
summary: Upside-Down Reinforcement Learning (UDRL) is an approach for solving RL problems that does not require value functions and uses only supervised learning, where the targets for given inputs in a dataset do not change over time. Ghosh et al. proved that Goal-Conditional Supervised Learning (GCSL) -- which can be viewed as a simplified version of UDRL -- optimizes a lower bound on goal-reaching performance. This raises expectations that such algorithms may enjoy guaranteed convergence to the optimal policy in arbitrary environments, similar to certain well-known traditional RL algorithms. Here we show that for a specific episodic UDRL algorithm (eUDRL, including GCSL), this is not the case, and give the causes of this limitation. To do so, we first introduce a helpful rewrite of eUDRL as a recursive policy update. This formulation helps to disprove its convergence to the optimal policy for a wide class of stochastic environments. Finally, we provide a concrete example of a very simple environment where eUDRL diverges. Since the primary aim of this paper is to present a negative result, and the best counterexamples are the simplest ones, we restrict all discussions to finite (discrete) environments, ignoring issues of function approximation and limited sample size.
abstract_zh: 颠倒强化学习 (UDRL) 是一种解决 RL 问题的方法，它不需要值函数，并且仅使用监督学习，其中数据集中给定输入的目标不会随时间变化。戈什等人。证明目标条件监督学习 (GCSL)——可以被视为 UDRL 的简化版本——优化了目标达成性能的下限。这引发了人们的期望，即此类算法可以在任意环境中保证收敛到最优策略，类似于某些众所周知的传统强化学习算法。在这里我们表明，对于特定的情景 UDRL 算法（eUDRL，包括 GCSL），情况并非如此，并给出了这种限制的原因。为此，我们首先引入对 eUDRL 的有用重写作为递归策略更新。这种表述有助于反驳其对各种随机环境的最优策略的收敛性。最后，我们提供了一个非常简单的环境的具体示例，其中 eUDRL 有所不同。由于本文的主要目的是提出否定结果，而最好的反例是最简单的，因此我们将所有讨论限制在有限（离散）环境中，忽略函数逼近和有限样本大小的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了倒置强化学习（UDRL）在具有情节重置的随机环境中可能发散的问题，通过理论分析和实例验证揭示其收敛性限制。
AI.motivation: 尽管UDRL被证明在目标达成性能上有下界优化，但其是否能在任意环境中收敛到最优策略尚不明确，需进一步验证其理论保证。
AI.method: 将eUDRL重写为递归策略更新形式，分析其收敛性，并构造一个简单离散环境作为反例进行实证。
AI.result: 证明eUDRL在广泛随机环境中无法收敛到最优策略，并通过具体实例展示其发散现象。
AI.conclusion: UDRL在随机环境与情节重置场景下存在收敛性缺陷，需对其理论前提和适用范围进行重新评估。

authors_text: Kaixuan Chen,Shunyu Liu,Na Yu,Rong Yan,Quan Zhang,Jie Song,Zunlei Feng,Mingli Song
title: Distribution-Aware Graph Representation Learning for Transient Stability Assessment of Power System
title_zh: 电力系统暂态稳定评估的分布感知图表示学习
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables
abstract: The real-time transient stability assessment (TSA) plays a critical role in the secure operation of the power system. Although the classic numerical integration method, \textit{i.e.} time-domain simulation (TDS), has been widely used in industry practice, it is inevitably trapped in a high computational complexity due to the high latitude sophistication of the power system. In this work, a data-driven power system estimation method is proposed to quickly predict the stability of the power system before TDS reaches the end of simulating time windows, which can reduce the average simulation time of stability assessment without loss of accuracy. As the topology of the power system is in the form of graph structure, graph neural network based representation learning is naturally suitable for learning the status of the power system. Motivated by observing the distribution information of crucial active power and reactive power on the power system's bus nodes, we thus propose a distribution-aware learning~(DAL) module to explore an informative graph representation vector for describing the status of a power system. Then, TSA is re-defined as a binary classification task, and the stability of the system is determined directly from the resulting graph representation without numerical integration. Finally, we apply our method to the online TSA task. The case studies on the IEEE 39-bus system and Polish 2383-bus system demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: The real-time transient stability assessment (TSA) plays a critical role in the secure operation of the power system. Although the classic numerical integration method, \textit{i.e.} time-domain simulation (TDS), has been widely used in industry practice, it is inevitably trapped in a high computational complexity due to the high latitude sophistication of the power system. In this work, a data-driven power system estimation method is proposed to quickly predict the stability of the power system before TDS reaches the end of simulating time windows, which can reduce the average simulation time of stability assessment without loss of accuracy. As the topology of the power system is in the form of graph structure, graph neural network based representation learning is naturally suitable for learning the status of the power system. Motivated by observing the distribution information of crucial active power and reactive power on the power system's bus nodes, we thus propose a distribution-aware learning~(DAL) module to explore an informative graph representation vector for describing the status of a power system. Then, TSA is re-defined as a binary classification task, and the stability of the system is determined directly from the resulting graph representation without numerical integration. Finally, we apply our method to the online TSA task. The case studies on the IEEE 39-bus system and Polish 2383-bus system demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 实时暂态稳定评估（TSA）对于电力系统的安全运行起着至关重要的作用。尽管经典的数值积分方法，即时域仿真（TDS）已在工业实践中得到广泛应用，但由于电力系统的高纬度复杂性，不可避免地陷入计算复杂度较高的困境。在这项工作中，提出了一种数据驱动的电力系统估计方法，可以在TDS到达仿真时间窗口结束之前快速预测电力系统的稳定性，这可以在不损失准确性的情况下减少稳定性评估的平均仿真时间。由于电力系统的拓扑是图结构的形式，基于图神经网络的表示学习自然适合学习电力系统的状态。通过观察电力系统总线节点上关键有功功率和无功功率的分布信息，我们提出了一种分布感知学习（DAL）模块来探索用于描述电力系统状态的信息图表示向量。然后，TSA 被重新定义为二元分类任务，系统的稳定性直接从结果图表示中确定，无需数值积分。最后，我们将我们的方法应用于在线 TSA 任务。对 IEEE 39 总线系统和波兰 2383 总线系统的案例研究证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图神经网络的分布感知表示学习方法，用于提高电力系统暂态稳定评估的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统时域仿真方法计算复杂度高，难以满足电力系统实时稳定评估需求。
AI.method: 设计分布感知学习模块（DAL），通过图神经网络捕捉节点功率分布特征，将暂态稳定评估转化为二分类任务。
AI.result: 在IEEE 39节点和波兰2383节点系统测试中验证了方法有效性，显著降低仿真时间且保持精度。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过图表示学习实现快速稳定评估，在保证准确性的同时提升计算效率。

search_text: Distribution-Aware Graph Representation Learning for Transient Stability Assessment of Power System 电力系统暂态稳定评估的分布感知图表示学习 The real-time transient stability assessment (TSA) plays a critical role in the secure operation of the power system. Although the classic numerical integration method, \textit{i.e.} time-domain simulation (TDS), has been widely used in industry practice, it is inevitably trapped in a high computational complexity due to the high latitude sophistication of the power system. In this work, a data-driven power system estimation method is proposed to quickly predict the stability of the power system before TDS reaches the end of simulating time windows, which can reduce the average simulation time of stability assessment without loss of accuracy. As the topology of the power system is in the form of graph structure, graph neural network based representation learning is naturally suitable for learning the status of the power system. Motivated by observing the distribution information of crucial active power and reactive power on the power system's bus nodes, we thus propose a distribution-aware learning~(DAL) module to explore an informative graph representation vector for describing the status of a power system. Then, TSA is re-defined as a binary classification task, and the stability of the system is determined directly from the resulting graph representation without numerical integration. Finally, we apply our method to the online TSA task. The case studies on the IEEE 39-bus system and Polish 2383-bus system demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method. 实时暂态稳定评估（TSA）对于电力系统的安全运行起着至关重要的作用。尽管经典的数值积分方法，即时域仿真（TDS）已在工业实践中得到广泛应用，但由于电力系统的高纬度复杂性，不可避免地陷入计算复杂度较高的困境。在这项工作中，提出了一种数据驱动的电力系统估计方法，可以在TDS到达仿真时间窗口结束之前快速预测电力系统的稳定性，这可以在不损失准确性的情况下减少稳定性评估的平均仿真时间。由于电力系统的拓扑是图结构的形式，基于图神经网络的表示学习自然适合学习电力系统的状态。通过观察电力系统总线节点上关键有功功率和无功功率的分布信息，我们提出了一种分布感知学习（DAL）模块来探索用于描述电力系统状态的信息图表示向量。然后，TSA 被重新定义为二元分类任务，系统的稳定性直接从结果图表示中确定，无需数值积分。最后，我们将我们的方法应用于在线 TSA 任务。对 IEEE 39 总线系统和波兰 2383 总线系统的案例研究证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于图神经网络的分布感知表示学习方法，用于提高电力系统暂态稳定评估的效率。 Kaixuan Chen,Shunyu Liu,Na Yu,Rong Yan,Quan Zhang,Jie Song,Zunlei Feng,Mingli Song eess.SY,cs.AI

authors_text: Longquan Jiang,Ricardo Usbeck
title: Knowledge Graph Question Answering Datasets and Their Generalizability: Are They Enough for Future Research?
title_zh: 知识图问答数据集及其普遍性：它们足以用于未来的研究吗？
comment: Accepted by SIGIR '22 (Resource Track)
comments: Accepted by SIGIR '22 (Resource Track)
abstract: Existing approaches on Question Answering over Knowledge Graphs (KGQA) have weak generalizability. That is often due to the standard i.i.d. assumption on the underlying dataset. Recently, three levels of generalization for KGQA were defined, namely i.i.d., compositional, zero-shot. We analyze 25 well-known KGQA datasets for 5 different Knowledge Graphs (KGs). We show that according to this definition many existing and online available KGQA datasets are either not suited to train a generalizable KGQA system or that the datasets are based on discontinued and out-dated KGs. Generating new datasets is a costly process and, thus, is not an alternative to smaller research groups and companies. In this work, we propose a mitigation method for re-splitting available KGQA datasets to enable their applicability to evaluate generalization, without any cost and manual effort. We test our hypothesis on three KGQA datasets, i.e., LC-QuAD, LC-QuAD 2.0 and QALD-9). Experiments on re-splitted KGQA datasets demonstrate its effectiveness towards generalizability. The code and a unified way to access 18 available datasets is online at https://github.com/semantic-systems/KGQA-datasets as well as https://github.com/semantic-systems/KGQA-datasets-generalization.
summary: Existing approaches on Question Answering over Knowledge Graphs (KGQA) have weak generalizability. That is often due to the standard i.i.d. assumption on the underlying dataset. Recently, three levels of generalization for KGQA were defined, namely i.i.d., compositional, zero-shot. We analyze 25 well-known KGQA datasets for 5 different Knowledge Graphs (KGs). We show that according to this definition many existing and online available KGQA datasets are either not suited to train a generalizable KGQA system or that the datasets are based on discontinued and out-dated KGs. Generating new datasets is a costly process and, thus, is not an alternative to smaller research groups and companies. In this work, we propose a mitigation method for re-splitting available KGQA datasets to enable their applicability to evaluate generalization, without any cost and manual effort. We test our hypothesis on three KGQA datasets, i.e., LC-QuAD, LC-QuAD 2.0 and QALD-9). Experiments on re-splitted KGQA datasets demonstrate its effectiveness towards generalizability. The code and a unified way to access 18 available datasets is online at https://github.com/semantic-systems/KGQA-datasets as well as https://github.com/semantic-systems/KGQA-datasets-generalization.
abstract_zh: 现有的知识图问答（KGQA）方法的通用性较弱。这通常是由于标准 i.i.d.对基础数据集的假设。最近，定义了 KGQA 的三个泛化级别，即 i.i.d.、compositional、zero-shot。我们分析了 5 个不同知识图谱 (KG) 的 25 个著名 KGQA 数据集。我们表明，根据这个定义，许多现有的和在线可用的 KGQA 数据集要么不适合训练可推广的 KGQA 系统，要么这些数据集基于已停止和过时的 KG。生成新数据集是一个成本高昂的过程，因此不能替代较小的研究团体和公司。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种缓解方法，用于重新分割可用的 KGQA 数据集，使其适用于评估泛化，而无需任何成本和手动操作。我们在三个 KGQA 数据集（即 LC-QuAD、LC-QuAD 2.0 和 QALD-9）上测试我们的假设。对重新分割的 KGQA 数据集进行的实验证明了其泛化能力的有效性。代码和访问 18 个可用数据集的统一方式位于 https://github.com/semantic-systems/KGQA-datasets 以及 https://github.com/semantic-systems/KGQA-datasets-generalization。

AI.tldr: 本文分析知识图谱问答数据集的泛化能力问题，并提出一种无需成本的重新划分数据集的方法以提升其适用性。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱问答方法因数据集的独立同分布假设导致泛化能力不足，且多数数据集过时或无法支持未来研究需求。
AI.method: 提出通过重新划分现有数据集的训练/测试集划分方式，无需人工干预或生成新数据集，以评估模型在不同泛化场景下的表现。
AI.result: 在LC-QuAD、LC-QuAD 2.0和QALD-9数据集上验证了方法有效性，证明重新划分后数据集能更好评估模型的组合性和零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 现有数据集可通过重新划分提升泛化评估能力，为资源有限的研究团队提供了低成本解决方案，同时呼吁关注数据集的时效性与适用性。

authors_text: Wentao Huang,Haizhang Zhang
title: Convergence Analysis of Deep Residual Networks
title_zh: 深度残差网络的收敛性分析
abstract: Various powerful deep neural network architectures have made great contribution to the exciting successes of deep learning in the past two decades. Among them, deep Residual Networks (ResNets) are of particular importance because they demonstrated great usefulness in computer vision by winning the first place in many deep learning competitions. Also, ResNets were the first class of neural networks in the development history of deep learning that are really deep. It is of mathematical interest and practical meaning to understand the convergence of deep ResNets. We aim at characterizing the convergence of deep ResNets as the depth tends to infinity in terms of the parameters of the networks. Toward this purpose, we first give a matrix-vector description of general deep neural networks with shortcut connections and formulate an explicit expression for the networks by using the notions of activation domains and activation matrices. The convergence is then reduced to the convergence of two series involving infinite products of non-square matrices. By studying the two series, we establish a sufficient condition for pointwise convergence of ResNets. Our result is able to give justification for the design of ResNets. We also conduct experiments on benchmark machine learning data to verify our results.
summary: Various powerful deep neural network architectures have made great contribution to the exciting successes of deep learning in the past two decades. Among them, deep Residual Networks (ResNets) are of particular importance because they demonstrated great usefulness in computer vision by winning the first place in many deep learning competitions. Also, ResNets were the first class of neural networks in the development history of deep learning that are really deep. It is of mathematical interest and practical meaning to understand the convergence of deep ResNets. We aim at characterizing the convergence of deep ResNets as the depth tends to infinity in terms of the parameters of the networks. Toward this purpose, we first give a matrix-vector description of general deep neural networks with shortcut connections and formulate an explicit expression for the networks by using the notions of activation domains and activation matrices. The convergence is then reduced to the convergence of two series involving infinite products of non-square matrices. By studying the two series, we establish a sufficient condition for pointwise convergence of ResNets. Our result is able to give justification for the design of ResNets. We also conduct experiments on benchmark machine learning data to verify our results.
abstract_zh: 过去二十年来，各种强大的深度神经网络架构为深度学习令人兴奋的成功做出了巨大贡献。其中，深度残差网络（ResNets）尤为重要，因为它们在许多深度学习竞赛中获得第一名，展示了在计算机视觉方面的巨大用处。此外，ResNets 是深度学习发展史上第一类真正深度的神经网络。理解深度 ResNet 的收敛性具有数学意义和实际意义。我们的目标是表征深度 ResNet 的收敛性，因为网络参数的深度趋于无穷大。为此，我们首先给出具有快捷连接的一般深度神经网络的矩阵向量描述，并使用激活域和激活矩阵的概念为网络制定显式表达式。然后，收敛性被简化为涉及非方阵的无限乘积的两个级数的收敛性。通过研究这两个序列，我们为 ResNet 的逐点收敛建立了充分条件。我们的结果能够为 ResNet 的设计提供理由。我们还对基准机器学习数据进行实验来验证我们的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了深度残差网络（ResNets）在深度趋于无穷时的收敛性，通过数学方法和实验验证其设计合理性。
AI.motivation: ResNets在计算机视觉中表现优异且深度极大，但其收敛性缺乏理论支持，理解其收敛性对设计更优网络具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过矩阵-向量描述残差网络，利用激活域和激活矩阵构建显式表达式，将收敛性问题转化为无限非方阵乘积的级数分析。
AI.result: 建立了ResNets逐点收敛的充分条件，并通过基准数据实验验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为ResNets的设计提供了理论依据，揭示了其深度增加时的收敛特性，同时实验验证了理论的正确性。

search_text: Convergence Analysis of Deep Residual Networks 深度残差网络的收敛性分析 Various powerful deep neural network architectures have made great contribution to the exciting successes of deep learning in the past two decades. Among them, deep Residual Networks (ResNets) are of particular importance because they demonstrated great usefulness in computer vision by winning the first place in many deep learning competitions. Also, ResNets were the first class of neural networks in the development history of deep learning that are really deep. It is of mathematical interest and practical meaning to understand the convergence of deep ResNets. We aim at characterizing the convergence of deep ResNets as the depth tends to infinity in terms of the parameters of the networks. Toward this purpose, we first give a matrix-vector description of general deep neural networks with shortcut connections and formulate an explicit expression for the networks by using the notions of activation domains and activation matrices. The convergence is then reduced to the convergence of two series involving infinite products of non-square matrices. By studying the two series, we establish a sufficient condition for pointwise convergence of ResNets. Our result is able to give justification for the design of ResNets. We also conduct experiments on benchmark machine learning data to verify our results. 过去二十年来，各种强大的深度神经网络架构为深度学习令人兴奋的成功做出了巨大贡献。其中，深度残差网络（ResNets）尤为重要，因为它们在许多深度学习竞赛中获得第一名，展示了在计算机视觉方面的巨大用处。此外，ResNets 是深度学习发展史上第一类真正深度的神经网络。理解深度 ResNet 的收敛性具有数学意义和实际意义。我们的目标是表征深度 ResNet 的收敛性，因为网络参数的深度趋于无穷大。为此，我们首先给出具有快捷连接的一般深度神经网络的矩阵向量描述，并使用激活域和激活矩阵的概念为网络制定显式表达式。然后，收敛性被简化为涉及非方阵的无限乘积的两个级数的收敛性。通过研究这两个序列，我们为 ResNet 的逐点收敛建立了充分条件。我们的结果能够为 ResNet 的设计提供理由。我们还对基准机器学习数据进行实验来验证我们的结果。 本文分析了深度残差网络（ResNets）在深度趋于无穷时的收敛性，通过数学方法和实验验证其设计合理性。 Wentao Huang,Haizhang Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI,math.FA

authors_text: Chaoqin Huang,Qinwei Xu,Yanfeng Wang,Yu Wang,Ya Zhang
title: Self-Supervised Masking for Unsupervised Anomaly Detection and Localization
title_zh: 用于无监督异常检测和定位的自监督屏蔽
comment: Transaction on Multimedia 2022
comments: Transaction on Multimedia 2022
abstract: Recently, anomaly detection and localization in multimedia data have received significant attention among the machine learning community. In real-world applications such as medical diagnosis and industrial defect detection, anomalies only present in a fraction of the images. To extend the reconstruction-based anomaly detection architecture to the localized anomalies, we propose a self-supervised learning approach through random masking and then restoring, named Self-Supervised Masking (SSM) for unsupervised anomaly detection and localization. SSM not only enhances the training of the inpainting network but also leads to great improvement in the efficiency of mask prediction at inference. Through random masking, each image is augmented into a diverse set of training triplets, thus enabling the autoencoder to learn to reconstruct with masks of various sizes and shapes during training. To improve the efficiency and effectiveness of anomaly detection and localization at inference, we propose a novel progressive mask refinement approach that progressively uncovers the normal regions and finally locates the anomalous regions. The proposed SSM method outperforms several state-of-the-arts for both anomaly detection and anomaly localization, achieving 98.3% AUC on Retinal-OCT and 93.9% AUC on MVTec AD, respectively.
summary: Recently, anomaly detection and localization in multimedia data have received significant attention among the machine learning community. In real-world applications such as medical diagnosis and industrial defect detection, anomalies only present in a fraction of the images. To extend the reconstruction-based anomaly detection architecture to the localized anomalies, we propose a self-supervised learning approach through random masking and then restoring, named Self-Supervised Masking (SSM) for unsupervised anomaly detection and localization. SSM not only enhances the training of the inpainting network but also leads to great improvement in the efficiency of mask prediction at inference. Through random masking, each image is augmented into a diverse set of training triplets, thus enabling the autoencoder to learn to reconstruct with masks of various sizes and shapes during training. To improve the efficiency and effectiveness of anomaly detection and localization at inference, we propose a novel progressive mask refinement approach that progressively uncovers the normal regions and finally locates the anomalous regions. The proposed SSM method outperforms several state-of-the-arts for both anomaly detection and anomaly localization, achieving 98.3% AUC on Retinal-OCT and 93.9% AUC on MVTec AD, respectively.
abstract_zh: 最近，多媒体数据中的异常检测和定位受到了机器学习界的广泛关注。在医学诊断和工业缺陷检测等现实应用中，异常仅出现在一小部分图像中。为了将基于重建的异常检测架构扩展到局部异常，我们提出了一种通过随机屏蔽然后恢复的自监督学习方法，称为自监督屏蔽（SSM），用于无监督异常检测和定位。 SSM不仅增强了修复网络的训练，而且还大大提高了推理时掩模预测的效率。通过随机掩码，每个图像都被增强为一组不同的训练三元组，从而使自动编码器能够在训练期间学习使用各种大小和形状的掩码进行重建。为了提高推理时异常检测和定位的效率和有效性，我们提出了一种新颖的渐进掩模细化方法，该方法逐步发现正常区域并最终定位异常区域。所提出的 SSM 方法在异常检测和异常定位方面均优于多种最先进的方法，在 Retinal-OCT 上分别实现了 98.3% AUC，在 MVTec AD 上分别实现了 93.9% AUC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SSM的自监督遮罩方法，用于无监督异常检测与定位。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中异常仅出现在少量图像中，传统重建方法难以高效处理局部异常，需改进检测与定位效率。
AI.method: 通过随机遮罩与恢复训练修复网络，并提出渐进式遮罩细化方法，逐步定位异常区域。
AI.result: 在Retinal-OCT和MVTec AD数据集上分别达到98.3%和93.9%的AUC，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SSM通过自监督学习和渐进细化有效提升了异常检测与定位性能，实验结果验证了其优越性。

authors_text: Alan F. T. Winfield,Anouk van Maris,Pericle Salvini,Marina Jirotka
title: An Ethical Black Box for Social Robots: a draft Open Standard
title_zh: 社交机器人的道德黑匣子：开放标准草案
comment: Submitted to the International Conference on Robot Ethics and Standards (ICRES 2022)
comments: Submitted to the International Conference on Robot Ethics and Standards (ICRES 2022)
abstract: This paper introduces a draft open standard for the robot equivalent of an aircraft flight data recorder, which we call an ethical black box. This is a device, or software module, capable of securely recording operational data (sensor, actuator and control decisions) for a social robot, in order to support the investigation of accidents or near-miss incidents. The open standard, presented as an annex to this paper, is offered as a first draft for discussion within the robot ethics community. Our intention is to publish further drafts following feedback, in the hope that the standard will become a useful reference for social robot designers, operators and robot accident/incident investigators.
summary: This paper introduces a draft open standard for the robot equivalent of an aircraft flight data recorder, which we call an ethical black box. This is a device, or software module, capable of securely recording operational data (sensor, actuator and control decisions) for a social robot, in order to support the investigation of accidents or near-miss incidents. The open standard, presented as an annex to this paper, is offered as a first draft for discussion within the robot ethics community. Our intention is to publish further drafts following feedback, in the hope that the standard will become a useful reference for social robot designers, operators and robot accident/incident investigators.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了相当于飞机飞行数据记录器的机器人的开放标准草案，我们称之为道德黑匣子。这是一种设备或软件模块，能够安全地记录社交机器人的操作数据（传感器、执行器和控制决策），以支持事故或未遂事件的调查。作为本文附件的开放标准作为初稿提供给机器人伦理界进行讨论。我们的目的是根据反馈发布进一步的草案，希望该标准能为社交机器人设计者、操作者和机器人事故/事件调查人员提供有用的参考。

AI.tldr: 提出社交机器人伦理黑匣子的开放标准草案，用于安全记录操作数据以支持事故调查
AI.motivation: 社交机器人事故调查缺乏数据记录机制，需建立标准化伦理黑匣子以提升透明度和安全性
AI.method: 开发可安全记录传感器、执行器及控制决策数据的设备或软件模块，并制定开放标准草案
AI.result: 发布伦理黑匣子开放标准初稿，为后续修订和行业应用奠定基础
AI.conclusion: 伦理黑匣子标准草案将推动机器人伦理实践，需持续优化以实现行业广泛采纳
